C: 白厄与万敌谈论在「纷争」试炼中的见闻。白厄遭遇毁灭哀丽秘榭、杀死<color=#f29e38ff>昔涟</color>的凶手，与之交战，并记下对方的面具、巨剑与黑色斗篷。
E: Phainon and Mydei exchanged stories from their experiences in the trial of "Strife". Phainon had confronted the one who annihilated the Aedes Elysiae, also the killer of <color=#f29e38ff>Cyrene</color>. As they clashed, he noted that person's mask, greatsword, and black cloak.

C: 命运的箴言揭示：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始。」</color>昔涟与「记忆的花」约好，将笔、书、名字一并送出。启程吧，冲破监牢，追上流星，与「天外的救世主」一同，在故事的最后一页种下无垠花海，写就《如我所书》的诗篇。
E: The maxim of fate was revealed: "You shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning." Cyrene made a promise with the Flower of Memory to offer her pen, book, and name. Set forth, break free from the prison, chase after the shooting star, and together with the Deliverer from Beyond the Sky, plant a sea of flowers on the final page of the story, to compose the verses of As I've Written.

C: 银枝会高喊「纯美的女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双」，跃入猩红长夜。在保证列车安全离开后，银枝会自寻出路，平安脱险。
E: Argenti would shout: "Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all" before leaping into the crimson night. After ensuring the Express's safe departure, Argenti would find his own way out and escape to safety.

C: 三月准备就绪，穷观阵准备启动。
E: March prepared herself, and the Matrix of Prescience was ready to begin.

C: 你将信送交给丹恒，然而丹恒似乎也不清楚这封信的含义。
E: You delivered the letter to Dan Heng, but even he seemed unsure of its meaning.

C: 鳞渊境中，景元与罗刹正进行言语交锋。景元质疑罗刹自首的行为，列举罗刹的过往事迹，并提到罗刹有个拗口的名字。而罗刹则借景谈起「云上五骁」，并指出景元带他来此的目的：谈论他的师父镜流。
E: In the Scalegorge Waterscape, Jing Yuan and Luocha engaged in a verbal duel. Jing Yuan questioned Luocha's motives of turning himself in, listing his past deeds and even his other tongue-twisting name. Luocha, in turn, steered the conversation to the High-Cloud Quintet, pointing out Jing Yuan's true purpose for bringing him here was to discuss his master, Jingliu.

C: 尾巴坦露自己被寒鸦封印一事，并同意附身藿藿，吞噬她体内另一岁阳。
E: Tail admitted that they had been sealed away by Hanya and agreed to possess Huohuo to consume the other heliobus inside her.

C: 你和三月七捉到虎克。这位「鼹鼠党的老大」展现出非凡的觉悟，要打要罚，随你们处置。
E: In the actual round, you and March 7th caught Hook again. Proving herself a fearless "boss of The Moles," she boldly told you to punish her as you saw fit.

C: 景元称卡芙卡潜藏仙舟，意欲劫救同伴。景元请你们协助捉拿卡芙卡，一来洗清嫌疑，二来获知星核猎手的真实目的。你们答应协助。
E: Jing Yuan claimed that Kafka was hiding undercover aboard the Xianzhou to save her comrade. He enlisted your aid in capturing Kafka to clear your suspicions and to ascertain the real motives of the Stellaron Hunters. You agreed.

C: 列车抵达匹诺康尼，你从奇怪的梦中醒来，和帕姆讲述了噩梦的事，帕姆提醒你注意忆质的影响。
E: As the Express arrived at Penacony, you woke from your strange dream. You told Pom-Pom about your nightmare, and Pom-Pom reminded you to mind the effects of memoria.

C: 桑博带你与流萤回到梦境贩售店。以桑博昨晚的梦为原型，爱德华医生据此为你定制可重复体验的个性化梦泡。
E: Sampo led you and Firefly back to the Dreamscape Sales Store. Using a dream Sampo had last night as a prototype, Dr. Edward created a personalized dream bubble that you can repeatedly experience.

C: 你被吸入电视机，变成了「小小哈努」，按设定只能发出很酷的*哼*。桑博称你必须在完成挑战后再次触碰电视机，才能变回原形。
E: You were drawn into the television and turned into a Lil' Hanu, and found yourself only able to let out a cool "hmph" grunt by design. Sampo said that you must complete the challenge before touching the television to return to your original form.

C: 你将「信任的证明」交给「莎塔娜」，成功团结起众垃圾桶。「莎塔娜」将护送你前往王座「造物之筑」，见证垃圾桶一族的未来。
E: You handed the Proofs of Trust to Shatana and successfully united the trashcans. She escorted you to the "Pillars of Creation" where the throne awaits to witness the future of the trashcans.

C: 你感觉到自己的思绪被回旋的水流扰动，窒息感自内而外将你淹没。在无边际的黑暗中，你聆听到流萤的低语与轻叹。
E: You felt your thoughts disturbed by the swirling waters, and suffered a suffocation that consumed you from the inside out. In the boundless darkness, you heard Firefly's whispers and sighs.

C: 黑天鹅担保这段记忆的真实性，砂金提议以他个人的名义与星穹列车合作。砂金无意争夺遗产，只想完成为公司收复匹诺康尼的工作。
E: Black Swan confirmed the authenticity of that segment of memory, and Aventurine asked to personally collaborate with the Astral Express. He had no intentions of fighting for the Legacy, and merely wanted to complete his job of reclaiming Penacony for the IPC.

C: 黄泉与瓦尔特抵达朝露公馆。出乎黄泉意料的是，一路上没有遭遇到任何守卫阻拦。
E: Acheron and Welt arrived at Dewlight Pavilion. To Acheron's surprise, they were not halted by any guards along the way.

C: 「知更鸟」慰问封锁影视乐园的两位猎犬家系成员，感谢其为维持梦境秩序的努力。作为礼物，「知更鸟」送给他们每人一个按钮。
E: "Robin" visited the two Bloodhound Family members guarding the blocked-off Theme Park and thanked them for their efforts in maintaining order within the dreamscape. As a gift, "Robin" gave each of them a button.

C: 列车组决意继承遗志，推开梦之终点之门，迎向「开拓」的未来。
E: The Express Crew resolved to carry on the legacy, pushing open the door at the end of the dream and stepping toward a future of the Trailblaze.

C: 黄泉与黑天鹅揭示梦境真实本质，你的经历皆源于「秩序」塑造的幻梦世界。
E: Acheron and Black Swan revealed the true essence of the Dreamscape. All your experiences on Penacony were from the dream world created by the Order.

C: 你在舒翁酒吧中调制特饮，用以缅怀逝者，寄托离别心情。
E: You concocted a special drink in Siobhan's lounge to commemorate the dead and express your feelings of parting.

C: 你找到「捕头」娃娃，它正沉迷于扮演一颗炸弹。你发现它确实只是玩具，只不过内部装了遥控小音响。
E: You found the "Constable" Doll, which was obsessed with pretending to be a bomb. You discovered it was really just a toy with a small remote-controlled speaker inside.

C: 乱破负责念颂旁白，认为谐乐蕉师也会在这课堂上露出马脚。丹恒注意到芮克先生尝试控制教学走向，他似乎也有所发现。
E: Rappa took charge as the Narrator, believing that Charmony BananAdvisor would slip up during this class. Dan Heng noticed Mr. Reca trying to control the direction of the lesson — he seemed to have discovered something too.

C: 你操控「扎格列斯之手」配平天秤失败，泰坦之声令人不快。
E: You failed again to balance the scales with the Hand of Zagreus, making the Titan's voice sound even more displeased.

C: 阿格莱雅与元老凯妮斯交谈，后者威胁阿格莱雅不要做出僭越之举，否则将受到元老会议的审判。在缺乏元老院支持的情况下，阿格莱雅自行探查圣城中的「渗透」，并让缇宝为抵御来袭的「天谴之锋」做好准备，以期挫败尼卡多利的阴谋。
E: Aglaea was engaged in a tense conversation with Elder Caenis, who warned her against overstepping her bounds, threatening judgment by the Council of Elders should she act without sanction. With no backing from the Council, Aglaea began investigating on her own those who had "infiltrated" the holy city. She also instructed Tribbie to prepare for the coming assault by the Blade of Fury, hoping to thwart Nikador's schemes before they could unfold.

C: 你与遐蝶遇见一位沉默的斗士。斗士既不是来参加竞赛，也不为尼卡多利的祭典而来，没有向你们提供任何信息。
E: You and Castorice encountered a silent warrior. He had come neither to join the competition nor to attend Nikador's festival, and he offered you no answers.

C: 你们进入试炼场地，然而没有遇到敌人。遐蝶注意到场地中的预言算碑，也许你们需要先解开谜题。
E: You entered the trial grounds with Castorice and Gnaeus, but no enemies awaited you. Instead, Castorice spotted the Prophecy Tablet nestled within the arena. It seemed that solving its riddle was the key to advancing.

C: 你与遐蝶向商人询问情况，得知缇安所看中的是一块火山玻璃。遐蝶当即决定将其买下，打算将其缝装到羊毛毡里，作为给缇安的礼物。
E: You and Castorice asked the merchant about the item, learning that what Trianne wanted was a piece of volcanic glass. Without hesitation, Castorice bought it, intending to stitch the piece into felted wool as a gift for Trianne.

C: 你终于赶到迷迷身边，毫不犹豫地开与怪物展开战斗。
E: At last, you reached Mem and leapt into battle without hesitation.

C: 你们看到一处用于占卜的「雅努斯迷津」，缇宁称其充当此地的门锁。<color=#f29e38ff>按照提前设计好的路径，让石球落入池中两次就好。</color>
E: You saw a divinatory Janus' Maze, and Trinnon explained that it was also used as a door lock for this place. <color=#f29e38ff>Just follow the designated path and let the stone ball fall into the pool twice.</color>

C: 阿格莱雅祝贺你从「岁月」试炼中归来，她会设法让赛飞儿助你寻找「死亡」。与此同时，金丝捎来消息，那刻夏正与元老院接触，
E: Aglaea congratulated you on your return from Oronyx's trial. She promised to get Cipher to help you seek "Death." At the same time, the golden threads informed Aglaea that Anaxa was meeting with the Council of Elders.

C: 你与白厄遇见克拉特鲁斯，他带领悬锋人来此牵制凯妮斯的手下。万敌传来消息，称盗火行者死灰复燃。议院传来嘘声，高呼「下台」。
E: You and Phainon met Krateros, and learned that he led some Kremnoans over to restrain Caenis's subordinates. Mydei also sent news, saying, "Watch out. The Flame Reaver is back." You heard cries from the stage, calling for the speaker to "Get off!" and "Scram!"

C: 工程已毕，阿蒙内特的亡魂于此显现。为了保护遐蝶，阿蒙内特缄守关于斯缇科西亚的往事，而少女如今已经知悉自己的过去。
E: With the ritual completed, Amunet's soul appeared before Castorice. She had concealed Castorice's past in Styxia to protect her, but by now, Castorice already knew her own story.

C: 黑天鹅推测三月七的记忆遭到劫持。她向姬子坦白，调查翁法罗斯是为了阻止极端忆庭组织私藏世界。此时，「记忆」瞥视翁法罗斯。
E: Meanwhile, on the Astral Express, Black Swan speculated that March 7th's memories had been hijacked. She admitted to Himeko that her reason for investigating Amphoreus was to prevent Memokeeper extremists from concealing Amphoreus in the Garden of Recollection's mirror for their own ends. At that moment, the gaze of the Remembrance swept across Amphoreus.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯打开欧洛尼斯的灯塔，将光圈锁定在赛飞儿身上，以此帮助她蹚过河面。
E: "Spirithief" Bartholos opened Oronyx's lighthouse, placing a circle of light around Cipher to help her cross the river.

C: 阿格莱雅救助受伤的赛飞儿。赛飞儿觉得自己愧对黄金裔身份，总在做卑劣的事情。但阿格莱雅给予她发自内心的信任，邀其留在身边。
E: In the past, Aglaea rescued a wounded Cipher. Cipher felt ashamed of herself, for being a Chrysos Heir, yet constantly bringing shame to them with her deeds. However, Aglaea had placed her trust in Cipher anyway, and invited her to stay by her side.

C: 阿格莱雅留下遗言，坦承为清除圣城暗处的威胁而自毁设局，将守护翁法罗斯的使命托付白厄。白厄接过领袖重任，将以演讲团结公民。
E: In her final words, Aglaea admitted that she had destroyed herself to eliminate the threats lurking in the shadows of the Holy City. She entrusted Amphoreus's protection to Phainon, who accepted his responsibility, and left to address the citizens.

C: 你们来到穹顶，众多受黑潮侵蚀的士兵在此聚集，在风堇阅读长眠于此的记忆前，你们仍有一场恶战。
E: You arrived at the dome where many soldiers corrupted by the black tide gathered. Before Hyacine read the memories slumbering in this place, you had a fierce battle to complete.

C: 一名黄金裔向塞涅俄丝乞怜。她为懦弱辩护，称坚韧亦是凡人的品德。若得逃生，她会让后代传颂塞涅俄丝的史诗，直至有人重返天空。
E: A Chrysos Heir begged for mercy from Seliose. She defended her cowardice, asserting that tenacity was also a mortal virtue. If allowed to escape, she swore to make her descendants sing praises of Seliose's tale until someone returned to reclaim the Sky.

C: 凯妮斯向刻法勒跪地祈祷，白厄决定惩罚其见证黄金裔完成使命。你们无视凯妮斯声称的「火种失踪」，尝试开启火种匣，
E: Caenis knelt in prayer to Kephale, but Phainon chose to punish her for witnessing the Chrysos Heir fulfill their mission. You disregarded Caenis's claim that the Coreflame had vanished, and attempted to open the Coreflame Casket.

C: 白厄与你告别，<color=#f29e38ff>将「救世主」的名号交予你</color>。面对来古士的质疑，白厄指出来古士才是被束缚的囚徒、神的奴隶。
E: Phainon bid you farewell, and <color=#f29e38ff>bestowed upon you the title of "Deliverer."</color> Facing Lygus's rebuke, Phainon retorted that Lygus was the bound prisoner, the slave to the gods.

C: 实验记录：对象卡厄斯兰那对权杖内核层发动攻击失败。对象心智函数部分损毁，并有不可逆风险。
E: Experiment Log: Subject Khaslana failed to breach the scepter's core layer. Partial cognitive function damaged. Irreversible risk detected.

C: 你接受「匹诺康尼圣杯战争」的采访，在此遇到桑博和虎克。作为被选中参与「圣杯战争」的资格证明，你的手上出现「令咒」。
E: You gave an interview for the Penaconian Holy Grail War, where you ran into Sampo and Hook. A set of Command Spells appeared on your hand as proof of you being picked as a chosen contestant of the Holy Grail War.

C: 斯科特不是你的对手，选择撤退。
E: Outmatched by you, Skott chose to retreat.

C: 你中了斯科特的埋伏，踏入陷阱，被惊梦剧团包围。是斯科特的从者葛瑞迪对你发起了攻击。
E: You fell into Skott's trap and were ambushed by the Dreamjolt Troupe. It was an attack by Grady, Skott's Servant.

C: 你们在酒店深处遇到由斯科特化身的庞大恶灵军团。斯科特扬言要让你将他失去的一切千倍奉还，不由分说地发起进攻。
E: Deep in the hotel, you ran into a huge army of evil spirits that Skott turned into. Skott swore to make you repay everything you took from him thousand-fold, and charged without warning.

C: 黑塔发现，来古士曾引爆一颗星核来将权杖改造成「毁灭」迭代的中继器。名为「德谬歌」的生命形态，正是权杖原本的演算目标。
E: Herta discovered that Lygus detonated a Stellaron to refashion the Scepter into a relay for Destruction to iterate. The life form known as "Demiurge" was the Scepter's original extrapolation target.

C: 昔涟讲述每一世的逐火之旅，其内容被权杖系统记录归档。「记忆的种子」从中学习，逐渐成长。
E: Cyrene recounted the Flame-Chase Journey of every lifetime, and its content was recorded and archived by the Scepter System. The "Seed of Memory" learned and gradually grew from this content.

C: 你与阿兰看到被怪物袭击的阿德勒，立即前去支援解救。
E: You and Arlan spotted Adler being attacked by monsters and rushed to help.

C: 小贩称自己在案发时间去镇上进货了，指认厨子为偷窃案的真凶。
E: The merchant claimed he was in town restocking supplies at the time of the incident and accused the cook of being the real thief.

C: 在你的陪同下，虎克将被叫作「菌菌」的大熊玩偶交给娜塔莎。
E: With you accompanying, Hook handed over the big teddy bear called "Junjun" to Natasha.

C: 惊恐的难民向你们求救，称许多居民被怪物围困在矿区。杰帕德当即率领银鬃铁卫前往搜救，磐岩镇的防御工事则由「地火」进行组织。
E: Terrified refugees begged you for help, saying many residents were trapped by monsters in the mining area. Gepard immediately led the Silvermane Guards to conduct a search and rescue, while Wildfire organized the defensive fortifications of Boulder Town.

C: 你在机械屋外听到朗道姐弟的交谈。杰帕德为玲可的不愿意沟通而感到着急，希露瓦认为有你帮忙，情况一定能改善。
E: Outside the workshop, you overheard the Landau siblings talking. Gepard was worried about Lynx's unwillingness to communicate, while Serval believed that with your help, things would surely improve.

C: 看完了彦卿的「示迹玉扣」，你们决定将它交到景元手中。
E: After reviewing Yanqing's jade tracer, you decided to hand it over to Jing Yuan.

C: 云璃不想连累你，而你决定先同她一起战斗。
E: Not wanting to involve you further, Yunli tried to part ways. But you chose to stay and fight by her side.

C: 灵砂眺望古海，称她受仙舟联盟委派来清扫、重建丹鼎司。丹恒建议灵砂与罗浮持明族保持距离，彦卿建议灵砂与景元商议对策。
E: Gazing out toward the ancient sea, Lingsha explained that she had been sent by the Xianzhou Alliance to clean up and rebuild the Alchemy Commission. Dan Heng suggested that Lingsha should keep her distance from the Vidyadhara of the Luofu, while Yanqing advised her to discuss countermeasures with Jing Yuan.

C: 神秘狐人们再度折返，彦卿赶紧率领你们退后。
E: The mysterious foxians returned, and Yanqing quickly led you all to retreat.

C: 在回忆中，飞霄命令椒丘治好她的「月狂」之症。而飞霄将以此身巡征追猎，「医治」战争。
E: In a flashback, Feixiao ordered Jiaoqiu to cure her "Moon Rage" affliction. In return, Feixiao would use her strength to hunt and "cure" war itself.

C: 这道谜题的确只有唯一的答案。但青雀认为宇宙并非如谜题一般被人精心设计，命运一定存在别的选择。她提出使用更复杂的沙盘推演。
E: The puzzle indeed had just one solution. However, Qingque argued that the universe wasn't a meticulously designed puzzle, and fate surely offered alternative paths. She proposed using more sophisticated sandpit simulations.

C: 点石成金
E: The Golden Touch

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 原谅我无法对这张合影做出评价，它所承载的，比它展现出的更多。\n最后，请允许我向这位年轻的摄影师送上祝福。
E: Forgive me for not being able to comment on this group photo — what it carries is more than what it shows.\nFinally, please allow me to send my blessings to this young photographer.

C: 温和舒缓
E: Gentle

C: 星槎海中枢
E: Central Starskiff Haven

C: 丹鼎司
E: Alchemy Commission

C: 流云渡
E: Cloudford

C: 你复原了菜谱的做法。
E: You reverse engineered the dish's recipe.

C: 托帕带你参观了更多生态室。
E: Topaz brought you to visit more ecological rooms.

C: 你用积蓄买了一间小房子。
E: You use the savings to purchase a tiny house.

C: 舰长对你敞开了心扉。
E: The captain opens up to you.

C: 人偶们把你扔进了模拟宇宙…
E: The puppets threw you into the Simulated Universe...

C: 一条鲨鱼盯上了你们…
E: A shark has its eyes on you two...

C: 「和持明一样，都属龙脉亚种。」
E: "They are of the Draconis subspecies, same as the Vidyadhara."

C: 公司科技，震撼人心…但效果取决于价位。
E: IPC technology is astonishing... but its effectiveness depends on the price.

C: 还行，有点像是融化的星槎。
E: It's not bad, kinda like melted starskiffs.

C: 针对翁瓦克的勘察告一段落，你开始清点飞船仓库里堆积成山的植生样本。这时，角落中一盆刚刚冒芽的植物吸引了你的注意力。\n「根据公司先前的实验，这一物种会对外界刺激产生反应…？」
E: As the Vonwacq survey wraps up, you begin sorting through the mountain of plant samples in the spaceship's storage. A newly sprouted plant in the corner catches your eye.\n"According to IPC records, this species responds to external stimuli...?"

C: 法吉娜的冰海刻蚀着斯缇科西亚的长岸， 救世的英雄已来到冥河渡口，幽色的巨龙化身为冥府渡船。 冥河沿途的亡魂化作甜蜜的低语，劝告英雄不必重返世间。 「你已经令那世间的泰坦们臣服，将伟业留于你的传承者们如何？」 听罢这番话，哀伤的救世主痛心疾首地答道： 「沉沦于此的死者，你从未考虑过，我那救世的愿望胜过团聚的心。」 在渡船之上，救世主回想起逐火旅程的一幕幕过往， 「再见了，『死亡』的塞纳托斯， 我祈盼你能照顾好我最好的朋友们，哪怕他们从未畏惧死亡。」 救世主抚摸着麂皮护手，仍然留有故友们的温度， 从那开满安提宁花的海岸，乘着温暖湿润的西风，吹向人间。 「瑟希斯，请你捍卫我的理性，让我不必再蓦然回首。」 那起死回生的经历，足以向任何人证明其英雄的资质。 「不会再漫长了，我的黄金裔伙伴们，我将兑现那不被磨灭的誓言。」 吉奥里亚的大地迎来了{F#她}{M#他}的回归，逐火的旅途继续。 就像乌云散去的黑夜，启明之星再次闪烁。
E: Phagousa's freezing seas engraved the vast shores of Styxia, and the hero of deliverance has arrived at the crossing of the River of Souls, where a ghostly pale dragon transformed into a ferry to the netherworld. Along the River of Souls, the spirits of the dead morph into sweet whispers, urging the hero to never return to the mortal realm. "You have subjugated the Titans of that world. Why not leave your legacy to successors?" Hearing these words, the sorrowful Deliverer replied in anguish: "O fallen souls who linger here, you've never considered how my desire to save the world outweighs my longing for reunion." Aboard the ferry, the Deliverer recalled memories of {F#her}{M#his} Flame-Chase journey, "Farewell, Thanatos of Death, I pray you'll watch over my dearest friends, even though they never feared death." The Deliverer caressed {F#her}{M#his} deerskin gauntlets, that still held the warmth of their fallen comrades. {F#She}{M#He} drifted with the warm and humid west wind, from the shores blooming with Antila flowers to the mortal realm. "Cerces, please defend my rationality, so I need not face another shocking discovery." That experience of reviving from the dead was enough to prove to anyone that {F#she}{M#he} had the makings of a hero. "The wait won't be long now, my fellow Chrysos Heirs. I shall fulfill that unforgettable oath." The lands of Georios welcomed {F#her}{M#his} return, as the Flame-Chase journey continued. Like dark clouds parting in the night, the morning star shall sparkle once more.

C: 秩序星神
E: Aeon of Order

C: ……「存护」克里珀，与「贪饕」奥博洛斯同为宇宙中已知最古老的星神。我曾经对祂很有兴趣，毕竟琥珀历最早的近两百纪历史几乎是一片空白。这个大石头/琥珀是什么生物？祂从哪来，如何成为星神，又干嘛孜孜不倦地筑墙？问题很多，但无处求解。公司把克里珀的信息封锁得太好了，对他们来说，琥珀王简直是真正而唯一的神，容不得半点轻慢。从公司那里，我什么有用的情报都没拿到。相比之下，博识学会对「存护」就没什么敬畏……
E: ...Qlipoth the Preservation is the oldest known Aeon in the universe alongside Oroboros the Voracity. I was once very interested in Qlipoth, as the first two centuries in the Amber Era were almost completely blank. What creature is this giant rock/amber? Where did THEY come from? How did THEY become an Aeon? And why are THEY tirelessly making a wall? There are many questions surrounding THEM, but the answers are nowhere to be found. The IPC is doing too good of a job keeping Qlipoth's information a secret. These people regard the Amber Lord as the one true god and allow not even the smallest transgression towards the Aeon. I didn't get any useful information out of the IPC. In contrast, the Intelligentsia Guild has a lot less respect for the Preservation...

C: ……学会关于药师是善神还是恶神的争论很多，在我看来完全是吃饱了撑的。拿我们狭隘的善恶观去套星神这种还没弄明白的存在，稍微对宇宙有点儿敬畏的人都干不出这事。个人而言，我对药师的态度非常开放：尽管我会帮助仙舟联盟处理丰饶孽物，却也不妨碍我发自真心地崇敬药师：这孤独而浪漫的存在。祂漫行在宇宙间，身后有「巡猎」与联盟不断追逐，发誓要把祂彻底消灭……尽管如此，祂仍然孜孜不倦地点化一个又一个世界。据我所知，「丰饶」从来没有夺走过哪怕一条性命，虽然多数时候，与祂接触过的生命会陷入生不如死的窘境……
E: ...There is a lot of debate in the Guild about whether Yaoshi is good or evil, and I think that's just people having too much time on their hands. Anyone with the slightest respect for the universe wouldn't apply our narrow definitions of good and evil to incomprehensible existences such as Aeons. Personally, I have an open mind when it comes to Yaoshi — I will help the Xianzhou Alliance to sort out the Abominations of Abundance, but it won't stop me from genuinely admiring Yaoshi as a lonely and romantic existence. THEY travel between the universes with The Hunt and the Alliance in hot pursuit, both of which have sworn to destroy THEM... And yet THEY continue to bring enlightenment to world after world. I understand that the Abundance had never taken a single life, even though those THEY come into contact with often end up with a fate worse than death...

C: ……如果祂仅仅热爱玩弄世人也就罢了，阿哈这个怪物最可怕的一点是：只要有乐子，祂连星神都不放过。结交星穹列车之后，我从他们的智库里弄到了一大批极有价值的资料，里面有克里珀、末王、太一、希佩等多个星神的近距离接触情报，然后，不出所料的，阿哈也在里面掺了一脚，但方式远远超过我的想象——这家伙想捉弄阿基维利和祂的无名客，因此变成一个凡人，在阿基维利的列车上足足潜伏了一年多，最后终于逮到机会，把半辆列车和一颗星球炸成了粉末。如果我是阿基维利，恐怕连弄死祂的心都有了，可惜我不是，我永远也不能理解星神在想什么……
E: ...It'd be one thing if THEY only reveled in toying with mortals. The worst thing about this monster named Aha is that THEY won't even spare other Aeons as long as there's fun to be had. I obtained a large amount of valuable info from the Astral Express' data bank after I got to know the Express crew, including intel on close encounters between many Aeons such as Qlipoth, Terminus, Ena, and Xipe. Unsurprisingly, Aha was also involved in these interactions between Aeons, but in a way that far exceeded my imagination — Aha wanted to trick Akivili and the Nameless, so Aha shapeshifted into a human and laid low on Akivili's Express for more than a year, then finally got the opportunity and blew up half the Express and an entire planet. If I were Akivili, I'd have wanted to kill Aha. Pity I'm not an Aeon, and I can never figure out what THEY were thinking...

C: 某日，天才俱乐部#77迷图突发奇想，决定为银河教育事业添上一笔。她用简易力场在克莱因瓶中编织了包括微型虫洞、虚数亚空间场在内的复数空间结构，希望通过这一益智玩具为全宇宙的孩童打开物理世界的大门。这一杰作不出意外迎来了惨烈的滞销，显然迷图认知中的学前教育和大众相比存在着不小的差异。这说明：天才并非在每个领域都是天才。
E: One day, Genius Society #77 Puzzle suddenly wanted to add something to the Cosmic educational effort. She used a simple force field to weave multidimensional structures such as mini wormholes and Imaginary subspace fields in a Klein bottle, hoping to use this educational toy as the first stepping stone to physics for all children in the universe. As expected, this great invention was met with abysmal sales. Evidently, pre-school education as conceived by Puzzle was quite different from the general public's perception of it. This only illustrates that a genius cannot be a genius in every aspect of life.

C: 摇滚天王阿卡巴在梅洛星云开展赈灾演出时，一种水果为他带来了意想不到的灵感。这些样貌怪异的水果，被反直觉地冠以「菠萝」的名字，他将荒诞的见闻写进歌词，呼吁人们对旧世界的语言发起进攻。在他的带领下，叛逆青年们不断歪曲已有的名词，每间星际物流的保鲜库里，都塞满了难以名状的「菠萝」。直到上百个发达世界因他们改写了菠萝的定义，这场荒诞的水果摇滚运动才终于停下它的脚步。
E: When the rock king Akbar was giving a disaster relief performance in the Merlo Nebula, he was struck with sudden inspiration by a strange fruit. These strange-looking fruits had been given the absurd name "pineapple," so he wrote about his extraordinary experience in his song lyrics and called upon his fans to attack the archaic language of the old world. Under his leadership, the rebellious youths began to endlessly twist existing nouns and filled the cold warehouses of every interstellar courier company with unimaginable "pineapples." It was only when over <unbreak>100</unbreak> developed worlds changed the definition of the word "pineapple" due to the fans that this wild, fruit-inspired rock and roll movement finally stopped in its tracks.

C: 尽管「终末」不稳定的呓语总让厄兆先锋头晕目眩，但他们那双预见未来的眼睛，仍是自有机生命诞生以来便长久渴求的奇迹。在一位骇客朋友的协助下，厄兆先锋恩汀将神的恩赐短暂迁移到目镜中，令使用者的目光也能投射到不远的将来。一无所知的骇客在他的坏笑里戴上复眼，视线跃迁至一个琥珀纪后的朋克洛德。他看到了那款让万千骇客翘首以盼的游戏，上面写着一行大字：「即将发售」。对骇客而言，这何尝不是一种末日？
E: Though the Finality's fluctuating murmurs often leave the Omen Vanguards in a state of wracked dizziness, their clairvoyant eyes remain a miracle that organic life has coveted since their birth. With the aid of a hacker friend, the Omen Vanguard Endin briefly transferred the divine blessing into an ocular device, allowing its user's eyes to project into the near-future. The oblivious hacker puts on the device as Endin snickers and their sight leaps to the Punklord an Amber Era later. He sees the game that myriad hackers had been clamoring for, with a line of words blown up above it: "On sale soon." Is this also not a form of doomsday to a hacker?

C: 哀地里亚相信睡眠是死亡的预演，所以当地居民对睡眠质量极其重视，你在哀地里亚可以找到最舒服的被窝和枕头，以及一种神奇的助眠设备。这种设备可以快速让人进入深度睡眠，甚至可以说是一种接近死亡状态的睡眠。不过需要注意的是，虽然该设备在治疗失眠方面有显著成效，但一定要在使用八小时后叫醒使用者，否则就只能为他准备葬礼了。
E: Aidonia believes that sleep is a rehearsal for death, so its residents place extreme importance on sleep quality. Here, you'll find the most comfortable blankets and pillows, as well as a miraculous sleep aid device. This device can quickly induce deep sleep — so deep that it's almost akin to a state of death. However, caution is advised: While highly effective in treating insomnia, the user must be awakened after eight hours. Otherwise, the only thing left to prepare will be their funeral.

C: 直觉告诉你这代码没什么问题，直觉也告诉你直觉不怎么可信。\n\n「这里好像写了个死循环，但也不是不能跑跑看……」
E: Your instincts tell you that the code should be okay, but they also tell you that your instincts can be wrong.\n\n"This here looks like an infinite loop, but we can always try to run it anyways..."

C:
狭窄的图书馆里，你慢慢地翻开书页。可它们早已被啃食，蛀虫恰恰好吃掉了约尔兰达战役的百万守军，倘若如此，他们要怎样抵抗真蛰虫的进攻？你愤怒地翻到下一个章节，涅瓦多的死亡竟成了妄语，它说他还活着，只是藏进了小行星带的阴影。

简直荒谬至极！你决定要去修复这些记忆。从泛黄的过去找到真实，把缺口填补。再剪去被曲解和虚构的章节，替它来正名。最后为破碎的书籍缝补好伤口，等到伤痕不再流血，把书卷抚平，放回到图书馆和资料库里。

你是历史的维修工，填平遗失的沟壑，将秽史都涤清。
E:
In the cramped library, you slowly leaf through the book, but the pages have been devoured by worms. The million defenders of the Battle of Yolanda happen to be ravaged by the bookworms. In that case, how could they withstand the onslaught of the True Sting? Furiously, you turn to the next chapter and find, much to your chagrin, that Nevado's death is falsely written. The chapter claims that he is still alive, and he is merely hiding in the shadows of a small asteroid belt.

That is outright absurd! You've decided to fix these memories, filling up the gaps by seeking the truth in the sepia past. Then, you will cut away the twisted and fabricated chapters to set the records straight. Finally, you mend the wounds of the tattered book and wait until the bleeding stops before you smooth the pages and put it back in the library and archives.

You are the repairman of history who fills in the missing holes and purges the tainted past.

C:
你正身处最坏的时代，星海遍布罪恶，公义荡然无存。他们说暴力并非问题的最优解，但当正义无法伸张，你绝不会犹豫是否要扣下扳机。有冤报冤，有仇报仇，这是世界基本的运转逻辑。你从恶兽的口中拔出枪管，仔细擦拭保养，将意图扩大的邪恶扼杀在萌芽之中。

追杀是你的家常便饭，围猎是你的生活甜品，为害一方的财阀视你为眼中钉，他们生怕在噩梦中惊醒时看见你的身影。肆虐寰宇的战争贩子放出豪言壮语，要将你酿成美酒洒进太空里，可真见到你的时候，又只能爬着逃离。

你要做一把悬挂在银河中央的利剑，刺向狂妄的奸邪。
E:
You are living in the worst times right now. Sin and evil are widespread throughout the stars, and justice does not prevail. They say violence is never the solution to your problems, but when the arm of righteousness is sorely absent, you will discover no hesitation in pulling the trigger. An eye for an eye, blood for blood — that is the fundamental law of nature of the world. You extract your gun chamber from the beast's maw, meticulously polishing it to maintain its pristine condition. You are on a path to vanquish evil right in its cradle as it desires to expand.

Search and destroy is your bread and butter, and hunting is your life's dessert. The moguls terrorizing their local areas see you as a thorn in their sides. They live in fear at the mere glimpse of your figure when they awake from their worst nightmares. The rampant warmongers spew proclamations to brew you into a fine wine and scatter your liquid remains across space, but when they really do face off against you, they can only slink away in cowardice.

You will become a sharpened sword that hangs over the center of the cosmos, a blade that thrusts right through the hubris of evil.

C: 什么是惊心动魄的魔术？在星际能源战争的高潮，用幕布遮掩住舰队的主力，将他们转移到敌阵的侧翼。在生死相争的时刻，同旗舰撞进爆缩的黑洞，却在另一角发起奇袭。每个把戏都容不得失败，每个骗局都只能用上一次，每个骗局都关系数万的性命。\n\n宇宙级别的演出，只有魔术师中的翘楚方能在此同台竞技。你用幕布遮掩进军的轨迹，将进攻引导向别处。或是将流溢的虚数场伪装作爆炸的残骸，误导对方减少兵力。你是骗子中的骗子，用毕生伎俩为军队打造生存的结局。
E: Just what is truly breathtaking magic? At the climax of the Interstellar Energy War, a screen was used to conceal the fleet's main force and transport them to the flank the enemy. In this crucial moment of life and death, they and the flagship crashed into a shrinking black hole only to unleash a surprise assault on the other side. There is no room for failure with such tricks, and each deceit can only be used once. Each trick connects to the fates of tens of thousands of lives.\n\nThis is a universe-level performance that only the most outstanding magicians may perform alongside each other. You use a screen to hide the traces of the army's advancement and misdirect the assault to elsewhere. Or, perhaps you disguise an overflowing imaginary field as debris from an explosion to fool your enemy into reducing their forces. You are a liar among liars, using the tricks you amassed over a lifetime to ensure a chance for survival for your forces.

C: 在「存护」的巨锤下，星体被加工为坚不可摧的墙基，而在伟力下溅起的残渣则迅速冷却，成为珍贵的天彗合金。这些克里珀敲打天彗星墙时迸射的细小碎片，在诞生之初便宣告着新一个琥珀纪的到来。几乎所有的天彗合金都被星际和平公司严加保存，只有P<unbreak>45</unbreak>以上的员工方有机会一窥它们的真容。
E: Under the colossal hammer of the Preservation, celestial bodies are processed into indestructible foundations, while the residue splattered by its immense force quickly cools, forming precious Celesticomet Alloy. These tiny shards, ejected when Qlipoth struck the Celestial Comet Wall, heralded the arrival of a new Amber Era from the moment they were created. Almost all Celesticomet Alloys are meticulously preserved by the Interastral Peace Corporation, with only employees ranked P<unbreak>45</unbreak> and above having the opportunity to catch a glimpse of their true form.

C: 行政区广场人头攒动，大半个贝洛伯格的市民都聚集到了这里。希儿强忍着自己对嘈杂人群的厌恶，用尖锐的目光扫过一张又一张面孔。 功夫不负有心人，她很快便锁定了一个目标。那个戴着灰色格纹帽的男人双手插袋，在人缝中来回穿梭，藏在阴影下的双眼狡黠地打探着四周。确认周围无人注意到他的存在以后——至少他自己如此认为——他将手伸向了身边一位妇人的挎包。 在他的指头能够触碰到挎包拉链之前，一只纤细但有力的手迅速拑住了他的腕部。窃贼差点疼得叫出声来，但希儿用另一只手捂住了他的嘴。 「别出声。」 雄浑的号角声划过天空，熙攘的人群瞬间沉默了下来。一个打扮夸张滑稽的男人冲到了高台上，用尖锐的嗓音喊出了那句话—— 「女士们先生们，请欢迎本次庆典的剪彩嘉宾——大守护者布洛妮娅•兰德女士！」 广场爆发出震耳欲聋的欢呼声。借着声浪的掩护，希儿静悄悄地将窃贼带出人群，送到了在边缘值岗的铁卫手上。她转头望向远处的高台，视线在一瞬间与身着白裙的女人相撞。大守护者对她露出了一个短促的微笑，希儿也微微点头作为回应。 然后她们分道扬镳，一个踏进灯光，一个融入阴影 ——她们终会相遇。
E: The Administrative District Plaza is a crowded place, and it's where almost half the residents of Belobog are now gathering. Suppressing her disdain for bustling crowds, Seele scans across the faces in the Plaza with her careful gaze. Her hard work pays off, and she soon locks onto a target. A man wearing a gray hat, his hands in his pockets, is scuttling back and forth through the crowds while slyly looking from side to side with a sharp expression. After confirming that nobody is watching — at least, so he thinks — the man reaches out to grab the satchel of the woman beside him. But before his fingers could reach the bag's zip, a slender but forceful hand quickly grabs his wrist. He nearly cries out with the pain, but Seele clasps her other hand over his mouth. "Not a peep from you." The majestic cry of horns resounds throughout the skies, and the bustling crowd falls silent immediately. A man in a comical outfit rushes to the podium, and shouts in a piercing voice — "Ladies and gentlemen! For the ribbon-cutting part of this ceremony, please welcome to the stage — the Supreme Guardian herself, Madam Bronya Rand!" Deafening cheers erupt from the plaza. Seele quietly pulls the pickpocket out of the crowd during the ruckus, and escorts him to the Silvermane Guards on duty. She turns to look back at the distant stage, and briefly locks eyes with the woman in the white dress. The Supreme Guardian flashes her an ever-so-brief smile, and Seele nods slightly in response. And then, they go their separate ways — one stepping into the light, the other into the shadows. — One day, they will finally meet again.

C: 第一次参加擂台赛，卢卡倒在了决赛场上。 「哈哈哈，没用的废物！这就是弱肉强食的世界——你这种货色，不配出现在我眼前！」 卢卡没有在意那份羞辱。决赛的对手是镇上出名的恶棍，出手阴狠毒辣。如果注定要靠这些阴险的路数才能夺得冠军——他心想——什么破金腰带，不要也罢。 第二天晚上，他在俱乐部的转角看到几个孩子。其中一个身形瘦小的男孩痛苦地蜷在地上，遍体鳞伤。围在他身边的大孩子们趾高气昂，神情得意。 「哈哈哈，没用的废物！」领头的恶霸指着受伤的男孩，「这就是弱肉强食的世界——你不配出现在我眼前！」 从那时起，他发誓要成为下层区的冠军——用他自己的方式，堂堂正正。
E: Luka is defeated at the final stage during the first championship he takes part in. "Hahaha, how useless! This is the world of survival of the fittest — someone as weak as you shouldn't even show yourself before me!" Luka does not mind the humiliation. His opponent for the final is an infamous thug in town known for his underhanded and cruel tactics. If I have to resort to this kind of tricks and deceit to become the champion — Luka thinks — then I'd rather never get my hands on the golden belt. Luka runs into a few children around the corner from the Fight Club the night after. A short and skinny boy is curled up on the ground, his body covered in wounds while the older children surrounding him laugh in arrogance. "Hahaha, how useless!" The leader of the bullies points at the wounded boy. "This is the world of survival of the fittest — someone as weak as you shouldn't even show yourself before me!" That is when Luka swears he will become the Underworld champion — and he will do it his own way: Fair and square.

C: 曾经的罗浮剑首，云骑军不败盛名的缔造者。\n而今其名已被抹去，成为行于魔阴边缘的仙舟叛徒。
E: Former Sword Champion of the Luofu, and the reason behind the Cloud Knights' mythical reputation of implacable might.\nNow, her name has been wiped from the records, and she is a traitor of the Xianzhou walking on the fine line between sanity and mara-struck.

C: 透明的培养仓中，她浸没在冰冷的人工羊水里，包覆于洁白的卵中。 容器摇晃，她漂浮着，凭借本能摸索到冰冷柔软的边缘。她紧紧贴着仓壁，蜷缩在角落，仿佛那样能使身体感受到更多温暖。 她听见巨物坠落，金属碰撞，急匆匆的脚步声不时响起，培养仓开始摇晃… 「战士们，该醒了……」  「为了，女皇陛下……」  一双机械手将她抱起，刺眼的光撕裂了世界。她忘记了哭泣。 「为自己的诞生感到荣耀……」 「为了，女皇陛下……」 她睁开眼，却看不见说话的人。 她起身，穿过厚厚的帷幕，朝着宫殿深处前进。 「接受你们的荣耀，你们的命运……」 「为了，女皇陛下……」 整齐的脚步声回荡在空旷的宫殿中。 她路过荒寂的巨大花园，途经庞大的虫类尸骸，穿过一个又一个孵育装置…最后，她走进了辉煌的议事厅，一个面目模糊的女人坐在王座上，疲惫地垂着手。 「别抬头。」  有人走到她身边，轻轻地说。那人身上有一个号牌，AR-26702——那是什么？ 她看向自己，AR-26710。 「过来…我的孩子……」  一个幽远的声音自她脑海深处传来，一股莫名的狂热淹没了她的心绪。 她走到女皇跟前，跪下亲吻女皇的指尖。 女皇的手冷得如同坚冰，让她在狂热之中短暂感到一丝茫然。 「尽情燃烧吧，为了格拉默的未来……」  「为了，女皇陛下……」
E: Within the transparent incubation pod, she lay submerged in frigid artificial amniotic fluid, enclosed in a pristine white egg. As the container trembled, she floated, and instinctively reached the cold and soft edges. She presses against the pod's walls tightly, curled up in a corner, as if that would make her body feel warmer. She heard something heavy fall and the clamor of metal clashing. Intermittent haste-filled footsteps resounded, and the incubator started to shake... "Warriors, it is time to awaken..." "For Her Majesty..." A pair of mechanical hands scooped her up as blinding light rent the world asunder. She forgot to weep. "Feel glory in your birth..." "For Her Majesty..." She opened her eyes, yet failed to find the speaker. She rose up and advanced through heavy curtains, venturing deeper into the palace. "Accept your honor, and your destiny..." "For Her Majesty..." The cadence of footsteps in unison reverberated through the desolate palace. She traversed the unattended vast garden, navigating through colossal insectoid carcasses and numerous incubators... until finally, she arrived at the resplendent council chamber, where a woman with a blurry face was seated upon the throne, her hands hanging wearily. "Don't look up." Someone approached her, whispering softly. The person bore an identification tag, AR-26702. What does that signify? She glanced at herself, AR-26710. "Come closer... my child..." A distant voice emanated from the depths of her mind, casting an inexplicable frenzy upon her consciousness. She obediently approached the Empress and knelt down, kissing her fingertips. The Empress's touch felt as icy and unyielding as solid ice, momentarily stirring a flicker of perplexity amidst her frenzy. "Ignite yourself to the last moment, for the future of Glamoth..." "For Your Majesty..."

C:
你记得不多。
你并非来自此地，也并非来自彼方，你本不去往任意一处——
直到模糊的声在你耳边吹拂，那悲伤爱怜的劝导，似是而非的催促……
种子扎根。你睁开双眼，那说话的人已不在。

只是声音愈来愈多愈清晰。
有无虑的关照，有镇静的劝告，有毅然的坚持，有温柔的点拨……
你看到锦线正织成明日。

巨大的兽自无垠降下，
金色的瞳从黑夜俯视，
你也不再被过去抛弃。
你还将开拓漫长旅途，
踏过的荆棘都成了路。

列车鸣笛，愿你抵达将至的未来
——以你自己的意志。
E:
You don't remember much.
You're not from around here, nor did you come from elsewhere. You're not really going anywhere—
Just then, that indistinct voice whispers into your ear. That sorrowful and tender persuasion, that deceptive goading...
The seeds take root. You open your eyes, and the speaker is no longer there.

But there are more and more voices, and they are getting clearer and clearer.
Some give easygoing care, some calmly provide advice, some speak firm support, and some gift gentle direction...
You see the silken thread being woven to form tomorrow.

A huge beast descends from infinity,
golden pupils stare down from the darkness,
and you are no longer abandoned by the past.
You will also set upon a long journey,
and the thorns you have stepped on have become your path.

The train whistles, wishing you a successful journey to the coming future
...by your own will.

C: 可可利亚及杰帕德受到的伤害降低。弱点击破后，行动额外延后，受到的伤害额外提高。
E: Cocolia and Gepard take less DMG. After Weakness is broken, additionally delays action and additionally increases DMG taken.

C: 永冻幻土的悲鸣
E: Cry of the Frozen Fantasy Land

C: 阿兰似乎担心自己会拖累你们，但你们在说服他这点上已经产生了一种微妙的默契，难道这就是同伴么？\n和同伴一起，抓紧时间去往最上层吧。
E: Arlan seems to worry that he would be a hindrance, but you as a group already developed a sort of delicate rapport in how to persuade him. Could this be what it means to be companions?\nHurry and reach the top floor with your companions.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，今后，这里就是你的家了。\n新的冒险就要开始了，准备跃迁前往新世界吧！
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express. From now on, this will be your home.\nA new adventure is about to start. Prepare to warp jump to a new world!

C: 你们平安着陆雅利洛-Ⅵ，却发现此处只有冷冽的霜风和无垠的雪原向各位表示欢迎。\n毫无头绪的你回想起姬子的话：成功的开拓需要「探索」、「了解」、「建立」和「连结」…现在大概是正处于「探索」的阶段吧——\n无论如何，现在恐怕只剩下在风雪中前进，或者等星核自己找上门这两种选择了。
E: You land on Jarilo-VI safely, but now find yourselves standing in frigid winds among barren snowfields stretching as far as the eye can see.\nFeeling stuck, you recall Himeko's words: Successful trailblazers must learn to explore, understand, establish, and connect... Maybe this is what exploring looks like.\nIn any event, your options are now clear: Push through the snow or wait for the Stellaron to miraculously appear by itself.

C:
在和同伴充分交换意见之后，你们很快得出结论：当下最要紧之事务应是回到旅店房间好好睡一觉，回头再去请教「地火」的想法。
这听起来确实是有点扯，但你如何能拒绝长途跋涉和艰苦战斗之后的柔软床垫呢？
之前的你还对眼前的铺位有所嫌弃，可它现在简直是全世界最舒适的地方，没有之一。
晚安，也愿你不再从噩梦中惊醒。
E:
Having had a thorough discussion, you quickly conclude that the priority is to return to the hotel and get a good night's sleep. You will ask what Wildfire makes of this later.
It may sound outlandish, but how can one say no to a soft mattress after a long journey and harsh battle?
You toss all the complaints about your bed behind, thinking it must be the nicest thing this world has to offer.
Nighty-night. May you no longer be troubled by nightmares.

C: 对卡芙卡这样狡猾的猎物，你很难相信自己找到线索不是她刻意留下的障眼法，然而猎手别无选择。\n使用谛听，追上她的踪迹吧！
E: With a cunning prey like Kafka, it's hard to believe that finding all the clues yourself wasn't a deliberate ploy that she orchestrated. But alas, the hunter has no choice.\nWith Diting's help, get on Kafka's trail and catch up!

C: 「建木」的根系缠紧洪炉，自工造司各处汲取力量，生成名为「丰饶玄鹿」的灵兽拱卫自身。\n一番奋战，你们却发现玄鹿生机不绝，倒地亦能复生。唯有切断其供输来源，方有胜机。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's roots wrap tightly around the furnace and absorb power from all over the Artisanship Commission, creating the Abundant Ebon Deer to protect itself.\nYou discover during battle that the Ebon Deer appears immortal and revives as soon as it is defeated. The only chance you have of victory is to cut off its energy source.

C: 你就不好奇，在你等待列车组期间，匹诺康尼的另一边发生了什么吗？现在你有机会看到了——虽然不是很科学——但好好欣赏吧。
E: Aren't you curious about what took place on the other side of Penacony while you were waiting for the Crew? Now you have a chance to see it — This can't be explained by science, so just enjoy it.

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n无论如何，还是按照流程集齐筑梦碎片吧，你知道教授朋友向来没什么耐心。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nAnyway, you might as well go through the procedure and collect all the jigsaw fragments. You know how your professor friend isn't known for his patience.

C: 为了让故事足够浅显易懂，加拉赫决定寓教于乐，带领你们前往克劳克影视乐园——他将把那里的游乐设施当做教具，给你们上一堂匹诺康尼的历史课…你很累，大家都明白，但还是由衷希望你暂时别睡着。
E: To better get his story across, Gallagher decides to make things fun by taking everyone to Clock Studios Theme Park. Using the facilities there as tools, he will give you all a lesson on the history of Penacony... Everyone understands that you are exhausted, but they hope you won't doze off.

You█ fut███ █e█er ████ted
Yo██ ██████ █e█er ████ted

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C:
星期日就在幕布后方等待各位。在盛典开场前，遵循阿斯德纳的古老传统，他愿邀请诸位一同观赏三出幕前剧。

「历史是面镜子，它映照出宇宙最本真的面貌。我们也可借这个机会，更深入地了解匹诺康尼和星神的历史。」
「而未来的轮廓——自然就在其中显现。」
E:
You find Sunday awaiting you all behind the stage curtains. Before the festival begins, he invites you all to watch three prologue stage plays, following a long-held Asdana tradition.

"History is a mirror. It reflects the true face of the universe. We can take this opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Penacony and the Aeon."
"From this, the contours of the future... will naturally present themselves."

C: 黑天鹅向你揭示了一个令人毛骨悚然的事实：原来在与星期日的对抗中，列车组的各位、乃至匹诺康尼的所有人都失败了，无人生还。\n不过，事情还有转机。忆者表示，在你亲身经历的这段故事中，存在一处致命的破绽。而那一线生机，就藏在这破绽的背后。\n现在，你已经看穿了太一之梦的迷障——但要想让整个阿斯德纳清醒，只有你们还远远不够……
E: Black Swan reveals a bone-chilling truth to you: It turned out the entire Express Crew, as well as everyone in Penacony, lost their lives in their battle against Sunday. There were no survivors.\nHowever, there is still a chance to turn this around. The Memokeeper points out that there is a fatal flaw in the story that you experienced. Behind this fatal flaw lies a glimmer of hope.\nNow, you have seen through the illusion of Ena's Dream... However, if you wish to awaken everyone in Asdana, you will need far more people on your side...

C: 又一次回到了白日梦酒店，曾经承载你诸多回忆的入梦港埠。入梦前不必回顾过去的痕迹，因为每次睡眠都会带来一场崭新的美梦…或噩梦。\n到前台办理入住手续吧，你应该很熟悉这个流程了。
E: Once more, you find yourself at The Reverie, the gateway into the Dreamscape that is imbued with many of your memories. There is no need to reflect on your past before diving into the Dreamscape, because each sleep births a brand-new sweet dream... or a nightmare.\nGo check in at the front desk. It's a process you should find very familiar.

C: 考试结束，课程还未开始，现在是最令人欣喜的学院游览时间。一般来说，一段浪漫的邂逅、一场奇妙的冒险、一次世界毁灭的过程都是从学生在学校闲逛开始的。\n在校庆的创意集市逛逛吧，不保证有趣，但一定比上课轻松。
E: The test has concluded, and classes have yet to start. Now is the ideal time to explore the academy. Typically, a romantic encounter, a thrilling adventure, or the prelude to world destruction often begins with a leisurely stroll through the campus.\nEnjoy yourself in the anniversary's Creator's Market. While excitement is not guaranteed, it promises a more relaxed atmosphere than the classroom.

C: 大岚神在上，邪忍的诡计已全然暴露于忍者们的面前，此番荒诞猴戏必有幕后黑手推波助澜，邪祟•总长甚是可疑，无论如何，先去拷打一番！\n你把这群假老师都打翻了，现在轮到校长了…校规？你看智库里收录了吗？
E: By the Great Lan above! The Evil Ninja's schemes have been exposed! This monkey farce must have been orchestrated by an elusive mastermind, and the Fiendling Chief seems highly suspicious. Let's interrogate first and ask questions later!\nYou have taken down all the fake teachers, and now it's the dean's turn... School regulations, you say? Oh, they weren't included in the data bank, right?

C: 缭乱•忍侠的过往如浮世绘画卷般徐徐展开，在她飒爽的身姿与笑容之暗面，究竟隐藏着何种不为人知的血泪秘事呢…你已经完成了忍法宗师•苦茶大师的试炼，依照大师先前所言，你此刻已经拥有了成为「忍徒」的资格。\nAK-A-3，忍者的游戏好玩吗？
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero's past unfurls like an Ukiyo-e scroll. Just what kind of untold sorrow and pain is hiding behind her determined facade and cheerful smile...? Having passed the challenges set by the Ninja Grandmaster, Master Kucha, you are now eligible to bear the title of a ninja initiate as he had previously stated.\nAK-A-3, are you enjoying your little ninja game?

C: 虽然这个导演哥们不喜欢猴子，但说的话和喜欢猴子的小可爱一样爱兜圈子。没办法，谁叫你的同僚总是一群不说人话的家伙呢？等你修好了联觉信标，得好好教教大家什么叫有话直说。\n行，这哥们整的剧情还真有点意思，那就帮他找找演员呗。
E: So, this director bro isn't too keen on monkeys, but he sure beats around the bush just like those shirthead monkey lovers. Can't blame them, because your colleagues never really got the hang of talking plain human language. Once you've fixed your Synesthesia Beacon, you'll teach them how to talk like a straight shooter.\nBut hey, this dude's narrative looks interesting, so why not pitch in and help recruit actors?

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 比「世界命运」更沉重之物…我们以取巧的方式，用三月七的相机通过了这项考验。
E: An item heavier than the "Fate of the World"... We adopted a tricky method and used March 7th's camera to solve this puzzle.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 「戏剧」的第二幕，是白厄与那位我们熟知的悬锋王子——万敌的初遇…
E: The second act of this "drama" is Phainon's first encounter with Mydei, the Kremnos prince we all know...

C:
你还记得她们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
英雄撕裂天空，圣女飞落悬崖，棋手扬起初火，以负世神谕之名。
多么可敬！然而，命运从来慷慨，赴死的若虫必得赴死的结局。
你啊，救世主，看她们无光的死灰！难道还要妄想留住？
那推石攀升的，必遭大地倾覆；搅扰岁月的，也只能徒增一副零落的甲壳。
听我说，你与她们无异：正如那欢唱的也嘶声，明眸的也盲目。
去！尽管独自向前——
狂欢，起舞，投入不倦的火，永不停歇！
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
The hero tore through the sky, the Holy Maiden fell from the cliff, and the chessmaster ignited the first Flame, all in the name of prophecy of Worldbearer.
What noble deeds! And yet fate, ever generous, ensures that the death-bound nymphs shall find their death nevertheless.
O Deliverer, behold the lifeless ash they've become! Do you still futilely dream of saving them?
Those who push the boulder upward will see the earth swallow them whole. Those who meddle with time earn nothing but a shattered shell.
Hear me. You're no different from them: The singers still scream, and the bright-eyed still go blind.
Go, then! March on alone —
Revel, dance, throw yourself into the tireless flame, and never stop!

C:
《午夜电锯狂想》
简介：一群星际和平公司的职员，被上级打发到偏僻的星球度假。抵达酒店的他们，却发现，这里原本是隶属于公司的监狱。在古老的年代，无数的犯人因狱警的镇压和恶劣的劳动环境死去，就像这颗匹诺康尼。
而现在，苏醒的怨灵封闭了酒店的出口，誓要向着那些该死的公司狗索命！
呼，终于有人听本导演把故事简介完整地说完了。
E: Midnight Chainsaw Rhapsody Synopsis: A crew from IPC gets sent to a remote planet for vacation. But the resort land in turns out to be one of the IPC's off-world prisons. Back in the day, countless inmates died here, crushed by cruel guards and brutal labor. Just like this very Penacony. Now, the vengeful ghosts have sealed off the hotel exits, hell-bent on dragging those IPC dogs to the grave! Hah, finally! Someone let this director finish his pitch for once.

C: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
E: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

C: 神话已偏移了原定的轨迹，若命数是天上的巨星，那它的游离或会牵动太阳，也会牵动今夜的潮汐。\n你摸不到星，但可以站在潮汐里，感受波澜拍打你的脚踝。\n那是海在向你诉说它的忧虑。
E: The myth has drifted from its destined course. If fate is written in the stars, then their gravity pulls not just the sun, but the very tides at your feet.\nThe stars may be untouchable, but the tide isn't. Stand in its flow and feel how cosmic forces lap at your ankles.\nThat's the ocean whispering its worries, wave by wave, shore to soul.

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n访问控制节点，上传封装密钥。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nAccess the control node and upload the encapsulated encryption key.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…果然是假的！\n这里是用你的「记忆」构筑的假象，你必须和昔涟一起赶紧逃进其他的记忆里。\n星期日正在用他的能力入侵你的「梦境」来拯救你…没想到还会有这样的一天。
E: The Era Nova Ceremony has been completed. The journey in Amphoreus is over... As if!\nThis is all an illusion constructed from your "memory." You must now escape with Cyrene into other memories!\nSunday is using his powers to invade your "dreamscape" to save you... Never thought this day would come.

C:
我来为你讲述「迷路迷境」的故事吧：哀丽秘榭的树林里，住着一群可爱的小朋友，它们的名字能连成一首歌谣——
一、二、三、四、五、六、七♪
哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻♪
生命微种萌蘖于无瑕忆中。心灵最柔软处，由哀怜触动的真挚颤抖，就是「生命的因」。
E:
Let me tell you the story of "Membrance Maze": A group of cute little friends live in Aedes Elysiae's forests. Their names can be connected into a song...
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven ♪
Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti ♪
Tiny seeds of life sprout within pristine memories. In the most tender corners of the heart, that genuine shiver stirred by lament... That's the "mover of life."

C: 如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
E: If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

C: 艾丝妲自称收到了一封「宓堂空境解语人」递交的密信，信中不仅揭露了销声匿迹许久的「异星水魈」的行踪，甚至暗指空间站内有包庇逃遁奇物的共犯。为防打草惊蛇，谨慎的站长拜托你展开调查。
E: Asta claims to have received a secret letter written by a Cryptologist From Locus Silentii, which not only revealed the whereabouts of the Xenohydro that had been missing for a long time but also tacitly implicates that someone in the space station has been covering up for the escaped Curio. The cautious lead researcher asks you to investigate.

C: 丹恒正在与防卫科其他科员一起清扫「军团」残党。\n过去搭把手，帮帮忙吧！
E: Dan Heng is cleaning up the remnants of the Legion with other Security Department staff.\nGo and offer a helping hand!

C: 老旧的机组竟然只能为终端机提供一天一查的算力，这样的结果令你十分恼火。但维修工程师向你保证，今天绝不会再出什么闪失了，你决定再信他一次。
E: The terminal units are so old that they can only provide enough computing power for one check a day. You're annoyed, but the engineer promises that nothing else will go wrong today. You decide to trust him one more time.

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 至此，事件终于告一段落。对于这个结果，你并不意外——不如说现在这样，才更符合你对黑塔的认知。
E: At this point, the incident has finally come to an end. You are not surprised by this outcome — rather, this is now more in line with your perception of the Herta Space Station.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助完成一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to complete a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？\n帕姆有一台「可移动列车清洁机」，没想到这种时候可以派上用场……
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!?\nPom-Pom has a portable train cleaning kit. Who knew it'd come in handy at a time like this...

C: 艾丝妲在你们眼前被冥火吞没，先听听螺丝咕姆的判断再做打算
E: Asta was swallowed up by infernal fire before your eyes. Listen to Screwllum's deductions before you act on anything.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n公司占领了大矿区。没素质，欠收拾。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nThe IPC took over the Great Mine. No manners. Needs a beating.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n看来就我们俩了，有点扫兴。不能让三月感觉出来。准备好了就出发。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nLooks like it's just us. Bummer. Can't let March know, get ready and get gone.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n扑满好像在给我们带路。先跟着吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nThe Trotter seems to be leading the way for us. Follow it for now.

C: 磐岩镇的矿头安东尼娜似乎有事想找你聊聊。去问问她发生了什么事吧。
E: Looks like supervisor Antonia from Boulder Town wants to talk to you. Go ask her what it might be about.

C: 虎克大人的小钻机坏掉了，本来应该就这么回到磐岩镇的，但是她想起自己还有一个宝贝。\n说不定另一个宝贝她原本并不打算卖掉，只不过此时改变了心意而已，既然到这里了，继续前进吧。
E: Hook's small drilling machine is broken. It's supposed to have been returned to Boulder Town by now, but she remembers that she has another treasure.\nMaybe she didn't plan to sell this treasure initially, but she changes her mind now. Since you're here already, it's best to keep moving.

C: 运气加上实力，你们成功地拍下了地髓探针，虎克大人笨手笨脚的，还是去找娜塔莎包装礼物吧。\n说不定，虎克只是想去娜塔莎那里炫耀炫耀自己的战果呢。
E: With strength and a bit of luck, you get the Geomarrow Probe. Hook is not good at wrapping presents, so you have to ask for Natasha's help.\nPerhaps Hook wants to prove herself by presenting the gift in front of Natasha.

C: 你的询问似乎触动了那位目击证人脆弱的神经。他那不寻常的惊惧暗示你：这桩盗窃案或许比你想象得要更危险。\n但是，你与克拉拉仍然决定前往犯罪现场进行侦察——提防随时可能发生的危险，保护好自己吧——至少保护好克拉拉。
E: Your questions seem to touch a nerve with the jumpy witness. His unnatural terror hints that this theft might be more dangerous than you have imagined.\nHowever, you and Clara still decide to head to the crime scene. Be prepared for any potential dangers and protect yourself — or at least protect Clara.

C: 帕斯卡带领你与克拉拉来到了铆钉镇的废弃工作室「淬火工坊」。从帕斯卡破碎的词句中，你们拼凑出它行如此举动的部分动机。\n帕斯卡似乎是将此处当作了自己的「秘密基地」，并在这里日夜不停地维护整个铆钉镇。\n你发现了一些可疑的物件，但它们似乎并不能说明些什么——还是在这里继续调查吧。
E: Pascal led Clara and you to the abandoned workshop in Rivet Town, the Tempering Workshop. You piece together some of the motivation underlying Pascal's behavior from its broken speech.\nPascal seemed to have treated this place as its secret base and maintained the entire Rivet Town ceaselessly from here.\nYou find some suspicious objects, but they don't really explain much — Keep looking around for a bit longer.

C: 希露瓦以蹩脚的借口邀请你一同前往歌德宾馆共进下午茶。可正所谓「天下没有免费的咖啡」——机智的你立刻察觉到此事并不单纯。\n但无论如何还是前往歌德宾馆与希露瓦聊聊吧——毕竟有谁能拒绝免费的咖啡呢？就算退一万步讲，希露瓦可是你在贝洛伯格为数不多的朋友之一，不是吗？
E: Serval invited you to have afternoon tea together at the Goethe Hotel with a clumsy excuse. After all, there is no such thing as a free lunch — You immediately realize that there is more to it.\nNo matter what, head to the Goethe Hotel and chat with Serval — Who can resist a free cup of coffee? At the very least, Serval is one of the few people in Belobog that you call your friends, no?

C: 你收集到了三处贝尼尼学士所隐藏的光印拓迹，现在该将这些拓片交给陶德了。
E: You've collected three Optical Markings hidden in three locations by Scholar Bernini. Now it's time to give the rubbings to Todd.

C: 陶德的所作所为实在令你心寒，何况这也违背了仙舟的律法。你几经思索下，终于做出一个艰难的决定——现在你决定前往地衡司举报陶德。
E: What Todd had done really disappoints you, not to mention it also breaks Xianzhou's laws. After thinking about it at length, you finally make a difficult decision — you decide to report Todd to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 这次星核灾患，显然有人从中作祟。我路遇妖人，竟然能驱遣孽物。还好我手头功夫没拉下，对方不过是一合之敌罢了。有意思的是，那位姐姐竟然能从我挥剑声响中听出端倪来。待我调查舵航仪，再来试试她。
E: This Stellaron crisis is evidently puppeteered by someone. The villain I accosted along the way could control abominations! Thankfully, my swordplay is adequate to dispatch them all. Interestingly, that lady could tell what was going on just from listening to the sound of my sword-wielding. After checking the navigator array, I'll have to test her.

C: 在解决了种种阻碍之后，三月七终于接近了自己记忆的起点。可越是靠近，她就越是不安——这「阻碍」究竟是从何而来呢？\n此时符玄的警告在她的心中不断回响，使她几乎想要停下脚步，回头折返……\n「但开拓者绝不能回头，即使是在回头的时候。」三月七对这个冷笑话颇为得意，决定之后讲给丹恒听。
E: After overcoming various obstacles, March 7th finally approaches the starting point of her memories. However, the closer she gets, the more anxious she feels — Where is this "obstacle" coming from?\nFu Xuan's warning echoes in her mind, making her almost wanting to stop and turn back the way she came...\n"But Trailblazers must never turn back, even when they turn their back." March 7th is pretty satisfied with this dry joke and decides to tell it to Dan Heng when she gets back.

C: 这种时候急着联系你的会是谁呢……
E: Who could be in a hurry to contact you at a time like this...

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 「挑战观众」…你也看过一些三月七硬塞给你的推理小说，对这样的桥段并不陌生。但一般在作品中负责挑战读者（或者观众）的，不都是作者或是侦探角色吗？怎么到了花火这里，就变成凶手本人跳出来下战书了？比起「挑战观众」，这大概更接近于「挑衅观众」吧…真不愧是花火。\n无论如何，祝君狩猎愉快。
E: "Challenge the audience"... You have read a lot of detective novels that March 7th shoved into your hands and are no stranger to this kind of plot. Although, normally it's the job of the author or the detective to challenge the reader (or audience), is it not? How is it that in Sparkle's game, it's the murderer who's throwing down the gauntlet? Surely this is closer to "threatening the audience" than challenging...? It's just what you've come to expect from Sparkle.\nEither way, happy hunting.

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n跟随孤云继续前进。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nFollow Guyun and continue onward.

C: 在尚未踏入下一站旅程前，列车接到了来自罗浮仙舟的通讯，景元向暂无去向的众人发出邀请，参加演武仪典。
E: Before embarking on the next stop of their journey, the Express received a comms from the Xianzhou Luofu — Jing Yuan extended an invite to all wanderers to join the Wardance.

C: 在金人巷，驭空见到了老朋友
E: Yukong encounters an old friend in Aurum Alley

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.

C: 既然无法改变外界，柯柯娜只能选择…改变自己。
E: Unable to change the external world, Cocona has to... change herself.

C: 助人为乐的工作圆满结束了。和皇帝陛下聊聊天，增进一下对彼此的了解吧。
E: The work of helping others has come to an end. Talk to the Emperor to get to know her a little better.

C: 竟然有刺客想要刺王杀驾！这太离奇了，怎么会有人对这样一位善良的好人图谋不轨？\n快抓住刺客，保护皇帝陛下的安全吧。
E: Assassins are after the Emperor! Unbelievable, who would do such a thing to such a kind soul?\nFind the assassins quickly and protect Her Majesty.

C: 托帕、砂金和翡翠已经完成了他们在匹诺康尼的工作，你为他们办理了退房手续。\n告别之前，拍一张合照作为纪念吧。
E: Topaz, Aventurine, and Jade have finished their work in Penacony, and you have completed the check-out process for them.\nBefore bidding farewell, take a group photo to commemorate the moments.

C: 你已经变身为哈努兄弟，现在你再也不用担心身高问题了。\n混进「四尺圣堂」的集会所，找到青雀吧…如果你感兴趣的话，或许也可以和那位「矲主」罗伊罗伊聊聊。
E: Now that you have transformed into Brother Hanu, your height is no longer a concern.\nBlend into the gathering place of the Four-Foot Hall and locate Qingque... and if you are interested, you may also talk with that "Master" named Royroy and see what you can find out.

C: 变身哈努兄弟的确让你成功接触到了青雀，但你却无法向她证明你就是前来拯救她的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}。\n没办法，现在你必须变回自己，并向波提欧和银枝发出求救信号了。
E: Having transformed into Brother Hanu, you have successfully located Qingque, but you are unable to convince her that you are her trusted friend who comes to her rescue.\nNow you will have to resume your original form and send a distress signal to Boothill and Argenti.

C: 「鼹鼠党振兴计划」总算完成了！不过你总觉得大人们的表现稍微有些反常——算了，管那么多干嘛？反正尤利安还会给你奖励。
E: The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan is complete! You can't help but think that the adults are acting a little off... Forget it, why worry so much? Julian will give you a reward regardless.

C: 捉迷藏比赛已经开始。寻找一个合适的藏身点吧！
E: The hide-and-seek competition is on. Find a suitable place to hide!

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 「寻径指津」的爱好者们借着演武仪典的东风，在竞锋舰上办了一场大型活动，去凑凑热闹也无妨。
E: Lovers of "Pathfinder" took advantage of the Wardance excitement and organized a large-scale event on the Skysplitter. It wouldn't hurt to see what it's about.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯讲述起了自己的英雄事迹，究竟它是如何巧妙地化险为夷。
E: Spirithief Bartholos recounts their heroic deeds, telling how they cleverly turned danger into triumph.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 请与密卷的元老梅厄沟通，帮忙补足列车物资。
E: Speak with the elder of the Department of Insight, Mare, and help to replenish provisions on the Express.

C: 「管家」将奇物的下落托盘而出，现在该去取回奇物了……
E: The butler has revealed the location of the lost Curio. Now it is time to retrieve it...

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n通向「少校」的道路已经通畅。只要打败它，这次演习就宣告结束了。
E: Once again, you join a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nThe road to get past Major is already clear. Defeat Major to conclude the training.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 阿波罗尼居然失踪了…最后的目击记录位于城下的古遗迹，顺着记忆的残像前进，寻找他的踪迹吧。
E: Who would have thought that Apollonius disappeared... He was last seen in the ancient ruins under the city. Advance after the fragments of memory and look for traces of him.

C: 你帮助布凯辛完成了「星芒战幕」的战斗测试——轻轻松松。\n和那位科员聊聊，安抚一下她的焦虑情绪吧。
E: You complete the Stellar Flare testing at Grumpy's request without a hitch.\nTalk to the researcher and soothe her anxiety.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说卖小吃的高阿姨和商会建立合作关系。但高阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Tall Auntie, who sells snacks, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Tall Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 金人巷不少商铺与码头建立了合作，码头上的运单也比之前更加复杂。小秘书似乎是有事相求的样子。\n到码头看看，也许有你能帮上忙的部分。
E: Plenty of shops and stores in Aurum Alley have established a collaborative relationship with the docks, and the logistics orders coming in also more complex than before. Mingxi's expression seems to imply a need for assistance.\nHead to the docks and see if you can help with anything.

C: 传闻贝洛伯格出现了埋藏珍宝的古代遗迹，前往大矿区寻找关于遗迹的线索吧。
E: It is rumored that there are ancient ruins with buried treasures in Belobog. Go to the Great Mine to get some clues about the ruins.

C: 信念与希望足以构成通往胜利的桥梁。在踏上擂台之前，你还有时间从朋友的支持中汲取力量。
E: Faith and hope are more than sufficient materials to build a bridge toward eventual success. Before you rise to the arena, you still have time to draw strength from the support of your friends.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 你们驱除了依附在彦卿身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
E: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Yanqing, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

C: 艾丝妲向你求助，佩佩不知踪影，她分身乏术正需要你帮忙找佩佩。好在培育工作相当顺利，你此时正好得空，就去帮个忙吧。\n佩佩失联和造物有什么关系？对此保姆机器人表示它也不是很清楚。
E: Asta approaches you for help: Peppy is missing, and she's too busy, so she needs you to find Peppy. Fortunately, the nurturing work is going very well, so you happen to be free right now — go help out.\nHow exactly is Peppy's disappearance connected to the creations? The Helper Robot isn't very clear on this, either.

C: 收集散落的拼图碎片，完成拼图。
E: Collect the scattered jigsaw pieces and complete the jigsaw.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n继续去接待顾客吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nLet's continue serving the customers.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C:
你应该猜得出这位「独立参赛者•铁臂」是谁，所以这里还是不要欲盖弥彰了。

和你聊些无关紧要的星天演武仪典幕后八卦吧。
你可能发现了，虎克和史瓦罗没怎么在故事中登场。这其实是因为他们有自己的事要忙。
除了偷偷参赛，史瓦罗还要带着虎克在罗浮四处逛街。他想给克拉拉带一些伴手礼，但不知道该买些什么。于是他就「计算」了一下——同为女孩子，虎克一定知道该给克拉拉买什么伴手礼！听她的准没错！

十数日后，机械聚落。
克拉拉看着面前整整六箱子苏打豆汁儿，陷入了沉思。
E:
You can probably guess who this "Independent Contestant — Iron Arm" is, so there's no need to play up the mystery here.

Let's chat about some unimportant Luminary Wardance behind-the-scenes gossip instead.
You might have discovered that Hook and Svarog didn't make much of an appearance in the story. It's because they are busy with their own affairs.
Apart from taking part in the competition, Svarog is also visiting the shops in Luofu with Hook. He wants to bring some souvenirs to Clara but doesn't know what to buy, so after some "calculation" — He figures that Hook, as another female child, must know what to buy for Clara! He can't go wrong listening to Hook!

A few days later in the Robot Settlement,
Clara sinks into deep thought as she gazes upon the six boxes of mung bean soda before her.

C:
「明知注定失败的比赛，我也要参加到底吗？」
「那老子问你：注定失败的人生，就不活了吗？」
「可如果这注定是一场徒劳的悲剧，又何必看到结尾呢？」
「因为你是个战士啊，蠢材。」
E:
"Should I still participate in a tournament till the end when I know I'll definitely lose?"
"Then let me ask you: Will you stop living if you know you'll life is doomed to fail?"
"But why should I see the end of this story when it's fated to be a tragedy that I can't change?"
"Because you're a fighter, idiot."

C: 或许…就像祖辈说的：我需要的只是一把扳钳，一枚钻头。
E: It's just like what my ancestors said — all I ever need is a wrench and a drill.

C: 嗯，已经没事了，请放心。
E: Yes, I'm fine now. Don't worry.

C: 走啦走啦，才一晚而已——姬子和杨叔都是成熟的大人，很有耐心的！
E: Come onnnn! Himeko and Mr. Yang are grown-ups — I'm sure they'll cope without us for one night.

C: 没关系，名字没那么重要啦！最关键的是，我看到了哦——那个怪兽，它的胃口超级大，把很多人都吞进去了！
E: Don't worry about the name! The important thing is I saw what it can do — it has a huuuuge appetite and swallows people whole!

C: （发个短信给帕姆吧……）
E: (Let's send a message to Pom-Pom...)

C: 我是不是来得不是时候？
E: Is this a bad time?

C: 但希露瓦的专精远不止于对「星核」的研究，她在机械工程等其它领域也有很深的造诣。
E: But her expertise went far beyond Stellarons. She was and still is well versed in mechanical engineering and other fields.

C: …算了，这也不过是我个人的猜测，我一向不擅长揣测姐姐的心思。
E: *sigh* Never mind, it's just a personal hunch. I've never been good at reading my sister's mind.

C: 这把吉他…其实是很久之前，可可利亚送给我的生日礼物。
E: This guitar... was actually given to me as a birthday present by Cocolia a long time ago.

C: 这种关系一直维持到了彻底决裂之前。直到闹翻的那天，她的办公室里还留着很多我们共用过的东西……
E: That's how things were until the day we fell out. A lot of our shared possessions never left her office again...

C: 根据记载，主力决战的时候，她亲自率领两个铁卫旅，在城下与敌军大战了整整四个昼夜…当时的剪报我还留着呢，有机会给你看看。
E: The records tell that during the decisive battle, she led two Silvermane Guard brigades. She engaged the enemy for four full days and nights in the fight for the city... I still have the newspaper clippings from that time — I'll show you when I get the chance.

C: 况且…他没有落下大碍，能看出你们有刻意留手。
E: Not to mention... he wasn't in bad shape when we found him. Thank you for holding back.

C: 你注意到好奇心旺盛的小孩在童话中总是有一些不幸的结局，而蕾莎不太一样，她似乎懂得把握好奇心的程度，在故事最后幸免于难。
E: You notice curious children tend to end up encountering misfortune in these stories, but Leisha is different. She knows how to control her curiosity and therefore lives to see another day at the end of the play.

C: 你发现《雪国往事》的宣传画展示了惊人的舞台美术装置，那是「存护」祝福的贝洛伯格城墙，在飞雪造景中屹立不倒。
E: You notice the advertisement poster for Once Upon a Snowsieged Country showcases a fantastic set-piece, which is none other than Belobog's walls blessed by Preservation standing tall in the snowy scenery.

C: 这城里的垃圾桶还真严肃。
E: Even trashcans are serious business in this city.

C: 这什么奇怪组织。
E: What a strange arrangement.

C: 这是居民使用的汽车，它们随处停靠，让你非常羡慕这个没有停车费的世界。
E: These are the cars used by the residents and they can be parked anywhere. They make you very envious of a world where there are no parking fees.

C: 你看见牌子上写着：「『太阳花』——家有一盏，欣欣向荣！」
E: You see a sign that says, "Solarflower — you only need one for your place in the sun!"

C: 一只普普通通的邮筒。
E: Just a normal mailbox.

C: 你仿佛看见它周围紫黑色怪异而扭曲的气场，明确地表示出「生人勿近」的抗拒态度。
E: ...almost as if there were some strange, twisted, dark purple aura surrounding it, protesting in no uncertain terms: "no living entities permitted."

C: 我的同伴在哪里？
E: Where are my friends?

C: 嗯嗯，很有意思哦！
E: Mm-hmm, in fact, it's awesome!

C: 我们最好不要引来过多关注，但也不能放着那孩子不管。
E: We should avoid attracting too much attention... but we can't just leave her.

C: 哼，「到底有什么企图」…她以为自己还是上面的大小姐呢。
E: Hmph, listen to her. "What is the meaning of this?" ...She still thinks she's an Overworld princess.

C: 听说矿工和地痞起了激烈冲突，还有不少人受伤。我来看看能不能帮上忙。
E: I heard that the miners had been having violent clashes with local thugs, with significant numbers of wounded. I hurried over to see if I could help.

C: …对。我是想让史瓦罗先生看到，有很多流浪者和矿工因此受了伤…你能帮帮他们吗？
E: ...Right. I wanted Mr. Svarog to see that many miners and vagrants have gotten hurt because of the vein... Can you help them?

C: 我们想跟「地火」交朋友。
E: Pleased to meet you. We're here to make friends with Wildfire.

C: …你不会想说可可利亚吧？
E: ...Do you mean Cocolia?

C: 哼，虽然我落到你们手里了，但是你们肯定抓不住我的得力副手尤利安！
E: Hmph. You might have found me, but there's no way you can find my trusty deputy, Julian!

C: 呣呣呣…鼹鼠党的老大，说到就要做到！
E: Ummmm... Yes. The boss of The Moles is true to her word!

C: 想听。
E: Sure.

C: 从哪里开始说起呢？
E: Where should I start?

C: 人情世故嘛，我不是很擅长，不过你问。
E: I'm not so good at analyzing people, but seeing as you asked...

C: 目前为止，除了被桑博带下来的布洛妮娅，我还没有在地下见到任何银鬃铁卫。
E: Up to now, apart from Bronya, whom Sampo brought here, I still haven't seen a single Silvermane Guard.

C: 我已经清楚了。
E: Well, I'm all up to speed now.

C: 百分之百！
E: <unbreak>100%</unbreak>!

C: 然后我就跟着娜塔莎学读书、写字，十岁开始跟着奥列格到各个矿区去巡查，有时还会跟当地的混混对峙……
E: There I learned to read and write from Natasha. At the age of <unbreak>10</unbreak>, I started to patrol the mines with Oleg, occasionally getting into fights with the local thugs...

C: 听说可把老爷子气得够呛，家里也就几个弟弟妹妹还在跟她来往。
E: I heard that her old man was furious, and that only a few younger siblings are still in contact with her.

C: 说说「炉心」。
E: Tell me about the Furnace Core.

C: 别急，等拳王把伤养好了，就让你知道什么叫残忍。
E: Just you wait till the champ has recovered, you'll know what real brutality looks like.

C: …咳…要是我会错意了，你就当我没说…我身体好得很…咳…没什么大问题。
E: *cough*... Forget I said anything if I misunderstood you... I'm alright... *cough*... Nothing wrong.

C: 哦？{NICKNAME}，你的这位朋友是发生了什么情况？
E: Oh? {NICKNAME}, what happened to this friend of yours?

C: 妈妈怎么还不下班呢？
E: Why isn't she off work yet?

C: 镇子陷落以后，那位裁缝跟我们断了联系，布料细腻的衣服也越来越难找了……
E: After the town fell, we lost contact with the tailor, and it became increasingly difficult to find clothes with delicate fabrics...

C: 这分数具体怎么算，我们会负责搞定的，您只要专注于比赛本身就行。一旦您的排名发生变化，我们会立刻通知您。
E: As for the calculation of the points, we'll take care of that. All you need to do is focus on the fight itself. As soon as your ranking changes, we'll notify you.

C: 如果您想继续比赛就请随时和我说，我来为您安排！
E: If you want to continue fighting, please let me know and I will arrange a match for you!

C: 我先去其他地方转转。
E: I'll go mill around elsewhere first.

C: 没问题，您要是有想法了随时和我说！
E: No problem, come back any time!

C: 记住——史考特商业联盟，只为最强的你！
E: Remember, Scott Business Alliance is only made for you, the strongest!

C: 叔叔，是地震了吗？
E: Was it an earthquake?

C: 我也闻到了哦。
E: Hehe, I smell it too.

C: 那不是屋顶，虎克…是「天空」。
E: That's not a ceiling, Hook... that's the sky.

C: 打起来！打起来！
E: Fight! Fight!

C: 他们是一个魔法学院的同学…
E: They are a trio that went to a wizarding school...

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》有各种各样的大冒险，原始丛林的冒险、历史遗迹的冒险，还有外太空的冒险……
E: The Adventurous Moles has all kinds of great adventures. The Moles would often go into primitive jungles, lost cities, and even outer space...

C: 我这里刚好有后记，喏，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}你就拿上吧。
E: I happen to have the postscript here. There you go, take it.

C: 快去吧！我和鼹鼠党的小伙伴都等着新书的好消息。
E: Go on, then! The Moles and I can't wait to see the new book getting published.

C: 你买了《冒险鼹鼠队》吗？
E: Did you buy The Adventurous Moles?

C: 你试图用单手拿起一柄铁锹，反而被其巨大的重量拉扯着失去了重心。
E: You try to pick up a shovel with one hand and are immediately thrown off-balance by its weight.

C: 从沙袋上你能学会的事：倒下就要倒得干脆，旋转跳跃并没有人欣赏，只是浪费时间。
E: What you learned from observing the sandbag: Commit to your choices, even if you're falling. Stylistic theatrics is just a waste of time that no one appreciates.

C: 星际和平公司强烈谴责反物质军团的野蛮暴行，并愿为一切受军团摧残的世界送上琥珀王的「存护」。
