E: The IPC strongly condemns the barbaric atrocities committed by the Antimatter Legion and conveys the Amber Lord's wish for Preservation to all worlds ravaged by that wretched force.

C: 而骇入系统的人手段高明，甚至故意留下了一道印戳，仿佛挑衅——「银狼」，星核猎手的一员。
E: The hacker was skillful and even taunted us with her seal. Her name is Silver Wolf, a member of the Stellaron Hunters...

C: 嗯，多得有符卿智珠在握，之后的事情，也全都仰仗你了。
E: Indeed, your counsel has always been of great help to me. You may use your discretion on the matters ahead of us.

C: 哼，我能理解。仙舟诸务繁杂，你难免精力不济。要不是有我在底下撑着……
E: Hmph, I can understand. There's a lot to take care of on the Xianzhou — you were bound to miss something. Thank goodness I'm here...

C: 仙舟上的麻烦，桌案上的文牍，花坛里的杂草，唯有这三样东西是无论怎么努力也打扫不干净啊。
E: *sigh* There are three things in the world that I can't seem to rid myself of: The troubles of the Xianzhou, the papers on my desk, and the weeds in my garden.

C: 不瞒你们说，刚才我看到那位驭空眉头一皱，差点以为周围要冲出一队全副武装的士兵，要把咱们几个押进大牢。
E: Jokes aside, did you see Madam Yukong frown at us? I thought her guards were about to jump out of nowhere and throw us in jail.

C: 请您通融一下吧，我真的有急事，让我过去吧……
E: Please find it in your heart to let me through, I'm on urgent business. Please let me through...

C: 只记得这儿是个闲适度日的好地方～不过，星核降临，许多洞天都变得面目全非了吧。
E: All I remember is that this is a good place to while away the days~ Still, many delves have changed beyond recognition since the arrival of the Stellaron.

C: 出于安全考虑，请您呆在旅馆里，暂时不要外出行动。
E: For safety reasons, please stay in your residence and refrain from going out for the time being.

C: 真是难以想象的雄伟巨树。
E: It sounds like an unimaginably magnificent tree.

C: 被人教训了一顿，现在能乖乖躺好了吧？
E: ...That'll teach you a lesson. Ready to lie down now?

C: 卜卦的结果是凶
E: The result of the augury is woe

C: 作为商人，你的武艺不错。
E: You have great martial skills for a merchant.

C: 你性格还真好……
E: Huh, I should learn to be this easygoing...

C: 我刚刚见着咱们店里的大客户，停云小姐她……
E: I did just see Miss Tingyun walk by. She's a big patron of ours...

C: 投降吧，向仙舟解释。
E: Surrender, and save your explanations for the Xianzhou.

C: 仙人？仙舟之上并无仙人。什么「丰饶」神迹，什么操弄生死，你们的所作所为，不过是妖孽行止罢了！
E: Celestials? There are no celestials on the Xianzhou. The "divine miracles" of the Abundance, the manipulation of life and death... Your deeds are nothing but evil!

C: 停云小姐！
E: Miss Tingyun!

C: 瓦尔特先生…
E: Mr. Yang...

C: 长话短说吧。请见谅，兵凶战危，现下不是分神闲聊之时。
E: Forgive me for being brief — warfare is a dangerous business. There's no time for idle chat.

C: 好嘞，完成了！这下烟雾瞧不见了。
E: Yay, we did it! Can't see the smoke anymore.

C: 如今的我已被逐出仙舟，不再是「不朽」的龙裔了。
E: I was exiled from the Xianzhou. I am no longer one of the Scions of Permanence.

C: 这一手…你也是那个女人的徒弟！又是她！
E: That move... You're also one of her apprentices! It's her again!

C: 彦卿绝不会令将军失望！
E: I won't fail the general!

C: 为了对十王司和天舶司有个交代，迫于压力，他们还是对丹枫执行了强制褪鳞之术，不过，故意留下了一道瑕疵。长老以为能瞒得过十王司，哼，好个如意算盘，但纸是包不住火的……
E: The Vidyadhara were under great pressure. In order to placate the Ten-Lords and Sky-Faring Commissions, they performed an exuviation charm on Dan Feng against his will. Still, they ensured that the charm contained a flaw, thinking that this would fool the Ten-Lords Commission. Hmph, the senior Vidyadhara were sure of their scheme, but you cannot hide fire with paper.

C: 是「丹枫」，是他的声音…另一个人是谁？很熟悉，好熟悉啊……
E: That's Dan Feng's voice... but what about the other person? So familiar...

C: 云骑将军和十王司。他们会定期来检查鳞渊境……
E: The Cloud Knight general and the Ten-Lords Commission. They performed regular inspections of Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 宇宙的一切都将以毁灭作结，「丰饶」与「巡猎」也不例外……
E: The universe will end in destruction, and with it the Abundance and The Hunt will disappear...

C: 列位，瞧见这具美丽的肉身了吗…「丰饶」神迹，名不虚传。
E: Benefactors, behold this beautiful body... The miracles of Abundance live up to the name.

C: 放心吧。以长生种的强韧生命力，将军定能化险为夷。当年上阵冲杀时，遭遇的凶险百倍于此，他都挺过来了。
E: Don't worry, long-life species are resilient and strong — the general will pull through. He's faced down situations a hundred times more dangerous than this.

C: 穷观阵神通广大，能穷举卡芙卡的过去…当时我就在想，那对我使用穷观阵，是否能算出本姑娘的过去呢？
E: The Matrix of Prescience has amazing powers, and can iterate and reiterate Kafka's past... So it got me thinking — if I turned the Matrix on me, could it calculate my past?

C: 用短生种的话说，就是葬礼。只是对仙舟上的长生种而言，身后事一直是个遥远又稀薄的概念。
E: To put it into short-life terms — a funeral. You see, for long-life species of the Xianzhou, death has always been a distant, mystical concept.

C: 其实，停云小姐太客气了。金人巷中的大小商户谁没有受过「鸣火」商团的恩惠？她举办的海市，给咱们这些小商户招徕了域外的商客。要说送礼，该是咱们送她才对。
E: *sigh* Miss Tingyun is too kind. Who among the Aurum Alley vendors hasn't been spoiled by the generosity of Whistling Flames? Her Grand Fair puts small merchants like us in touch with big intergalactic vendors. If we're talking gifts, it's us who should be gifting her something.

C: 好呀好呀，我也有这个打算，你要是有空回来，我就可以教你啦。
E: Aha, I thought so. Come back when you have time — I'll teach you.

C: 什么人这么重要？
E: Who could be this important?

C: 我是这么说了，所以……
E: Well, I did, which is why...

C: 哎，这话我就不爱听了……
E: I'm not sure I like that tone...

C: 演技不错，我喜欢。
E: Your acting's good, I like that.

C: 你怎么知道？
E: How do you know?

C: 最后，只是一句浅浅的忠告…有这么一类人，他们拥有誓死不二的意志与信念，却并不打算将其用于正道。而在那位先生脸上，我看见了熟悉的神情。
E: Lastly, a gentle reminder... There are people who possess unwavering resolution and faith, even unto death, and they do not wield such conviction for good. And on that man's face, I see such a similar expression.

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
E: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

C: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
E: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

C: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
E: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 当然有。
E: Of course there is.

C: 今天没演出，向导工作也不是时时都有嘛…来这里的都是上上之宾，大多都有护从随行……
E: I'm not booked for any performances, and most visitors to Penacony don't need tour guides anyway... They're all big shots who have their own entourage with them.

C: 难道…你真的是偷渡犯？
E: Are you... really a stowaway?

C: 这样吧，保镖大哥，我们不进去了，您帮我取个东西吧，先前寄存在这儿的——
E: Okay, so, we aren't going in anymore. But could you help me pick up something I left inside?

C: 那个…我觉得——只是我觉得——这台电视可能有猫腻。
E: Well... I might be totally off base here, but I think there's something fishy with this TV.

C: 我不知道啊，怎么回事？
E: I have no idea. What happened?

C: 这样吗…总之，没事就好！
E: I see... Anyway, I'm glad you're safe!

C: 不觉得这梦泡和如今的匹诺康尼很像么，嗯？
E: Don't you think this dream bubble looks really similar to modern-day Penacony?

C: 向往无名客也是真的，你们去过很多世界，能见识各种各样的人和事，每一天都是全新的开始……
E: And my admiration for the Nameless is also genuine. You guys have been to a lot of worlds, met people from all walks of life, and experienced all sorts of things. Every day is a new beginning for you guys...

C: 要出人命啦！来人啊！
E: Someone's dying! Please come here!

C: 给你个提示吧：既然你谁也说服不了，何不考虑去找个哑巴做朋友呢？至少他不会反驳你，哈哈。
E: Here's a hint for you — Since you can't convince anyone, why don't you befriend a mute? At least, a mute won't be able to refute your arguments. *laughs*

C: 他说你不够直率、纯真、有童心。
E: He said you weren't innocent, kind... or honest.

C: 你是要我…钻进去？
E: Do you want me... to crawl in there?

C: 你不必这样妄自菲薄。
E: Don't sell yourself short.

C: 尝试再次洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts again.

C: 你们两个，一定要在我面前现眼是吗？那别怪我不客气了！
E: Do you two really want to stay here and test my patience? You're going to regret it!

C: 是我太久没喝苏乐达了吗，还是因为连加了两个月的班——怎么偏偏今天没灵感了呢？
E: Is it because I've gone for too long without drinking SoulGlad, or because I've been working overtime for two months? Why don't I have any inspiration today?

C: 他自顾自走了…但留下了拼图碎片。
E: He wandered off, but he left behind the puzzle piece.

C: 讲笑话？啊，我…没什么幽默感……
E: Jokes? Um, I... don't really have a good sense of humor...

C: 我…我已经在想办法转移话题了……
E: I... have been trying to do that...

C: 从这可以去到对面楼顶，得借用一些机关。我记得是藏在了这里……
E: We can get to the rooftop of the opposite building from here, but it requires a device. I remember it's hidden here...

C: 各位客人，请冷静一点……
E: Everyone, please calm down...

C: 滴答…滴答…
E: Tick tock... Tick tock...

C: 好吗？求你…
E: Okay? I beg you...

C: 可家族明明对外承诺，梦境是绝对安全的……
E: So strange... The Family insist that the Dreamscape is absolutely safe.

C: 请帮帮我…
E: Please help me...

C: 视死如归的决心……
E: Unyielding resolve in the face of death...

C: 是你救了我们？
E: Did you save us?

C: 某人的宝物
E: Someone's treasure

C: （这里是…贝洛伯格下层区的诊所？为什么空无一人？）
E: (Is this... the clinic in the Belobog Underworld? Why is it empty?)

C: 这位异乡人一定是想让我们明白，眼下的纷争是多么可笑…您用行动证明了自己。此物象征着我们的追随与憧憬，希望您能收下！
E: The outlander must be trying to help us understand how foolish this dispute of ours was... You have proven yourself with your actions. This signifies our loyalty and longing. We wish for you to have it.

C: 作为惩罚，他将我发配至此，要我数尽这座城中所有的垃圾。在那之前，我将永远不能发表自己的看法。
E: ...As punishment, he assigned me this role, demanding that I count all the trash in the city. Before then, I am to never issue forth my opinions.

C: 当然，请随意。
E: Naturally, take your time.

C: 看来完全没印象啊…毕竟是泯灭帮，也算正常。那我就为你说明一下……
E: You don't seem to have heard of him before... He belongs to the Annihilation Gang, so I guess it's normal. Then let me explain to you...

C: 二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
E: You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will help you safely reach the floor right below this room.

C: 但谁说明面的算计背后，没有更深的阴谋呢？
E: Who's to say there isn't an even deeper conspiracy lurking beneath the surface?

C: 没关系，我不会强迫你。
E: That's fine. I'm not forcing you.

C: 「联合酋长国的建立对茨冈尼亚有着重要历史意义：此举为该星球漫长的血腥历史画上句号，耸人听闻的『卡提卡-埃维金灭绝案件』将成为遥远的过去——」
E: "The formation of the Sigonian Sovereignty is of great historical significance to the Sigonia system: This move puts an end to the planet's long and bloody history, turning the sensational Katica-Avgin Extinction Event into a distant memory..."

C: 天，我可能是苏乐达喝多了…没想到你回来得这么快，如何…有什么发现？
E: Oh heavens, I must have drunk too much SoulGlad... Didn't expect you to be back so soon. How is it... find anything?

C: 选择？「毁灭」的血途，向来容不下犹疑。
E: Choice? The bloody trail of the Destruction leaves no room for hesitation.
..."Emanator."

C: 我不值得你如此好奇。独行银河的人总有些秘密，我也被公司通缉过，对星核猎手有所了解并不奇怪…也仅止于此。
E: I don't deserve your curiosity. Loners wandering the cosmos always have their secrets. Take me. I've also been wanted by the IPC, so it's little wonder I know something about the Stellaron Hunters... that's all.

C: 难道偷渡犯的事是真的…
E: Could the stowaway incident be real...

C: 每个人都有难以启齿的过往，不愿轻易示人的秘密…我也不会多问，星穹列车为何要带着一颗*星核*漫游银河。
E: Everyone has their own unspeakable past, secrets that they don't want to be revealed... and I won't be asking any more questions, such as why the Astral Express is roaming around the cosmos with a Stellaron on board.

C: 大门紧闭，看来是要我们自己动手。
E: The door is shut tight. Looks like we're on our own.

C: 承蒙谬赞，也感谢您花了这么多心思来欢迎我，星期日先生。只是这实在不像诚心邀约之人会做的事。
E: I appreciate your words, and I see you put a lot of effort into welcoming me, Mr. Sunday. However, this is no way to greet a guest.

C: 我从不承担任何风险。基石必须由家族来保管。
E: I'm not the kind that takes risks. The Cornerstone must be in the custody of The Family.

C: 您吃了吗？吃的什么？
E: When's our lunch break? Mmm... Hungwy.

C: 就等你这句话呢！
E: Just what I've been waiting for!

C: 感谢您配合家族工作，也谢谢你没让我真的跪下来求你。
E: Thank you for cooperating with The Family's efforts... and also thank you for not making me actually get down on my knees and grovel.

C: 我没想到…你真的会得寸进尺。
E: I didn't think you were the type who would kick someone when they were down.

C: 那女人的过去？没人知道。但如果你要的只是个简单的答案，可以，你最好找张椅子垫在下面，那个叫黄泉的女人——
E: That lady's past? Nobody knows. But if all you want is a simple answer, sure, you best get a chair and take a seat. That woman named Acheron...

C: 这都是做给你看的。我越是狼狈不堪，就越有可能把你钓出来…等你好久了，看在我这么努力的份上，不奖励我一个回答么？
E: All part of the act. Fool's bait. The more pathetic I seem, the more likely you'll come sniffing around. So. Now that I've drawn you out, will you reward me with an answer for my efforts?

C: 是苏乐达！那姐姐不是说店里不卖这个嘛？
E: It's SoulGlad! But I thought they didn't sell SoulGlad at the bar?

C: 你不了解舒翁的过去，不知道她是个…多么闪耀的人。即便在巨星云集的鸢尾花家系，她的才华也无可追及。
E: You don't know Siobhan's past, and you have no clue how... radiant she used to be. Even among the talented Iris Family, her skill was unmatched.

C: 这种滋味…不算热烈，但回味无穷。
E: The taste is... not very intense, yet evocative.

C: 这味道…比苏乐达复杂得多哎。
E: The flavors... they're way more sophisticated than SoulGlad.

C: 我不知道这意味着什么，也许加拉赫先生愿意讲解一下自己的巧思？
E: I'm not entirely sure what it all means. Maybe Mr. Gallagher can shed some light on it?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这小姑娘人间蒸发了</color>，梦里没留下任何痕迹，现实中也完全找不到身体，仿佛从没来过匹诺康尼。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She simply vanished</color>, leaving no trace in the Dreamscape or reality, as if she had never come to Penacony at all.

C: 人不可能一辈子只做正确的决定，但好运总是站在我这边。我从未输过。
E: People can't always make the right choices in their lives, but luck has always been on my side. I've never lost.

C: 也许两者都是。
E: Perhaps both.

C: 「要想让自己不在人前露馅，最高明的办法就是先骗过自己」…要我说，你根本骗不了自己。这次能得手算你走运。
E: "The best way to prevent others from seeing your true colors, is to first be able to fool yourself"... Really? You can't even fool yourself. You just got lucky this time.

C: 怎么不说话了？
E: Why aren't you talking?

C: 需要一点提示么？这是一副镣铐，套在你身上的。那男人给你的第一份「工作」，你挣到的第一桶金…我可记得清清楚楚。
E: Do you need a hint? These are manacles on you. That man gave you your first job, and you made your first pot of gold... I remember it all too well.

C: 如果对局不公平，还有什么乐趣可言？
E: What fun is it if the fight isn't fair?

C: 这和缉拿真凶有关吗？
E: Does this have anything to do with the wanted murderer?

C: 他们大多成了那影子的一部分。
E: They mostly become a part of the shadow.

C: …「命案」是个好借口，但还远远不够。即便匹诺康尼真的存在那么一两起谋杀，影响的也只是极少数人，掀不起波澜。
E: ...The murder isn't nearly enough to disrupt business as usual. Even if there were one or two murders on Penacony, most people wouldn't be personally affected — and that won't create any waves.

C: 他们在每个人都会去往的地方，一个很远、很远的地方。
E: They are in a place where everyone will go. A very, very distant place.

C: ——履行我们的职责，开始「收获」吧。
E: —Let's fulfill our duty and start "harvesting."

C: 大概算的帕……
E: It probably is...

C: 我们此前一直在困惑的「梦境中是否存在真正的死亡」，现在看来完全是幕后主使设下的思维陷阱，为了掩盖人们失踪的真相，以及…这座名为「流梦礁」的城寨。
E: The question that has been perplexing us — "Does death really exist in the Dreamscape?" — appears to be a cognitive trap. It was laid by those orchestrating events from the shadows to cover up the truth behind the disappearances, and the existence of this fortress known as Dreamflux Reef.

C: 除此以外…是我的私心。我想以「流萤」…而非「萨姆」的身份和你们同行。
E: That aside... there were also my personal motives. I wished to travel with you as Firefly... and not Sam.

C: 你说，这里是你的家？
E: So this is... your home?

C: 既然如此，请问这一两天它是否有带什么客人回来呢？事实上，我们正在调查一起美梦中的失踪案。
E: I see... Has it brought back any guests recently, say in the last day or two? We're currently investigating a missing person case that occurred within the beautiful dream.

C: 莫非是知更鸟小姐？
E: Is it Miss Robin?

C: 当时他也和米沙在一起。
E: He was with Misha at that time.

C: 哈，哈。真会开玩笑……
E: Ha. Ha. You're a regular comedian...

C: 这位米沙正要带我们去见她，弄清个中原委。不过在此之前，我们先和姬子会合吧。你之前应该和她在一起？
E: Misha is about to take us to her to find out what happened, but before that, let's meet up with Himeko. You were with her earlier, right?

C: 我们的目的地是贸易区。那是流梦礁人最多的地方，说不定能找到各位的伙伴。
E: Our destination is the commercial district. That's where the largest crowds gather in Dreamflux Reef. We might be able to find the others there.

C: 哥哥，你看！这里有一只小鸟。
E: Look here, brother! A little bird!

C: 哈哈，那可真是太好了。这边请，尊贵的橡木家主。这下所有的演员…就都到齐了。
E: Haha, that'd be great. Please follow me, honorable Oak Family Head. Now all the actors... are on the stage.

C: 好你个虚构史学家，合着之前跟咱们说了那么多，都是编的呗？
E: History Fictionologist? So, what? everything you told us was made up?

C: 那是被称作「逐梦时代」的三纪，被蒙在鼓里的「钟表匠」向全宇宙发出邀请，掀起了名为梦想之地的热潮。
E: Those three eras were known as the Age of Dreaming. The Watchmaker, who had been left in the dark, sent out invitations across the universe, spreading the hype around the land of the dreams.

C: 不仅如此，我更想看到的是各大派系为遗产争斗不断的样子，再加上「钟表匠」销声匿迹十余年来的首次发声，家族中的*叛徒*一定会露出马脚。
E: It's not just that. Above all, I wanted to see what happens when the major factions engage in a struggle for the legacy. Since this is the Watchmaker's first announcement in decades, the traitor within The Family is bound to reveal themselves.

C: 无论家族的叛徒是谁，无论他向我下达怎样的指令，我都不会登台献唱。我们绝对不能把谐乐大典变成毁灭「同谐」的仪式……
E: I won't step on that stage and sing, no matter who the traitor is or what orders they give me. I won't let the Charmony Festival become an event that destroys Harmony itself...

C: 跟我来吧。现在…该是它重现天日的时候了。
E: Come with me. Now... is the time to reveal it.

C: 适者生存，弱肉强食…世间的一切悲剧皆源于此。而匹诺康尼之所以为美梦，正是因为它为任何想要从中脱身的人提供了一片安眠之地……
E: Survival of the fittest... that's where all the tragedies in the world come from. People come to the sweet dream in Penacony to escape from that reality and find solace.

C: 你们该好好感谢我，要不是我肯收拾这个烂摊子…现在匹诺康尼早就乱成一锅粥了哦？
E: You should be thanking me because if it weren't for me cleaning up this mess... Penacony would still be in shambles. Don't you think?

C: 很遗憾，现实正是如此。「未来」的别名…正是「自我价值」。
E: Unfortunately, that's exactly what happens. Another name for "the future" is "self-value."

C: 也许，要先变成星星才行吧。
E: Maybe you'll have to become a star first.

C: （这鬼地方真够大的…别走太远，省得他一会儿找不着人。）
E: (This place is too big... I better not wander too far in case he can't find me later.)

C: 看，这不就成了。
E: See? Just like that.

C: 事态紧急，我们就速战速决吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Time is of the essence. Let's make this quick, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「这不公平！你现在就得帮我。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "It's not fair! You have to help me." — You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 既然是「枪火」的试炼…应该能用战斗解决问题吧？希望不会浪费我们太多时间。
E: If it's a Gunfire trial... We should be able to settle this with a fight, right? I hope this won't waste too much of our time.

C: 他们跳进电视机里了……
E: So they just jumped inside that TV...

C: 您竟然已在别处探听到了我卑微的称号…不胜荣幸！
E: You've already heard of my humble title elsewhere? I am deeply honored!

C: 美梦乐园确实不错…
E: A Sweetdream Paradise doesn't sound too bad...

C: 最高分通过！
E: You pass with full marks!

C: 去吧！冠军的舞台属于二位…享用你们赢得的荣光！
E: Go forth! The champion's stage belongs to the both of you... Bask in the glory you deserve!

C: 这则故事发生在我和知更鸟很小的时候。我们是星核之灾的受害者，家族的歌斐木先生——也就是日后的匹诺康尼梦主——见我们兄妹两人无依无靠，便收养了我们。
E: This story happened when Robin and I were very young. We were victims of the Stellaron Disaster, and The Family's Mr. Gopher Wood — who would later become the Dreammaster of Penacony — saw that we siblings had no one to turn to and took us in.

C: 事实上，什么事都不会发生。因为这只是一个空想，一道纠缠了我无数个夜晚的梦魇——如果各位有机会像我一样做出选择……
E: Because this is merely a figment of imagination, a nightmare that has haunted me through countless nights. If you ever had the opportunity to make a choice like I did...

C: 流萤小姐——患有失熵症的你，一定能理解这意味着什么吧？
E: Miss Firefly, you who are stricken with Entropy Loss Syndrome — you of all would surely understand this?

C: 他常说，那一刻就像回到了家人身边，海上的日子再苦，也不觉得多难熬了。
E: He often said that those moments felt like returning to his family's side, and the difficulties at sea didn't seem quite as challenging.

C: 你们？什么意思，你不跟我们一起走了吗……
E: What do you mean? Are you not coming with us...?

C: 梦想之地，匹诺康尼。
E: Land of the Dreams, Penacony.

C: 她…变成了一潭死水。
E: She... became stagnant water.

C: 共有两道命途在这场大战中失去了星神：「繁育」和「秩序」。巧合的是，这两道命途的转折都与某位星神有关……
E: Two Paths lost their Aeons in that war — the Propagation and the Order. Coincidentally, their downfall is related to a certain Aeon...

C: 「我从无限延伸的螺旋阶梯，向着未来缓缓坠落。不必恒久地记住我，或试图将我寻获。我心中的轮廓，必将与其他经验交错。」
E: "Descending from the infinite spiral staircase, I traverse towards the future with measured steps. No need to remember me or seek my existence, for the contours of my mind shall intersect with other experiences."

C: 「而未来的轮廓——自然就在其中显现。」
E: "Within it, naturally, the future takes shape."

C: 环境也和刚才不一样了。周围的陈设…似乎变得整齐了些？
E: The surroundings are different from before. The stage decorations... look a bit tidier now?

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕1系统时
E: 1 system hour until Charmony Festival

C: 这就是沉浸式戏剧吗…
E: Is this what they call "immersive theater"?

C: 这里是梦境还是现实？
E: Are we in the dream or reality?

C: 呃…嗐，算了算了！大家都想不起来说明那人八成是个小毛贼，不重要。反正不影响咱们几个理解前因后果。
E: Uh... heck, forget about it! If it's slipped all our minds, reckon that person was just a minor scoundrel, unimportant. Ain't gonna stop us from piecin' together the story anyhow.

C: 也向您致以诚挚的谢意，罗浮将军。能有各位在场共同见证，想必此次谈判一定能以令各方都满意的结果圆满落幕。
E: I would also extend my sincere thanks to you, General of the Luofu. The presence of everyone here assures that the talks will likely reach a conclusion that satisfies all sides.

C: 今天早些休息吧。这段时间你太累了，若是不趁这个机会好好修养精神，可是会落下病根的…你现在年轻还好，老了以后可是要遭罪的哦。
E: Turn in early today. You've really been pushing yourself hard recently. If you don't take this chance to recharge, it could lead to long-term problems... It seems fine when you're young, but it's a different story as you age.

C: 这样，我就可以随时感应到你，以便在你遇到危险的时候及时出手了。
E: This way, I can always be attuned to your location, ready to assist immediately if you encounter any threats.

C: 在与几位合作伙伴讨论后，我们决定暂缓对模拟宇宙项目的推进，并将以技术顾问的身份支持博识学会对梦境与忆域的研究，以便这种物质更好地为全人类服务。
E: After deliberations with my partners, we have decided to defer the progress of the Simulated Universe project, and instead assist the Intelligentsia Guild as technological consultants in the research of the Dreamscape and Memory Zone, so that these assets may be better used to serve humanity.

C: 就算你开辟的未来，可能不属于你？
E: Even if the future you forge may not even belong to you?

C: 饿啦，账账？
E: Are you hungry, Numby?

C: 我梦见列车驶过一站又一站，有人到来，有人离去，而我们五人始终都在，这段旅程似乎永远也不会结束。
E: In my dream, the Express stopped at many places, and passengers came and went. However, the five of us were always present, and the journey seemed never-ending.

C: 将所有的回忆和感情倒在一起，搅拌均匀，透过时间的滤网，留在杯中的便是值得回味的东西。
E: Blend all your memories and emotions together and stir them well. Through the filter of time, what remains in the glass is something to savor.

C: 很严厉的指控呢，你不理解也很正常。但没关系，我会帮你看清。
E: That's quite a harsh accusation. I understand you may not fully comprehend what I mean, but don't worry, I'll help you understand.

C: 多萝西，我想送你一件礼物。你看。
E: I've prepared a gift for you, Dorothy. Check this out.

C: 多萝西，我们走吧？到外面去，一起看看十二时分的风景！
E: So, shall we go, Dorothy? Let's go outside and enjoy the stunning views of the Twelve Hours!

C: …毫不意外。
E: ...I'm not surprised.

C: 一二三四五……
E: One, two, three, four, five...

C: 啾啾，啾啾……
E: Chirp, chirp...

C: 嗯…只可惜找错了方向，但我也算是有些别的收获啦。
E: Yes... sadly I was looking in the wrong place. But I did reap some rewards.

C: 可以说，匹诺康尼能有今日的辉煌成就，离不开「钟表匠」深植于我们心中的「开拓」。也只有铭记这份「开拓」之志，我们才能不辱使命，将「同谐」带给更多的人。
E: It can be said that Penacony's splendid success today is deeply rooted in the Trailblazing ethos the Watchmaker planted within us. Only by honoring this Trailblazing spirit can we fulfill our mission and spread Harmony to a broader audience.

C: 我讨厌直觉敏锐的小鬼。
E: I hate smartypants!

C: 拆除？没问题！正在启动自主拆除程序——请给我一首歌的时间！
E: Defuse? No problem! Executing self-defusing program — this won't take long!

C: …谁知道第一花火大学根本没有什么电影编导系——就连第一花火大学这所高校都不存在！哎，花火。
E: ...Who knew that there was no such thing as the "Film Directing and Screenwriting program" at Sparkle University — in fact, Sparkle University isn't even real! Bah, Sparkle.

C: 你是炸弹吗？
E: You're a bomb?

C: 而未来的无名客，也准备好启程前往他们的下一站了。
E: While the Nameless are also preparing for the next stop of their voyage.

C: 小三月，有什么心事吗？
E: What's on your mind, March?

C: 谈判、审讯，或者一场彻头彻尾的私刑…我的下场完全取决于你，慈玉女士。
E: Negotiation, interrogation, or death... My fate lies entirely in your hands, Lady Bonajade.

C: 选修课、社团、校园派对…本姑娘全都要体验一遍！
E: Electives, extracurricular activities, campus parties... I want to try them all!

C: 那就出发吧。折纸大学位于「太阳的时刻」，酒店已经将入梦地点设置在校园附近啦，咱们校门口集合！
E: Let's get going then. Paperfold University is located in the Moment of Sol. The hotel has set the entrance to the dream near the school, so let's meet at the gates!

C: 我是星穹列车的无名客。
E: I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express.

C: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bananana! Bananana!

C: 好疼！
E: That hurt!

C: 指的是「测弦考试」。在入学典礼上，家族成员会通过「调律」来分析学生们的潜质，分配至合适的学院。
E: It refers to the "Tuning Test." At the entrance ceremony, The Family's Members will analyze the potential of students through "tuning" and assign them to the appropriate academy.

C: 「美梦多彩，理想自由」！
E: "Color your dreams, free your ideals"!

C: 到你了到你了，快去吧！要是结束得早，别忘了给我们讲讲面经哦！
E: It's finally your turn! Hurry and go! If you finish early, don't forget to tell us how it went!

C: 那来一只吧。
E: I'll take it.

C: 低调，低调。
E: We're trying to keep it on the down-low.

C: 唉，就是有个在校园里形迹可疑，还乱涂乱画的家伙。穿着奇装异服，一条发光的围巾，开口还满嘴胡话……
E: There's someone acting suspiciously and leaving graffiti on campus. They're dressed oddly, wearing a glowing scarf, and speaking nonsense...

C: …「伎乐忍徒」，我等的闲暇时光似乎要结束了。
E: ...Ninja Initiate Gigaku, it seems our time of rest is coming to an end.

C: 当然，在下正是为此而来。但在此之前——
E: Of course. That is exactly why I'm here. But before that—

C: 那时我才意识到，原来自己还算有一个脑子是「活着」的。
E: That's when it hit me. I've got a mind that's still "alive."

C: 抱歉抱歉，入场暂停了，有社员在里面打翻了个大家伙，还在收拾。
E: I'm very sorry. We're temporarily closed. A member knocked something big over and we're still cleaning it up.

C: 等等，我只是一下子想不起来了。对了对了，第二十条…第二十条是……
E: Wait, wait, it just slipped my mind for a moment. I think I got it. Number <unbreak>20</unbreak> is... is...

C: （不是每个人都值得一颗子弹，他们还没到那份上。）
E: (Not everyone deserves a bullet in them. They haven't gone that far yet.)

C: 因为我要告诉你，你现在需要相信的不是你自己，而是他们。
E: I'm telling you that it's not yourself you have to trust, but them.

C: 而当失去一切的时候，这些人最需要的又是什么？智者的指引？强者的援助？
E: What do these people really need when they have lost everything? Guidance of the wise? Or aid from the strong?

C: 所以这堂课的内容是画画？
E: So this class is about painting?

C: 「无论有何条约律令，采用暴力的行径，便要准备迎接暴力的回应。」
E: "Doesn't matter what the rules say, if you bring the violence, then the violence is comin' back your way."

C: 能人…<unbreak>426</unbreak>？
E: Denisovan... <unbreak>426</unbreak>?

C: 虫豸小猴！
E: Monkey Pest!

C: 这些小猴玩偶之所以如此活泼，是为了给年轻消费者提供更多情绪价值。
E: These monkey toys are made this lively so that they bring more emotional value to our young customers.

C: 我知道自己比不上那些大佬…但我也有自己想做的事啊……
E: ...I know I can't measure up to those bigwigs, but there are things I hope to achieve too...

C: 富贵的样子不太对劲，快阻止他！
E: Something's happening to Richie! We have to stop him!

C: 难道就是<color=#dbc291ff>「原始博士」</color>？
E: It's <color=#dbc291ff>Dr. Primitive</color>, isn't it?

C: 能追查到博士的下落，算你有点本事。但偷偷摸摸跟过来还认为不会被发现，未免有些太过傲慢了？
E: Tracking down the Doctor's whereabouts shows you have some skill. However, believing you could follow us unnoticed was quite presumptuous, wasn't it?

C: 他香蕉的…又来了？
E: Fudgin' banana... That line again!?

C: 我去别的地方看看。
E: I'm checkin' somewhere else.

C: 我也不想那么有天赋嘛。但助蕉非说本姑娘是个优秀人才，一上来就给我发了级别很高的社员证……
E: I wasn't expecting that either, but the Assistananas insist I'm a great talent. They even gave me a membership card with a high level of clearance...

C: 准备把这儿砸了吧！/带我成为高级社员。
E: Prepare to tear this place apart! / Help me become a high-ranking member.

C: 嘿，哥们——
E: Hey there, pal—

C: 可惜的是，痛觉尚在——无论何时何地，都最适合用来唤回某人的痛觉，此刻尚在。
E: Unfortunately, the sense of pain remains — whenever and wherever, it's appropriate to use it to bring someone back to their senses.

C: 没问题，老师。不过我还有一件事想说……
E: No problem, Teacher. But there's something else I have to tell you...

C: 呼…知道吗，刚才我还一直担心自己搞错了呢！
E: Phew... Wanna know something? I was worried I had it all wrong just now!

C: 他宝贝的，匹诺康尼还能有人比我更擅长？
E: Forkin' hell, you think you can find a better shot than me in Penacony?

C: 看——这就是面对这个问题，您脑海中浮现的思绪。可惜，无论怎么选，似乎都会留下遗憾。
E: You see, these are the thoughts that come to your mind when you were given that question. Sadly, it appears that whichever option you choose, there will be some lingering regret.

C: 或者…那个曾经名为波提欧的男人。
E: Or rather, the man that was once known as Boothill.

C: 初次见面，我等乃是得「巡猎」真传的忍侠，前来讨伐御猿•邪忍。
E: My pleasure to make your acquaintance too. We are Ninja Heroes who have received the true teachings of The Hunt. We come forth to punish Evil Ninja Osaru.

C: 对三号使用模因病毒…这对实验有什么帮助吗？
E: Use a memetic virus on No. 3... How would that help the experiment?

C: 可你知道，那只是一场意外。
E: But you know that was just an accident.

C: 而这位见习研究猿还不知悔改，私通巡海游侠，为实验室带来无比惨重的损失，最终只留下了一件极其糟糕的「失败品」——
E: Moreover, that trainee research ape showed no remorse and even colluded with the Galaxy Rangers, resulting in a devastating loss for the laboratory. In the end, we're only left with an abysmal piece of "failure"...

C: 开学时，你让大家追随自由，如今却讥讽着自由的意义。先前判定香蕉是失败的植物，现在又开始赞颂它的无私。
E: When school started, you encouraged everyone to pursue their desires freely, but now you ridicule what it means to be free. Previously, you judged bananas to be a failed plant, but now you are singing praises of their selflessness.

C: 差生们，你们已经严重违反了蕉学规范。
E: You bunch of unruly students have seriously violated the banacademic code of conduct.

C: 桌上有一张奇怪的传单，上面写着——「睡蕉社招新新生蕉粉，蕉学探讨，蕉语蕉流蕉友蕉往,欢迎蕉入！」
E: There's a strange flyer on the table. It says "The Slumbernana Association is recruiting freshman Ripe Bananas for banacademic discussions, Bananese communications and banafriends for bana fun. All are welcome to banajoin!"

C: 知更鸟
E: Robin

C: 泰坦站在她那边…小心！
E: The Titan is on her side... Watch out!

C: ——吹响先攻的号角。
E: ...taking the lead in this battle.

C: 而现在，我们必须另寻他法，尝试点燃「纷争」了。
E: But now, we must look for alternative means of igniting the flames of Strife.

C: 不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
E: That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.

C: 这大抵也是一种全明星吧。
E: It could be an all-star cast.

C: 为我…复仇吧…！
E: Avenge... me...!

C: 那还等什么？快出发吧！
E: What are we waiting for? Let's go!

C: 只是…我听说黄金裔与奥赫玛的元老院之间存在分歧，作为外来者，我们不想在这场斗争中站队……
E: It's just... I've heard of the friction between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Okhema. As outsiders, we are wary of getting caught up in this conflict—

C: 这个提议好，欢迎灰宝来树庭做客！就由我来做你的导游吧？
E: That's a wonderful suggestion! Come visit the Grove, Grayie! I'd be delighted to show you around!

C: 我有重要之物…必须向它讨回。
E: And they have something of mine... something of great importance that I must get back from them.

C: 这是…黑潮造成的伤痕？
E: These wounds... They're caused by the black tide!

C: 几日后 神悟树庭
E: A few days later, Grove of Epiphany

C: 呼…大家已经醒了吗？小小灰，小小蝶，还有…粉色小狗？
E: Phew... Is everybody awake? Little Gray, Little Cas, and... a little pink puppy?
Mmm...

C: 还记得故事里勇敢的大英雄吗？他们都会把强大的力量留到最后再用，这样才能万无一失，对不对？
E: Remember all those brave heroes in the tales you've heard? They would always save their strength until the very last moment. That way, they could ensure that nothing went wrong with their plans. Isn't that right?

C: 那刻夏老师认为万物皆诞生于同一源头，亦有相同构成，那就是灵魂。而他将其命名为「智种」……
E: Professor Anaxa theorizes that all beings originate from the same source and have a similar composition, which in this case refers to the soul. He calls this theory Nousporism...

C: 怎么区别对待呀，是怕人家太聪明，问出颠覆整个翁法罗斯的问题吗？
E: What's with this unfair treatment? Is it because I'm too smart and you're afraid that the question I ask will turn Amphoreus upside down?

C: 你为什么不以真面目示人？
E: Why don't you show your true appearance?

C: 咦？咔吕噗嗦…是谁呀？
E: Hm? Kalipso... Who's that?

C: 难以置信。是为了抵御黑潮，还是……
E: That can't be. Was it for fending off the black tide, or perhaps...

C: 呜哇…你是从哪里冒出来的？！
E: Whoa... Where did you come from!?

C: 现、现在逃还来得及吗…
E: I—Is there still time for us to escape now...

C: 呃…原来你根本用不着水车啊。
E: Eh... So, you don't actually have to take the water wheel?

C: 卡吕普索…你到底在隐瞒什么？
E: Calypso... Just what are you hiding?

C: {RUBY_B#人家感觉…凉快多了…！}咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟……{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#It feels so much cooler now!}Bloop bloop bloop bloop...{RUBY_E#}

C: 王子殿下！
E: Wait, Your Highness!

C: 居然把<color=#dbc291ff>歌耳戈之子</color>带到我面前了？
E: To what do I owe the pleasure, <color=#dbc291ff>son of Gorgo</color>?

C: 终于！到了一日中最为炽烈的时刻，强有力的命运应召而至——
E: And at last, the most scorching moment of the day descended upon them! The formidable hand of fate heeded their call and arrived...

C: 因为我也不擅长这门语言。听和读不成问题。但若要让我以古语写作……
E: It's because I'm not exactly a master at it, either. I can listen and read just fine, but when it comes to writing...

C: 那你呢，万敌？你在那试炼里看见了什么…你的恐惧又是什么？
E: Then what about you, Mydei? What did you see in that trial? ...What do you fear?

C: 抱歉，是我的提问太唐突了。迄今为止的人生，我始终在思考：死亡一事，于我而言究竟为何，我又为何与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}有着千丝万缕的联系……
E: My apologies for the abrupt question. For all my life, I've always wondered: What is my connection to death? And why am I inextricably linked to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}?

C: 树庭事发，接下来肯定又会有几番动荡。事已至此，先休息吧。
E: After what happened at the Grove, there's sure to be unrest in the coming days. We should rest for now.

C: 那里有一位尊贵的女孩，她聪慧过人，但也细腻敏感。
E: There's a noble girl there who's very smart but also very delicate.

C: …好，那就麻烦你了。
E: ...In that case, thank you.

C: 不无可能。就跟黑潮一样，不是么？
E: It's possible. Much like the black tide, no?

C: 怎么了，缇安？
E: What's wrong, Trianne?

C: 喔！是这么回事，缇安都想起来了！
E: Ah, yes! Trianne remembers now!

C: 那名剑士会飞吗？
E: Can that swordmaster fly?

C: 拜托啦，感受到大家热烈的目光了吗？这么重大的场合，可不能让他们失望呀！
E: Aw, come on! Can't you feel their fervent gazes? This is a big deal! We can't let everyone down!

C: 没错，所以他也必须面对同样的抉择：某日，吉奥刻勒斯一如往常，翻出山丘。但他看见，山脚下驻扎了一整支拉冬人的营队。
E: Yes, that is why he, too, faced the same dilemma as I do. One day, during one of Geocles' many ventures beyond the mountain, he spied a battalion of Ladonians stationed at the foot of the mountain.

C: 但他并未放弃。若你是他，会怎么做？
E: But he didn't give up. If you were in his shoes, what would you have done?

C: ——然后，大声呼唤新神的名字吧。
E: ...And loudly call out the name of the new god.

C: 别这么做，迈德漠斯……
E: Do not do this, Mydeimos...

C: <size=28><color=#dbc291ff>于今日，悬锋王朝正式终结。</color></size>
E: <size=28><color=#dbc291ff>The Kremnoan dynasty comes to an official close today.</color></size>

C: 重要的是你会出现在那里——挡在她的面前。
E: What truly matters is that you showed up there and shielded her.

C: …也祝你们在翁法罗斯不留遗憾。
E: ...I wish the same for you during your time in Amphoreus.

C: 可别随便冤枉人啊，这次真的与我无关。
E: Hey, don't go pointing fingers without cause. I swear I'm innocent this time.

C: 哼，悬锋人的哲学从来不以字典彰显。
E: Hmph, the Kremnoan philosophy can never be encapsulated in a mere dictionary.

C: 不如说，这才是历史真实的模样：沉眠千年，只待觉醒的一瞬。可惜，现在不是研讨史观的时候。
E: You could say this is the true face of history. It slumbered for a thousand years, only to awaken for this one moment. Alas, now is not the time for a study of history.
Yeah...

C: 此时的雅努萨波利斯尚在{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的照拂下。不过，门城的命运已经由盛转衰，仅是表面光鲜。
E: At this point, Janusopolis still resides under {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} protection, yet it is already fated for decline, and only contains a beautiful facade.

C: 你来啦，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: You're here, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 「虚假的预言」…你还是这么认为呀。
E: "False prophecy," huh? So you still think that way.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>按照提前设计好的路径，让石球落入池中两次就好。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Just follow the designated path and let the stone ball fall into the pool twice.</color>

C: 这种人，真不想留在记忆里呀……
E: People like this are best forgotten...

C: 身负三重生命之女…汝真的准备好了？
E: The one who bears three lives... art thou truly prepared?

C: 队、队长…怎么办……
E: C—Captain, what should we do...

C: 阿蝶，那不是谎言。
E: Cas, that's not a lie.

C: 想必三月他们，现在也很焦虑吧？
E: I bet March and the others are pretty worried too.

C: 人子哪，莫不是在等那黑夜临近？
E: Child of humanity, surely you are not waiting for the arrival of night?

C: 缇安…有种不祥的预感。
E: Trianne... I have a bad feeling about this.

C: 螺丝咕姆先生受托对「圣杯」进行了无害化的处理。现在的它不过是个寻常的梦泡，不会再有什么回应愿望的非凡特性了。
E: Mr. Screwllum was entrusted to neutralize the power of the "Holy Grail." Now it's just an ordinary dream bubble, stripped of its wish-granting properties.

C: 抱歉，在「圣杯战争」中，「真名」是非常重要的情报，我不能告诉你。
E: Sorry, but in the Holy Grail War, revealing my True Name would be a major breach of security.

C: 御主，感谢你的安慰。不过，以我如今真名遭到封印的状态，且不提与那位Saber小姐为敌，恐怕很难在其他对手面前保护你的周全，更别提帮助您实现梦想。
E: Master, thank you for your comforting words. But in my current state, with my True Name sealed, and not to mention being an enemy of that Saber, I fear it would be difficult to protect you in front of other opponents, let alone help you achieve your dreams.

C: 咦？波提欧突然给我发了一条很长的短信。
E: Huh? Boothill just sent me a really long text message.

C: 说起来我也算半个星穹列车粉丝，我知道搭乘它的无名客各个都经历过了不起的冒险。你倒是说说看，你有啥丰功伟绩？
E: I'm a bit of a fan of the Astral Express, and I know that every Nameless who boards it has been through some incredible adventures. So, tell me. What great deeds have you done?

C: 抱歉，您所预约的时间已无会议室。
E: Sorry, there are no conference rooms available at your requested time.

C: 轻松完成工作。
E: Breeze through the work.

C: 正因如此，你才会借用那个名字，不是吗？由你的学生和朋友，梅芙恩和钟表匠共同创造的形象——在美梦小镇中自在歌唱的「音符小姐」。
E: That's why you chose to borrow that name, isn't it? A figure shaped by your students and friends, by Maeven and the Watchmaker — "Miss Note," the one who sang freely in Dreamville.

C: 我已经活过了十个琥珀纪，只要我愿意，我的医疗团队努努力甚至可以让我再多活一阵……
E: Oh, I've lived for ten Amber Eras already. As long as I give the word, my medical team can squeeze a few more years out of these old bones.

C: 切，懒得和你们争了——在消失之前，我想再去看看匹诺康尼的风景。
E: Tch, I'm done arguing with you lot. I'm gonna take another peek at Penacony's views before leaving for good.

C: 在成为英雄前，赫拉克勒斯也曾是个孩子。
E: Even Heracles was just a child before becoming a hero.

C: 喔？葛瑞迪那样的烂片导演的记忆？你倒是说说，那东西有什么价值？
E: Memories of a flop director like Grady? Do enlighten me, what worth do those hold?

C: 以我对老奥帝的了解，他会雇佣最卑鄙的家伙充当自己的马前卒，召来最邪恶的从者替他扫清障碍。
E: From what I know of Old Oti, he's the type to hire the lowest scum as his pawn, summoning the most wicked Servant to eliminate anything in his way.

C: 踏进了斯科特大人的地盘还想走？没门儿！
E: You want to leave after entering Boss Skott's turf? In your dreams!

C: 斯科特以你的名义，给波提欧先生发了封诈骗短信。然后就没有然后了。
E: Skott sent a scam text to Mr. Boothill in your name, and you know how that goes.

C: 比起那种无名小卒，我更关心另一个问题——我们的从者被他弄到哪儿去了？在恐怖片里分头行动，可是大忌，先弄清现在的状况吧。
E: Forget that third-rate nobody, what I really want to know is: Where did he send our Servants? Splitting up in a horror movie? That's a death flag. Let's figure out what we're dealing with here.

C: 喂！你好歹是我的从者，再怎么也考虑下锯掉{NICKNAME}的腿好不好？
E: Hey! You're my Servant, remember? At least consider cutting off {NICKNAME}'s leg instead!

C: 抱歉，斯科特先生，是我错看你了。
E: Sorry, Mr. Skott. I was wrong about you.

C: 关于知更鸟小姐，有件事需要——算了，你们还是直接跟我来吧。
E: About Ms. Robin, there's something... never mind. Just come with me.

C: 那我们赶紧出发吧。
E: Then let's get going.

C: 呱，是一名正义的伙伴呱。
E: *ribbit* Here comes a hero of justice. *ribbit*

C: 英雄的血浆，怪物的血浆，远航之人在异乡大杀四方，这正是拓荒时代的逐梦客们最爱的东西。
E: Hero's blood, monster's blood... The story details how explorers cause bloodshed in strange worlds — this is exactly what Dreamchasers of the pioneering age live for.

C: 干脆我们也投了吧。
E: Perhaps we should all surrender as well.

C: 制片人，你这个没用的东西！为什么让你去偷袭两个没什么战斗力的角色你都办不到！
E: Producer! You useless piece of junk! I sent you to ambush two mere low-threat characters, how did you still mess that up?

C: 也不知是谁在推波助澜，外头同时传着十几种谣言，一条比一条离谱。
E: Who knows who's been fanning the flames, but there are a dozen rumors going around out there, each one more outlandish than the last.

C: 知道知道，这下热闹死了。
E: Okay, okay. Boy, this is gonna be a party!

C: 旅客？
E: A passenger?

C: 还是……
E: Or...

C: 来看看笔记上都写了什么……
E: Let's see what we have on these notes...

C: 逻辑：普通的命途行者不会在忆庭之镜留下痕迹。
E: Logic: The average Pathstrider wouldn't leave any trace behind in the Garden of Recollection's mirror.

C: 几位又来啦？考虑得如何？
E: Oh, you're here again! So, what's your decision?

C: 太好了。不然，那仙舟人怕是要撑不住了。
E: That's great. Otherwise, that person from the Xianzhou might not be able to hold on much longer.

C: 下一站，你准备去哪？
E: Where are you planning to go next?

C: 虽然很酷，但不合适吧？
E: It looks cool, but it's probably not a good idea.

C: 怎么可能忘得了？{NICKNAME}被吓得定在原地，直喊着什么——
E: How could we forget? {NICKNAME} was so shocked, {M#he}{F#she} was frozen in place when {M#he}{F#she} shouted...

C: 我们来买几个梦送人。要有异域风情，最好还能让人意犹未尽。
E: We're looking for some dreams to give as gifts — something exotic and, preferably, captivating.

C: 你怎么知道她在这儿？
E: How did you know she would be here?

C: （深呼吸）……
E: (deep breath)...

C: 最后也不舍得说声再见么？也许我比你想的要更坚强些呢……
E: You still couldn't bear to say goodbye in the end? Maybe I'm stronger than you think...

C: 这段同行算是我个人的回礼，无论如何——
E: This shared journey is my way of repaying you. After all—

C: 坠亡本是飞翔的别名。
E: Falling is just another name for flying.

C: 嗯，在这场交锋中，你和他是最直接的对手。你的想法尤为重要。
E: In this battle, you were the one who directly confronted him. Your opinion holds the most weight.

C: 「尝试」是什么意思？
E: "Try"?

C: 各位乘客请稍候，航线会议马上开始。
E: Please stand by, passengers. The navigation meeting will be starting soon!

C: 旅程伊始，面对未知的时候…
E: The start of a journey, when we dive into the unknown.

C: 拍摄十二星宿
E: Take a photograph of the twelve constellations

C: 球棒？啊，是说这柄神兵利器吗…抱歉，可以用它交换你的名字吗？
E: Baseball bat? Oh, you mean this marvel of a weapon...? Sorry, but why don't you tell me your name in return for your weapon?

C: 痛苦是有害的，苦难并不能使信仰变得高尚。将大家从苦难中解放出来，正是我们这些黄金裔与生俱来的职责。
E: Suffering's bad for your health, and it won't help your faith much, either. That's why it's our inherent duty as Chrysos Heirs to free everyone from suffering.

C: 不也挺奇怪？
E: Is that not also strange?

C: 黄金裔，庇佑我们……
E: Chrysos Heirs, please protect us...

C: 一定要站在水中吗？
E: Do we really have to get into the water?

C: 翻越雅努斯的万千门径…
E: Surmount the myriad passages of Janus...

C: 空气不怎么清新啊…
E: The air here isn't too fresh...

C: 你将净水含在口中，奋力洗刷口腔内残留的黏土，但这份苦涩却难以被轻易冲漱……
E: You hold the clean water in your mouth, trying hard to rinse away the remaining clay, but the bitterness lingers stubbornly...

C: 该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
E: You could say she's not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.

C: 在它的脚下，沐浴金血的人类们合力修建起一座宏伟的城邦。这就是奥赫玛，翁法罗斯文明的发源地。
E: At their feet, the humans bathed in the golden blood work together to create a great city. This city is Okhema, the origin of Amphoreus civilization.

C: 或者，我可以现场给您烧一下——您只要闻着味道就能分辨出来了！
E: Or, I can burn it for you? You'll be able to tell once you smell it!

C: 显然做不到。
E: Obviously not.

C: 看——万径之门！很显眼吧，*我们*就是在那儿相遇的。
E: Look — the Gate of Infinity! It's very eye-catching, isn't it? That's where we met.

C: 原来击退泰坦那时，缇安女士是去追踪敌人了。
E: So, back when the Titan was repelled, Lady Trianne was off chasing the enemy.

C: 对了，从这儿能远眺重渊。如果要拍照，是个不错的地点。
E: Oh right, you can see the Abyss from here. It's quite a nice place for a photo.

C: 一丝凉意穿透了你的肌肤，紧接着渗入了你的经脉。
E: A chill seeps through your skin, then immediately spreads into your veins.

C: 是阿格莱雅和缇宝老师再度召集起世界上的黄金裔，重启了神谕中的征程。
E: It was Aglaea and Tribbie who rallied the Chrysos Heirs from all over the world once again, leading us to re-embark on this prophesized journey.

C: 对于这十二位泰坦…无论怎么描述，都不如亲耳聆听星宿中的私语更直观。
E: When it comes to the twelve Titans... no words can describe them more vividly than the whispers within the constellations.

C: 白厄阁下…我们的客人似乎有些疲惫。让他们先回浴宫休息片刻吧？
E: Lord Phainon... Our guests seem quite weary. Should we have them return to the bath chamber for some rest?

C: 走吧，丹恒，{NICKNAME}。我会带人护送两位回到你们坠落的地方。
E: Let's go, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}. I'll escort you back to where you landed.

C: 对不起，这个话题有些沉重，我不想展开。请两位听从白厄阁下的建议，尽早回浴宫休息吧。
E: I'm sorry, but I prefer not to delve into such a heavy topic at the moment. Please follow Lord Phainon's suggestion and return to the bath chamber for some rest.

C: 说不定两者兼有呢。万敌，你也该多交几个朋友了。
E: Maybe both. You should really make more friends, Mydei.

C: 现在我们把他支开，任他想去哪哭鼻子都没所谓。
E: Now that we've sent him away, he can go have a good cry wherever he wants.

C: 冷静些，咱们可没有不死之身啊。
E: Hold your horses! We're not exactly immortal here.

C: 但{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}为自己打造了不灭的躯壳，无法被彻底杀死。万敌正在拖延时间…我们必须珍惜他争取到的每一秒。
E: But {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has crafted an indestructible body for themself, one that can't be entirely destroyed. Mydei is buying us time... We need to cherish every second he's fought for.

C: 它象征着「万径之门」{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的神权。传说里，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}是命运三泰坦中最年长的一位…它创造了翁法罗斯的「空间」。
E: The Gate of Infinity. It represents the divine power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. According to legend, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} is the eldest of the Three Titans of Fate. They created the "space" of Amphoreus.

C: 并非每位泰坦都必须以暴力手段击败。
E: Brute force isn't the only option. Some Titans can also be vanquished... in other ways.

C: 脑筋急转弯？
E: Is this a brainteaser?

C: 「你们追随那受诅咒的神谕…将我和同胞们视作猎物……」
E: "Pursuing the cursed prophecy... You've treated my kind as prey..."

C: 怎么回事…这真的是我的记忆吗？
E: What's going on...? Are these really my memories?

C: 真是不挑食啊。
E: You really aren't picky about food.

C: 刚才发生了什么？！
E: What just happened!?

C: 前往奥赫玛的途中，我曾和你聊起天外的「星神」——浮黎就是其中之一，掌管「记忆」命途。
E: Remember the Aeons that I spoke to you about on the way to Okhema? Fuli is one of them and presides over the Path of Remembrance.

C: （想去观景车厢看看……）
E: (I want to take a look in the Parlor Car...)

C: 记忆已经收集完成…
E: All memories have been collected...

C: 悬锋城……
E: Castrum Kremnos...

C: 的确…有些奇妙。悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
E: It's... quite intriguing, indeed. But Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.

C: 浇铸和切割灵魂之地…我们很接近了。
E: We are nearing the place where they cast and cut the souls.

C: 但你比我更有资格…你的身上又添了不少新伤。
E: But you're more deserving of it... You sustained all these new wounds from fighting them.

C: 不得表示表示？
E: Talk is cheap.

C: 小妖精！好啊，我最喜欢跟它们玩了！这次，我一定要把输给它们的木剑赢回来！
E: Fairies! Okay! I love playing with them! Hmph, I'll win back the wooden sword I lost to them!

C: 还有点拿不定主意…
E: I'm still on the fence...

C: 赶鸭子上架，我就是鸭子…
E: I feel like a sitting duck that has been thrown into the deep end...

C: 想要…解脱……
E: I want... freedom...

C: 轻盈的脚步声自你身后传来，一步、两步……
E: You hear soft steps coming closer, one step at a time...

C: 我将召集凯妮斯一派前来会晤，且请阁下稍事等待，随后会有传令士兵为您带路。
E: I'll notify Caenis and the others of your arrival. Kindly wait for a moment. A soldier will be here to guide you shortly.

C: 好心提醒你，此行在黎明云崖，收起那些谵妄之语吧。我已不是当年那位只能看人眼色的辅祭了，对付你有的是手段。
E: Let me remind you that you're currently in Dawncloud, so you had better keep your deranged language to yourself. I am no longer that altar servant from years ago who could only acquiesce to the commands of others. Now, I have plenty of ways to deal with people like you.

C: 让我们像真正的哲学家那样，通过话语和智慧决定你我究竟能为自己争取多少，又能为之牺牲多少吧——准备好了吗，阁下？
E: Let us decide how much we can secure for ourselves and how much we're willing to sacrifice, like true philosophers: with our words and wisdom. Are you ready, my lord?

C: 万敌阁下向我证明了这一点：如果不踏出最开始的一步，往后的一切都无从谈起。
E: Lord Mydei showed me that without taking the first step, all talk of what follows is moot.

C: （不知道说什么，但微笑。）
E: *unsure of what to say, but offers a smile*

C: 阁下也是这么想的吗？但……
E: Is that how you see it too? But...

C: 他们的声音…哀求也好，感谢也罢，全都那样刺耳……
E: Their voices... They pierce my ears... The pleading, the thanks...

C: 所以，遐蝶，你能给我最后一次机会，让我向那恐惧发起冲锋，证明自己并非懦夫。
E: Castorice, will you give me one last chance to charge towards fear and prove that I am no coward?

C: 是我的大头胸针吗？
E: Is it a brooch with my face on it?

C: 蜗居公主，虽然你一直都口口声声说，要找到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，解除自己的诅咒，除此之外什么都不关心……
E: Princess Homebody, you keep talking about needing to find {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, about getting rid of your curse, and you don't care about anything else...

C: 给我带哪了，还是翁法罗斯吗？
E: Where am I? Are we still in Amphoreus?

C: 求您…赐我解脱……
E: Please... grant me release...

C: 在哀地里亚，有些人认为它们是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的仁慈。它将死者的最后一道执念，化作这些生灵，就像是为生命制作了标本。
E: In Aidonia, some think of them as manifestations of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' benevolence. By turning the lingering obsessions of the deceased into these creatures, it is as if the Titan has made life into a specimen.

C: 冥界…子虚乌有……
E: The nether realm... Does not exist...

C: 这位老人家…看来很难接受现实呀。
E: Looks like it's difficult for this gentleman to accept reality.

C: 别回头，向前、向前。
E: Don't look back... Keep moving forward, always.

C: 这是…我的名字…？
E: That's... where my name comes from?

C: 我们将前往那高塔上的法阵…去唤出那藏匿已久的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: We're headed for the matrix inside that tower... to summon {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} from their prolonged concealment.
Heh...

C: 现在，玻吕刻斯思念的拼图已甄于完整，只差最后一块碎片——
E: Now, the puzzle of Pollux's yearnings is nearly complete, with only one final piece remaining —

C: 更遑论行至此地，与我宿命的半身重逢；一同分享我们的过去，眼前的风景……
E: I wouldn't have made it here to reunite with my missing half, and we wouldn't be discussing our past while sharing the same view of this landscape...

C: 好吗，玻吕茜亚？
E: What do you think, Polyxia?

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的奇迹，显现了……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s miracle has appeared...

C: 然后，我，玻吕茜亚残存的理智，徒留在冥界……
E: Then, what was left of my reason was left behind in the nether realm...

C: 元老院说，她会抛下所有人，只因神性正在蚕食她的身心。但各位可曾想过，那些贵人本能向她伸出援手——他们为何选择了冷眼旁观，并将奥赫玛推离逐火的事业？
E: The Council of Elders claims that Aglaea will one day forsake the people because her divinity is eroding her body and soul. But ask yourselves this: Rather than offering her aid and support, why do they choose to watch and push Okhema away from the Flame-Chase Journey?

C: 不过为了公平起见，「金织」女士，我会在所有人面前向你提问——
E: But before that, in the interest of fairness, Lady Goldweaver, I pose a question to you before all who are gathered here:
You...!

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: 首先，对于奥赫玛元老凯妮斯，与「神礼观众」来古士，被指控疏忽职守，徇私枉法，致使尊神奥体遭受严重亵渎……
E: First, Elder Caenis of Okhema and Lygus the Theoros stand accused of neglecting their duties and abusing the law, leading to the egregious blasphemy against a god...

C: 以同样的方式致敬。
E: Salute him in the same way.

C: 瑟希斯啊瑟希斯，你确实不过如此。
E: Oh, Cerces, Cerces. Is that all you've got?

C: 别再经历人间的苦难。
E: Just forget about all the hardships of the mortal realm.

C: 空间折跃倒计时：五，四，三，二，一……
E: Spatial warp countdown: Five, four, three, two, one...

C: 黑潮造物的遗骸。近距离看，的确和泰坦眷属有所不同。
E: These are... the remains of a black tide monster. It does look different from the Titankin from up close.

C: 如果把七贤人都放到{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天平上，一端是那刻夏，另一端一定得放上尤绪弗罗才能保持平衡吧。
E: If we were to place the Seven Sages on the scales of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, Anaxa and Euthyphro would be placed on opposite sides to achieve balance.

C: 地上还有些散落的卷轴。在你操作时，我四下检查一遍。这样应该不会有遗漏了。
E: There are still several more scrolls strewn all over the place. I'll gather them while you pull up those texts, this way, nothing will be overlooked.

C: 如果你是他，在黑潮逼近，眼看自己生命无多的情况下…一定会采取的行动是什么？
E: Put yourself in his shoes. Knowing that the black tide was closing in and your time was running out, what would you have done?

C: 第一，我必须承认，我一直以来都落入了认知陷阱。
E: Before I begin, I must confess I had been stuck in a cognitive trap all this time.

C: 你去找那刻夏到底发生了什么？
E: What happened when you went to look for Anaxa?

C: 它闯入高塔，吞噬了女王最心爱的女儿，还盘踞在寝宫中，俨然一副暴君的模样。
E: It barged into the tall tower and devoured the queen's beloved daughter. It even settled itself in her bedroom, like a tyrant king.

C: 属于我的时刻已经到来。但，或许正是因为坚信生命无价……
E: My time is finally here. However, perhaps because of my firm belief in the immeasurable value of life...

C: 现在，我已抵达终点。回头望去，看见我等亲手谱写的宏伟诗篇，怎能不感到尽兴呢？
E: And now, I have reached the journey's end. When I look back and see the grand epic that I've personally written, how could I not revel in that fact?

C: 不会呀，玻吕茜亚。
E: You're wrong, Polyxia.

C: 我将为你洞开冥界的大门，赐你以第二次生命。地上的生灵必将响应我的呼声，将你接入神圣的白昼。
E: I shall open wide the entrance to the nether realm and grant you a second life. The living beings on this earth shall respond to my call and lead you to the sacred daylight.

C: 诸君，到此为止了。可惜，我与至高之神适性不佳，没能彻底把这家伙的灵魂熔于己身。不过，能从中窥探到这些，也足够令人振奋——
E: Everybody, we've come to the end. Unfortunately, I am not compatible with the supreme being, so I was unable to completely fuse their soul into my own body. However, being able to glean all this from them is exciting enough...

C: 呵，真是十足令人震撼哪…所以背负「火种」的半神，亦将在世界尽头成为新的泰坦，再造天地？
E: Heh, what a startling revelation... This means that the demigods who bear the Coreflames will also become the new Titans at the World's End, thereby shaping a new world?

C: 你还好么，风堇？
E: Are you alright, Hyacine?

C: 那些刺客刻毒，但不愚蠢。他们从未敢打过塞涅俄丝的主意。
E: Those assassins were vicious, but not foolish. They never actually dared to attack Seliose.

C: 她看到了神明畏惧之物——那扎根于黑暗之中，自世界的边缘滋生并吞噬一切的黑潮。
E: She saw what the god fears — rooted in the darkness, spawning from the edge of the world, the black tide that devours all.

C: 平台回溯到了头顶…必须想办法上去！
E: The platform has reset above us... We need to find a way up!

C: 要找准时机呀，大家！
E: Make sure you get the timing right!

C: 塞涅俄丝大人，是你吗？
E: Lady Seliose, is that you?

C: 无法…打破……
E: Can't... be broken...

C: 哈…正好停下歇歇脚。
E: Ha, just in time to take a break.

C: 你们优哉游哉的每一秒…可都是本姑娘争取来的！
E: Every leisurely second you enjoy... was fought for by yours truly!
...Yeah.

C: 你和这世上的河流、海洋，一定能形成很棒的默契呀。
E: You'd move in perfect harmony with the rivers and seas of this world.

C: 既然如此，黑塔。我对「翁法罗斯」世界本质的猜想，你是否也有足够的理由相信了？
E: If that's the case, Herta, do you now have enough reason to believe my conjecture about the true nature of "Amphoreus"?

C: 这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事……
E: This will be a romantic story like none that has come before...

C: 嗯？可我看你刚才，明明吓得灰毛都竖起来了哪？
E: Really? But just a minute ago that gray hair of yours was all standing up, you were so scared.

C: 只要我顺着这条路奔跑下去，什么注定实现的预言、宿命…都追不上我。
E: So, as long as I keep going down this path... all those predestined prophecies and fates will never catch up to me!

C: 它也是火种尚未被归还的两位泰坦之一。
E: Additionally, Aquila is one of the two Titans whose Coreflames have yet to be returned.

C: 说得对，伙计。只凭现在的我还应付不了那家伙，我还需要伙伴们的助力。
E: You're right, partner. As of now, I'm not able to handle that swordmaster on my own. I still need the help of my friends.

C: 但你一定很忙，对吧？所以人家先不打扰你啦，祝你今天…每一天都过得开心！
E: But you must be busy, so I won't bother you for now. Hope your day — every day — is joyful!

C: 你很爽快，白厄阁下，我喜欢跟你这样的人打交道。
E: I enjoy dealing with people as straightforward as you, Lord Phainon.

C: （这块髀石护身符，就送给姐姐吧。希望你每天都能有好运气，将来也不要被任何人欺负！）
E: (I want you to have this knucklebone talisman, big sis. I hope it brings you luck every day and keeps you safe from bullies!)

C: 跑、跑慢点，大姐头！
E: Slow down, Boss!

C: 施压。制造不安。植入焦虑。看来，这是他们所选择的策略。
E: Pressure. Fear. Planting seeds of anxiety. It seems this is the strategy they've chosen.

C: 白厄，我谦逊的学生，信赖的同僚——
E: Phainon, my humble student, my trusted colleague —

C: 你从来都没有变哦，白厄。
E: You've never changed at all, Phainon.

C: 凶手？除了元老院还能是谁？
E: The murderer? The Council of Elders, obviously.

C: 呵呵，幸好我早有准备，可不会被难倒——我的理想，是补全英雄史诗最后的「空白页」。
E: Good thing I came prepared, hehe! My aspiration is nothing less than completing the final "blank page" at the end of the heroes' epic.

C: …做得好，风堇。
E: ...Well done, Hyacine.

C: 那我倒是有个提议。
E: I have a suggestion.

C: 她与泰坦融为一体，再度撑起天穹，只为世间留下一句激昂的寄语——
E: She merged with the Titan, holding up the sky once more, only to leave behind a powerful message for the world —

C: 这次「开拓」，即将圆满收尾！
E: This trailblazing expedition is about to end perfectly!

C: 精神很充沛啊，战友。看来我挑的日子还不错。
E: So full of energy, comrades. Seems I chose the perfect day.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「苏醒吧，『天象画壁』！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Awaken, Celestial Mural!"</color>

C: 看，残像提到的<color=#dbc291ff>「化身印记」</color>——
E: Look, the <color=#dbc291ff>"mark of their manifestation"</color> mentioned by the memory fragment...

C: 是Boss吗？
E: Is that a boss?

C: 索拉比斯……
E: Solabis...

C: 艾格勒这么谨慎吗？
E: Is Aquila really that cautious?

C: 低头看看你们自己吧。自称烈阳之子的民族，却受不起这强光的照射，还把被烫得焦烂的肌肤当作神明的馈赠。
E: Look at yourselves. You call yourselves the Sunborn, and yet you're unable to bear the blinding sunlight. You even consider sunburns and blisters as a gift from the gods.

C: 你们已经病入膏肓了…我的父亲亦是烈阳的信者，他教会了我坚韧和正直，让我向着光芒的方向一路前行——
E: You are all beyond saving... My father was also a disciple of the Sun, but he taught me resilience and justice and guided me toward the light...

C: 英雄塞涅俄丝，她对晖之民的作为失望透顶，决定斩断一切的源头…他们信仰的神明。
E: The hero Seliose, disillusioned by the Sunfolk's deeds, decided to sever the source of it all... The god they so blindly placed their faith in.

C: 不错，这是真实的历史。也正是在她年幼之时，两个民族的矛盾开始激化。雨之民畏惧塞涅俄丝的另一半血脉，从未真正将她视为同胞。
E: Correct. That was true. It was also during her formative years that the conflict between the two tribes began intensifying. The Rainfolk feared the other half of Seliose's bloodline, and never truly saw her as one of their own.

C: 除了约定中的天空后裔，无人有权阅读此处的记忆。
E: Aside from the descendants of the sky named in the pact, no one else is entitled to access the memories here.

C: 现在…就只剩下最后的几步了。
E: Now... only the final steps remain.

C: 但被尘封的历史真相也必须重见天日，因为凡人的命运不该被经过美化的传说淹没。
E: The true history buried in time must come to light. The fates of mortals shouldn't be lost beneath polished myths.

C: 这…就是奥赫玛的末日吗……
E: Is this... the end for Okhema...?

C: 但如今恐怕没有踌躇的余地。
E: But I'm afraid there's no room for doubts now.

C: 那个来古士，找他？
E: That Lygus, should we seek him out?

C: 黄金裔的罪孽…终于化作了神明的惩罚……
E: The sins of the Chrysos Heirs... have finally transformed into divine punishment...

C: 并非…为战斗而生，这双手……
E: For battle... these hands were not meant...

C: 别想用这种方法阻止我回来。
E: Don't try to stop me from coming back like that.

C: 但现在，谎言破碎了。那就代表……
E: But now, the lie has come undone. Which means...

C: 小白……
E: Snowy...

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 该完成仪式了。
E: It's time to complete the ritual.

C: 哦！「羁客」牌，这是最调皮的一张。它常常贴在其他牌的背后出现，擅长伪装成其他卡牌的模样，抽中它可不容易呀！
E: Ah! The Traveler, our little trickster! Always hiding behind other cards, disguising itself. What a rare catch!

C: 真为难啊。那枚戒指肯定承载了许多特别的意义，该用什么来和他对抗？
E: Now this is a tough one. What can I possibly offer against a ring that signifies so much?

C: 这柄长剑随我征战至今。总有一天，我会用它写下英雄的诗篇……
E: This sword has been with me through every battle. One day, it'll help write a heroic epic...

C: 但除了向前，我们早已别无选择。
E: But we haven't had any other choice... except to move forward. Not for a long time now.

C: 即便前方是漫漫长夜，我也相信…那是黎明的方向。在火光的尽头，是终将升起的烈阳。
E: Even if we only see the long, long night ahead, I still believe... that through it, we'll find the dawn on the other side. Beyond these flames, a new sun will someday rise.

C: 白厄哥哥，教我像你一样挥剑吧！
E: Phainon, show me how to use a sword like you do!

C: 看，他们回来啦！
E: Look, they're back!

C: 是呀。看着眼前的世界，悲伤的念头还是化作了现实……
E: Yeah. As I gaze at the world before me, those sorrowful thoughts have become reality...

C: 一代代英雄、神明、世界，都是为了被它「毁灭」而生。
E: Every generation of heroes, gods, and worlds was born only to be destroyed by it.

C: {RUBY_B#昔涟}「PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>」{RUBY_E#}。
E: {RUBY_B#Cyrene}"PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>."{RUBY_E#}

C: 刻律德菈陛下，终于要面见本尊了。
E: At last, I can meet with Her Majesty Cerydra herself.

C: 我知道，总会这样。在贼灵的掩护下，「诡计」半神会带着两枚火种逃之夭夭……
E: I know. It always plays out like this. The Spirithief covers for her, and the "Trickery" demigod escapes with two Coreflames...

C: 一人留在过去。
E: One will remain in the past.

C: 你要去哪里？
E: Where are you going?

C: 真是难以置信，我们的共同点，或许远比想象中更多呢…我完全理解你的困境，所以更不希望你被坏人利用，受到伤害。
E: It's incredible, really. We might have more in common than you think... I know exactly what you're going through, which is why I don't want to see you exploited or hurt.

C: 方法其实一点也不复杂，只要回头，然后一步步离开这里就好啦。
E: It's really easy, actually. Just turn around and walk away from this place.

C: 这是什么…新奇的搭讪技巧吗？
E: Is this... a new way to chat someone up?

C: 在这片不为人知的星域，它不断重复「再创世」的进程，求解摧毁「智识」的方法。
E: Hiding in this segmentum unknown to other lifeforms, it has endlessly repeated the process of "Era Nova," seeking a solution that could obliterate the Erudition.

C: 咦？她的命途图谱……
E: Huh? Her Path chart is...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>什么天外的群星，创造泰坦的神明…看看这世道，被你们的暴行糟蹋成了什么样子！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Stars beyond the sky? Gods who created the Titans? What kind of nonsense! Look at this broken world, and see what your atrocious acts have done!</color>

C: …是啊。
E: ...Yes.

C: 哦？有客人来了。二位好，我是阿格莱雅，爵名「金织」。
E: Oh? We have guests. Welcome. I am Aglaea, the Goldweaver.

C: 「岁月」神谕中揭示的「救世主」，{NICKNAME}，已从天外降临。我等将在救世主的助力下，击碎满溢之杯——
E: The "Deliverer" revealed in the prophecy of "Time," {NICKNAME}, has descended from beyond the sky. With {M#his}{F#her} aid, we shall shatter the Chalice of Plenty...

C: 你…我认得你，你是那暴君的走狗！怎么，来替那小矮子堵我的嘴吗？
E: You... I know you. You're that tyrant's lackey! What, here to shut me up for that little imp?

C: 二位，幸会。我是「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，昏光庭院的战士。比起凯撒的臣子，我更愿意自称…合作伙伴。
E: It is an honor to meet you both. I am the "Dux Brumalis," Seneca, a warrior of the Twilight Courtyard. I prefer to call myself... a partner of the Imperator, rather than a subject.

C: 不必尝试了。
E: No need to try.

C: 虽然不能透露太多，但人家觉得，不妨就以「未来」开篇吧？
E: We can't reveal too much, but I think it wouldn't hurt to start your poem with "The Future."

C: 嗯，比如…「我心怀憧憬，为自己写下明天的寓言。静静守候，直到明天又一个明天之后，它兑现如约而至的诺言」…类似这样？
E: Maybe use something like... "With hope, I write down the tale of tomorrow for myself, silently waiting, day after day, till the moment it fulfills its promise..." How's that?

C: 我会控制水汽，让你们能像深海鲸兽那般听见远方的声音，听清交谈的细节。
E: And I'll control the moisture in the air. That way, you'll be able to listen to sounds from afar, as if you are a whale of the depths, and hear every word of their conversation.

C: 可如今，「真理」二字成了觐见祂的祭品，天才会说：博识尊早已知晓。
E: But now... "truth" has become the sacrificial offering required to gain an audience with THEM, and the geniuses would say that Nous already knew.

C: 那…有什么办法吗？
E: So... how should I do that?

C: 是啊。历史已经改变了，无论人类，还是泰坦，都愿意为了世界的存续拼尽全力。
E: You're right. History has changed. Humans and Titans are both giving their all to keep this world going.

C: 前进吧——然后，明天见！
E: Go on... and see you tomorrow!

C: 一个谎言要用更多谎言维系，裁缝女这话果然不假哪……
E: That seamstress wasn't wrong when she said a lie needs more lies to keep it together...

C: 伟大的王，我听闻星间强敌环伺，我们是否还能百战不殆？
E: Great monarch, I've heard the universe teems with great threats. Can we truly remain invincible?

C: 的确，那不过是酒杯里闪烁的泡影……
E: Yes... just fake bubbles glinting on the surface of poured wine...

C: 凯撒已死！
E: The Imperator is dead!

C: 请带着我的性命…完成步入群星的伟业吧……
E: Take my life... and finish the conquest of stars...

C: 洞穴中的影子献出一切，却只是在戏仿洞外的「生命」，令人惋惜的徒劳。
E: The shadows within the cave gave everything, yet all they did was mimic "life" outside its walls. A futile effort steeped in sorrow.

C: 以一场残酷的献祭，他们点亮此世「律法」的星辰，推动翁法罗斯的命运滚滚向前。
E: Through a brutal sacrifice, they lit the stars of Law in this world, propelling Amphoreus' fate forward.

C: 在法吉娜蜜露的浇灌下，她将于千年的醉梦中醒来，演唱自己使命的最后乐章。
E: Bathed in the Honeydew of Phagousa, she will awaken from her thousand-year dream and sing the final song of her mission.

C: 这场残酷的征程……
E: Now this cruel journey...

C: 「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，生于光历<unbreak>3749</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Brumalis" Seneca. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3749</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: 我看见：一位错把谬误当作真理的觉醒者返回了洞穴，试图将同伴带入{M#他}{F#她}曾沐浴过的阳光……
E: I see an awakened human who has mistakenly taken fallacies as truths, and has returned to the cave to try to bring {M#his}{F#her} friends into the sunlight {F#s}he once bathed in...

C: 容我更正：「拘禁」并非「击败」。对于诸位英雄而言，这微小的差别具备决定性的意义——
E: Allow me to correct your statement: "constrain" does not mean "defeated," and for heroes like yourself, that nuance could make all the difference...

C: 迷茫和顿悟总是形影相随，对于天才更是如此。
E: Confusion and epiphany always go hand in hand. That's particularly true for geniuses.

C: 都提到了{NICKNAME}和我，很容易联想到吧？人家的直觉一向很准。
E: You've already mentioned {NICKNAME} and I, so it's an easy connection to make, no? My intuition has always been very on-point.

C: 接下来，人家就要带上这份力量，短暂离开你的身边，走进漫长的循环啦。
E: Now, I'll carry this power with me... and for a little while, I must part from you, as I step into the long cycles of this world.

C: 「赞达尔」阁下，你已经身陷囹圄了哦？
E: Which means you are now trapped, Lord Zandar.

C: 凯撒，命运三相殿来信了。
E: The Temple of the Three Fates sent a letter, Imperator.

C: 命运三相的祭司不是军人，但是政治家。不要以为他们是在盲目抵抗，这群垂死的狗鼠会为自己的短视穷思竭虑，以至于比他们的敌人精明得多。
E: The priests of the Three Fates aren't soldiers, but politicians. Do not mistakenly believe they don't have a plan. These dying pests will wring out every idea from their brains all for short-sighted gain. They are much shrewder than we are.

C: 鱼儿终究是鱼儿，怎能离开她栖身的海洋？
E: A fish is simply a fish, and she can never leave the ocean she's in.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>因为这片忆潮正来自你的同伴「三月七」……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Because this memoria tide comes from your companion... "March 7th"...</color>

C: <unbreak>97</unbreak>天。
E: <unbreak>97</unbreak> days.

C: 看来，没有从容商议的时间了呀……
E: Looks like we don't have time to keep talking this out...

C: 抱歉，三月。
E: Sorry, March.

C: 本以为「长夜月」会出手阻拦，但这一路倒是风平浪静。
E: I thought Evernight would have done something to stop us, but it's been smooth sailing the whole way through.

C: 但是，访问失败了…
E: But the access failed...

C: 所幸，终点也近在眼前了。
E: Thankfully, our destination is right ahead.

C: 最初的涟漪启程时，也曾像这样为同伴加油打气。这是一句饱含祝福的话语，所以，我也想送给你……
E: The very first ripple cheered up her friend like this before she set off. It's a sentence full of blessings, so I want to say it to you as well...

C: 但现在，如果你执意要这么做，银河无疑会落入最糟糕的结局……
E: But if you insist on doing this right now, then the cosmos will undoubtedly face the worst possible outcome...

C: ——闭嘴！
E: Shush!

C: …{F#她}{M#他}还要多久才会醒来，银狼？
E: ...So, Silver Wolf, how long till {F#s}he wakes?
...Ugh!

C: 没错，我以兵锋作答。
E: That's right. My sword is my answer.

C: 你做出了选择。
E: So you made a decision.

C: 该结束挣扎了，吉奥刻勒斯。你理应以尊严的姿态赴死。
E: It's time to stop struggling, Geocles. Go to your death with dignity.

C: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途。但你会失去的，远比生命更为沉重。」
E: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. What you stand to lose weighs far heavier than life itself."

C: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
E: Stand with me, and become heroes!

C: 我认识的每一个人都已死去，我妄图拯救的世界也支离破碎。
E: Everyone I know is dead, and the world I dared to save has been torn to pieces.

C: 另有一则提醒：<color=#dbc291ff>这一世，一位特立独行的半神偏离了逐火的命运。</color>
E: I have another notice for you: <color=#dbc291ff>In this cycle, an eccentric demigod deviated from their Flame-Chase destiny.</color>

C: 有理由怀疑，这也和「三月七」阁下有关。
E: I have reasons to suspect it also has something to do with Lady "March 7th."

C: 而「开拓」——会为它写下新的起点。
E: And "the Trailblaze" will write a new beginning for this world.

C: 结束这永无止境的轮回吧。
E: Let us end this never-ending cycle.

C: 都说{RUBY_B#爻光}戎韬将军{RUBY_E#}智光昭昭。这会儿怎么看不清局势了？
E: They say the {RUBY_B#Yao Guang}Seer Strategist{RUBY_E#}'s wisdom shines like a beacon. So why can't you see things clearly now?

C: 就把它当作一场长远的投资吧。还请见谅：庇尔波因特上下都在为铁墓忙作一团——尤其是市场开拓部——石心十人难免力有不逮。
E: Think of it as a long-term investment. Please understand that everyone at Pier Point is swamped with Irontomb work, especially the Marketing Development Department. At this rate, even the Ten Stonehearts can only do so much.

C: 知更鸟小姐舍生取义的精神实在令人动容。星穹列车也郑重承诺，不会抛下每一位同伴。
E: Miss Robin, I'm beyond moved by your spirit of self-sacrifice. The Astral Express would also like to make a promise that we won't leave any companion behind.

C: 「那家伙背负着整个世界，每一次呼吸都与翁法罗斯的命运相连。」
E: "Our good buddy now bears the weight of the entire world, and every breath they take is intertwined with Amphoreus's destiny."

C: 「记忆」的行为确有古怪，但她的观点与现状相符：自进入矩阵，我们还未发现任何和德谬歌有关的线索。
E: The Remembrance's behavior is certainly odd, but her assessment aligns with our current reality: Since we entered the Matrix, we haven't found a single clue pointing to the Demiurge.

C: 操作已授权。命途能量读数：「智识」——衰减中。「毁灭」——充盈。
E: Operation authorized. Path energy readings: The Erudition, declining. The Destruction, surging.

C: 还有你，第十三位泰坦。
E: And you, the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan.

C: 听君一席话，如听一席话。
E: Wow, I just learned so much from you.

C: 没有地动山摇，出乎意料地平静……
E: No earthquakes... It's surprisingly quiet.

C: 神谕也千万次昭告不变的命运。
E: The prophecy spoke of our unchanging fates, time and time again.

C: 当然，可别小看我……
E: Of course I do! C'mon, give me some credit...

C: 螺丝咕姆先生！
E: Mr. Screwllum!

C: 小家伙们，干得漂亮。
E: Nicely done, little ones.

C: 抛却身后的一切，只留一场酣畅淋漓的死斗！
E: Cast everything behind you. All that's left is a thrilling, relentless deathmatch!

C: 自登上列车的那天起，这趟旅行就没有「一个人」的说法。所以这次，没人会在时间的尽头独自前行。
E: After someone boards the Express, the word "alone" ceases to exist. So as we reach the end of time, no one will be left to face it alone.

C: 你看，那道照彻树庭的金光，依然在天地间徘徊。就像翁法罗斯的神谕。
E: Look. The golden light that shone upon the Grove still meanders between heaven and earth, like the prophecies of Amphoreus.

C: 其他人，在哪里…
E: Where's... everyone... else...

C: 这样一来，它们就不再是你一个人的回忆。
E: That way, it won't just be your memories alone.

C: 「不要放弃。」
E: "Don't give up."

C: 「真希望有一天，我也能到星间旅行！」
E: "I wish I could go journey among the stars one day!"

C: 「只要和{NICKNAME}一起……」
E: "As long as {NICKNAME} and I are together..."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>逐火是从不断失却，走向坚定舍却的旅途。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Flame-Chase is a journey that changes from constant losses to an unwavering act of release.</color>

C: 求解「生命」的十三因子，汇入原初的混沌——
E: Seek the thirteen factors of "life," and let them converge into the primordial chaos—

C: 将肉体凡胎与权杖相连，直视星神——我尊敬她。
E: To bind a mortal body to a Scepter and stare straight at an Aeon. I respect her for that.

C: 帕姆——！
E: Pom-Pom!

C: 可惜，已经没什么能吓到我了。
E: Too bad nothing really fazes me anymore.

C: …缇安，祝你好运。
E: ...Trianne, good luck.

C: 所以今天，让缇宝老师也享受下难得的孩童时光吧？
E: So today, why don't you let Tribbie enjoy some rare moments of childhood too?

C: 不妥？何来不妥！我只恨自己晚生了许多年，不然那样的宴会，我巴不得从门关月开到机缘月！
E: Inappropriate? What's inappropriate about it? I only wish I were born earlier. I would've partied like that from the Month of Gate all the way to the Month of Fortune!

C: 「你播下的种子，已经生根发芽。」
E: "The seeds you've sown are already sprouting."

C: 哪怕是我也看得出来，你很在意他们，尤其是{NICKNAME}。
E: Even I can tell how much they mean to you, especially {NICKNAME}.

C: 但最后，可以再问你一个问题吗？
E: But may I ask you one last thing?

C: 一眨眼的功夫，回到命运的转折点啦。
E: In the blink of an eye, we have returned to the turning point of fate.

C: 去…看？
E: Go... see?

C: >>>桃子。害怕。
E: >>> Peach. Scared.

C: 陪伴我的，一直都是…
E: The one walking beside me... had always been...

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。你的温柔，总是这样恰到好处。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Your kindness is always just right.

C: 对第一位天才而言，失败只是下一次论证的开始……
E: For the First Genius, failure is simply the beginning of the next inquiry...

C: 这里视野不错。交给你了，螺丝。
E: The view's pretty good here. All yours, Screwy.

C: 联盟所需的「烬灭金血」，无名客手中正好有那么一枚，那是翁法罗斯的英雄卡厄斯兰那赌上性命，从纳努克本尊处取来的。
E: And it just so happens that the Golden Blood of Ruin the Alliance needs is in the Nameless's hands. It was taken by the hero Khaslana of Amphoreus at the cost of his life, directly from Nanook THEMSELF.

C: 沿着左边门后的回廊继续深入，有个放置了某种「奇物」的房间。
E: Go down the corridor behind the door on the left. There's a room where some kind of rare item is stored.

C: 你怎么神神叨叨的，不会也像我之前一样，被怪物刺激到了吧？
E: Why are you so weird about this? You aren't freaked out by the monsters like I was before, are you?

C: 你别恶人先告状，我在这儿站得好好的，你却凭空冒出来…我们两个，谁更可疑？
E: Excuse me, but who are you calling a fake? I was standing right here the whole time. You're the one who just appeared out of nowhere. I have witnesses who can confirm that. So tell me, who do you think looks suspicious here? You or me?

C: 破坏公物真过分。
E: That's destruction of public property. It's unforgivable.

C: 「黑塔•万有应物科」的温槐仁曾经三十三次试图来偷师，被我打得鼻青脸肿。
E: Wen Huairen of the Herta Department of Implement Arts has tried to steal the secret from me <unbreak>33</unbreak> times — for which he was beaten to a pulp like he deserved.

C: 这里应该就是藏宝图标示的房间所在了。
E: This should be the room shown on the treasure map.

C: 看不出来姬子你也爱好八卦…
E: I didn't realize you liked gossip too, Himeko...

C: 给我看看…咦，拍照有一手嘛，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let me see... Hey, you're pretty good, {NICKNAME}.

C: 哎，看来我加班期间发生了很多事啊……
E: *sigh* Sounds like a lot's happened since I last poked my head out the door...

C: 截至目前，你已经获取了三张来历不明的权限认证卡。
E: So far, you have obtained three authentication cards of unknown origins.

C: 隐约可以辨认出是一张特殊权限卡——残角破碎，字面磨损，不知是否还可投入使用。
E: This special access card is vaguely distinguishable from the others — the corners are chipped and the writings are worn out. It's unclear if it works.

C: 这就叫浪漫？那我们聊的「浪漫」可多了。
E: So this is romantic? Then we had even more "romantic" discussions.

C: 听我讲，<color=#dbc291ff>中继器</color>就在<color=#dbc291ff>「嘘实埋间」</color>的旁边！那是一座大型的废弃奇物仓库。
E: Listen, the <color=#dbc291ff>Airwave Repeater</color> is next to the <color=#dbc291ff>Disposal Site</color>! It is a massive warehouse for storing discarded Curios.

C: 无法识别，无法识别，检测到生物情绪波动。
E: Cannot identify. Cannot identify. Lifeform emotional fluctuation detected.

C: 但需要调查的区域不是这里。
E: But this is not the area I should be investigating.

C: 时间流速不一。
E: The flow of time will be different.

C: 至少对我来说，那里有壮绝寂寞的奇观，未知美丽的危险，以及我所苦苦追问的那个人…
E: At least for me, there are lonely wonders, the mysterious charm of danger, and the person I am chasing after...

C: 只能滑入宇宙那不详的颤抖，如同滑下一道黄昏的斜坡
E: But to slide into the shivering calamities of the universe as if sliding down a slope into dusk.

C: …是这样的吧？
E: ... Am I right?

C: 来把多余的备份还给你。
E: I'm here to return the other backup to you.

C: 有些实在无法遗忘的心结会伴随一生，直到我这把年纪，还无法释怀。那时候，这心结，也就成了一辈子的伙伴。
E: Some regrets will always stay in your life. Even at my age, there are regrets I can't let go of. By then, your regrets will become your life-long partner.

C: 它似乎在叫着一个你无法听清的名字。
E: It seems to be calling a name you cannot hear clearly.

C: 不瞒你说，我唯一的爱好就是研究愚人戏，有时也会手痒难耐写些剧本。纯属虚构，当不得真。
E: To tell you the truth, I'm a theater enthusiast. I've written a play or two myself in my spare time. It's pure fiction.

C: 没问题，包在我身上了。
E: No problem. I'll take care of it.

C: 你才发现这事吗？算上她每天早来的三个小时，这都第七天了，你的消息也不怎么灵通嘛。
E: You are only noticing this now? She's been three hours early for work for the past seven days. Looks like you haven't been paying attention.

C: 你想想啊，空间站里往来人员的背景与身份各不相同，但在个人隐私方面大家都达成了一致。
E: Think about it. Despite different backgrounds and identities, people on the space station have reached an agreement on personal privacy.

C: 你可算来了。事态紧急，我就直奔主题啦——阿兰他失踪了。
E: Finally, you're here. This is urgent, so I'll cut to the chase — Arlan's disappeared.

C: （妙语连珠夸赞卡波特的品格）
E: (Spares no effort in praising Capote's character)

C: 艾丝妲，我也觉得阿兰似乎并不是对你有不满。
E: Asta, I don't think Arlan is upset with you.

C: …听不懂。算了，接下来的交给我们就好。事不宜迟，收拾「军团」余孽，夺回科员的所有物！
E: ...Um, I don't understand what it's trying to say. Never mind, just leave the rest to us. There's no time to lose. We are purging Legion remnants and recovering researchers' belongings now!

C: 直接抓回去算了。
E: Let's just capture them and bring them back.

C: 非基座舱段的问题稍后再处理…啊，原来是{NICKNAME}啊。
E: We'll deal with problems outside the base zone later... Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 总之，领导都给机会了，我怎能不珍惜？要是能将功补过，好好表现一番，我说不定还有扭转风评的机会。
E: To put it simply, the leaders have given me an opportunity. How could I not cherish it? If I can make up for my mistakes and do a good job, I may have a chance to prove myself.

C: 冷静，都解决了。
E: Don't worry. It's taken care of.

C: 唉，又不见了？这玩意儿解码起来断断续续的。
E: Ugh, disappeared again? This thing keeps cutting out when I'm deciphering it.

C: 真难受！
E: It's really annoying!

C: 你做了什么？
E: What did you do?

C: 空间站的事我不管，但敢挑衅我的人，我必当百倍奉还。
E: I couldn't care less about what happened with the space station, but I will surely repay the favor tenfold to anyone who dares to taunt me.

C: 前方就是终点了，让我看看花了多少时间…不愧是{NICKNAME}，比我预想中还要快！加油，突破最后的障碍吧。
E: The end is right there in front. Let's see how long you took... You're faster than I expected, {NICKNAME}! Keep going, it's only the final obstacle left.

C: 我就知道，好朋友，你从不会让人失望！
E: I knew it, my good pal, you'll never let me down!

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 谢谢！我们走吧。
E: Thank you! Let's go.

C: 关于安全演练…
E: About the security drill...

C: 你认为眼前的瓦尔特应该是真实的…趁他不开心前收手吧，这里没有虫卵。
E: You're pretty convinced that the Welt standing in front of you is real... Best to back away before he gets grumpy; there are zero eggs here.

C: …看来已经不需要再取证了。
E: ...It looks like our theory has already been confirmed.

C: 走吧，我们去与瓦尔特先生商量对策。
E: Let's talk to Mr. Yang.

C: 将列车被「巨真蛰虫」吞噬的猜想转告给了瓦尔特……
E: Dan Heng tells Welt that he thinks the Express is being swallowed by the Giant Sting.

C: 那就是所有人梦寐以求的美好生活。
E: Sounds like a wonderful life — I'm sure many have dreams of that.

C: 别瞎说，怎么就拜拜了！不过到这个时候，你终于开始对列车有感情了，帕姆也很欣慰帕，让帕姆想想故事从哪里说起才好……
E: Nonsense. This won't be our last meeting! But I'm happy the Express has started to grow on you. Now... where should Pom-Pom start the story?

C: 你别以为一直说这种话我就会感动啊，我这人可是出了名的铁石心肠！
E: *sniff* Don't assume you can reassure me that easily. I've got a heart of stone, you hear?

C: 三月也会担心…这也很正常。麻烦你安慰大家了，{NICKNAME}。
E: It's rare to see March genuinely worried... but given the circumstances. {NICKNAME}, maybe you could try reassuring some of the crew.

C: 看来你似乎有所打算。虽然我并不清楚纯美骑士的传统，但…三月，不着急。
E: At this stage, any plan is a plan worth hearing. March — hang fire. Let's see where this leads us.

C: …替黑塔跑腿？
E: ...Probably running errands for Herta?

C: 别装傻，好好想想。
E: Don't play the fool. Think.

C: 要我说，密卷科这上上下下的年轻人啊，论手脚麻利哪个也比不上你。
E: ...though I confess I did hear someone say you were the shining star of the Department of Insight.

C: 本来重建与复兴的成果已经抚平了一些噪音，但最近<color=#dbc291ff>科员的连续失踪</color>又让事情再度发酵了。
E: Things had settled down a bit with the reconstruction efforts, but the <color=#dbc291ff>researchers' disappearances</color> have rattled them again.

C: 找回一度失去的信任，远比建立它要困难得多，所以我才会感到焦虑。我也担心此事背后存在借机煽动舆情的人。
E: Rebuilding trust is harder than establishing it in the first place... I'm concerned someone's pulling strings to sway public opinion.

C: 我是狗。
E: ...So I'm the dog?

C: …你还是少说两句吧。
E: Ugh, can you leave the talking to me next time?

C: 你看这几摞资料吧，不知是哪个小年轻这么不上道，字搞这么小。
E: See this material here? People are so inconsiderate — how's someone like me supposed to make out the small print?

C: 不妨有话直说。
E: Say what you want to say.

C: 如果此时再有恶性事件发生，无异于火上浇油，会彻底点燃内部的矛盾。
E: Another severe incident would further intensify suspicion and cause great internal strife.

C: 耶佩拉宫在烈焰中倾倒，而后阿弗利特的势力日益壮大，你相信这只是巧合？
E: The Jepella Palace crumbled in the scorching flames, and Ifrit's power has grown by the day ever since. Would you believe it to be merely a coincidence?

C: 而阿德勒通过「能量生命」这一点，早早察觉了<color=#dbc291ff>人体自燃和相位灵火的关系</color>。
E: And Adler already discovered the <color=#dbc291ff>relationship between spontaneous human combustion and the Phase Flame</color> through the concept of "energy lifeforms."

C: 阮•梅小姐是位不折不扣的学者。听闻她此前在沙漠行星小憩，离开时已创造了当地的物种繁荣大奇迹。
E: Miss Ruan Mei is the very image of a scholar. I heard she once took a little vacation on a desert planet. By the time she left, she'd miraculously created a boom in the local ecology!

C: 嗯，我们走吧。
E: Alright, let's go.

C: 等你回来后，就来月台找我。那时你会明白一切。
E: Once you're back, come find me on the railway platform. Then you'll understand everything.

C: 呜呜…呜呜……
E: *sob*... *sob*

C: 我想到有一种「生命形式」，足以令我承认其不可捉摸。
E: I thought of one lifeform that would truly lie beyond my reach.

C: 也因此，我很高兴。在这个几乎都是「如期到来」的故事中，还是有着「意外之喜」。
E: That's where the joy lies. Even the most predictable storylines can have their pleasant surprises.

C: 世上没有不透风的墙，因一些不愿提起的往事，我很难信任自己之外的人。
E: Over time, hidden truths tend to surface. Past traumas, which I'd rather leave behind, have made me skeptical about trusting anyone but myself.

C: 建议：前往地下，寻找培育路径记录，嘶嘶。
E: Suggestion: Proceed to basement. Locate records of cultivation path. *buzz*

C: 谢谢，认识雷金先生之后，我曾经空虚的生活变得充实了，每天都能学习到很多新知识。
E: Thank you. My boring life has become so fulfilling since I met Mr. Regin. I get to learn all sorts of new things every day.

C: 可能他们看到了拥有更好生活的可能，都想努力一点吧。
E: Maybe they all saw the possibility of getting a better life and decided to work harder.

C: 送给一位著名女演员。
E: They're for a famous actress.

C: 起因是我参加了一场贝洛伯格与星际和平公司的文化交流活动，在那里接触了爵士音乐，从此就爱上了这种音乐形式。
E: It all started when I took part in a Belobog and IPC cultural exchange event, where I discovered jazz music. I fell in love with the genre immediately.

C: 我不理解想念的含义，但目前我系统中命令优先级最高的人是你。
E: I do not understand the meaning of "missing" someone. However, you are currently the person with the highest command priority in my system.

C: 他们还不断地问我，什么「是我们的补给到了吗？」。我吓坏了，抓起书包就跑，可是他们看到我跑，反而追着我……
