E: They kept asking me: "Are our supplies here?" I was so scared. I grabbed my book bag and ran for it. But, when they saw me running, they started to chase me...

C: 仅用好喝已不足以形容这碗茶，如果有「茶道」命途，你相信杜老板已经接近这条命途的终点，除了稍微有一丢丢咸……
E: "Delicious" is not enough to describe this tea. If there were a Path of "the way of tea," you are certain that Boss Du would be approaching its absolute pinnacle. If only the salty flavor could be slightly toned down...

C: （向小机器人询问那里的事）
E: (Ask the little robot about the situation)

C: 是的。此次旅程共记录了<unbreak>127</unbreak>条人类行为模式，<unbreak>2891</unbreak>条对话数据，以及<unbreak>46</unbreak>条情感波动记录。这些数据让我对{NICKNAME}与星穹列车有了更深的理解。
E: It was. During this trip, I recorded <unbreak>127</unbreak> human behaviors, <unbreak>2,891</unbreak> items of conversational data, and <unbreak>46</unbreak> instances of emotional fluctuation. This data has allowed me to gain a greater understanding of {NICKNAME} and the Astral Express.

C: 我说哥们儿，不至于吧？钻雪里没啥大过错，不用拿枪尖子捅我吧？
E: My fine fellow, was that really necessary? Is crawling around in the snow a crime these days? I mean, c'mon, surely it doesn't warrant a spearing?

C: 进城？这就回去了？今天还没开张呢妹妹，带个路是小意思，但——
E: The city? Already? I haven't even started trading yet. Showing you the way is easy enough, missy, but it would cost—

C: 欠债还钱——
E: It's never too late...

C: 还能是谁，当然是「星际和平公司」啦，就是到处都能看到它标志的那个「公司」——
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation — who else? The one whose insignia is pretty much everywhere? That IPC!

C: 你们第一次来到贝洛伯格的时候，肯定听人提到过那段历史吧？有关七百多年前的军团入侵、还有因「星核」而生的寒潮……
E: I'm sure you heard pieces of Belobog's history the first time you visited — the Legion's invasion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, how the Stellaron brought about the Eternal Freeze...

C: 横跨整个银河的两拨人，居然就这么偶遇在一起了…命运可真神奇呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: The universe is huge, yet we somehow stumbled onto the same path. Fate truly works in mysterious ways, {NICKNAME}, don't you think?

C: …你们聊得挺欢啊？它都说什么啦？
E: ...Sounds like you two are getting along! What's Numby saying?

C: 嗨！史瓦罗先生，对吗？那旁边这位可爱的小姑娘…肯定就是克拉拉妹妹了！
E: Hello — it's Mr. Svarog, isn't it? And this cute little girl must be Clara!

C: 你应该还知道，在这下层区的某个地方，曾经有一座巨大的兵工厂。那里沉睡着许多…许许多多的兵器，多到足够碾碎一整支军团的先遣队。
E: I assume you're also aware that there was once a large automaton factory in the Underworld. Thousands upon thousands of automatons — enough to crush the Legion's vanguard — lay dormant within.

C: 呃…你、你们究竟是什么来头？！居然连公司的机甲都镇压不了……
E: Ugh... Wh—Who are you people? Not even our tech could take you down...

C: 「各项目组在执行资产评估作业期间，不得影响当地居民正常生活秩序——」
E: Teams are not to disrupt the lives of local inhabitants during the asset evaluation period...

C: 嗯，我请两位过来，就是想听听你们的意见。
E: That's the reason I asked for you to come here. I need your advice.

C: 既然你已经下了决心，我也不必再佯装中立了。我认为你的选择是正确的，布洛妮娅。
E: Now that you've decided, I don't have to pretend to be impartial anymore. I think you're making the right choice, Bronya.

C: 唷…居然就在这个地方，真没想到。
E: Well, would you look at that. I never would've guessed it'd be here.

C: 怪不得！怪不得我们上哪都找不到所谓的「兵工厂」——
E: No wonder we couldn't find the "automaton factory." It was right under our noses all along.

C: 那个…姬子，我们是不是该试着跟她谈判来着？这么聊下去的话……
E: Um... Miss Himeko, sorry for interrupting, but this doesn't sound like a negotiation...

C: 动员的结果，你也看到了。贝洛伯格的孩子们已经做出了决定，他们想靠自己的双手「存护」这个家园。
E: The outcome of our mobilization speaks for itself. The children of Belobog have made their decision. They have chosen to preserve this homeland with their own two hands.

C: …我会为你们争取这个机会。我把你们的境遇和自己童年的经历混为了一谈，这是个重大的错误。
E: I'll fight for this opportunity for you, Bronya. I shouldn't have conflated your own circumstances with my childhood. That was a serious lapse of judgment on my part.

C: 这话说的，我不能在？干嘛这么嫌弃，我又不是你的上级…哦不对，现在应该是了？哈哈，失礼失礼，我还没适应呢！
E: Hey, what's with the hostility? It's not like I'm your boss... Oh, wait, I guess I am now? Haha! My apologies — I'm still getting used to my new place in the hierarchy!

C: …不过也要多加小心，城里的扒手就喜欢挑这种场合下手。请务必保管好私人财物。
E: Please make sure you keep your personal belongings safe — pickpockets tend to take advantage of events like this. We'll be performing additional patrols.

C: 你知道瓦赫医生吗？他做的特效药不仅便宜，还能立刻起效，只需要承担一点点风险……
E: Did you know Dr. Vache? His wonder medicine is cheap and the results are immediate. You just need to be willing to... take a little risk.

C: 不过就算知道有「风险」，大家还是争着抢着想拿到这种药，你知道为什么吗？
E: Even knowing the risk, most people fought tooth and nail to get a hold of the medicine. You know why?

C: 我难以评价。
E: It's tough for me to say.

C: 残破的储物箱里存放着按照实验编号放置的测试药剂，应该就是「互助会」提到的「特效药」了。
E: The old box has some medicine labeled with experiment numbers. This must be the wonder medicine the mutual aid society was talking about.

C: 积分赛的具体规则是什么？
E: What are the rules for the point-based tournament?

C: 您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
E: Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.

C: 若您有想法了，随时与我联系即可！
E: No worries, if a question does arise, feel free to ask me anytime!

C: 毛发彻底干燥，电子屏的本地日期也停留在很久之前……
E: The hair is completely dry, and the date on the screen is from a long time ago

C: 各位好姐姐！听我的，先散了吧。
E: My ladies! Listen to me, please just go now.

C: 我接收的命令是捉拿你们，至于详细的罪责和判罚，裁判团会向你们解释。
E: My orders are to arrest you. It is for the adjudication panel to present you with the nature and penalty of your alleged crimes.

C: 嗯…但我已经在这里待了很久很久了。如果有人帮忙的话，也许就能走出去……
E: Mmm... but I've been here for such a long, long, long time. Maybe if someone helps me, I can get out...

C: 那什么，这事…怎么说呢，咱们要不就别追究了吧？你要是睡眠质量不行的话，可以去娜塔莎那儿整点补剂……
E: So uh, this thing... ah, how about — let's not look into it any further? If you're having problems sleeping, then Natasha will have something for you...

C: 不管了，多一双眼睛也不是坏事。我们试试看吧。
E: Anyway, one more pair of eyes might not be a bad thing. Let's try it out.

C: （该去大桥对面和佩拉会合了。）
E: (It's time to meet Pela across the bridge.)

C: 是个好主意呢。在下层呆得太久，我也已经很久没闻到过花朵的芬芳了。
E: That's a great idea. I've been underground for so long, I almost forgot what flowers smell like.

C: 瓦赫喜欢的花是…
E: What was Vache's favorite flower...?

C: 我从小一个人长大，完全不知道自己的出生日月。养父母把我带到上层区以后，就把领养我的日子当做我的生日来过。
E: As an orphan, I never knew my birthday. My adoptive parents took me to the Overworld and made the day I joined the family my birthday.

C: 该帮娜塔莎挑什么花呢…
E: What flowers should I pick for Nat...

C: 这里的条件…真简陋。不知道这些人在这里住了多久了……
E: The conditions here are so... rudimentary. I wonder how long those people have been living here...

C: 我们该去机械聚落寻找「齿轮与智慧」的下落了。你准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: We need to search for Gears and Wisdom in the Robot Settlement. Are you ready, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嗯，克拉拉也没有头绪……
E: Yeah, I guess...

C: 还能有谁？肯定是偷文物的家伙们。
E: Who do you think? It's obviously the same people who stole the Meteor Fragment.

C: 也只能继续了吧？其实我已经有点乏了……
E: Do we have any other choice? I am starting to feel a little worn out, though...

C: 咦？史瓦罗先生…在和小朋友聊天？
E: Huh? Is Mr. Svarog... talking to other children?

C: 克拉拉姐姐……
E: Big sis Clara...

C: 我…呜哇……
E: I... *whimper*

C: 留在你眼前的选择有，且只有一个……
E: There is only one choice left in front of you...

C: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。
E: You obviously answered wrong. Not a peep can be heard from Mr. Cold Feet. Uh-oh....

C: 啊…{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}说得对！克拉拉得想想办法……
E: Ah... {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} is right! I should think of a way...

C: …哎，你就填「解决纠纷」吧——这么写着不至于太吓人。
E: ...Hmm, just go ahead and put down "dispute resolution" — which won't sound too intimidating, I hope.

C: {NICKNAME}——我想向你请教一下，面试官应该怎么提问比较好？
E: {NICKNAME}, how do you think I should ask the questions as an interviewer?

C: 哈？你什么意思，你是在指责我吗？
E: Huh? What are you trying to say — that it's my fault?

C: 要想真正帮助他们越过难关，就应该给他们正当的工作。所以，我让这些流浪者加入了矿队。难道我做错了吗？
E: They needed honest work to get them through this hardship. So, I let them join the mining team. Can anyone really say I did wrong?

C: …抱歉，你有话要跟我说？
E: ...Sorry, did you have something you wanted to say to me?

C: 他们是在守着这部升降梯吗？咱们能用它直接下去吗？
E: Were they guarding this elevator? Can we use it to go down?

C: 在地下，你没见过的事可太多了，「大小姐」。
E: That's not the only thing you won't have heard of down here, princess.

C: 嗯…不是我想当告密的小人啊，我把这秘密抖给你们，纯粹是看在费斯曼老爷子的面子上。
E: Well... I don't want to be a snitch, but out of my respect for Fersman, I'll tell you a secret.

C: 发呆。
E: Spacing out.

C: 你看到探测器了吗？
E: Did you see the detector?

C: 不对。
E: Wrong.

C: 假如姐姐说了谎，那么姐姐就是小偷。然后，厨子和小贩的证言就会相互矛盾……
E: If she's lying, then that makes her the thief! But then, what the cook and merchant said would contradict each other...

C: 呃，那个…气氛好像有点紧张啊，要不我先撤了？
E: Umm, well... It seems you guys have some issues to sort out. So... maybe I should leave.

C: 这东西…我也算从业多年了，但还从来没见过这样的古代遗物。
E: This device... I've been in the business for a long time, but never have I seen an ancient relic like this one before.

C: 果然是被人偷走了啊…你没有受伤吧，虎克？
E: So it was stolen... You're not hurt are you, Hook?

C: （这是什么宝贝…防毒面罩吗？等一会儿，这上面也有刻字…「匹克」？又是他？）
E: (What's this... a gas mask? Wait a minute, there are some characters engraved on it..."Peak"? This guy again?)

C: 事态紧急，必须如此。我会让信任的参谋暂时接管指挥系统。
E: The battle is reaching a pivotal point. I have to get to the front line. I'll leave the command post to my officers.

C: 不堪一击…但不要放松警惕。
E: It made it easy for us... but we can't let our guards down.

C: 还要方便观测极光…好难挑啊。
E: ...and we need to be able to observe the aurora... This is going to be difficult.

C: 这座废墟里或许就能找到炉具的备用件。让我看看……
E: There might be spare stove parts in the ruin. Lemme see...

C: …好吧，不逗你玩啦。你先休息一下，让我来看看这座炉子吧。
E: ...Oh, uh... Why don't you take a break — I'll have a look at this stove.

C: …你不也是嘛。
E: Hehe, same as you, then.

C: 锵锵——霜纹鲑面包做好了！
E: Ta-da. Frostweave Salmon Bread is ready!

C: 你以前不是说过嘛——「平时太忙了，休息时间只想瘫在床上」……
E: Well, aren't you always saying how you just wanna lie in bed when you get off work?

C: 没错……
E: Yeah...

C: 至于之后该怎么和玲宝沟通…我们俩还得再考虑考虑。
E: As for how we'll communicate with Lynxy in the future... We'll have to have a good think about it.

C: …看来佩拉信任你是有理由的。
E: Looks like Pela was right in trusting you.

C: 那她带你来过吗？
E: So did she ever bring you?

C: 所以我才会成为可可利亚大人的女儿——除了下一任守护者，我没有别的身份。但我，我差得太远了……
E: And thus... I became the daughter of Madam Cocolia. My only identity is that of guardian successor, but I'm... not good enough...

C: 所以，请相信克拉拉！克拉拉会尽力去说服史瓦罗先生。迟早有一天，他能听进去我的话……
E: So, please trust me! I'll try to persuade Mr. Svarog. Hopefully, one day he will finally listen...

C: 我记起来了！当时有个大孩子想跟我抢玩具，我拗不过他，所以干脆就把它紧紧咬住……
E: Alright, well... this one time, a big kid was trying to steal this toy from me. I couldn't outwrestle him for it, so I just bit down hard and hung on for dear life.

C: 话说回来，这把钥匙是拿来开什么的呀？说不定尤利安知道点啥……
E: By the way, what does this key open? Maybe Julian knows...

C: 其实大家都知道，我们的实力相差有多大！孤儿院的大家都只有在路边捡到的玻璃珠，根本比不上那些有钱孩子的弹珠！
E: We were all well aware that we didn't stand a chance! We at the orphanage only had some old glass marbles we scavenged from the side of the road, which were no match for those rich kids' marbles!

C: 不管啦，既然挖出来了，就打开看看吧！
E: Whatever. Since we've already dug it up, let's open it!

C: 那我们就再来抓一次人吧！
E: Say no more — this is gonna be easy!

C: 往那个方向去了…我们快跟上去看看吧？
E: He went in that direction... I think he wants us to follow him!

C: 这里…似乎是铆钉镇的废弃餐厅呢。克拉拉曾经在这里找到了不少罐头…营地里的叔叔阿姨们为此开心了很久。
E: I think this place used to be a restaurant. One time, I found a bunch of canned food here... The vagrants in the camp were so happy.

C: 难道有人住在这里？
E: Is it possible that someone lives here?

C: …我们接下来该怎么做？
E: What should we do now?

C: 哈哈哈哈！瞧咱们这小算盘打的？想得是真美呵。唉，等你们真到了史瓦罗的地盘就懂了，这地下从来就没有那么顺利的事儿。
E: Hahahaha! Our scheme is coming along nicely! But I fear that Svarog just isn't the swaying type. *sigh* You'll understand when you get to his territory. Things never run smoothly down here.

C: 哎哟，这叫什么话！你们仨能跟「地火」打上交道，不是多亏了老桑博引荐嘛？
E: Hey, what are you trying to say!? You guys wouldn't have even gotten to know Wildfire without my help, right?

C: 测试是什么内容？
E: What's the test?

C: 别想那些没用的了，这家伙要进攻了！
E: Wishful thinking, it's about to attack!

C: 要守护你，要守护她，乌有的女王说空虚的话
E: You to protect, her to defend, queen of oblivion lies with no end

C: 不错，还差两步，走走走。
E: Great, only two more steps to go. Let's move.

C: 散热基板
E: Heat sink substrate.

C: 啊？居然蒙对了。
E: Huh? Lucky guess.
Stellaron...

C: 目标展现出的敌意大幅超出基准值。维持原有的计算结果。
E: Target hostility significantly exceeds base index. Calculation result remains unchanged.

C: …这是…这里为什么还有个机器人？
E: ...This is... Why is there a robot here?

C: 我们不会对他们做什么…虽然史瓦罗堵死了炉心，但他一直给流浪者提供庇护，算是一件善举……
E: We'll leave them be... Svarog may have blocked off the Furnace Core, but he's provided shelter to the vagrants from the beginning. An admirable deed.

C: 地下有许多无家可归的人需要照料，若不是缺乏安全感，他们也不会为了生存做出触犯底线的行为。
E: There are many homeless people in the Underworld. If they had safety and security, they wouldn't have to struggle to survive.

C: 喂！你这个大嘴巴。
E: Hey! You bigmouth!

C: 玩偶？小朋友，先拿来给我看看吧……
E: Teddy bear? How about I take a look at it first, little missy...

C: 不过别慌，你们这玩偶熊身上的宝石也价值不俗。要是有人愿意出大价钱买下，你们的探针也就有着落了。
E: But don't worry, the gems on your teddy bear are also very valuable. You'll have the chance to bid on the probe if someone's willing to pay a high price for him.

C: …怎么，不想让我占到便宜是吧？那我偏要出来竞个价，看看你们这玩偶里藏着什么玄机，哼！
E: ...Don't want me to profit from your item, huh? Well in that case, I'll just have to place a bid and solve the mystery of your teddy bear, hahaha!

C: 对了，我在找歌德大饭店的掌柜歌蒂——你要是在哪见到她了，记得跟我说一声。
E: By the way, I'm looking for Gertie, manager of the Goethe Grand Hotel. Please tell me if you see her.

C: 虎克，这是你奶奶吗？
E: Hook, is this your grandma?

C: 稍等一下，让我看看……
E: Wait a minute, let me see...

C: 和他一起注册的好像还有另一个矿工，我还有点印象——走吧，我们去找他们盘问一下。
E: ...And I think there was a miner who registered with him. Come on, let's go and interrogate them.

C: 走吧，我们回磐岩镇上去抓小偷！
E: Let's head back to Boulder Town and catch the thief!

C: 后悔没和小偷做交易了？
E: Do you regret not making a deal with the thief?

C: 外来…外来者…克拉拉…的朋友。
E: Outssssiders... F—Friends of Clara.

C: 第一手证词可是非常宝贵的。
E: Witnesses' firsthand accounts are crucial.

C: 不过，这附近是堆放机械垃圾的地方啊。难道……
E: This is where the mechanical waste is disposed of though. Could it be...

C: 嗯…也对，毕竟大多数人都只把机器人看作工具而已…但克拉拉还是会尊重{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，还有大家的选择。
E: I guess most people only see robots as tools. I'll try not to hold it against you.

C: 个体产生超脱控制的自我意识，其概率约为<unbreak>0.12%</unbreak>。对于未接入网络者而言，该概率提升为<unbreak>3.23%</unbreak>。
E: The likelihood of a robot gaining sentience beyond control is approximately <unbreak>0.12%</unbreak>. For those that aren't connected to the network, the chance climbs to <unbreak>3.23%</unbreak>.

C: 克拉拉认为，不论是人类还是机器人，只要拥有了「情感」这种东西，就值得被善意对待。
E: I think that anyone with emotion should be treated with dignity, regardless of whether they are a human or robot.

C: 我可以想办法，让帕斯卡不再去偷窃、不再伤害别人…克拉拉有自信能办到这件事。
E: I'm confident that I can prevent Pascal from stealing and harming others.

C: （还是先暂时离开吧……）
E: (Let's get out of here...)

C: 帕斯卡，执行，任务，来自克拉拉！
E: Pascal, carry out, Clara, mission!

C: 抱歉，希露瓦…我能问问，杰帕德戍卫官是怎么和你说的吗？
E: Sorry, Serval... but can you tell me what Captain Gepard told you?

C: 这是敌袭警报…整个后备区的铁卫都要和我们为敌了。
E: That's the enemy attack alarm... Every Silvermane Guard in the reserve zone just became our enemy.

C: …算了。我习惯了，就这样吧。
E: ...Well, whatever. I've gotten used to it.

C: 啊…这是从我祖上一路传下来的宝贝。虽然我也不知道它里面装的到底是什么…但它对我来说十分重要。
E: Oh... This is a family heirloom. Even though I don't know exactly what's inside, it's still very important to me.

C: 我感觉到了，困住我的力量…又在逐渐接近我。一步一步…又要重新把我裹入黑暗……
E: I can feel the power trapping me... coming nearer again. It's coming, one step at a time... to wrap me in darkness once again...

C: 对！难道…难道她已经来过这里了？
E: Yeah! So she's... she's been here already?

C: 又是从前没见过的新形态怪物呢。
E: Looks like another completely new monster.

C: 之后发生的事…你也清楚了。
E: As for what came later... you know as well as I.

C: 亏你这时候还有心情开玩笑啊……
E: I'm impressed you can still think up jokes right now...

C: 你说人性的深处是愚蠢和畏缩，也许不假，绝境会映出人心中最阴暗的一面。
E: You say that conceit and cowardice lie in the depths of human nature — perhaps you're right... desperation sheds light on the darkest recesses of the heart.

C: …好。差点忘了，你们还在被城里的铁卫通缉…虽然我是下层区人，但起码不像你们这么显眼。
E: Right... I almost forgot, you're still wanted by the guards... I might be an Underworlder, but at least I don't stand out as much as you guys.

C: 你向艾丝妲说明了查宝的来历，以及那位锲而不舍的推销员的故事……
E: Telling Asta about Findie's origin and the story of a certain indefatigable salesperson...

C: 原来这款寻物仪也会说话呀。
E: So this finder is able to talk.

C: 对啊，现在实在不是一个合适的时机。
E: That's right. This is not the right time to do so.

C: 她是什么铁人？这不是才出了事故吗……
E: Is she made of iron? She was just in an accident!

C: 这样想想，不会老去也有这样的坏处呀……
E: If you think about it, not being able to age has its downsides too, huh...

C: 唉，虽然我认为丹枢的问题不该牵连到司内正常的学术工作。
E: *sigh* I don't think Dan Shu's crimes should influence the academic work being carried out in the commission.

C: 树身上传来的反作用力令你差点摔倒在地。你这才意识到仙舟上的树似乎不是普通的树，至少这一棵不是。
E: The rebound from the tree almost knocks you over. Only now do you realize the Xianzhou's trees don't seem to be ordinary trees... Not this tree, at least.

C: 站好了吗？
E: Ready?

C: 我好像见过这个「阴晴伞」…
E: Where have I seen that Baroumbrella before...

C: 也许这确实和你没有什么关系，但世事并无绝对，无穷的远方，无数的人们，都和你息息相关。
E: You might think it has nothing to do with you, but nothing is ever absolute. Infinite people across countless locations are all actually connected to you.

C: 再来！再来！嚯哈哈哈哈！
E: Encore! Encore! Hohoho!

C: 光有题材和对象，却无深邃的诗情和巧妙的设喻，终究不过是一段大白呱。
E: Subject and theme alone without profundity, sentimentality, or the ingenuity of metaphor — without all that, it's just boring.

C: 拜托你了呱。
E: Thank you, croak.

C: 我现在就删掉……
E: I'll delete it now...

C: 我再考虑一下。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 什么杨先生？平仄平平平平平。哼，没有对仗工整，我必须亲自将你赶走！
E: What Mr. Yang? This clause does not contrast with my line. I must oust you myself!

C: 静斋卜官的人品与工作能力都非常棒，是非常出色的工作伙伴。
E: Jingzhai has a great personality and excels at what she does. She is an amazing colleague.

C: …我有一种不祥的预感。
E: ...I have a bad feeling about this.

C: 我来听你说「美丽狐仙聊天」…
E: I'm here for the Foxian Beauty Chat...

C: 你是谁啊？
E: Who are you?

C: 过去的我埋头于研究，从没有考虑过恋爱…但直到我接触了「美丽狐仙聊天」，我改变了！不对！我重生了！
E: In the past, I buried myself in research and never once had I thought about love... But now, after I started socializing on the Foxian Beauty Chat service, I've changed! No, reborn!

C: 尘寰相见！好礼相送！
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil! Luxurious gifts from beyond!

C: 我要是有你这么闲，我宁愿去多打两轮牌。
E: If I were as free as you are, I'd rather go have another round of games or two.

C: …啊，对了，别忘了你买茶钱，我必须还给你。你要的茶叶太多了，我根本给不了，请接受我的退款。
E: ...Oh right, don't forget the money you paid to buy the tea leaves. The tea you paid for is too much, there's no way I can provide that much to you, so please accept my refund.

C: 真狐人就可以骗你了吗？
E: So can real foxians deceive you?

C: 我不敢想，幸好我还没有出发。
E: Just thinking about it makes me shudder. Thankfully I hadn't set out yet.

C: 「美丽狐仙聊天服务」的线下工作人员就在星槎海，接头暗号是<color=#dbc291ff>「尘寰相见，好礼相送」</color>。
E: The in-person operation for the "Foxian Beauty Chat Service" is located in Starskiff Haven, and the pass phrase is <color=#dbc291ff>"Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond."</color>

C: 我会把学会的识别插件装在你的手机里，这样你就能识别到这种标记，并且把它拍摄下来——咳，按考古领域说法，也许该叫「拓印」，光学拓印。
E: I'll install the Guild's detection plug-in to your phone. That way, you'll be able to recognize the markings and take pictures of them... Ahem, in terms of archaeology, it should probably be called "optical rubbing."

C: 真的没有了？你把我标出来的地方全都找遍了？没有标出来的呢？
E: Are you sure? Did you do a thorough search in the locations I marked? What about those I didn't mark?

C: 我想，贝尼尼学士之所以画下这些人尽皆知的历史，当然是为了告诉后来的学士，在仙舟已追寻不到任何有价值的秘密。
E: It seems to me that Bernini drew the well-known historical events because he wanted to tell the other scholars that Xianzhou no longer bore any secrets worth pursuing.

C: 是贝尼尼学士将我带上了这条道路，也是他向学会举荐我，让我正式成为了一名学士。如果不能再见到他，我想走一遍他走过的路。
E: Bernini led me to this career and made me an official scholar with his recommendation. Since I can never see him again, I'd like to walk the path he walked before.

C: 你变年轻了？！
E: Have you gotten younger!?

C: （提及陶德）
E: (Bring up Todd)

C: 明白了，交给我吧。
E: I see. Leave it to me.

C: …你根本就不是十王司的冥差，别在这平白无故地吓人。
E: ...You're not a Ten-Lords spiritfarer — why are you trying to frighten people!?

C: 一只最新款的玉兆手镯，不能解锁；还有一枚金色的徽章。
E: A jade abacus bracelet with the latest design that cannot be unlocked, with a Golden Badge.

C: 你手中的钱包里没有钱，你在其中找到了一张叠好的照片。
E: No money has been found in this wallet. You can only see a folded photo inside of it.

C: 这个药方的字迹…和你交给我的那张一模一样。
E: The handwriting on this prescription is exactly the same as on the one you gave to me...

C: 哼，虽然她有事瞒着我。但我毕竟答应了她，要去救她的心上人。
E: Hmph, she hid everything from me... but I promised her I'd save her beloved.

C: 还没…买…
E: I haven't... bought that... yet...

C: 戴葫芦的矮个子小姑娘。
E: The short girlie carrying a gourd around.

C: 头好疼…怎么会？
E: M—My head... How can that be?

C: （这十王司的判官好厉害，可是半夏你……）
E: (This Ten-Lords Commission judge packs a punch! But Banxia, you—)

C: 我没有忘记。
E: Yes, I remember.

C: …等等，我的头有些晕。
E: ...Wait, I feel a bit dizzy.

C: 你什么都不要说了，我会隔着头盔把药灌进去。
E: Enough talk. Here, I'll pour the medicine through the helmet.

C: 救、救命啊——
E: H—Help...!

C: 惩罚太轻了！
E: That's way too light a punishment!

C: 你的意思，我听得很明白了。但眼下我无法答复。
E: I understand your concern... but I have nothing more to say on the matter at present.

C: 合理！
E: Very reasonable!

C: 你们穿过空无一人的龙宫废墟，来到建木玄根处。
E: The group walks through the empty ruins of the Dragon Palace and arrives at the roots of Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 奇怪，这和解除封印时不同，为什么没有反应？
E: Strange... This is different from the breaking of the seal. Why's there no reaction?

C: 我们撤？
E: Should we retreat?

C: 唉，我知道在长老心目中我始终是个多余的存在，是没能继承龙尊力量的伪龙。
E: I always felt useless in the eyes of the elders — a false dragon who failed to inherit the power of the High Elder...

C: 龙师们也好，族人们也好，都以为龙尊才是持明族唯一的救赎，那只是高谈阔论罢了，根本不切实际！你们见识过「慈怀药王」能做到什么吗？
E: The Preceptors, our people... they think that the High Elder is the Vidyadhara's only savior. Arrogant, illogical! Have you seen what Merciful Medicus can do?

C: 「慈怀药王」一定能帮助我们开枝散叶，龙尊做不到的，药王可以做到。
E: Merciful Medicus will help us to grow our population and bear descendants. They can do what the High Elder cannot.

C: 那位侍女是叫浣溪吗？
E: Is the new maid named Huanxi?

C: 确实，很难想象异象的出现似乎是为了食物。
E: Indeed. It's hard to imagine that food is the reason of the phenomenon's appearance.

C: 让我先看看货帕。
E: I'll be the judge of that.

C: 建木生发引起了不正常的阴阳相感现象，导致整个机巧鸟系统出现了故障。事发当日的影像资料抢救不回来了，连事发前日的也损坏了不少。
E: The resurrection brought about unusual yinyang phenomena that caused the entire cycrane system to malfunction. The image data from the day of the incident is beyond restoration, and data from the day before was badly affected.

C: 杨叔啊，以貌取人可不好啊！
E: —Cover!?

C: 准备好了，来吧。
E: Ready, let's do it.

C: 正是如此，有劳各位了。
E: Exactly. Thank you again for your help.

C: 你人真好！以后我会常来光顾这家店的。
E: Aw, that's so kind of you! You just made a loyal customer out of me.

C: （你别捣乱，我正在高速思考。）
E: (Quit messing around, I'm thinking.)

C: 问您小子话呢！您是来做什么的？
E: Excuse me, sir! May I ask whether you're here on business, or...?

C: 这瓦尔特倒是很瓦尔特…
E: Strong Mr. Yang vibes...

C: 那可不行。私自收客人的钱，这要是被老板知道，我就死定了。
E: No can do. If the boss found out that I took a bribe, I'd be in big trouble.

C: （啊…这…这是因为，我们平时遵纪守法，很难理解坏家伙们的逻辑。）
E: (B—Because, uhh... Well, we're too law-abiding to understand bad guy logic.)

C: 谢谢二位恩公……
E: Thank you, benefactors...

C: 哕…味道可怕…
E: *retch* ...Anyone have a bucket...?

C: 晴霓收到了一条短信，皱着眉头地读了起来。
E: Qingni receives a message and frowns as she reads it.

C: 你当然是个优秀的战士，但你敏锐的观察力更加令我叹服。无论宝箱藏得有多深，你都能把它找出来。
E: You're a great fighter, but your perception is even more impressive. No matter how well a treasure chest is hidden, you're always able to spot it...

C: 驭空司舵是他一手提拔上来的，那些往事他大概比谁都清楚。
E: He promoted Helm Master Yukong himself — he probably knows more about her past than anyone.

C: 当年的驭空绝不是如今这般模样，案牍劳形，枯坐书斋。
E: The Yukong of the past was nothing like she is now — spending her days surrounded by documents at her desk.

C: 因为我已经触碰过天空了。
E: ...I guess I already touched the sky.

C: …您明明知道我有这个天赋！我可以成为罗浮最棒的飞行士，就像您一样！
E: ...You know I have the talent to make it! I can become the Luofu's best pilot, just like you were!

C: 是…帝弓司命的神矢……
E: ...The Reignbow Arbiter's divine arrow...

C: 别紧张呀，{NICKNAME}。第一个问题是无关紧要的，回答真话假话都可以。这个游戏的趣味呢，在第二个问题时才会浮现……
E: Don't be nervous, {NICKNAME}, the first question is quite trivial — you can tell the truth or tell a lie. It's the second question where the game gets interesting...

C: （说谎）我恨你。
E: (Lie) I hate you.

C: （当我在空间站苏醒时，我记得卡芙卡…但别的事情都很模糊，是不是该问问我自己的事呢？）
E: (When I came to on the space station, I remember seeing Kafka... but everything before that is a blur. Shouldn't I ask about my past?)

C: 我成长在一个被星核污染的星球：天衣五——「新巴比伦」，在那里生长的人类不知道什么是恐惧，这种概念根本不存在。
E: I grew up on a planet contaminated by a Stellaron: Pteruges-V — "New Babylon." Humans there don't know what fear is — the concept itself simply doesn't exist.
Oh...

C: 这哪是让旅客登陆的地方呀，这是卸货的码头吧！谁给咱们指引来的？
E: This area isn't for receiving guests, it's for unloading cargo! Who decided to send us this way?

C: 堕入魔阴身的云骑军……
E: A Cloud Knight stricken with mara...

C: 我本来是不担忧，但她一副胸有成竹的样子，我就担心起来了……
E: I was perfectly calm until she volunteered to help...

C: （倒悬古海，重游故地…这是封寄给丹恒的信。是什么人送来的？问问列车长吧……）
E: (Upend the ancient sea and return to old ground... It's a letter for Dan Heng, but who is it from? I should ask the conductor...)

C: 那书行笔风趣，十页有九是作者在不同世界里星槎坠毁，频频遇险的经历，还夹杂着对当地物种和生态的记录。
E: It was actually really interesting — <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of it was about starskiff crashes on different worlds and dangerous situations. It also had records of local species and ecosystems.

C: 无妨，便陪你多走段路吧，但结局不会改变，我终会站在胜利的那一方。
E: No matter. I will deviate if you insist, but this does not change how things will end. Ultimately, I will stand on the side of victory.

C: 猜的不错。命运就是这般爱开玩笑。
E: Correct. Such are the twists of destiny.

C: 走吧，我带你去找三月七。
E: Let's go, I'll bring you to March 7th.

C: 你以为剑术只是胜负的游戏么？未来的剑首？
E: Did you think this swordplay was just a game of victory and defeat, future Sword Champion?

C: 哎，先别急嘛。要是人人都能轻而易举获得长生，我们早就发展壮大，也不必那么掩人耳目了。
E: Ah, let's not get ahead of ourselves. If it were so easy, we'd be a far larger group, and there'd be no need for secrecy.

C: 我也无所谓。
E: I don't mind either.

C: 看得出来，你的确身手不凡。
E: It seems you have some impressive skills in your arsenal.

C: 那可不是什么幻觉。其中之一是本座的投射，方便咱们随时交流。另一个符玄的出现，说明本座存在于你的这段经历中。
E: Your eyes are working just fine. One of the Fu Xuans is a projection of me which allows us to communicate with each other at all times. The other Fu Xuan indicates that I existed during this part of your experience.

C: 那么我们先从准备演算所需的「材料」开始。三月小姐的「记忆」这条是靠不住啦。为了能让穷观阵更精确，你得提供些与过去经历有关的东西…什么都行。
E: Let's begin then by preparing the requisite inference materials. Miss March, your memory is unreliable. To guarantee the Matrix's accuracy, you'll have to provide something related to your past experience... anything will do.

C: 对、对不住，太卜大人！
E: S—Sorry, Master Diviner!

C: 嗯？接下来的战斗？
E: Huh? Which next fight?

C: 此外…小三月，未来对我们来说才是最重要的，不是吗？
E: Another thing... The future is what's most important for us. Don't you agree, March?

C: （自从三月拜了彦卿和云璃两位师父学剑，列车里都听不见她的声音了……）
E: (Ever since March started learning swordplay from Yanqing and Yunli, her voice has been absent on the Express...)

C: 爷爷说了，他可以吃。
E: Then we can bring the leftovers to Grandpa.

C: 你将球棒，你最信赖的伙伴——也许仅次于三月七、丹恒、瓦尔特、姬子和帕姆的伙伴，放在云璃面前。
E: You place your beloved bat, your most trusted companion — perhaps second only to the likes of March 7th, Dan Heng, Welt, Himeko, and Pom-Pom — before Yunli's gaze.

C: 爷爷说了，剑无定型。你这球棒倒也算是一种「剑」。不过爷爷还说了，物肖主人形。你知道吗？你的武器会反映出你的习惯和性格。
E: Grandpa said that a sword doesn't have to be constrained by its shape, so in a sense, your bat is a sword too. He also said that a weapon mimics its master, so your bat actually reflects your habits and nature, you know?

C: 帕沃尔先生的故乡才受邀加入泛银河贸易体系不久，这一次他带着使团前来仙舟做客，不仅为了生意，也是为了归还属于仙舟的东西。
E: Mr. Paavo's planet recently joined the Pan-Cosmic Trade System. He brought his delegation here this time not only for business but also to return something that belongs to the Xianzhou.

C: …你是爷爷派来的，他可不希望你来帮我。
E: ...Grandpa sent you here. Surely he doesn't want you to help me.

C: 哎，现在可不是你滥用好名声的时候。
E: Now is not the time to use your reputation like that.

C: 不对，老夫想起来了，我的宝贝金人也被人给砸坏了！唉呀！
E: Wait, no. I just remembered, my precious aurumatons were smashed!

C: 魔剑已经影响了你的认知，我会帮你摆脱它！我会亲手打碎这个幻象——还有这把剑！
E: That cursed sword has messed with your ability to think, but I'll break you free from its grip! I'll shatter its illusion... and the sword itself!

C: 好啊，如果真的熬不住了，我会把身体交给你支配的。
E: Yeah, sure. If I really can't handle things anymore, I'll leave my body to you.

C: …在我看来，这毫无疑问是一场「谋杀」。
E: ...In my estimation, there's no question about it. This is murder.

C: 二位既然是橡木家系派来的，现场就任由你们调查了。我会在一旁待命。
E: You are guests of the Oak Family, so you may investigate the crime scene. I'll be on standby over here.

C: ——何必那么认真呢？
E: ...Why so serious?

C: 似乎是袭击者从别处偷来的美梦剧团，故意放在这儿的…真气人，简直就是不把公共秩序放在眼里。
E: Seems like the assailant stole the troupe from elsewhere and deliberately placed them here. What nerve... They don't even have the slightest consideration for public order.
Oh...

C: 没想到你们竟敢跳过上一道谜题，那可是我的自信之作！算了算了，花火大人不记小人过，来吧，这就是最后一问——
E: I didn't expect you to skip the final puzzle. That's on me! Alright, alright, Miss Sparkle cares not for the faults of ants like me. Come then, this is the final question...

C: 接下来…来会会这两个小家伙吧。
E: Next up... let's interview those two over there.

C: 随着沙马里先生的惊醒，他的随身物品本应一并从梦境中消失才对。这张证件应该是花火小姐放置的，为了证明她确实袭击过某个人。
E: Mr. Shamari's belongings should have disappeared alongside him as he woke from the Dreamscape. The fact this ID is here means Miss Sparkle placed it here on purpose to prove that she definitely attacked someone.

C: 听起来确有相似之处，要是能有机会亲眼见识它的制造机理就更好了。
E: It sounds like similar technology. Maybe we'll get a better understanding if we see the manufacturing process with our own eyes.

C: 本待「穷观阵」运转，再教各位见识我太卜司奇技…唉，让客人久等，是我失礼。
E: I was waiting for the Matrix of Prescience to resume operations so that you might gain insight into my divination techniques... *sigh* It was rude of me to keep you waiting so long.

C: 我也有很多疑惑——但我可以等。
E: There are many things I want to know — but they can wait.

C: 明白。愚我两次，其错在我。
E: Got it. Fool me twice, shame on me.

C: 既然你问了那三个问题之一，就说明一切都很顺利。准备好听我的答案了吗？
E: Since you asked one of the three questions, it means everything is going smoothly. Are you ready to hear my answer?

C: 我就知道，将军一微笑，咱们就要被差遣了！
E: The general's smiling again — definitely errands...

C: 我们这些小把式慌什么神呀，让大人物们为大事操心吧。这才是保持快乐身心的秘诀。
E: What do subordinates like us have to panic about? Let the big shots worry about the big events. That's the secret to happiness.

C: 听将军说，丹鼎司中有叛徒。
E: According to the general, there are traitors in the Alchemy Commission.

C: 我对此倒是不意外。毕竟「丹鼎司」的丹士们曾是罗浮仙舟上，离仙迹最近的人啊。
E: I'm not overly surprised. The Alchemy Commission's alchemists were once closer to the Arbor than anyone else on the Luofu.

C: 你耳朵真厉害。
E: Your ears are really sharp!

C: 没错！要是你没用内力暗算我，我肯定一拳就给你打得满嘴血！
E: That's right! If you hadn't cheated, I would've knocked your lights out!

C: 孩子的父母曾是工造司的工匠，想来是那里让她心有怀恋吧。
E: Her parents used to be artisans in the Commission, so I think she has some nostalgic connection to the place.

C: 辛苦你陪我走这一遭，{NICKNAME}。我想，我在长乐天的心愿也暂时了却了。
E: Thank you for sticking with me through all of this, {NICKNAME}. I think my aspirations in Exalting Sanctum have been met, for now.

C: （情况有些怪异，还是去神策府找青镞商量一下吧。）
E: (Something feels off — I'd better talk to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

C: 青镞转身离开。你在神策府等了许久，才看到她匆匆折返回来。
E: Qingzu turns around and leaves. It was a long time before she returns to the Seat of Divine Foresight hurriedly.

C: 还是很难相信丹枢骗了我…
E: I can't believe Dan Shu lied to me...

C: 因为我放生的法乌努斯红毛羊丢了啊！那些红彤彤的小羊在故乡濒临灭绝，我重金买下一大堆，想将它们放生到了鳞渊境……
E: It's because the Faunus Red Sheep I released have gone missing! The lovely sheep with crimson wool is an endangered species in their home. So, I've spent a fortune to buy a herd of them, thinking of releasing them into the Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 这样吧，你和我一起去见见「放生帮」的「四大善人」说明情况吧？哦对，现在好像是「三大善人」了……
E: Why don't you come with me to meet the Four Benevolent Ones of the Unshackled and explain yourself? Sorry, it's the Three Benevolent Ones now...

C: 你们先吵着，我还有事。
E: I'll leave you to your argument.

C: 您想必也看出来了…我们三人放生的生命构成了一条食物链，希斯曼的植物被我的法乌努斯红毛羊吃掉，而我的小羊又被冬妮娅的猛兽吃掉……
E: I believe you can tell that the creatures we released have formed a food chain. Heathmann's plants were eaten by my Faunus Red Sheep, and my sheep were eaten by Tonya's beasts...

C: 咱们什么时候是师徒了？
E: When did I become your student?

C: 放心好了，刚才都是意外状况。我已经调试好了这几台机兵的程序，现在它们只会按照我设定好的模式行动。
E: Don't worry. What happened earlier was just an accident. I've debugged their programming, so now these automatons will only act according to the mode I've set.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here.

C: （我总觉得这件事有哪儿不太对劲。）
E: (I have a feeling something's amiss about all this.)

C: 不知这两个白痴到底怎么会被说服的。这机械生物能是植物吗？你说那个希斯曼到底是怎么想的？
E: I wonder how those two idiots were convinced. Can a mechanical creature be counted as a plant? What was going through Heathmann's head?

C: 对咯！<size=36>你没得选！</size>
E: Indeed! <size=36>You have no choice!</size>

C: 有鬼啊啊啊啊啊——
E: It's a ghoooost!

C: 去除神秘感，也就镇伏了鬼怪。
E: Ghosts can't exist without mystery.

C: 不帮。
E: Nope.

C: 十王司真是不挑不拣，连你这样的废物都能成为判官，真是让人笑掉大牙。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission needs to overhaul their hiring criteria. How did someone as useless as you ever become a judge?

C: 要本大爷开金口安慰人？想屁吃。
E: Keep dreaming. I have nothing nice to say to anyone.

C: 人类的记载中，当然只会吹嘘将军的战功了！
E: Of course the human records would flatter their general!

C: 我们…似乎回到了绥园里？
E: Are we... back in Fyxestroll Garden?

C: 你是…浮烟？小玩意，你凭什么与我争胜？
E: ...Cirrus? What makes you worth my time, weakling?

C: 原来…我经历的是这样的生活吗……
E: So... this is the life I live...?

C: 由我来转交吧。
E: Let me deliver it to her then.

C: 我的动作更快。
E: I can deliver it quicker for you.

C: 柯柯娜依然站在那里，努力微笑。细密的汗珠从她的额头上渗了出来。有些经过的客人发现了异样，在一旁指指点点。
E: Cocona is still standing there, trying her best to smile. Fine beads of sweat emerge on her forehead. Some passing guests notice the strangeness and start to murmur and point at her.

C: （危险的情绪会使梦境发生变异，看来那张唱片所承载的情感相当强烈……）
E: (Intense emotions will cause anomalies in the Dreamscape. It appears that the emotions contained in that record are quite strong...)

C: 弹奏一段旋律。
E: Play a melody.

C: 这样才对，这才是我们的乖娜娜。等你正式开始工作，工资什么的我们先来替你保管——等以后你成家了再还给你。
E: Right. That's our girl. When you officially start work, we'll help save up your wages for you first. When you're ready to get married, we'll return them to you.

C: 那太好了…您尤其适合稍稍偏冷的颜色，和您的肤色和体态都非常相称。
E: That's great... You're especially suited for cooler tones — it matches your skin tone and body shape.

C: 时间不早，我先下班了。下个系统时的轮班安排，还有那份报表，就拜托你啦。
E: It's getting late. I'm clocking out. I'll leave the next system hour's shift schedule and that report to you. Thanks.

C: 我应该怎么改正？
E: How can I do better?

C: 老实说，柯柯娜小姐，我不知道…也最好不要知道。
E: Truthfully, Miss Cocona, I don't know... And I don't think I want to know.

C: …欸？但我…唱得并不好……
E: ...Huh? But I... I don't sing very well...

C: 殒落？
E: Crashing down?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 莱斯利——有人想胁迫莱斯利先生！
E: It's Lesley — Someone is trying to take Mr. Lesley away!

C: （我在梦中遇到的莱斯利，虽说的确拥有属于那位银河之星的记忆，但终究只是一个被捏造出来的幻象而已……）
E: (The Lesley that I met in the dream, though infused with the memories of that Cosmic Star, was nothing more than just a fabricated fantasy...)

C: …我、我知道了，恳请您不要把这件事说出去！不然的话，家族的人肯定会断定我工作失职、禁止我再入梦的！
E: ...Okay. I beg that you please do not tell anyone about this! Or else I know that The Family will deem me negligent of my duties and forbid me from ever dreaming again!

C: 无论梦境多么甘甜，沉溺其中也只会带来窒息的结局。该帮他们回归现实了。
E: No matter how sweet the dream, delving in too deep will only lead to suffocation. I should help them face their realities.

C: 在他身旁的罗伯特显得如此干瘪普通——他绝非其貌不扬的类型，但站在鼎盛期的莱斯利•迪恩身边，平凡亦是一种贬损。
E: Standing next to him, Robert appears dry and plain... He is by no means unattractive. It's just that standing next to the great Lesley Dean in his prime, he seems unremarkable in comparison.

C: 这是……
E: It's...

C: 只要干掉「它」就行了，对吧？
E: I just have to defeat "it," right?

C: 我在听。
E: I'm listening.

C: 在世的短短数十年里，莱斯利•迪恩始终没有学会该如何毫无保留地去爱…即便如此，他仍然被许许多多的人们拥戴着。
E: In his brief few decades in this world, Lesley never learned how to love without reservation... Yet, he was supported by so many.

C: 您确认要雇佣冷芯为您的大副吗？
E: Do you wish to recruit Caldwick as your first mate?

C: 我更重视他们的主观能动性，而不是他们的外表或制服。
E: I value their initiative more than their appearance or uniform.

C: 冷芯将你带至空艇游人必经的长廊里。
E: Caldwick leads you to the long gallery where visitors must pass by.

C: 先前新招了不少人，其中有位折纸大学出身的船员，他已经为您试着打印了雕像。不知道您是否同意将它摆在这里？
E: We've had many new recruits, one among them having graduated from the Paperfold University. He has already tried printing your statue. I wonder if you're agreeable to having it be placed here?

C: 我有个兄弟，以前在折纸大学念过书，折纸技术一流，他试着为您打印了一座雕像。您看看，要不要摆在这儿试试？
E: I have a friend who is a graduate of the Paperfold University, and his origami skills are top-notch. He has tried to print a statue for you. Here, take a look. Why don't we try to place it here?

C: （冷静地）没错，是我。
E: (Calmly) Yes, that's me.

C: 都听你的，大堂经理{NICKNAME}。
E: Whatever you say, Lobby Manager {NICKNAME}.

C: 有预约吗?
E: Do you have a booking?

C: …他刚才是不是提到了*奥帝叔叔*？
E: ...Did he just mention Uncle Oti?

C: 噢，十分抱歉——我刚才不小心输错了您的名字！我又查了一遍，您的预约记录果然还在。
E: Oh, I'm so terribly sorry — I must have misspelled your name accidentally! I just ran another check and sure enough, your booking is right here after all.

C: 皮皮西人语气中透出的惊恐瞬间令你愧疚万分——的确，不论表面再怎么爱慕虚荣，你的内心依旧是柔软的……
E: The panic in the Pepeshi's voice instantly makes you feel guilty — sure, you might look vain, but you're still a softie deep down...

C: 坏了坏了，我还想着这趟出门千万别碰上熟人呢…没想到还没入住就破功了！
E: Oh no, oh no! I really didn't want to bump into anyone I knew this time... let alone get rumbled before I could even check in!

C: 你来晚了，钟表匠已经无了！
E: You're too late — Watchmaker's gone!

C: 我还从来没有拜访过天才俱乐部的成员…这的确是个有趣的选项，谢谢你的推荐。
E: I've never visited a Genius Society member... This is an interesting option. Thanks for your recommendation.

C: 既然如此，那便只能以雷霆手段显我「四尺圣堂」的慈悲心肠了……
E: If so, I have no choice but to adopt a more aggressive measure to manifest the kindness of the Four-Foot Hall...

C: 早知道那个有牌瘾的女人是个不祥之兆…这、这回就算你们赢了，下次再遇见我可别想全身而退！你们都给我记住了！
E: I knew that girl with Celestial Jade addiction was a bad omen... Even though you win this time, don't think you will have it easy again next time we cross paths! Keep that in mind!

C: 听！
E: Ting!

C: 有这么难喝吗？这都是心意！
E: Is it really that disgusting? This is a gift from the kindness of my heart!

C: 过了不久，曜青仙舟的客人来到了港口……
E: After a few moments, the Yaoqing guests arrived at the port...

C: 就在朱明仙舟客人将行之际，灵砂也正巧来到港口。
E: Lingsha happens to arrive at the harbor just as the Zhuming guests are about to leave.
Uhh...

C: 我…明白了。未来若有机会，请将军一定要不吝赐教。
E: I... I understand. If I have an opportunity in the future, I will make sure not to miss out on your personal instruction, general.

C: 别吧，有话好商量啊。
E: Hey, let's talk this out instead of throwing in the towel, okay?

C: 除非青雀跟我一起去。
E: Not unless Qingque comes with me.

C: 我们去吃点儿小吃吧！
E: Let's go eat some snacks!

C: 走吧，我们去小吃摊上看看有没有什么好吃的。
E: Alright, we'll go to a snacks stall and see if there's anything good to eat.

C: 你怎么也这么消极啊？那就听我的，我们先去小吃摊吃点儿好吃的。
E: Why are you being so passive as well? Ah, fine, I'll call the shots then. Let's go and eat those snacks first.

C: 两个要离开的人，因为偶然的际遇都留了下来，也许这就是「缘分」吧。
E: So, two people who planned on leaving ended up staying. That's what you could call "fate," right?

C: 换而言之，就是<color=#dbc291ff>绘影图形</color>对吧？
E: In other words, some <color=#dbc291ff>visiographs</color>, right?

C: 师傅比我厉害太多了，我看不懂也很正常，就是得多花些时间。
E: My master is way better at this than me, so I'm not too surprised that I can't understand his work. I just need to spend more time studying it.

C: 师傅把他最珍贵的时间都给了你…
E: Your master gave you his precious time...

C: 我自己当然不行啦！但，找对人的话，说不定可以喔。
E: Of course, I can't! But it might be possible if you get the right person to help you.

C: 哦？那太卜司可不欢迎闲人。
E: Oh? We don't welcome visitors here.

C: 好、好的…我把金人带过来了。
E: S—Sure... I've brought the aurumaton over here.

C: 其他师傅只看重才能，而我看重学习的热情，所以我愿意收你为徒。还记得么，我们俩毫无保留的传授与学习、互相鼓励，那是我在工造司里最快乐的时光。
E: Unlike other masters who emphasized talent, I valued passion for learning. That was why I took you in as my disciple. Do you remember how we used to exchange ideas and encourage each other? That was my happiest moment at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 你们共同注视着纸船越飞越远，直到消失在视线之中……
E: Together you stare at the paper boat as it flies until it vanishes from sight...

C: 是说金人吗？我明白了，刚好就有一台，我现在就把它带过来！
E: Do you mean an aurumaton? Yes, I happen to have one now. Let me bring it over!

C: 下层…啊不，贝洛伯格的朋友们！第一千七百六十一届搏击擂主挑战赛冠军，参赛三十次、优胜二十八次的磐岩拳王——卢卢卢卢卢卡！
E: Friends of the Under— I mean — friends of Belobog! The champion of the <unbreak>1761</unbreak>st Fighting King Challenge, <unbreak>30</unbreak> tournaments, <unbreak>28</unbreak> victories, the Boulder King of Fists... Luuuuuuuukaaaaaaaa!

C: 谢了，希儿！这位是…噢，是{NICKNAME}对吧？我记着你呢。
E: Thanks, Seele! And who might... Oh, it's {NICKNAME}! I remember you.

C: …让他去吧，希儿。
E: ...Let him go, Seele.

C: 感觉他很热情。
E: He does seem very passionate...

C: 哈，这下想到一块去了！来吧，今天必须让你尝点苦头！
E: Ha! I was thinking the exact same thing! Here, let me punch some sense into you!

C: …都是他自己一拍脑门想出的主意。同不同意都看你，史瓦罗。
E: ...He's the one who came up with this idea. It's up to you to accept it or not, Svarog.

C: 说来话长…还是等下次吧。
E: It's a long story... I'll tell you later.

C: …算了，和你说了也白说。
E: ...Never mind. I get the feeling I'm wasting my breath.

C: 在找你。
E: We're looking for you.

C: 再不快点就要跟丢了…虎克，你赶紧回镇上去，别在这儿晃悠了。
E: We're gonna lose him if we don't hurry... Hook, run back to town — stop hanging around here.

C: 等我成为和哥哥一样厉害的拳手，我一定要尽力帮助下层区的大家。
E: When I become a fighter as awesome as you, I'm gonna do my best to help people in the Underworld.

C: 我、我可没说不想去。我是很喜欢凑热闹的啦…只是希望下一个凑热闹的地方不要再冒出个什么星期五、星期六来跟我们作对。
E: H—Hey! That's not what I meant! I'm all for some fun... I just hope there won't be any surprise party crashers like Friday or Saturday.

C: 我听说这一次的演武擂台，是拿罗浮退役的巨型斗舰改装而成的。
E: I've heard the ring was actually converted from a huge decommissioned Luofu fighter jet.

C: 说真的，这是我第一次在罗浮上见到这么热闹的景象。
E: Seriously, I've never seen the Luofu so lively before.

C: 是狗头人吧！
E: I know! They're Kobolds, right?

C: 会带来麻烦的家伙还真不少啊……
E: There sure are a lot of troublemakers around...

C: 你若能大大方方、堂堂正正地从我手上夺回自己的剑，云璃心服口服。可你没有，你竟想着大事化小，当着大庭广众随随便便让我还剑……
E: If you just stepped up and took your sword back from me fair and square, I would have totally respected you. But nope, you tried to play it down, expecting me to just hand it back to you like it's nothing, in front of everyone...

C: 之后我会另选时机与各位畅谈。好好答谢星穹列车当初救助罗浮于水火之中的恩情。
E: I'll find another chance to talk with you all. I'd like to express my gratitude to the Astral Express for helping the Luofu during the crisis.

C: 也许他是机器人也说不定。
E: Perhaps he's a robot.

C: 不过怪了，她怎么还没来？都说曜青的天击将军一贯动如雷霆，先声夺人，今天这么迟到可不是她的作风啊。
E: Speaking of which, why hasn't she arrived yet? They say the Merlin's Claw strikes like lightning. Being late isn't her style.

C: 斯科特先生，看在咱们打过交道的份上，我不妨给你透个底：你们的运输船被步离人袭击，这件事可大可小。
E: Since we've met each other before, Mr. Skott, let me share some information. Your transport ship was attacked by the borisin, and the Cloud Knights might see it as more than just a random attack.

C: 灵砂小姐想问什么？
E: What would you like to discuss, Miss Lingsha?

C: 如今再瞧瞧你，我觉得这剑说的不假。不怪我夺走你的飞剑，是你的心思不在剑上。
E: Now that I see you again, I realize your sword was right. It wasn't me who took your sword. It was you who lost focus.

C: 别抱怨了，我看你们两个身上也没多几个窟窿眼嘛。
E: Just stop whining. At least you're in one piece, right?

C: 给我更有感情一点！
E: Can't you put a little more enthusiasm into it?

C: 谢谢怀炎将军的厚爱。云璃和彦卿原本是要决一胜负，如今却要转头教我学剑，岂不是太耽误两位练剑备战的时间了？
E: I appreciate your kind words, General Huaiyan. But won't teaching me swordplay be a waste of Yanqing and Yunli's time? They should be preparing for the ceremony.

C: 以罗浮的状况，曜青内部颇为担心呼雷的关押情况。以往每隔百年一次的例行探视已经安不下老家伙们的心了。
E: Given the situation on the Luofu, those on the Yaoqing are concerned about Hoolay's imprisonment. I'm afraid that the routine visit every century is no longer sufficient to ease their concerns.

C: 步法开始。发力开始。
E: Her footwork. Her strength.

C: 那最好是欣慰的笑。
E: Are you sure he wasn't laughing at you?

C: 时候不早了，三月小姐。我和你们几位不同，我只是个受职务羁绊的成年人，我家将军交给我的事情可不会自动完成。
E: It's getting late, Miss March. Unlike you lot, I'm a grown-up bound by responsibilities and duties. The tasks entrusted to me by the general won't complete themselves.

C: 竞锋舰看完了，该回去继续训练了吧？
E: Now that we're done with our tour of the Skysplitter, shall we continue with our training?

C: 傻瓜都看明白啦，我只是想再听你说一遍那个。
E: Yeah, anyone could see that. I just wanted to hear you say it again.

C: 这几个人一见到咱们就立刻「检修完毕」，转身就走，实在是可疑。
E: And it's suspicious how they suddenly finished their "overhaul" and walked away as soon as they laid eyes on us.

C: 还要随时留意对方的行动。一有动静就躲起来。
E: And make sure to keep an eye on them. Hide out of sight as soon as there's any sign of activity.

C: 可惜丹枢已死，就连尸骸也碎成了一捧飞灰。可追究的线索又少了一个。
E: Unfortunately, Dan Shu is dead, and even her corpse has crumbled into ash. That's one less clue we can pursue.

C: 我听说啦，博识学会的人似乎造出了某种危险的东西。因果殿的卷宗中有不少关于这些智叟的记录，他们为了突破机巧技术的极限，总喜欢涉足禁忌研究。
E: I heard the Intelligentsia Guild crafted something dangerous. We have many records in the Hall of Karma about these wise ones. They love to tinker with forbidden technologies, always trying to push the limits of ingenia.

C: 遵命！
E: Yes, ma'am!

C: 无妨，稍加操作便能打通。
E: No matter, it'll just require a bit more work to get through.

C: 看起来就在不久前，这里经历了一场恶战。
E: Looks like there was a fierce battle here not long ago.

C: 是姐姐。看来她的灵魂恪尽职守，暂时还没回到因果殿中。
E: It's my sister. Looks like her soul hasn't returned to the Hall of Karma yet.

C: 这个寒鸦口中「身披暗色袍子的亡命之徒」站在你们面前。虽然他冷漠的脸上没有任何表情，但…不知为何，你能读懂那没有任何表情的表情似乎在说「你们终于来了」。
E: The "fugitive wearing a dark cloak," spoken of by Hanya, now stands before you. His face is devoid of any expression, cold and indifferent, yet... inexplicably, you could decipher this expressionless facade as if it whispered, "You're finally here."

C: 真的没有别的选项了吗？
E: Are we really out of options?

C: 末度，我们必须在这儿停留片刻了。不过你不用害怕。从踏出监狱的那一刻起，该害怕的是仙舟人。因为我将会让他们理解，什么是真正的灾难。
E: We must stay here for some time, Mok Tok. Fear not, because once I step out of the prison, it's the people of the Xianzhou who should tremble in fear. I'll show them what true calamity means.

C: 我将以元帅特使的身份调度罗浮云骑，展开对呼雷的追捕。
E: As the Marshal's special envoy, I'll dispatch the Luofu Cloud Knights to pursue Hoolay myself.

C: 劫狱的步离人从何处得知呼雷关押的区域？又为何如此赶巧，他们在曜青来使准备押解之前执行了计划……
E: How did the infiltrators learn about the location where Hoolay was held? And how did they time their plan just before the Yaoqing messengers were ready to escort him...?

C: …可惜狐人不答应。
E: ...The foxians didn't agree to that.

C: 狼形的机甲瘫痪成了一座金属小山。
E: The wolf-shaped mech disintegrates into a pile of metal.

C: 遭到这么严重的破坏，也能自我复原吗？
E: It can regenerate even after suffering such severe attacks?

C: 这火锅能煮烂你的舌头吗？我知道你的脑袋里装着什么痴心妄想。你想拖延时间，等待救兵。
E: Can I just boil your tongue in this hot pot? I know you're trying to buy time until someone comes to your rescue.

C: 云骑有没有封锁港口？
E: Have the Cloud Knights closed the ports?

C: 我看是师父给我一个人头落地的好机会吧！
E: Stick my neck out and get my head chopped off, you mean!

C: 是真的！
E: It's true!

C: 哦哦哦！果然还得是万众瞩目的彦卿骁卫！
E: Ohhh! Of course it's the highly-anticipated Lieutenant Yanqing!

C: 云璃师父，我、我怎么好像又紧张起来了！我真的能做到吗？
E: Master Yunli, I—I'm getting nervous again! Can I really do this?

C: 走，先进场吧！
E: Let's go, it's time to enter the stadium!

C: 立刻联系天舶司和云骑，启动通行禁令，要求所有的狐人闭门不出。
E: Contact the Sky-Faring Commission and the Cloud Knights right away! Have them enforce a traffic ban and order all foxians to remain indoors until further notice!

C: 飞霄，星槎海各处巷道中都有狼形生物在高速移动——
E: Feixiao, the ports of Starskiff Haven are crawling with wolf-like creatures. They're moving fast—

C: 啊，没错，你去过？
E: Ah. Yes! Have you been there?

C: 如此果断，又如此…残暴。比起如今沦落到这般地步的我们，她才更像是都蓝的子裔。难怪战首会对她感兴趣。
E: So decisive, so... brutal. She is more like a descendant of Duran than we who have fallen to our current state. No wonder the Warhead has his eyes on her.

C: 在我漫长的狩猎生涯中，虽然只有眼前这短短的片刻追随了战首。但他的存在却像青丘的月亮般照亮了我们盲目已久的双眼，让我看见了道路。
E: I lived as a hunter for many years, yet I have only followed the Warhead for this recent, brief period. However, his existence has brought light back to our once-blind eyes, like the moon of Verdantia. He has shown me the way.

C: 走吧，我们现在就赶往演武仪典的擂台！
E: Let's go. We need to get to the Wardance ring!

C: 三月七…没想到你会…
E: March 7th... I didn't think you'd...

C: 我本以为自己无法再活着听你谈论自己的身体了…但，感谢貊泽和那个孩子。相对于如今的结果，我所支付的代价实在微不足道……
E: I never thought I'd live to hear you discuss your health again... But thanks to Moze and that child, the price I've paid seems trivial compared to what we've achieved.

C: 毕竟联盟总有人说景元先生「智光昭昭，不逊『戎韬』」，罗浮遭此劫难，玉阙自然不会坐视不管☰☲。
E: People have been saying that Mr. Jing Yuan's intellect shines as brightly as the Seer Strategist's. With the Luofu caught in such strife, the Yuque couldn't just stand by and watch.

C: …三、二、一。时间刚好！至于如何接待这位贵客…请允许我将这烫手山芋丢给各位咯。
E: ...Three, two, one. Right on time! Now, as for the best way to receive our distinguished guest... I'll leave that in your capable hands.

C: 在「黄金的时刻」，如果有人沉迷玩乐到失去联系，那八成是被困在这里了。
E: In the Golden Hour, if you lose contact with someone who has sunken into entertainment, odds are that person is stuck here.

C: 哀家乃是皇后。
E: I am the consort.

C: 放尊重点！
E: You will show some respect!

C: （「皇帝陛下」应该已经接到埃夫姆了吧？回之前的汇合地点看看吧。）
E: (Her Majesty should have picked up Ephraim by now. Let's go back to our meeting point.)

C: 我有点急事要处理，之后再聊。
E: I have some urgent matters to attend to. Let's talk later.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们得搞清楚到底发生了什么，这样才能帮助她远离危险！
E: {NICKNAME}, we need to get to the bottom of this! It's the only way we will be able to keep her out of danger!

C: 好，你蹲在这里不要走动。朕去钓钓他们。
E: Okay, hide behind here and don't move. I'll go fish for some baddies.

C: 哎呀呀，今天不巧，平时陪朕一起巡视的臣民都没时间…都忙！忙点好，忙点好……
E: Oh hoho, how dismal! The loyal retainers who patrol with me are busy today... All of them! It's good that they're keeping busy though, busy is good...

C: 皇帝陛下！救命！我被卡在电话亭里了！
E: Your Majesty! Help! I'm stuck in the phone booth!

C: 啊？别吓我，你是不是脑子坏掉了？我是你最最敬爱的普普沙帝国公主殿下蒂索克二世！
E: Eh? Stop giving me a fright. Are you out of your mind? I am your most beloved Pupsha Empire's Princess Tizocic II!

C: 灰骑士，你终于来了。
E: Gray Knight, you're finally here.

C: 陛下…虽然帕斯德鲁克市的确曾是叛党的大本营，可它并不属于叛党，它属于居住在其中的<unbreak>400</unbreak>万百姓……
E: Your Majesty... Pasdrak City may have been the insurgents' main base, but it does not belong to them — it belongs to the four million citizens who live there...

C: 朕理解你，朕也不想这么做。但为了普普沙帝国的江山社稷…一些残酷的「保险」是必须的。希望你理解。
E: I understand what you said, and I do not wish to do this either. But for the great Pupsha Empire... some brutal insurances are required. I hope you understand.

C: 我…我曾经是他们中的一员，我是……
E: I... I used to be one of them. I am...

C: 查德威克博士就在里面吗？
E: Is Dr. Chadwick inside?

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}…又见面了。
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}. It's you again.

C: 虚数脉冲杀死了多少人？
E: How many people did the Imaginary Pulse kill?

C: 唯有一点无须争辩：智慧可以与自私的欲念共存。
E: Only one thing is irrefutable: Wisdom can co-exist with selfish desires.

C: 螺丝咕姆…终于，我终于找到你了。
E: Screwllum... I've finally found you.

C: 不，不行。我已经对自己发过誓，绝不会再把无关的人卷进来了。
E: No. No way. I've pledged to myself never to involve any more innocent people in this matter.

C: 我们又见面了，查德威克博士。
E: Here we are again, Dr. Chadwick.

C: …但此刻荡漾于空气中的唯有沉默。
E: ...Yet, all that lingers is a profound silence in the air.

C: 壁炉取暖开着，但整个客房如同冰窖一样寒冷。
E: The fireplace heating is turned on, yet the whole room is chilly like an icy cavern.
Hmph...

C: 除了寻找小鸟的事儿以外一概不回复——我忙得很，要找导游麻烦别人去。
E: I'm not answering anything else other than how to find the birds. I'm very busy, please find someone else to be your guide.

C: 关于「折纸筑梦师」…
E: About the Origami Dreamweavers...

C: （软的不行…就别怪我来硬的了！）
E: (If a good cop won't work... guess I'll have to go bad cop then!)

C: 历史只写上了他们的名字，却没有记录下真正的他们…为什么？
E: History only wrote their names, but not their true selves... Why?

C: 哈哈，他还是那么急性子……
E: Haha, he's always been the rash sort...

C: 我名为费歇尔，是「隐夜鸫」的现任家主，此行来寻找本家系的成员奥尔拉。听说他最近在这附近活动，或许建造此处的筑梦师会知晓他的行踪。
E: My name is Fischer, I'm the current head of the Nightingale Family. I'm looking for a family member named Orla. I've heard he's been about this area lately, perhaps the Dreamweaver who built this place may know his whereabouts.

C: 奥尔拉不愿再和我交流了…能帮我劝劝他吗？
E: Orla doesn't wish to speak to me anymore... Can you help me convince him?

C: 但我理解他——匹诺康尼在忘记过去，但哪怕只有一点也好，这个世界应该留下往日的痕迹。我怕哪天…我也会忘记那些时光。
E: But I understand him — Penacony has forgotten its past. But even if just a little, this world ought to preserve a fragment of its past. I fear for the day... when I, too, shall begin to forget those cherished moments...

C: 我知道你已经记下了他们的故事。
E: I know you've already recorded their stories.

C: （继续保持沉默！）
E: (Continue to remain silent!)

C: …滴答！这边，我在这边！
E: ...Tick-tock! Here, I'm over there!

C: （跟着他们，应该就能了解湛蓝爵士的过去。）
E: (Let's follow them to figure out more about Dr. Blues' past.)

C: 哎呀，您果然识货。喏，我这儿还有些水果，一并送你当赠品好了。
E: Hah, I knew you had a good eye. Oh, I have some fruit here too, take 'em as a gift.

C: 小女孩的目光在箱子上来回游弋，总算在箱子边缘找到了一个还算新鲜的苹果。
E: The little girl's eyes dart back and forth over the crate, finally coming across an apple that looks relatively fresh at the edge of the box.

C: 我去过一座名叫雅利洛的城邦，他们还没从对抗风雪的战斗中获胜，却已经有了重建家园的计划——这是你从没考虑过的。
E: I went to a city-state called Jarilo, where they had never triumphed in the battle against the storm, yet they already had plans to rebuild their home... This is something you have never once considered.

C: 作为外邦英雄，你自述的经历让在场公民坚信不疑、纷纷鼓掌附和。见了这幅景象，帕拉滕只能叹气。
E: As an outlander hero, your self-described experiences fully sway the citizens your way, and they chime in with gradual applause. Palaten can only sigh at this sight.

C: 他欠我的钱到底什么时候能还？这难道就不是对社会风气的破坏吗？
E: When is he going to return the money he owes me? Isn't this also undermining societal values?

C: 数十年？那他还活着吗？
E: Decades? Is he still alive?

C: 是啊，在金丝的牵掣下，塔兰顿的天秤也难免倾斜，雅努斯的指引也失了方向……
E: That's right! With the interference of the golden thread, even Talanton's scale become tilted, and direction from Janus loses its way...

C: 呵，果然另有所图。那你呢，叫做帕里斯的士兵。
E: Hmph, I knew you had ulterior motives. Then what of you, soldier by the name of Paris?

C: 那你是怎么说话的？
E: Then, how do you speak?

C: 赞美瑟希斯，愿你令我的子孙理智长存，别写些不三不四的书……
E: Praise Cerces! May you grant my descendants wisdom that their writings never grow cheap...

C: 嘁，没品位！
E: Tsk, they have no taste!

C: 我从未参加过此类仪式，不晓得你们的礼节，待在席上怕是会扰了你的兴致。
E: I have never attended a ritual like this and do not understand your customs. I fear that my presence would ruin your enjoyment.

C: 元老与战士心中最重要的东西不是城邦的安危，而是无用的情愫……
E: The elders and the soldiers no longer hold the safety of this city's people most dear. They prioritize their useless sentiments...

C: 我的确在想那个戍卫长的话，但并不是感到伤心，而是在思考他说的是不是对的。
E: I am indeed thinking about what that captain said, but I am not sad. I am thinking about whether what he said is true.

C: 雕像小姐的心情看起来好多了，真为她开心！
E: The statue lady seems much happier now. I'm happy for her!

C: 听，快听。
E: Listen, listen now!

C: 并肩作战？不不不，开什么玩笑，我会死在战场上的！
E: Fight side by side? No, no, no... Are you joking? I'll die on the battlefield!

C: 阿卡迪亚——
E: Arcadia...

C: 还有戍卫长和俄诺涅…好像不太对劲！
E: The captain and Oenone are there, too... Something isn't right!

C: 谢谢你的关心，但这和你的结论似乎没有关系呢。
E: Thank you for your concern, but this doesn't seem to be related to the conclusion you've drawn.

C: 为何，它们不拒绝献出火种的命运？还是说，它们在命运面前也无能为力？
E: Why do they not refuse the destiny that forces them to offer up the Coreflame? Or are they also powerless before destiny itself?

C: 我要成为圣女。
E: I want to become the Holy Maiden.

C: 打开最后的记忆吧，让我们见证欧洛尼斯眷属的真正面目。
E: Unravel the final memory. Let us witness the true face of Oronyx's kin.

C: 虽然觉得翁法罗斯离我们很遥远，但是看着他们在一次次轮回里挣扎的努力，看到最后整个银河摒弃嫌隙，一同对抗毁灭的决心……
E: Although Amphoreus seemed so distant from us, watching their struggles through each cycle, and seeing how the entire cosmos ultimately cast aside their differences to unite against the Destruction...

C: 都是伙伴们的功劳。
E: It's all thanks to my companions.

C: 没错，我超幸运的。
E: Yep, I'm super lucky!

C: 这便是你为翁法罗斯写下的最后一笔。它何时会回应，只有命运知晓答案。
E: This is the final stroke you write for Amphoreus. Only fate knows when it will respond.

C: 这一幕是《如我所书》的结局，也是现实中翁法罗斯的原点：总有一天，它将孕育出真正的生命。记忆中的人们，会一一诞生，在「明天」等候你。
E: This scene is the ending of As I've Written, and also the origin point of the Amphoreus in the real world: One day, it will give birth to true life. The people in the memory will be born one by one, waiting for you "tomorrow."

C: 这是老爹答应你的「卡利白」，新鲜酿制，汽足着哪！老爹我啊，去鼓捣摩…那堆机器去啰。
E: Here's the "Kapo-Kali" I promised. It's freshly brewed and full of fizz! Off I go, gotta fix that moto... space station equipment.

C: 学习前沿科学的理论知识，为法政科和空间站的大家提供辅助服务，以及…等待古恩先生的升级与维修。
E: Learn cutting-edge scientific theories, support the department of Galactic Geopolitics and the space station, and... wait for Mr. Gunn to give me upgrades and maintenance.

C: 正在研究学习计划……
E: Reviewing curriculum...

C: 你说话太死板了，不像人类。
E: The way you speak is too rigid, you don't sound human.

C: 哇！不愧是老师，听上去显得我整个人都很有耐心呢！
E: Wow! That's why you are the teacher. That makes me sound super patient!

C: 麻烦您了！
E: I'm so sorry to trouble you!

C: 呃，服务科应该能解决吧？
E: Um, the Service Department should be able to handle it?

C: 你说的有道理。我看看啊…底座上有破损，可能是零件脱落了。至于位置…应该就在机器人送餐的路上。
E: You're right. Lemme see... There's damage on the base, so some parts might have fallen out. As for where they might've gone... maybe on the meal delivery route the robots take?

C: 错误编号<unbreak>40</unbreak>，是哪里报错来着？
E: Error code <unbreak>40</unbreak>... What's that mean again?

C: 唔，难道是有外力冲击？感觉有点奇怪……
E: Um, maybe an external force hit it? Sounds weird...

C: 到底是什么类型的合金…还是说甚至可以是空气？啊…那个东西的载体到底是什么！
E: Just what kind of alloy... Or maybe, even air might work? Ahhh... What is that thing's receptacle!?

C: 你来到了那扇门面，然而它并没有发出任何声音。
E: You reach the door, but it makes no sound.

C: （应该不是和她们接头，继续找找看吧。）
E: (They are probably not who I'm looking for. Let's keep looking.)

C: 不知道，不清楚，别问我。
E: I don't know. I don't have it. Don't ask me.

C: 但是，他们根本不知道这需要付出什么样的代价！你看我这个老胳膊老腿的…哎，不说了，不说了！
E: But they have no idea of the prices they must pay! Just look at my old body... Ahhh, never mind. Never mind!

C: 原来是为了涨粉啊…
E: So, it was all about getting fans...

C: 我可是空间站里响当当的「潮人」！
E: Hey! I'm the bona fide fashion guru of the entire space station!

C: 稍等，我查一下…喔，确实好看！但宣传页面上的那个效果，感觉很难实现啊。
E: Hold on, let me check... Oh, it does look good! But I feel it'll be difficult to re-create what they're showing on the ad.

C: 嗯，「琥珀星光」看起来太花里胡哨了，我这么大岁数了，的确不合适。
E: Hmm, yes. Amber Starlight is too showy. It doesn't really fit me in my age.

C: 我听说波瓦大臣家的公子罗希是个性格豪放的年轻人，说不定和我能聊得来。你能否带着照片去帮我问问，看看他愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: I heard that Rossy, son of Minister Bova, is a young man with a bold personality. Maybe we are on the same wavelength. Could you show the photo to him and ask him if he's willing to be my friend?

C: 圈外人大概不了解，所有戏迷里最难缠的就是有钱有闲的那一类。抱歉，我不能答应他的请求……
E: People outside the theater industry might not understand that fans are hard to deal with, especially the ones with lots of money and free time. I'm sorry, but I can't be friends with him...

C: 我感觉到了，好像有一簇灵感射入了我的大脑，一些我之前从未有过的想法…总之，谢谢你。我会好好珍惜这两张明信片的。
E: I can feel it. Inspirations shoot into my head. These are the ideas I've never had... Anyway, thank you. I will cherish these two postcards.

C: 我先回去了，家里那位老头还指着这箱药呢。希望你们能继续加油干，「鼹鼠党」的年轻人……
E: I should go home now. My husband is waiting for this box of medicine. Keep up the good work, you kids from The Moles...

C: 哎呀，这不是我之前包给熔锤镇老铁匠的那批餐具吗？本来约定的交货时间是下个星期，没想到这么快就送到了…谢谢你们专门为此跑一趟。
E: Oh, it's the tableware order I placed! I thought it wouldn't be delivered until next week... Thank you for making a special trip for this.

C: …唔，{NICKNAME}，这个姐姐为什么不说话？
E: ...Umm, {NICKNAME}, why isn't she saying anything?

C: 你看吧，老头！连{NICKNAME}也这么说。
E: See, old man! Even {NICKNAME} said so.

C: 再说了，你不是有服役满二十周年的铁卫老兵勋章吗？这荣誉的分量难道还不够你去炫耀的吗……
E: Besides, don't you have the Veteran Guard Medal from your twentieth anniversary? Isn't that enough honor for you to show off...

C: 你要是不介意的话，能不能替我把信送到女儿手里？禁区的寄送手续太繁杂了，要通过好几层审核…怕是没等到信寄出去，我这役期就已经满了。
E: If you don't mind, could you help take it to my daughter for me? It's an arduous process mailing things from inside the restricted zone. You need one approval after another... The letter would probably not even be sent before my service was up.

C: 呃…长辈？
E: Uh... a parent?

C: 也就是说，老爸他还要过几个月才能回家……
E: So Dad won't be home for a few more months...

C: …咳，这事儿能怪我吗？要不是因为我跟他们结了梁子——
E: ...Ahem, can you blame me for that? If it weren't for my relationship with them...

C: 行了，听见波瓦大臣说的话了吧？你快走吧。
E: Alright. Did you hear what Minister Bova said? Move on, then.
Uhh...

C: 把波瓦大臣出的题目复述给了雷金……
E: Describe to Regin the question posed by Minister Bova...

C: 那我当然不能让您失望。正好，我这边准备了一些进阶的测验题目，您要不要试试？
E: Then I absolutely cannot let you down. I just so happen to have some advanced quiz questions right here with me. Would you like to give them a try?

C: 如何，您知道答案了吗？霍华德、菲利普和乔伊斯当中，到底谁是骗子呢？
E: How about it then? Do you know what the answer is? Howard, Philip, and Joyce: Who is the liar?

C: 谢谢你帮我这个忙！收下这些吧，这是小女子的一片心意~
E: Thanks lots for helping me with this! Take this as a token of my appreciation~

C: 「陛下、陛下~你应当遮蔽世间的明镜~连同平静的湖水~你需道出她的真名实姓~驱逐千面的妖妃~」
E: "Your Highness, Your Highness~! You must shield yourself from all mirrors of the world, even the serene lakes! You must ask for her true name and banish that duplicitous succubus!"

C: …噢噢，好的，我这就去安排。您要坐在哪里？
E: ...Ah, all right then. I shall get right on it. Where would you like to sit?

C: 罗希。他平时闲得没事就爱在宾馆大堂转悠…逢人便逮住讨论时事要闻。
E: Rossy. He likes to wander around in the hotel lobby whenever he has time... And discuss current affairs with anyone he sees.

C: 嗯…既然你帮了我们的忙，那你也是我们的一份子了。我就简单给你介绍一下吧。
E: Well, since you helped us, you are now one of us. I'll give you a short introduction.

C: 他消失在了雪原深处…
E: He disappeared into the depth of the Snow Plains...

C: 不愧是受害者互助会的老大…
E: You are certainly the leader of the Scam Victims Association...

C: 原来你压力这么大…
E: I didn't know you were under so much pressure...

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course.

C: 可惜妻子她早早离去…我的儿子长大后也嫌我老来不中用，一个人打拼去了。
E: But my wife left me early... My son thought I was a bother in my old age and went off to work somewhere else.

C: 呜呜…我在等爸爸妈妈……
E: *sob*... I'm waiting for my Mom and Dad...

C: 不在…是什么意思…？
E: Aren't around... What does that mean?

C: 裂界…是大人说的那个，很危险的地方吗？
E: Fragmentum... Is that the very dangerous place the adults talk about?

C: 他踱着步，一面思考着技术图纸的实现方案，一面向残响回廊深处走去，直到他来时的踪迹彻底消失——就像他从未出现在这里一般。
E: As he thinks about how to materialize the plans in the blueprints, he paces towards the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes until the traces of his appearance completely dissipate — as if he had never been here.

C: 啊…有谁在那儿吗？是你吗，队长……
E: Ahh... Who is there? Is it you, captain?

C: 我…我看不清东西了…是不是我的头盔…被什么玩意糊住了…？
E: I can't see anything... Is my helmet covered with something?

C: 对了，最近我们又去波月古海上搜索了一番，还没有找到任何落难者有关的情报。
E: That's right, we recently went to search the Lunarescent Depths again, but found no information regarding the castaway.

C: 这谁呀，随口胡诌是我「儿时玩伴」，这说法就好像我长大了一样！罗浮法律同意了吗？
E: Who is this!? Casually talking about being my "childhood playmate" as if I'm old now! Did Luofu law approve of this?

C: 你还是把漂流瓶还给我吧，我的叙事设计可不能就这样被你破坏了！
E: Please just gimme back the bottle. My narrative design cannot be disrupted like this!

C: 别别别，我承认，那就是酒坛。
E: No no no stop! You're right, they're wine jars.

C: 是谁在海滩上乱扔垃圾，不讲文明，不树新风。只有你记得保护海滩，人人有责。
E: Who would leave trash lying around on the beach like this in such an uncivilized manner? It's almost as if only you remember to take care of the environment and protect the beaches around here.

C: 很不错，表达一下羡慕之情。
E: That's nice. Express your envy to them.

C: 主人，我是灯神，请问你有什么吩咐？
E: Master, I am the Genie, what are your orders?

C: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
E: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

C: 据说最开始有人想给这种材料取名叫「魂钢」，但不知为何放弃了。
E: It's said that in the beginning, there were some who wanted to name this material "Soulsteel," but later abandoned that notion for unknown reasons.

C: 爬上大地兽
E: Climb aboard the dromas.

C: 晚上好。
E: Good evening.

C: 不久前，公司旗下重要矿业基地新伊甸-III遭到网络黑客攻击。
E: A short while ago, New Eden-III, an important mining facility under the umbrella of the IPC, fell victim to a hacking attack.

C: 对了，下回您再需要这些石头，直接和我说声就行！别看我一副大忙人的样子，偶尔开小差凿几块火山玻璃还是不在话下的。
E: Come to think of it, just let me know the next time you need some ore! I may seem busy, but I can always make time to carve out some volcanic glass for you.

C: ——歌耳戈，你可愿戴上悬锋王妃的金冠，持矛举盾相伴身侧，与朕一同拱卫悬锋城的荣耀？
E: ...Gorgo, would you wear the crown as Queen of Kremnos, wield your spear and shield by my side, and defend the glory of Castrum Kremnos with me?

C: 此乃知识汇流处、真理之海的入口；求道者应于此敬拜，忆其友邻之爱，则求索真理之门訇然中开。
E: This is the confluence of knowledge, the gateway to the sea of truth. Seekers should worship here, reflecting on the love for neighbors, for only then may the gates of wisdom swing open.

C: 看来就连永夜的信徒，也无法抗拒瑟希斯花园的魔力。
E: It seems even followers of the eternal night cannot resist the enchantment of the garden of Cerces.

C: 你的逻辑可真是一团浆糊。我知道你儿子在奥赫玛混得不错，何来无处可去一说？
E: Your logic makes no sense! I know your son is getting by pretty well in Okhema. What do you mean, "you have nowhere to go"?

C: 啊，温暖而神圣的火。树庭的某位哲人曾说过：｢宇宙的过去、现在和未来是一团永恒的活火，它按一定尺度燃烧，又按一定尺度熄灭。｣
E: Ah, the warm, divine fire. A philosopher from the Grove once said: "The past, present, and future of the universe is an eternal, living flame, burning and extinguishing according to its own rhythm."

C: 的确，泰坦是世界的准绳，一位诚实的祭司，其力量不容小觑…不过，如果人们发现这一切其实与泰坦无关，事情又会怎样发展呢……
E: Indeed, Titans are the measure of the world. A truthful priest's power is not to be underestimated... But what if people discover that all of this isn't even about Titans?

C: 不过…黄金裔也只是一种体质…万一这位黄金裔是个四肢发达头脑简单的类型，会不会反而没有办法带领大家逃出生天呢？
E: But... being Chrysos Heir is just a physical trait. What if this person is all brawn and no brains? Could they really lead everyone to safety?

C: 嗯…有位织者注重整洁。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某个凌乱的书柜前</color>，整理散落在地的卷轴呢。
E: Hmm... there's a Weaver who values cleanliness. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a cluttered bookshelf</color>, organizing scrolls scattered on the floor.

C: 嗝、打个不停…
E: I can't stop hiccuping...

C: 你凝视着圣烛中升降的金色流体，壁画上的图案在光影交错中若隐若现，却再也没有出现过你的名字。
E: You gaze at the golden liquid rising and falling within the holy candle. The images on the mural flicker in the shifting light, but your name does not appear again.

C: 事已至此，你只好抛开无谓思绪，享受起了这「有如转生般迷人」的旅途。
E: At this point, there's nothing to do but let go of any needless thoughts and enjoy this "mesmerizing journey, like a rebirth."

C: ——你重新穿上了鞋。
E: ...You slip your shoes back on.

C: *使了个眼色*
E: *gives you a look*

C: 哪怕风堇小姐在场，她也一定不会愿意让你们身处险境。
E: If Miss Hyacine is here, she would never want you to be in harm's way.

C: 据我所知，很久以前你也试着偷过黎明机器吧？还有艾格勒的眼睛，法吉娜的酒盏……
E: I know you've tried to steal the Dawn Device before, as well as Aquila's eye, Phagousa's wine cup...

C: 当心！
E: Watch out!

C: 九…十…十一……
E: Nine... Ten... Eleven...

C: 哪怕出发的缘由早已在口口相传中褪色？
E: Even when your journey's purpose has faded through countless retellings?

C: 总之，现在它是你的了，拿去玩吧。
E: Anyway, it's yours now. Have fun with it.

C: 如今这些防御工事已不必再阻挡任何军队，不过是久远战场的一处例证罢了。
E: These barriers don't need to stop anyone now. They're just relics of a battlefield long gone.

C: 木马随着晨昏之眼的晃动摇曳着，按钮仍然在发亮。
E: The wooden horse sways with the motion of Eye of Twilight, the button still glowing brightly.

C: …可能因为我看了不少闲书吧。
E: ...Maybe it's because I've read too many random books.

C: 敬拜学派著论《百族颂神册》中已提及了诸多泰坦神性的缺漏。最简单者：尼卡多利为诸邦诟病之狠辣、蛮勇，正铸成了纷争的神性，使它完美。
E: The Venerationism's treatise The Hundred Tribes' Praise of the Gods mentions many flaws in the Titans' divinity. The simplest example: Nikador, notorious for their ruthlessness and reckless bravery, embodies the divine nature of strife, making them perfect.

C: 行了，闲聊作罢，继续前进吧。
E: Alright, enough chit-chat. Let's keep moving.

C: 光是注视着山之民与奥赫玛之间一触即发的态势，我便无心再关注其他了。
E: Just watching the tension building between the Mountain Dwellers and Okhema leaves me no room to think of anything else.

C: 到那时接过命运的，即便不是吉奥里亚的后裔也无妨…是刻法勒的后裔也好，是来自繁星之中的天外来客也罢，我们的命运将行于他们的道路上。
E: When that time comes, those who inherit our destiny, be they descendants of Georios or Kephale, or visitors from beyond the sky, our fate shall follow their path.

C: 欸，不是我拔不出来啊，我是想让它再沉淀沉淀喀！
E: It's not like I can't pull it out. I just want to let it settle a bit more, crrk!

C: 说过多少遍了，那只虫的电不是我偷的，我的电还不够多吗？够我再挥霍几个轮回了！
E: How many times must I say it? I did not steal that nymph's electricity. Do I not already have enough? Enough to splurge on for several more cycles!

C: 好奇我面具之下的长相吗？哼…那就拿足够份量的回忆来和我交换吧！
E: Are you curious about what I look like under this mask? Hmph... Then bring me enough memories to exchange for it!

C: 裂界的怪物又涌进了残响回廊，兵长又、又上前线去勘察战况了。
E: The Fragmentum has spilled out into the Corridor of Fading Echoes, a—and he's gone to the front lines to survey the situation.

C: （这是小姐特意给我定制的信标功能，很神奇吧！）
E: (This is the custom beacon that Missy gave me. It's awesome!)

C: （这家伙可真生猛，没想到它把「分装快乐」当成宠物罐头吃了。）
E: (Gosh, that fellow's feisty. It ate the Joy Filtration Set like it was canned pet food.)

C: 让佩佩把自己冲走。
E: Let Peppy flush itself.

C: 这不是文明生物的正常礼仪吗？你连这个都不知道？
E: Is this not normal etiquette for civilized beings? You don't even know this?

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: 佩佩号！出击！
E: Peppy! Attack!

C: 目睹了这一切的「阮•梅」造物们对「管家」感到极为不满，它们不愿再和它做朋友。
E: The Ruan Mei creations that have witnessed this are very upset at the "butler." They no longer want to be friends with it.

C: 怎么又在发呆？还是说，是想和我聊聊天？
E: Why the daydreaming again? Or perhaps, you'd like to talk?

C: 听别人说，其实他的异能并非「不死」，而是「拒绝死亡」…即使受到致命伤，也能违抗塞纳托斯的召唤，强硬地从亡者的国度归还。真是不可思议的力量呢。
E: I heard someone say that his ability isn't "immortality" but "defying death." Even if he suffers a fatal wound, he can resist the call of Thanatos and force his way out of the realm of the dead. Now that's an unbelievable kind of power!

C: {NICKNAME}…会对这种表达感到负担吗？对不起呀，人家没有恶意，只是觉得喜欢是很单纯、自然的行为。
E: {NICKNAME}... does hearing this make you uncomfortable? I'm sorry. I didn't mean to trouble you. I just believe... liking someone is the most simple and natural thing there is.

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think things over.

C: 每天的航运时刻表会显示在我面前的这个公告板上，要记得查阅。
E: The daily shipping schedule will be displayed on this notice board in front of me, so remember to check it.

C: 滴、答…钟表小子……
E: Tick, tock... Clockie...

C: 记得，真是多亏了它呀！
E: I do remember. It's all thanks to it!

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 我一个外人，这合适吗…
E: This isn't my forte, are you sure about this...

C: 这些内容都和太卜司无关？
E: So these have nothing to do at all with the Divination Commission?

C: 我不会做这种事。
E: I will not be doing that.

C: 现在没空陪你玩。
E: I don't have time to play with you right now

C: 真的太感谢了，你真是个好人！虽然报酬不多…不过这是大家的心意，还请你收下。
E: Thank you so much! You are too kind! It isn't much, but please take this. It's a token of our gratitude.

C: 我只知道什么是师傅。
E: Like a personal butler?

C: 多亏了你，「枘凿六合•Remake」的前6题测试完成了。过些天，我会委托十王司的冥差们帮我把幽囚狱谜题刷新一遍，会有一些新的谜题。
E: Thanks to you, the first six tests of the "Hexanexus: Remake" are completed. In a few days, I'll assign the spiritfarers in the Ten-Lords Commission to refresh The Shackling Prison puzzles, and new puzzles will be available.

C: 我想换成*挑战难度*。
E: I'd like to change to *Challenging Difficulty*.

C: 你是学生？
E: You're a student?

C: 「好耶。」
E: "Aw right."

C: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 嗯…有位织者重视情谊，不愿与旧友们分离。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽站点的铃铛上</color>，跟每位过路人道别呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who values connections deeply and cannot bear to say goodbye to friends. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the bell of Dromas Station</color>, offering farewells to every passerby.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望完美。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>走廊的某根柱子上</color>，把自己伪装成一盏灯，说是要「追求极致」。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who strives for perfection. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lean <color=#dbc291ff>against a certain pillar along the corridor</color>, pretending to be a lamp. They seek to "reach the pinnacle of their aspirations."

C: 这块金织上确实有字，但每一句都断断续续、像是被污泥糊住了似的，根本不具备可读性。
E: Surely, the golden fabric is adorned with words, yet each sentence appears fragmented as if muddied by sludge. They are completely unreadable.
Four warriors.

C: 我连宝箱也不好意思拿了…下次可别那么容易上当受骗！
E: Taking this chest doesn't even feel right anymore... Do us a favor and try not to get tricked so easily next time!

C: 诸邦的勇士云集祭典，肉搏、拳击、斗兽、投枪…以搏杀换取荣誉，争夺胜者的冠冕，以及尼卡多利的赐福。
E: Warriors from all over would gather for great ceremonies and engage in hand-to-hand combat, boxing, beast fighting, spear throwing... They would battle for glory with their lives, vying for the winner's crown and the benediction of Nikador.

C: 你是什么好奇宝宝吗？
E: You a curious creature or what?

C: 我于是变成一只钢爪兽，在地里倒腾了无数个日夜，终于吃掉了那颗果实。说实话，味道一般。
E: So I turned into a Steelclaw Beast and dug into the earth for countless days, my journey ending with the fruit in my belly. Honestly, it didn't taste like much.

C: 我于是变成一只飞鸟，一连歇息了十枝枝桠，终于飞到树顶。说实话，味道很一般。
E: So I turned into a bird and flew, resting my feet on ten branches, my journey ending at the treetop. Honestly, it didn't taste like much.

C: 别小看我！
E: Don't underestimate me!

C: 没关系，巴特鲁斯喜欢一切无法确定的关系——箱子里未知的财宝、谁都不知道会发什么芽的种子、还有传说中又死又活的猫。
E: But that's fine — I, Bartholos, love all uncertain things: The unknown treasures in chests, seeds that might sprout into anything, and that legendary cat that could be both dead and alive.

C: 不过阳雷骑士赢得过{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}，却未必能赢过{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}…这么想来还是你比较强！溜了溜了，我要去和自己的真身会合了！
E: The Daythunder Knight beat {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} but probably couldn't defeat {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}... which makes you the stronger one! Time for me to return to my original form!

C: 不过巴特鲁斯和我讲过那个搬运工的故事，它说和你在这里玩角色扮演真的非常开心。
E: But Bartholos told me about the porter story and said it had a blast role-playing with you.

C: 这让巴特鲁斯非常感动，也让它在面对某些命运的时候，更多了一份坦然。
E: This touched Bartholos profoundly, helping it face certain destinies with more acceptance.

C: 放心吧，你们的宝贝就由我带过再创世！
E: Don't worry, I'll ensure your treasures survive Era Nova!

C: 残忍？什么残忍…
E: Cruel? What are you talking about?

C: 嘶！这得是多么绝望，多么残忍！而你们竟然把它当作游玩项目！
E: Tsssk! The horror, the cruelty! And you people even take that as an entertainment!?

C: 桀桀…既然你问出了这个问题，那么巴特鲁斯就用一个小故事来说明吧。
E: Hehehe... Since you asked that question, let Bartholos explain it with a little story.

C: 你们所保留的，是类似我们的世界这种，由形形色色的模因交织而成的虚拟现实。
E: What you keep is really just a virtual reality crafted from various memetic entities, much like our world.

C: 抱歉…愿{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}赐予他们平静的安眠。
E: My condolences... May {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} grant them eternal peace.

C: 再见了，所有的替罪羊。
E: Farewell to all the scapegoats.

C: 这也能找？
E: Janus can find that?

C: 「亲爱的潘：无论我们相距多远，妈妈都会永远陪在你的身边。」
E: "Dear Pam: No matter how far apart we are, Mom will always be with you."

C: 辛苦了，辅祭。如此一来，积压的委托就全数完成了，去命运泰坦前称颂自己的美德吧，这是你应得的。
E: Great work, acolyte. Now that all the backlog has been completed, go to the Fate Titans and extol your virtues — you've earned it.

C: 啊，不…没关系。不打紧。请您继续解开下一个火种匣吧！
E: Ah, no, no, it's fine. I'm fine. Please, let's keep going. Open the next Casket.

C: 不必担心，{NICKNAME}阁下…我其实感觉好多了。
E: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}... I actually feel much better now.

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 我这就看看…啊，这是！！！
E: Let me check... Ah, this is—!!!

C: 好欣慰，你成长了。
E: Glad to see you've grown.

C: 是真的。
E: It's true.

C: 吾还没见过这样的景象呢。
E: I've never seen anything like it.

C: 「你来了。」阮•梅的声音不起波澜，她对你的到来毫不意外，「这是我们的『秘密』空间，依旧的，请别告诉黑塔…它会在一定时间后彻底销毁。」
E: "You're here." There isn't a single hint of emotion in Ruan Mei's voice. She seems unsurprised by your arrival. "This is our 'secret' space. Just as it used to be, please don't tell Herta... it will self-destruct after a certain amount of time."

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 你看见一个模糊的人影：祂由镜子的碎片构成，五官被棱镜反复折射成谜团。无数记忆在你眼前涌现。
E: You see a blurry figure made of mirror fragments, and THEIR facial features are repeatedly refracted by the prism to form a mystery. Countless memories spring up before your eyes.

C: 「『开拓』，吾因汝之归来而欢喜。」祂用身躯上的万只眼睛注视着你，声音悲悯，像是垂怜。
E: "The Trailblaze, I am delighted by your return." THEY stare at you with tens of thousands of eyes on THEIR body, with a voice so sympathetic, as if speaking to you in pity.

C: 「丰饶」？
E: The Abundance?

C: 获得一些宇宙碎片。
E: Obtain some Cosmic Fragments.

C: 获得一个随机祝福
E: Obtain 1 random Blessing

C: 「记忆」的祝福体现在冰冻上，它能强化冰冻的效果和收益。
E: The Blessings of Remembrance are embodied in Ice, enhancing Freeze effects and buffs.

C: 什么时候能修好？
E: When will it be fixed?

C: 你平心静气地观摩，知道其上有万物的结局。潦草痕迹记载：「…塔伊兹育罗斯，于仇恨与孤独中飞升的星神；自<color=#dbc291ff>『终末』</color>的呓语中得知，祂的死亡将注定祂的诞生。其一生都被囚禁于「繁育」的命途。如有兴趣，可在接下来的故事中观察其怪异、断带、被命运操弄之处…」
E: You calm down and observe it, knowing that the end of all things is recorded in it. The scribbling writes, "...Tayzzyronth, an Aeon that ascends amid hatred and loneliness. From the words <color=#dbc291ff>the Finality</color> mutters in THEIR sleep, Tayzzyronth's death predetermines THEIR birth. Throughout THEIR whole life, THEY will be imprisoned in the Path of Propagation. If you're interested, you can learn about its abnormality, its separation, and how it is played by fate..."

C: 曼德勒岛民正是用生命的诞育抵抗对孤独和死亡的恐惧——这片孤岛上除了爱与孤独外什么也没有…可悲的是这火焰终被浇灭，它们最终成为了虫群最初的温床。
E: The Mandalan islanders use the continuation of life to resist the fear of loneliness and death - there is nothing else on this isolated island except love and loneliness... Regrettably, this flame will eventually be extinguished, and the island will end up being the initial breeding ground for the Swarm.

C: 没错！将刀与叉的磁力对调，它会引诱那些巨兽——它们将循着磁力而来，在张开巨口时露出破绽，接着用双色迷幻磁铁缩小自己的身躯，钻进那些巨大的嘴里——是的，就这样点燃一根火柴，然后从内部点燃它、炸碎它！或者，你可以从内向外饱餐一顿……
E: Exactly! Reversing the magnetic poles of the knife and fork will lure those behemoths! They will follow the magnetism, exposing their weak spots as they open their huge maws. Taking this opportunity, the hunters will use the dual-color psychedelic magnets to shrink themselves and dive into the gaping jaws! Just like that, light a match, then ignite the behemoth and blow it up from the inside! Or, you can simply stuff yourself from the inside out...

C: 你对着光线，看不真切里面封存的「影子」究竟是什么。你突然产生一种久远的…冲动。是的…你好奇太久了。没关系，黑塔没有在看你…
E: Facing the light, you can't make out what exactly this "shadow" is sealed within. An... urge suddenly wells up within you. Yes... you've been curious for far too long. It's all right, Herta isn't looking...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群热血慷慨的巡海游侠。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice changes into a group of fervent and passionate Galaxy Rangers.

C: 「话说回来，斯蒂芬做东西就这样。我们想研究星神，他可未必。」黑塔重新看向你，「好了，该解释的都说完了，后面你自己加油吧。在这个扩展装置里，时间流速是锁定的，所以，你会看到模拟宇宙被切成了几个位面。」
E: "But then again, it's typical of Stephen to do things like that. We want to study the Aeons, but I'm not sure about him." Herta looks back at you and continues, "Well, I've explained everything I can. You have to count on yourself after this. In this expansion module, the flow of time is locked, so you'll see the Simulated Universe divided into several planes."

C: 漫天琳琅作响的翅粉令你产生轻微的幻觉。你发现祂正被无数摇摇欲坠的黄蝴蝶、蚁虫、陨窠虫与不同大小的蛰虫簇拥着。祂在这种幻象的簇拥中不停飞升上天空…祂的血液看上去是彩色的。只是你并无从得知祂为何而流血……
