E: You have a mild hallucination due to the ringing and chiming dust on butterfly wings that covers the sky. You find the Aeon surrounded by countless yellow butterflies, ants, meteor bugs, and hibernating insects of different sizes that are on the verge of falling. Amidst the illusion, THEY begin a continuous ascent to the sky... THEIR blood appears colorful, but you have no idea why THEY are bleeding...

C: 突然！「沙王」的模拟影像再次于你面前亮起。噢…差点忘了说。在古琥珀纪中的某个时刻，那真是一个不起眼的时刻。在「均衡」、「存护」、「开拓」、「欢愉」、「同谐」的携手下——「繁育」的星神塔伊兹育罗斯于寰宇间陨落。
E: Suddenly, the Sand King's simulated image lights up before you. Oh, almost forgot to mention: At a certain point in the ancient Amber Era - that was truly an uneventful time - with the coordinated efforts of the Aeons of Equilibrium, Preservation, Trailblaze, Elation, and Harmony, Tayzzyronth the Aeon of Propagation fell across the cosmos.

C: 然而，仍有更偏远的地区尚未被波及——他们对远方发生的一切浑然不觉，依然过着质朴、和平的生活。正如此刻，一对工人夫妇正在分享同一碗星花炒饭，星花滑落的那一刻，先生俯身用机械钳去捡——他每日都祈祷着妻子不要发问，但妻子还是开口：
E: However, there were still more remote areas that remained untouched by these events. The people there were blissfully unaware of what was happening in the distance, continuing to live simplistic and peaceful lives. Just like at this very moment, a laborer couple are sharing the same bowl of starflower fried rice. When a starflower slips off the bowl, the husband bends down to pick it up with a mechanical clamp. He prays every day for his wife to not ask, but she does anyway.

C: 认知拓宽：「精神香料」•其二
E: Broadened Cognition: Mental Spices (II)

C: 极致无机：「神的三个启示」•其三
E: Supreme Inorganic: God's Three Revelations (III)

C: 老人们颤抖地递给你宝贵的相片，学者们把残存的数据资料整合。哈罗瓦将变成一个崭新的城市，却也会留存人们所珍视的点点滴滴。因为你是最杰出的城市复原师，不会失去任何一张笑脸。
E: The elderly hand over their precious photos to you, trembling as the scholars integrate the surviving data. Halover will become a brand-new city, but it'll still keep those little bits that people cherish most. Because you are the best urban restoration specialist there is — you won't leave any smile behind.

C: 帝国军说，在括尔加哈的南部群山之中，藏着一群嗜血的恶魔，他们长着青面獠牙，用吞噬弹湮灭城镇，生着三头六臂。
E: The Imperial Army claim that a horde of bloodthirsty devils lurk in the southern mountain ranges of Khorgahar. They are beastly to behold, boasting dozens of limbs and heads, and can obliterate towns with their consumption bombs.

C: 它会接替你的位置，变得臃肿，退化掉无意义的器官，但这些对你来说都不再重要。
E: It will replace you, become bloated, and let useless organs atrophy. But none of this is of any importance to you, anymore.

C: 一个忆者。
E: A Memokeeper.

C: 你打开星图，记录的坐标连接成一道即将连接的圆环。彗星蝉的远游不过是演化出的繁衍策略，可它的轨迹却改变了十一个星系的命运，将它们连接成巨大的生态系统。
E: You open your astral charts, and the recorded coordinates are for a ring that's about to be connected. The comet cicadas' long voyage was nothing more than an evolved reproduction stratagem, but its trajectory ended up changing the fate of eleven different star systems — and connecting them all together into one huge ecosystem.

C: 诞生自决策共性的你，不得不汲取人们的对立，以维持自我意识的存在。可当对立也成为共性，你便会回到无情的聚合数据，成为一股单纯的群体冲动。
E: As you are born from the unification of thought, you must absorb the opposition between people in order to maintain your own consciousness. However, once opposition also becomes commonality, you shall return to no more than simple emotionless polymerization of data, no more than a group impulse.

C: 这场由天外的舰炮引发的争斗，其代价却要地上的生命来偿还。你能缝补他们肉体的创伤，治愈他们的疾病，可伤病之外的嫌隙却难以根除。
E: The cost of this war ushered in by cannon fire beyond the sky must be covered with lives on the ground. Though you can stitch the wounds on their bodies and heal their sickness, the resentment beyond all this is nigh on impossible to eradicate.

C: 手动发射。
E: Launch manually.

C: 你又看到了第一个国家，在一条蜿蜒的大河边，首领头顶橄榄枝俯瞰着城邦。
E: Then, you see the first country. Along the bank of a snaking river, the chief overlooks his city with an olive branch laurel.

C: 「帕提维娅学士所发现的那个信号，就是一道宇宙中的孤波。同时，也是一道险些把整个宇宙都关进知识圆圈的寰宇难题。」
E: "The signal that Scholar Patavia received is a solitary wave within the universe. At the same time, it is also a conundrum that nearly confined the entire universe in the Circle of Knowledge."

C: 脑海中浮现出一缕不属于自己的记忆，作为有机体的记忆。你尝试扫描阻拦者的面孔，那里只有模糊的杂乱数据。你很清楚，她在微笑，并逐渐靠近。
E: A thread of memory that isn't yours appears in your mind, the memory of you being an organic. You attempt to scan the interloper's face, but there is only a miasma of digital gibberish. But you are certain that she is smiling, and is getting closer.

C: 「你是说，自己感染了反有机病毒，还被寂静领主杀掉了？」黑塔半信半疑地掰开你的眼皮，尝试判断，模拟宇宙内是否也能发烧说胡话。
E: "You mean to say you got infected with the Anti-Organic Virus, and were murdered by the Lord of Silence?" Herta pries open your eyelids with skepticism, trying to determine if it is possible to get a fever and sputter delirious nonsense in the Simulated Universe.

C: 「干得漂亮，螺丝咕姆！我头一次觉得这家伙的话那么悦耳。」
E: "Nicely done, Screwllum! This is my first time hearing such pleasing words from this fella."

C: 「欢迎你，{NICKNAME}。斯蒂芬让我一定要给你详细介绍一下『自定义骰』。」黑塔似乎不想解释太多，「他说『自定义骰』乃是一名智械的孕育之壳。你可以将『感情』、『思维』、『记忆』、『魅力』等物附着于它。」
E: "Welcome, {NICKNAME}. Stephen asked me to give you a thorough breakdown of those 'custom dice'." Herta doesn't seem to be in the mood to explain much. "According to him, the die is actually a shell of an Intellitron, and you can attach your emotions, thoughts, memories, and charms to it."

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: What kind of questions do you have?

C: 你遇到了黑塔，她漫不经心，面无表情地看着你。
E: You encounter Herta. Uncaring, she looks at you expressionlessly.

C: 打开强化界面。
E: Open the Enhance screen.

C: 打开祝福商店。
E: Open the Blessing Store.

C: 「我会证明给你看的，只需要对你之前的经历改上几笔。」他突然露出落寞的眼神。「你要切实忘掉过去，才能假装对未来一无所知。」
E: "I'll prove it to you. All I have to do is to make some changes to your past." Suddenly, his eyes are tinged with despondence. "You must genuinely forget about your past to pretend that you know nothing about your future."

C: 拍他一下。
E: Smack it.

C: 你打开了匣子，里面似乎有奇怪的东西……
E: You open the box and see something odd inside...

C: 他转动眼球，看向你，绅士地鞠躬。接着，荷官以十支机械手臂分发筹码，优雅切牌。
E: He moves his eyeballs to look at you before bowing at you gentlemanly. Next, the dealer distributes the chips and shuffles the cards gracefully with his ten mechanical arms.

C: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
E: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

C: 天才俱乐部#55余清涂的特调令你惊讶不已。原来你调制出了一杯传说中的有毒鸡尾酒……
E: You are shocked by the recipe of Genius Society #55, Yu Qingtu. As it turns out, you have made a legendarily toxic cocktail...

C: 哼…你翻阅着星际和平手册对公司领导层的介绍。那面庞英俊、能言善辩的「P<unbreak>-25</unbreak>」分部领导令你不悦…也许，你会比他更有才能？
E: Hmph... You flip through the overview of the IPC's directors in the Interastral Peace Handbook. That level P<unbreak>-25</unbreak> branch director with a handsome face and an articulate silver tongue annoys you... Perhaps you are more talented than him?

C: 突然！你同时感觉到无数隐秘的眼睛在黑暗中注视着你…尖锐的附足沿着振动寻到你的方位，饥饿的幼体虫群将你团团包围。
E: Suddenly, you feel as though countless concealed eyes are gazing at you from the darkness! As numerous sharp appendages manage to locate you by following the vibrations, the hungry Swarm larvae surround you completely.

C: 「新来的机修工，控制室好像出了点问题，赶紧去处理处理。」你左顾右盼，确认他嘴里的「机修工」指的是你。
E: "Hey, new mechanic — something's broken in the control room. Go fix it, fast!" You look around, just to be sure that this "mechanic" he's talking about is in fact you.

C: 你狠狠地掐住大腿的肌肉，直到疼痛让眼前的事物恢复正常。该死的家伙，等你抓住他，准要把星际和平网络的垃圾话大全塞进他的嘴巴。
E: You pinch at the muscle in your legs with all your strength until the pain returns everything to normal. When you get your hands on this scoundrel you're going to force-feed him every word of trash talk on the Interastral Peace Network!

C: 你身处一片破碎的忆泡中，一琥珀纪一度的千星跳蚤市场正进入最热闹的阶段。在这里，不再需要投影货架和信用点，只要有相中的物品，都能够用以物易物来交换。
E: You find yourself in a shattered memory bubble as the once-an-Amber Era galactic flea market reaches its peak period. Here, you don't even need to project a holographic goods shelf or use credits. If you see something you like, you can simply swap goods for other goods.

C: 由于驾驶员的美食理念与主办方不合，寿司飞船失去了比赛资格。
E: Due to culinary disagreements between the pilot and the organizers, the sushi spaceship is disqualified.

C: 「这假赛打得也太明显了！」观众席骤然躁动起来。
E: "This match is so obviously fixed!" The audience starts to become restless.

C: 「苦涩忧闷的藏品。」愚者因醉意已沉沉欲睡，「灰暗的破碎面具，信用为负数的说谎者，那人说暴胀子引擎才是库维达能源的出路，可就连智能单元都不愿意相信。」
E: "A bitter and depressed collection item." The Fool is dozing off in his drunkenness. "The dim and broken mask. A liar with negative credit. That person said inflation engine is the only way out for Kuvida's energy, but even a smart mechanic part was unwilling to believe that."

C: 你坐在幽暗的帐篷里，白发的卜者挥挥手，游离的色彩便将迪斯普夜市的嘈杂隔绝。漆黑的眸子在你的身上游走，似乎这样就能窥探到你的命运。
E: As you sit inside the dim tent, the white-haired diviner waves her hand, prompting the meandering colors to block out the clamor of the Dispo Night Market outside. Her dark eyes scrutinize you, seemingly peering into your fate.

C: 你缓步向上攀登，不敢往下窥探，一种没来由的预感告诉你，一旦踏错一步，便会坠入万丈深渊。
E: You make the ascent cautiously, not daring to look down. An inexplicable sense of foreboding tells you that one wrong step, and you'll be devoured by the endless abyss below.

C: 「谢谢你，小友。」他接下硬币，恋恋不舍地看向尚未被冥河淹没的尘世，消失在湍流深处。
E: "Thank you, young friend." He takes the coin, looks forlornly at the world still untouched by the River of Souls, and disappears into the torrential depths.

C: 世间仍在传颂，它率领众多的眷属，涉身踏入天际。长矛与雷枪碰撞，敲击出阵阵轰雷，神明的羽毛纷纷坠落，降下一场铁雨。
E: Legends also tell of the day Nikador led their countless kin into the heavens. Lances clashed against lightning spears with deafening roars, and the feathers of gods rained down like a storm of iron.

C: 愚昧的诗人弹奏乐曲，臆断纷争与死亡的盟约。却不知，荣耀和胜利，才是尼卡多利的旋律。纷争的事业未毕，它追猎每一位血亲，直到将它们尽数征服。
E: Foolish poets play their tunes, conjecturing about the covenant of strife and death. Yet they do not know that glory and victory are the melodies of Nikador. The conflict rages on, as they hunt down each kin until none remains unconquered.

C: 但真正的战士从不因丢失武器而变得胆怯，尼卡多利也不会是躲藏在盾后的懦夫。
E: But true warriors do not falter due to a lost weapon. Nikador has never been a coward who hides behind shields.

C: 它创造出一种人人都能获胜的棋局，直到连泼利斯王都压下了家当，才带着棋盘逃之夭夭。
E: They crafted a board game where all could triumph until even the king of Polis gambled away his realm and fled with the board.

C: 它是欧洛尼斯的好友。当人们因一天的繁忙而疲惫时，永夜之帷便晃动裙摆，令繁星闪烁，呼唤它的到来。
E: They were a friend of Oronyx's. When people were weary from the day's toil, the Veil of Evernight would sway their skirts, making the stars twinkle and calling for their arrival.

C: 就从塞纳托斯的船说起吧。世人总妄想挑战死亡，譬如疯癫的弥卡斯王，还有躲藏进石棺，陷入永眠的赫耳斯特拉。但他们终不过成为戏剧家笔下的丑角，真正可笑的，还要数密底斯泰歇的皮里曼斯。
E: Let us begin with Thanatos' boat. Mortals have always tried to defy death. The mad King Mikas, and Herostratus who hid in a sarcophagus and entered eternal sleep to escape mortality, only became the laughingstock of playwrights. But the most ridiculous of them all was Pylamans of Mythemis.

C: 牵强的解释。
E: These are forced explanations.

C: 爱将跨越一切。
E: Love will transcend all.

C: 以雅努斯为首，三位命运泰坦在混沌中划定时空，赋予法则，抟造出翁法罗斯的雏形，留下万物诞生的基石，是为创世之始。
E: Led by Janus, the three Fate Titans delineate time and space within chaos, bestow laws, and mold the embryo of Amphoreus, laying down the cornerstone for all creation.

C: 不过也有人对这次预言抱有怀疑，毕竟获得神启的只是区区几名信徒，也不排除造假的可能，但接下来的这段预言确凿无疑，整个翁法罗斯无人不知。
E: Yet some doubt this prophecy. After all, only a handful of believers received the divine revelation, leaving room for deception. But the next prophecy was undeniable, known to all in Amphoreus without exception.

C: 它宣布将对年轻人施以诅咒——无论这位可怜的祭祀吃下什么，吃了多少，他永远也无法饱足，无尽的饥饿将如烈火将他烧灼！
E: They proclaimed that they would place a curse upon the young man — no matter what this poor devotee ate, or how much he consumed, he would never be satisfied, and endless hunger would burn within him like raging fire!

C: 然后，他吃光了家中的麦子，还有邻居们的存粮。他为了寻找更多食物，不得不背井离乡。目所能及的飞禽走兽都被他吃了。
E: Then, he consumed all the wheat in his home, and the provisions of his neighbors. To find more food, he was forced to leave his homeland. He devoured all the birds and beasts within his sight.

C: 年轻的祭祀通过了瑟希斯的考验。于是各种作物开始在大地上生长，人们也聚集在圣树之下，垂听智慧之声的教诲。
E: The young devotee had passed Cerces's test. Thus, various crops began to grow upon the earth, and people gathered beneath the Sacred Tree to listen to the teachings of the voice of wisdom.

C: 或许它该停下。
E: Maybe they should stop.

C: 「尼卡多利有一面塞纳托斯赠予的神盾，由冥土抟造，足以抵挡万钧雷霆。」
E: "Nikador wields a divine shield, a gift from Thanatos themself. Forged from the very essence of the underworld, it is strong enough to withstand even the fiercest lightning."

C: 啊？你是今天来体检的啊。喔，倒是我疏忽了。
E: Huh? Oh, your medical examination was today. My apologies for keeping you waiting.

C: 似乎没什么反应，你决定——
E: Nothing seems to happen. You decide to...

C: 正确正确！密保问题核验通过，通过！
E: Correct, correct! The security question has been verified, verified!

C: 这场争执已经没必要再听下去，因为会议中缺失关键的「调停者」。而你意识到，这将是会议发起人应该承担的责任——
E: There's no need to keep listening to this debate go back and forth because the key "mediator" is missing. And you realize that the organizer of the meeting assumes this responsibility...

C: 你竟意外地发现，自己正受困于一阴暗逼仄的空间。空气中潮气弥漫，含混着木制品霉烂后特有的腐败气息。
E: To your surprise, you are stuck in a dark and cramped room. The air is thick and dank, mixed with the putrid scene unique to mouldy, rotten wood.

C: 「嘁！」你的工头将脑袋埋进属于他自己的毛球里猛吸了一口，「那个老皇帝…打发我们来这鬼地方修坟墓就算了，连宠物都不让养？！真该死……」
E: "Ahhh!" Your supervisor buries his head in his fluff ball and takes in a gulp of air. "That decrepit old emperor... Firstly he sends us to make his tomb at this godforsaken place, and now we can't even have pets!? Ridiculous..."

C: 这个讲师，压根不懂黄金时代的历史，瞎讲一通嗡……
E: This lecturer now has no idea about the history of The Golden Age. He's just talking a load of baloney...

C: 其他地方应该还有怀揣赐福的若虫，贵客可以去别的衣匠处看看。
E: There must be other blessed nymphs in other areas. Esteemed guest, try taking a look around other Garmentmakers.

C: 选吧。
E: Make your choice.

C: 打开小型宝箱。
E: Open the small chest.

C: （好像没拍到希露瓦。算了，我尽力了……）
E: (It seems like Serval wasn't in the shot. Whatever. I did my best...)

C: 喀喀——桥梁对城邦来说必不可少，正如再伟大的君王也会需要逃生密道。倘若我们彼此隔绝，「死亡」的脚步也会接踵而至。
E: Crrk crrk — Bridges are vital to a city. Just like how even the greatest ruler still needs a secret escape route, if we become isolated from each other, then the steps of "Death" shall swiftly follow.

C: 征服世界！
E: World conquest, here I come!

C: 吓死虫了，我都不敢出声喀！
E: Almost scared me to death, couldn't even crrk!

C: 这只是医生职责所在罢了。要谢还是去谢谢桑博吧。
E: That's my job. If you want to thank someone, you should thank Sampo.

C: <size=36>藏得可真好！</size>
E: <size=36>Excellently!</size>

C: 记住，下次一起玩的话，要向虎克问清楚规则！这次就先饶过你了！
E: Remember, the next time we play, ask me about the rules! I'll let you slide this time!

C: 停——冷静点，{NICKNAME}！
E: Stop — calm down, {NICKNAME}!

C: 就此离开，没人会受伤！
E: Leave now, and nobody gets hurt!

C: 赌上身为织者的尊严嗡，猜猜看吧，我在哪棵树后边？
E: For the honor of being a Weaver, buzz, take a guess: Behind which tree am I hiding?

C: 难道说，那些人把宝贝借走之后…就不打算还回来了吗嘤！
E: Could it be that those people borrowed the treasures and... never planned to return them, eep!?

C: 嘤嘤~竟敢攻击女王大人的骑士，难道你是来袭击这座宫殿的入侵者吗？
E: Chirp, chirp~ How dare you attack the Queen's knight! Are you an intruder here to attack our palace?

C: 若虫们的鸣叫声连成一片，仿佛夏日池塘中的青蛙——可惜翁法罗斯没有青蛙。
E: The chirping of the nymphs fills the air, blending together like the croaking of frogs in a summer pond — if only Amphoreus had frogs.

C: 豹~
E: Seal~

C: 说到底，我们根本没有给物流机巧鸟搭载任何智能，硬件条件也不允许啊。也许是你幻听了？或者是有人假装是机巧鸟与你对话？
E: Besides, we never equipped these courier cycranes with any intelligence in the first place. The hardware components simply couldn't allow for it. Maybe you were just hearing things? Or perhaps someone was talking to you disguised as a cycrane?

C: 过段时间你再来问我吧。
E: Talk to me a little later.

C: 说真的，也许是你的错觉：这只机巧鸟目光如炬，就像是说「走开，这不关你的事儿」。
E: To be honest, maybe it's a delusion: This cycrane's penetrating gaze say, "Get lost. This is none of your business."

C: 对呀。
E: I thought so.

C: 就算你打赌赢了一次，也不必这样高高在上嘛。
E: Even if you won the bet, you don't have to act so high-and-mighty.

C: …因为我们是机巧鸟，所以你们就出尽难题。凭什么要我们找你，而不是你来找我们，就因为你们是有机物吗？
E: ...Because we're cycranes, see, so you just chuck all kinds of problems our way. Why should we come to you instead of the other way around? Is it just because you're organic?

C: 简、简单？我也觉得这道附加题很简单……
E: S—Simple? I think so too...

C: 我太感动了，一定会回来。
E: I'm touched. I'll definitely be back.

C: 嘎更艮鹅日惹？！（发生什么事了？！）
E: Bopth pamphened!? ("What happened!?")

C: 宇宙…最后的边疆！
E: The final frontier of the universe!

C: 就让我试试嘛。
E: Just let me try.

C: 好了，我知道了。小型中子辐射炸弹是吧？我去转交给十王司的人。感谢你对神策府工作的大力支持。
E: Okay, I understand. A mini-neutron bomb, is it? I'll pass it over to the Ten-Lords Commission. Thank you for your support for the Seat of Divine Foresight's cause.

C: 嘁，你懂什么，别看我还小，但我可比这种白活了几百年的大人聪明多了。
E: Tch, what do you know? I may look young, but I'm so much smarter than these adults who have lived for centuries.

C: 所以你究竟做了什么？
E: So what exactly did you do?

C: 我得静下来好好想想——不不不，我得冷静下来，卜一卦看看接下来该怎么办……
E: I have to calm down and think... No no no, I have to calm down, and divine my next steps...

C: 想要气球吗？我这儿有各种颜色的，它们都和我一样，静静地漂浮着。
E: Do you want a balloon? I have all different colored balloons here, floating silently like me.

C: 我踩的水花比我还高！
E: My splashes are higher than yours!

C: 所以才叫你刻在石板上。
E: That's why stone tablets are better.

C: 哎，别说了，太悲哀了。
E: Ah, don't mention it. It's so sad.

C: 奥赫玛的永夜…
E: Okhema's eternal night...

C: 没人？我要游个来回！
E: No one around? Guess I'm swimming a few laps!

C: 这种情况该如何逃脱…
E: How do we escape a situation like this...

C: 这帮「投币祈愿」的家伙…也不知道是从哪儿听来了一大套迷信的说辞，非要往玦轮里面扔东西。
E: This wretched clique of Coin Zealots... Who knows where they got their superstitious ideas from, but they insist on throwing stuff into jade wheels.

C: 帕姆觉得这次还是喝点饮料算了，对了，{NICKNAME}你有什么推荐的吗？最好是有「罗浮」风味的那种，这样才算不虚此行嘛！
E: I thought it would be nice to have something to drink this time. Oh yeah, {NICKNAME} — can you recommend anything? Hopefully it's something Luofu-style to make our trip worthwhile!

C: 甜甜的，热乎乎的，哇这玩意儿喝完浑身都好舒畅是怎么回事？
E: It's sweet, and it's piping hot, wow! Why does my whole body feel so loosey goosey right now?

C: 是你对我看法有变。
E: The only thing that's changed is your opinion of me.

C: 冷静一点，别冲动！
E: Calm down. Please don't be so rash!

C: 但是！下次不可以这样做了哦！呼…吓死帕姆了！幸好没有影响到绿植……
E: But! Next time, don't do that! Woo... You really freaked me out! Luckily my plant is alright...

C: 看完了，就这？
E: I'm done. That's it?

C: 「没莓果汁配方：胡萝卜两根、黄瓜半根、雪梨两个。放入榨汁机即可。」
E: "No-Berry Juice Recipe: Two carrots; half a cucumber; two pears. Place inside a juicer and blend."

C: 列车长有事要问你哦，是为了制定「列车行为准则」用的。
E: I've got something to ask you so that I can draft these "Express Regulations" that I'm doing.

C: 诶！你是这样想的吗？不过智库里确实有记载，很多全新的物种都是经过基因变异而产生的。
E: Hey! You really think so? The data bank has lots of records in it actually about how brand-new species come about through this kind of genetic mutation.

C: 总感觉和列车的属性太过重复了帕！
E: That's too similar to the function of this very Express!

C: 就算是列车长，也需要一点私人空间的。
E: Even the conductor needs a little privacy.

C: 这…黑夜就是忧郁的最好配色！怎么样，帕姆的感受还…还不错吧？
E: Well... Nighttime represents melancholy the best! It... gives off a nice vibe, doesn't it?

C: 我喜欢关灯节能纯黑配色。
E: I like the energy-saving black.

C: 影响身体健康可不好。
E: You should take care of your health.

C: 哼，可别想跑！列车长已经选定你啦！过来帮我搭把手吧！加湿器还没修好，只能手动洒水了。
E: Hmph, don't think of running away, as I have chosen you! Please give me a hand! As the humidifier is still broken, I have to resort to sprinkling water manually.

C: 实在找不到相关负责人的话…直接问艾丝妲也行！就说是「列车长的请求」！
E: If you really can't find the person in charge... You can just ask Asta directly! Just say it's a request from the conductor!

C: 哦！帕姆好像懂了。但…又好像没懂？这就是管理学大师的建议帕，很有深度！
E: Oh! Pom-Pom gets it. But... Pom-Pom is not sure... Advice from the master of management is truly deep!

C: 我回来咯！
E: I'm back!

C: （那个军官身上或许有能操控栈桥的密钥？）
E: (That officer may have the key for the bridge?)

C: 唷，来这边！
E: Hey, come here!

C: 非常成功！
E: A great success!

C: 若您曾见过我的姐姐，可否转告她速归…？
E: If you've seen my sister, could you help me tell her to come home quickly...?

C: 我的妹妹…她离家出走了！我四处寻找，却怎么也找不到……
E: My little sister... she ran away from home! I've looked everywhere for her, but I can't find her...

C: 她那憔悴的面庞上浮现出一丝安心的笑容。
E: A faint smile of comfort lines her drained visage.

C: 呃…道歉要是有用，还要银鬃铁卫干嘛？你…呃…我必须让你知道事情的严重性！对，严重性！
E: If apologies worked, we wouldn't need Silvermane Guards! I must show you how serious this is. Yeah, how serious!

C: 行了，快走吧。禁区本来就不是任你游荡的地方。
E: All right, you may leave now. The restricted zone is not a hangout.

C: 但今天就算了。师傅喊我有事，回见！
E: But not today, though. Master needs me right now. So, catch you later!

C: 不会是你画的吧！
E: Are you sure it's not... YOU!?

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 你不禁展开了联想——也许「开拓」阿基维利上次来到这颗星球时过于流连忘返，于是在临走前给雅利洛-Ⅵ盖下了印章……
E: You can't help but think it might be a commemorative stamp left by Akivili the Trailblaze when he last paid a visit to this planet...

C: 这是「科技护具」的配方，据说是寒潮之前的天外来客带来的技术…可惜，我们现在拥有的资源和技术还暂时无法将其复现。
E: This is the recipe for High-Tech Protective Gear, rumored to be brought in by visitors from beyond the sky before the Eternal Freeze... Unfortunately, with the resources and technology we have access to, we have yet to be able to reproduce it.

C: 你得用点更科学的办法才行。
E: You'll need a more scientific method.

C: 你按照自己的风格，帮助它完成了大量情景对话……
E: Using your own style, you help it get through a ton of scenarios...

C: 咔哒！清脆的声音从机械锁中响起。看来你猜对了第一个数字。
E: *click* The lock clanged loudly and crisply. You've guessed the first number.
Zero.

C: 确实，我在刀上刻了个「泉」字。
E: That's right, I myself engraved the character Quan on it.

C: 终年潜居仙境里，千古怅然弹指间。年轻人，你又来了。上次你为我这罐中天地带来了人间烟火，多亏了你，现在罐中已是万物竟发。
E: An eternity in the celestial realm, a millennium gone in a flash. {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, you've come back. You brought me some of the hustle and bustle of humanity last time. Thanks to you, my vase has everything now.

C: 是啊…这要是换别人来，我还真不一定能放心呢。
E: Yeah, if someone else were to take the job, I don't know if I'd be as relieved as if it was you.

C: 呼…刚才可真是千钧一发，幸亏有{NICKNAME}在……
E: Phew... that was close. Fortunately, you were there, {NICKNAME}...

C: 我们这边还有些失踪的货物需要用机巧鸟寻找…如果你有时间的话，可以再来帮帮忙吗？
E: We still have some missing cargo to search for with cycranes... If you have the time, can you come over and lend a helping hand?

C: 哈哈哈哈，物流公司哪里会一直丢货物呢？
E: Hahaha. It shouldn't be a regular thing for a logistics company.

C: …不过，鹤运物流最近确实丢了些货物，你懂的。
E: ...Well, Heron Express has indeed lost some items recently. You know what I'm saying?

C: 复仇，我必须复仇……
E: Revenge, I must get my revenge...

C: 就当这是我最后一次提示了。
E: This is my final hint.

C: 不愧是「枘凿六合」的深度测试用户，你的建议简直是醍醐灌顶。
E: You really are a Hexanexus power tester! These suggestions of yours are simply illuminating.

C: …仔细想想，取乐有什么不好的呢？追求乐趣本来就该是生命的一部分才对。
E: ...Thinking carefully about it — what's wrong with having fun? The pursuit of leisure SHOULD be a part of our lives.

C: 我们一起玩游戏吧。
E: Let's play together.

C: 但我却吃了个闭门羹…他说我太过无趣，脑海已经被无用的知识占据，一张口就会把笑话冲淡。
E: But I got the cold shoulder... He said I was too boring. My mind was filled with useless trivia and I'd ruined jokes all the time.

C: 我、我也必须采取行动…得赶快再申请一次梦境人身保护才行……
E: I—I have to take my own precautions here... and apply for another round of personal dreamscape protection...

C: 这话说得有点绝。
E: That's a little bit absolute.

C: 后来我们得知：早在这场战斗发生前，韦兰就把自己手头的提取液全卖掉了，买家是一位出价颇高的面具人。
E: Later on, we learned that Wyland had sold off all the extract he had well before the battle to a masked buyer who paid very good money for it.

C: …那样艰苦的努力却不能为人所知，未免太可惜了些。
E: ...It would be a great pity for such hard work to go unrecognized.

C: 银河中有亿万颗恒星，在如此广大的尺度上，二人间的执念难免显得渺小。
E: There are hundreds of millions of stars in the cosmos. On such a vast scale, this mutual infatuation between two people seems inevitably insignificant.

C: 哎，对待游客就别那么粗鲁了嘛。
E: Hey, don't be so rude to the patrons.

C: 上面写的字我看不懂。
E: I can't read what's on it.

C: 它说自己是一个智慧生物，希望能与我们讨论哲学和艺术，而不是被切成零散的肉块——是它主动向当地人要求上船的。
E: It said that it's an intelligent species and hoped to discuss philosophy and the arts with us — instead of being carved up into pieces of meat. It also said, it was its own idea to join everyone on the ship.

C: 分给你一些吧，希望你永远不要被肚子影响判断。
E: Let me share a little with you. May your stomach never impact your decision-making ability.

C: 我原本想把这故事做进梦境里，好让人们知道宇宙的另一头发生过什么。但家族说题材太过压抑，不予批准……
E: I wanted to make this story into the Dreamscape to educate people about what happened on the other end of the universe, but The Family found this topic too oppressive and did not approve it...

C: 于是我自缚双臂，以人质形象出现在他们面前，把自己表现得像个受害的良家妇女…他们信了，还给我安排了单独的房间。
E: So, I tied up my arms and pretended to be an innocent woman held captive. They fell for the trick and even put me in a room all by myself.

C: 哈哈，看您就是个懂的…所谓醉生梦死……
E: Haha, I can tell you're my kind of guy... Life is all about...

C: 那是谁？
E: Who's that?

C: 呃…关于波奇……
E: Um... About Bocchi...

C: 你没有吗？刚刚那几个人可是说了你们关系不好呢。
E: Didn't you? Those guys over there told me that Bocchi and you weren't on good terms.

C: 但现在我已重新想起——只要热血和激情还未冷却，梦想就还有实现的可能！
E: But now, it's all come back to me... As long as my passion and motivation still burn bright, I still have a chance to achieve my dream!

C: 咻咻…正在进行侵权风险分析……
E: *Beep*... Initiating infringement risk analysis...

C: 咻咻…为保障一切专利创造者的合法权益，现在将对「斯坦威游隼」豪华飞车施行强制锁定操作。锁定将在现存的风险彻底清除后自动解除！
E: *Beep*... To protect the rights of patent creators, a mandatory lock will now be put on your "Steinway Falcon" luxury speedster. Please don't worry. The lock will be automatically unlocked once the infringement risk is resolved!

C: 酥酥麻麻，一秒舒爽！电电枪，最棒棒！
E: Zap away discomfort! Instant relief! The best of the best: Zappy Gun!

C: 咻咻…分析完成！本次分析对象：「广告牌推销员」。
E: *Beep*... Analysis complete! Object identified: A sales billboard.

C: *皮皮西族粗口*特拉维斯那个叛徒！败类！皮皮西族之耻！
E: *Pepeshi curse* Travis! That traitor! Scumbag! A disgrace among us Pepeshi!

C: 呵呵，那鸢尾花家系随时欢迎你，说不定下一个「盛会巨星」就是你。
E: Well, if that's the case, the Iris Family is always open to you. You might become the next superstar.

C: 只可惜现在的艺者太娇气了，完全没法担起重任。刚刚就有个叫波波特的毛头小子，出道没多久就吵着要解约，说什么鸢尾花家系限制了他的发展——
E: But artists nowadays are just too spoiled. A kid named Popott demanded the termination of his contract with the Iris Family, whining about how we're holding him back from his full potential...

C: 看来我司未来的艺人不是很想跟你聊天，请离开吧。
E: Looks like our future artist isn't too keen to talk to you. Please leave.

C: 好！交给我吧！
E: No problem! Just leave it to me!

C: 其实我的演出以前在匹诺康尼一直很受欢迎，不过最近音乐会的门票销量很不理想，所以经纪人让我来街头亲自推广演出。
E: Actually, my concerts used to be quite popular in Penacony, but ticket sales have been poor lately, so my manager suggested that I personally promote the show on the streets.

C: 我以为凭着我的名誉与粉丝，可以让人们接受真正的「纯美之歌」…但我却忘记了，这一切都是靠谎言得到的——放弃谎言，也就放弃了拥有的一切。
E: I thought that with my reputation and fans, I could make people appreciate the true essence of the Song of Beauty... but I forgot that I achieved everything through deception. By abandoning the falsehoods, I gave up everything I had.

C: 你未免把我想得太脆弱了…虽然我确实算不上硬汉。
E: I'm not that weak, though I'm not exactly tough either.

C: 为了不看清她的脸，我每天都要用酒精灌醉自己。一旦停下，那股窒息的感觉便会再次包裹我。
E: To avoid seeing her face, I had to intoxicate myself every day with alcohol. The suffocating feeling would envelop me again once I stopped.

C: 惊梦剧团还能变成人类？
E: Can a monster from the Dreamjolt Troupe turn into a human?

C: 已经过去的事无法挽回。就算再怎么悲伤，人死也不能复生。
E: What's done cannot be undone. No matter how grief-stricken you are, you can no longer bring the girl back to life.

C: 卢•阿彻凛冽地皱起了眉头，就像撞见扒手的警探。或许这是她的工作状态也说不定。
E: Lew Archer knits her eyebrows into a stern expression, just like a detective who sees a pickpocket. This is probably how she looks when she is at work.

C: 这个世界总对努力的人如此苛刻！不、不能再这么下去了，我得想办法……
E: The world is always so hard on people who work hard! No! I can't allow things to go on like this. I have to think of a way...

C: 我想我应该珍惜这个机会，好好看看那座名为「黄金的时刻」的城市，看看前人缔造出的美梦……
E: I should make use of this opportunity to take a good look at that city called Golden Hour. It's a beautiful dreamland built by our predecessors...

C: 不介意的话，能帮我一个忙吗？
E: Do you mind doing me a favor?

C: 「瞧瞧我们发现了什么，前文明的宇航机器！我们就要胜利了！」
E: "Look what we found — a pre-civilization space machine! We're about to win!"

C: 要合作，不要战争。我觉得这才是宇宙最美好的状态。
E: Collaboration, not conflict, is the way to go.

C: 相比之下，我能成为这里的一份子，简直是命运的馈赠啊！
E: In comparison, I'm so lucky to be a part of this place!

C: 到底是梦主的威压太过恐怖…还是我本就是个冷血无情的魔鬼？
E: Was the Dreammaster really that terrifying and intimidating... Or am I just a cold-blooded demon?

C: …为什么要瞒着我？
E: ... Why did you hide everything from me?

C: 总有一天，你会为自己的天真后悔的。
E: One day, you will come to regret your naivety.

C: 我要举报。
E: I'd like to make a report.

C: 再见。
E: Bye.

C: 哼，果然是个胆小鬼，就知道你不敢——但这可由不得你！
E: Hah, so you're a coward after all. I knew you wouldn't dare, but it's not up to you!

C: 我告诉你，虽然我不会再针对你了，但也不代表我会任由你找麻烦。
E: I told you, I may not pursue you anymore, but it doesn't mean that I'll allow you to cause trouble.

C: 唉…这样下去学生还怎么成才？真是校风日下！
E: *sigh* If this goes on, how will the students be able to hone their talents? This school is becoming worse with each passing day!

C: 你染上「秩序」了？
E: Have you been infected by the Order?

C: 唉，这些学生也是费尽千辛万苦才考进这所学校来的，怎么就对这机会一点都不珍惜？
E: *sigh* These students spent a lot of time and effort to get into this school, so why don't they cherish this opportunity at all?

C: 在接过信封的一瞬，阿图罗先生愣住了，因为信封上画着一只歪歪扭扭的折纸鸟——你花了些力气才尽可能把它画得像鸟。
E: Mr. Arturo looks stunned the moment he accepts the envelope. There is a crooked drawing of an origami bird on the envelope — a drawing you spent some effort into making resemble a bird as much as possible.

C: 这样不会头晕吗？
E: Don't you get dizzy doing that?

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 那家伙居然敢在施工队眼皮子底下做偷鸡摸狗的事，就为了赚几个小钱...我会让铁卫去处理此事。
E: That guy actually dared go sneaking around right under the construction team's noses, stealing items just for a few coins... I will ask the Silvermane Guards to take care of this.

C: 你也该回去睡觉了。
E: It's time for bed.

C: 我要把它的茶水带给妃色夫人尝尝，再见了啾。
E: I'm bringing the tea for Lady Vermilion to try. Goodbye, tweet.

C: 嗯？我不就在她身边吗啾？
E: Eh? Aren't I here with her, tweet?

C: 美梦小镇？人家最喜欢美梦小镇了啾！
E: Dreamville? It's my favorite place, tweet!

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 这表走慢了。
E: This watch is slow.

C: 啾——我正看到精彩的地方呢！那两个大家伙马上就要打起来了啾……
E: Tweet! I'm watching something exciting! Those two big guys are going to fight soon, tweet!

C: 要认真观察…
E: I have to look closely...

C: …乔装打扮……携带武器……未经允许偷偷潜入钟表小子家啾……
E: ...All dressed up... Carrying weapons... Sneaking into Clockie's home without permission, tweet...

C: …对哦……
E: ...Oh yeah...

C: 竟然已经有其他鸟先我一步…
E: Another bird has beat me to it...?

C: 随时为您效劳——啾啾！
E: At your service, tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个胆子特别小的小助手，有点风吹草动就会把自己藏起来呢啾。最近乐园里的乱子有点多，或许它还躲在附近呢啾……
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one extremely cowardly assistant that hides themselves away at the slightest gust of wind, tweet. There's been a lot of disorder in the garden lately, maybe they've hidden themselves nearby somewhere, tweet...

C: 应该做不到吧？
E: I think that's quite impossible?

C: 原来他们都是坏人吗？哈努兄弟会好好收拾他们的啾。
E: So they're all baddies then? Brother Hanu will take real good care of them, tweet.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}？！你怎么......
E: {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}!? How did you...

C: 谢谢娜塔莎医生！
E: Thank you, Dr. Natasha!

C: 聪明的人类，准备接受小鸟的奖励吧，啾啾。
E: Smart human, get ready for my reward, tweet tweet.

C: 找到你了！
E: I found you!

C: 啾…有地图，还逼我在这儿指路！
E: Tweet... There's a map, but I'm still forced to give directions here!

C: 忘了啾，忘了啾，你不是小鸟，不能自己飞啾。
E: I forgot, tweet. I forgot, tweet. You're not a bird, and can't fly on your own, tweet.

C: 当然，我确定。
E: Of course, I'm sure.

C: 哼，想来你也不信，咱们来做一笔交易。你加入云骑军的证明文件在我手上，你答应不揭发我是卧底的秘密，我就把文件还你。否则……
E: *sigh* You just won't believe me, will you? Alright, how about we make a deal? As you see, I have your official documents. You promise not to expose my identity as an undercover agent, and I'll give those documents back to you. Otherwise...

C: 「禁忌书典」存在着「阅读门槛」，对大多数人来说，那些书典是无害的。
E: There is a certain "reading barrier" for those forbidden tomes, so they are completely harmless to the majority of people.

C: 我也不知道这东西是什么，就想让咪咪嗅探一下。结果咪咪翻了翻这个小册子，突然双手抱胸原地坐下了，还在连连叹气……
E: I didn't know what the text was, so I asked Mimi to sniff it for any scents. But as soon as Mimi started flipping through the pages, it suddenly sat down and started sighing...

C: 我完全没听懂…但我相信你变得聪明了。
E: I didn't understand any of that... but I'm pretty sure you've become smarter.

C: 凭你的本事，的确如此，不过你明白我的意思，别让这种事情发生就是最好了。
E: With your skills, perhaps so. But you understand the subtext in my words. It's best to prevent such a thing from happening at all.

C: 我来交还「禁忌书典」。
E: I'm here to return the forbidden tomes.

C: 你在和谁说话？
E: Who are you talking to?

C: 小鱼之前收到了一个快递，里面有个奇怪的旧石板，还有丹枢大人留下的一封信。
E: Not long ago, I received a package containing a strange stone tablet, along with a letter left by Lady Dan Shu.

C: 我送你回家吧。
E: I'll walk you home.

C: 你交还了《无言之卷》并讲述了回收它的过程。
E: You return the Manuscript of Silence and explain how you've retrieved it.

C: 我也想啊！可这残酷的命运不给我这个机会啊！
E: I didn't want to, but now I'm feeling like giving in to the cruel hand of fate!

C: 没关系，我不信这套的。
E: Don't worry. Bad luck or jinxes don't really exist.

C: 不，还是要抽的…凶签和凶签之间也有区别。
E: No, I've got to do this... Even though they're all "Woe" sticks, there are differences between them.

C: 你并没有恶意，你只是好奇，而好奇正是生物于银河间行践开拓壮举的必要品质——你劝服了自己，心中某种躁动的不安平息了下来。
E: You mean no harm and are just curious, and curiosity is a necessary quality for creatures trailblazing magnificent feats across the galaxy. You convince yourself, and a restless discomfort in your heart settles right down.

C: 岁阳再次附身在古琴上，演奏起来。
E: The heliobus takes possession of the guqin once more, and starts to play.

C: 我偏要花费道德做小抄！
E: I want to use up my Praise of High Morals and make a cheatsheet!

C: 好的。祝你顺利通过「实战演练」。
E: Great. All the best with "Practical Training."

C: 但无论如何，我还是会继续在这里唱下去，哪怕这舞台下空无一人。
E: But no matter what, I will still keep singing here even if there's nobody in the crowd.

C: 你不会一直在这里等着我吧？
E: You won't keep waiting for me here, will you?

C: …再准备上一个缺口？妙啊！
E: ...and leave a gap? Genius!

C: 在皮皮西继续发作之前，猎犬用一个眼神止住了他的话头。
E: Before the Pepeshi can keep going off, the Bloodhound cuts off further chatter with a look.

C: 嗯…我倒是听说过一个地方，不过……
E: Hmm... There is actually a place that I have heard of, but...

C: 静静看完这出家庭伦理剧。
E: Stay quiet and observe this family drama to the end.

C: ——因为我爱你，韦斯莱！哪怕我知道那份爱对我来说不是终点，我也不希望你被如此残酷地对待……
E: —Because I love you, Wesley! Even if to me, that love would be the end, I did not want to be so cruel to you...

C: 怎叹…唉。
E: Ahh...

C: 为我…赎回自由呢？
E: Help me... buy back my freedom?

C: 您无需自责。是我不该提出如此无礼的请求。
E: You must not blame yourself. It was me that should not have made such a rude request.

C: 我不愿意。
E: I will not.

C: 感觉还行？这可是我们最近新推出的沉浸式服务——真实场景，自由选择，丰富互动，还有超高智能的实力演员，包您能完美代入！
E: How was it? This is our newly launched immersive experience — featuring realistic scenes, freedom of choice, rich interaction, and intelligent and skilled actors. Your perfect immersion is guaranteed!
(Rumble...)

C: 询问绿色酒瓶。
E: Talk to the green wine bottle.

C: 你这厮，想说什么就快说。
E: Look, buddy, just say what you want to say.

C: 我现在谁也不服，就服你，来吧，是时候离开这里了。
E: I will no longer answer to anyone, except you! Come, it is time for us to leave this place.

C: 在另外两个酒瓶的鄙视里，黄兴奋地走进你的背包。它现在已经是最香醇的美酒，足以把世间一切美酒踩在脚下。
E: Under the disdainful glance of the other two bottles, Yellow excitedly strolls into your Inventory. Now, knowing that it is the finest of wines, it is prepared to crush all other imposters under foot.

C: 果然，她没接电话。意料之内。
E: As expected, she didn't pick up the phone. No surprise there.

C: 呵呵，原来是想要合影…没问题。
E: Hehe, so you wanted to take a group picture... No problem.

C: 投点钱试试。
E: Give some money and see what happens.

C: 真的吗？我不信。
E: Oh yeah? I don't believe you.

C: 打劫——一口价，<unbreak>3000</unbreak>苜蓿币，不接受砍价。
E: This is a robbery... Fixed price, <unbreak>3,000</unbreak> Alfalfa credits, no barterin'.

C: 不管你同不同意，从今往后，你就是我们流梦帮的老大了！
E: Whether ya agree or not, from now on, you're gonna be the Dreamflux Gang's boss!

C: 我已经不会再愤怒了，以后就老实做瓶没气的糖浆饮料吧……
E: I have no more rage left in me. From now on I will just live my life as a bottle of flat syrup...
(What's this...)

C: …要价多少？可以刀吗？
E: ...How much? Can you cut us a deal?

C: 任何邪恶…终将绳之以法！
E: Any and all evil... will be brought to justice!

C: 就到这吧。事情都办完了，我还得赶着去参加知更鸟小姐的粉丝聚会呢。
E: That's it, then — all sorted. I have to rush off and join up with the party at Miss Robin's fan gathering.

C: 在你向舒翁等人发送邀请后，他们陆续以「还要继续工作」为由拒绝了你，你有些无奈，却又不好意思影响人家的生计，只得无奈应下。
E: You send invites to Siobhan and the others, but all of them decline with the same reason: "I have to work." Though crestfallen, you know you shouldn't get in their way of making a living, so you accept the rejections graciously.

C: 可别放太多噩梦进去，咱受不了。
E: Don't put too much nightmarish stuff, though! I doubt I can handle that.

C: 同伴给予的安全感。
E: A sense of security from your comrades.

C: 我们…之前有见过面吗？
E: Have we... met before?

C: …是吗？行商们大多是这样说话的吧。
E: ...Is that so? Many traveling merchants speak this way.

C: 不过，这次来幽囚狱一趟也算是有所收获。幽囚狱就很适合开发梦境素材！
E: However, we can't say that nothing good came from our trip to the Shackling Prison. The Shackling Prison is such a suitable place for developing Dreamscape material!

C: 就你一个人对吧，没有人跟踪你？
E: You're alone, right? Did anyone follow you?

C: 嗯呢呢，呢嗯嗯，嗯呢呢，嗯呢呢？
E: "Ehn-nah-nah, Nah-ehn-ehn, Ehn-nah-nah, Ehn-nah-nah"?

C: 能！
E: Yes, I can!

C: 没见过，不知道你们在说什么。
E: No, I don't know what you're talking about?

C: 喂，不关我的事啊，他自己忽然变大撞到了头，怎么怪我！
E: Hey, that has nothing to do with me! He suddenly enlarged himself and knocked his own head. How can you blame me for that?

C: 啾——啾啾？
E: Tweeeet, tweet tweet?

C: 你们的部长为什么突然退出…
E: Why did your director suddenly quit...

C: 特色确实挺明显的…
E: Their traits sure are unique indeed...

C: 回忆对三位演员的评价。
E: Recall your evaluation of the three actors.

C: 那么，就让测试开始吧……
E: Then, let the assessment begin...

C: 所以这说明什么？
E: So what does that mean?

C:
主演
丹恒  饰  丹恒
？？？  饰  三月七
姬子  饰  姬子
约阿希姆•诺基安维塔宁  饰  瓦尔特•杨
E:
Starring
Dan Heng  as  DAN HENG
???  as  MARCH 7TH
Himeko  as  HIMEKO
Joachim Nokianvirtanen  as  WELT YANG

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 我害怕。
E: I'm scared.

C: 等等，这不是答题吗？最好还是不要把现实规则代入题目吧。
E: Hang on, isn't this a math question? It's best not to involve real-world rules in the problem.

C: 来吧！让你考考我。
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 吼吼吼，听好了，我要问的问题是：<color=#dbc291ff>「什么东西无论在自己手中，还是在他人手中，这两个人都是一无所有？」</color>
E: Ho-ho-ho, listen well, my question is: <color=#dbc291ff>"What results in two people being left with nothing, whether it is in the hands of either person?"</color>

C: 总觉得这头狮子更喜欢剑走偏锋的答案，再问问其他人的想法吧。
E: You feel that this lion prefers answers off the beaten path. Let's ask someone else's thoughts.

C: 这题的难点就在于，本狮可没说过，搞丢的一定是自己的脑袋吼！怎么样，怎么样？是不是忍俊不禁了吼？
E: The difficult part of this question is that I never said it had to be the entity's own head! How was it, eh? Eh? Are you tickled?

C: 如此…石桥的承重越过了界限，开始摇摇欲坠，随后便是谜题描述的那幕……
E: And so... the stone bridge's load had exceeded its burden, and started swaying. The aftermath was as described in the riddle...

C: 旁白：在仁慈与好奇心的双重作用下，你决定允许它留下。
E: Narration: With a combination of kindness and curiosity, you decide to allow it to stay.

C: 呼呼…空气真好。
E: *crackle* The air is great here.

C: 我感受到了力量，呼呼，你做得好啊。带着这缕灵火离开吧，它现在属于你了。
E: I can feel the power. *crackle* Well done. Take this sliver of spiritual flame with you. It is yours now.

C: 我的肚子。
E: My stomach.

C: 扭。
E: I would.

C: 哎，这就对了。对待贵宾，就该把身份放低一点才好办事。孺子可教啊。
E: Yeah, that's right. You need to be humble when dealing with the VIP. I think you have a bright future ahead.

C: 呵，相传在宇宙混沌未开之际…中间忘了…后面也忘了。总之，这是一柄强大战争兵器的残片！
E: Heh, legend has it that in the primordial chaos of the universe... I forgot the middle part... I also forgot what happened after. Anyway, this is a remnant of a mighty War Gear!

C: 助人为乐？
E: Helping people out?

C: 我也不知道……
E: I don't know either...

C: 先打一顿再说！
E: Beat it up before all else!

C: 答案取决于你自己。
E: It's up to you.

C: 这便是我为诸位带来的礼物。彼时，我将它嵌入帝皇权杖后，便在不摧毁其外壳的前提下，获得了一份锚定的时间坐标。
E: This is the gift I bring to you all. After implanting it into the Emperor's Scepter then, I secured a set of anchored temporal coordinates without compromising its shell.

C: （进入树洞）
E: (Enters the tree hollow)

C: 以前的记忆，能想起更多吗？
E: Can you recall more of those lost memories?

C: 距离产生美。
E: Distance brings beauty.

C: 昔涟睡得很香。也许是哀丽秘榭的麦浪适合入梦，或是簌簌的林叶有助眠的魔法……
E: Cyrene is fast asleep. Perhaps the golden wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae is perfect to induce sleep, or maybe the rustling of leaves have a certain magical sleeping aid effect...

C: 伟大的万径之门，雅努斯都对这个问题保持沉默，或许…我就不该前往树庭。
E: Even the great Gate of Infinity, the mighty Janus, falls silent before this quandary. Perhaps... I should not go to the Grove of the Muses?

C: 同意，还能给人一种迅捷的印象。
E: Right? It would really emphasize a sense of swiftness, too.

C: 你没事吧？
E: Are you okay?

C: …去往「埃普斯」的那个。
E: ...The one bound for Epos.

C: 那些跳跃的火苗已经熄灭，其中小小的灵智，恐怕也随着永昼的终结逝去了。
E: Those flickering flames have already been extinguished, and the tiny sparks of sentience within them have likely perished along with the end of the Eternal Day.

C: 这就是「开拓」的力量！
E: This is the power of "Trailblaze"!

C: 我有点不懂…真是个奇怪的故事。
E: I don't really get it... what a strange story.

C: 能够与模型神经网络结合，使其认知决策逻辑产生异常噪声，借用熟知的概念——
E: It's capable of integrating with the model neural network, introducing disruptive noise into its cognitive decision-making logic. This aligns with the known concept —

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: （摸摸它的肚皮）
E: (Scratch its belly)

C: ……阁下，从刚刚开始，你好像就一直在注视着我指挥黑塔的重建复兴工作。请问是有什么事么？
E: ...With all due respect, you've been watching me for a while as I command the reconstruction and revival of the space station. How may I help you?

C: 你作为星穹列车的宾客，应该待在更加安全的区域。
E: As a guest from the Astral Express, you should stay in a safer area.

C: 不过有一点很重要，那就是星神密卷的内容，一定是根据现实撰写，而非是凭空捏造。
E: But one very important thing is that the content of the Mystic Scroll of Aeons is based on facts, not groundless fabrications.

C: 并且，我们与「星际和平公司」保持着极为密切的交流。若你行走银河，耳目宽广，多少应该听过我们的名号。
E: Furthermore, we maintain close communications with Interastral Peace Corporation. For someone as well-traveled as yourself, I'm sure you've heard of our reputation.

C: 奇物再收容小队嘛，是空间站依据灾后复兴需要，临时牵头成立的应急小组。
E: The Curio Collection Squad is a temporary emergency unit established by the space station to address the needs of the post-disaster revival.

C: …不熟，但我们可以熟。我伊丽莎白•沃森一看就知道你不是泛泛之辈。
E: ...Not really, but we can. I, Elizabeth Watson, can tell right away you are no ordinary person.

C: 至于奇物……咳咳，你可别想套世玲的话！我都说过了，那些奇物是根据规定分发的，不会按照科员的喜好来！
E: As for the Curios... Ehem, you think you can fool me into answering this? As I said, the Curios are distributed according to regulations, instead of the researcher's preferences!

C: 让我想想，好像是听说有位患者的药剂不足，需要补充来着。
E: Let me see. I heard a patient ran out of medicine and needed supplies.

C: 你身上的味道好奇怪，有铁锈味、有淡淡的清香，还有…好多不同的感觉？难道这就是「科员」的味道？
E: The smell on you is quite strange. There's a metallic, rusty scent, a faint freshness, and... so many different senses? Is this what they call the "researcher" smell?

C: 这种事情太可怕了，我们决不能给阮•梅女士丢人！
E: That's such a terrifying thing to happen! We'll never be a disgrace to Miss Ruan Mei!

C: 其实我觉得你还蛮可爱的。
E: I actually find you quite adorable.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 哇咔咔，我敢说没有人比我更了解阮•梅！可惜我的同族大多都很笨，它们不清楚阮•梅究竟喜欢什么、会被什么所吸引。
E: Mwahaha, I bet no one knows Ruan Mei better than I! It's a shame that most of my peers are too dumb to discern what Ruan Mei likes and gravitates to.

C: 哇咔咔，以本天才的智慧与远见！得到阮•梅女士的认可只是迟早的事！
E: Mwahaha, it's just a matter of time for me to gain Miss Ruan Mei's recognition with my knowledge and vision!

C: 听到我说话，你好像很惊讶？
E: You seem surprised to hear me speak.

C: 有孩童的惊呼声从小机器人身上传出，你注意到这声音似乎有点耳熟。
E: A child's exclamation comes from the little robot, and the voice sounds a little familiar to you.

C: 滴…滴……
E: Beep... Beep...

C: 你还记得我吗？
E: Do you remember me?

C: 您、您还真试啊！好…我给您摆好……
E: Y—You're really going to test it out!? Okay... allow me to prop it up for you...

C: 水落石出后，再做行动，不迟。
E: Act later, not too late it is, after the truth is revealed.

C: 你拿起卷轴在此处走动了几步，发现它表面的流光正随着你的移动而不断变化。
E: You pick up the scroll and walk a few steps, noticing that the light on the surface is constantly changing with your movements.

C: 你在箩筐中找到了两样东西——装满泥土的袋子，以及几颗看上去像某种坚果的玩意。
E: You discover two things inside the basket... A bag filled with dirt and a number of small, nut-like objects.

C: 是啊，翁法罗斯还有那么多有趣的事物等着你去开拓，为什么非得花时间来思考这些无用的内容呢。你不认为这是个有价值的话题。
E: You're right. Amphoreus has many interesting things awaiting trailblazing. Why must you waste time reflecting on such pointless conversations? This topic is clearly of no value to you.

C: 好，依我看，我们不妨继续刚才的辩论。理念与现实，究竟何者更为可靠？
E: Very well. I think that we may as well continue the debate that we were having before: Ideals or reality, which is more reliable?

C: 要是它在时间之内存在，那么它就处于流变当中。就连泰坦都会陷入疯狂，就连尼卡多利都会陨落，时间内的事物，该如何永久存在？
E: If it exists in time, then it is in a state of flow. Even the Titans will descend into madness and Nikador will fall with time. How can anything in time exist forever?

C: 只要好好利用那些游荡的泰坦眷属，一定能够找到机会脱身……
E: So long as I put those wandering Titankin to good use, I'll find a chance to escape...

C: 让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
E: Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.

C: 哈？你不明白我们的情况，若真是感情本身的问题就好了……
E: Huh? You don't know a thing about us. If only the problem were with our relationship...

C: 也就是说…！
E: That means...!

C: 好心的勇士，请留步，我还有最后一件事想拜托你。可以请你先去市集旁的<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>等我们吗？
E: Kind warrior, please stay a while. I have one final task to ask of you. Could you please go to the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color> beside the market and wait for us there?

C: 瞧把你开心的。时间不早了，趁被发现前，我们要赶紧上路了。
E: Just look how happy you are... It's getting late. We have to hit the road now before we're discovered.

C: 长大以后，我要不要也开个书店呢？但学者似乎更受尊敬……
E: Should I open up a bookstore when I grow up? But I think academics command a little more respect...

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 设备怎么还没批下来？
E: Why hasn't the device been approved yet?

C: 哎，对了朋友，我听说…你能使用欧洛尼斯的神力，对吧？
E: Say, my friend — they say you can wield Oronyx's divine power, is that true?

C: …你倒是…呜，先住住看啊……
E: Why didn't you... *sniff* try staying in that house for once...

C: 老实说，我觉得你推导出来的结论不太对啊。
E: To be honest, I think the conclusion that you derived isn't quite right.

C: 那不然呢？
E: What else could I be doing?

C: 它？你是说这玩意？
E: It? You mean this thing?

C: 体现你的科研态度啊！
E: It demonstrates your research prowess!

C: 我好像听谁说过…说是…「螺中笑声」感染了病毒就异变了？
E: I think someone once told me... that the Crackup Conch got infected with some kind of virus?

C: 咦？！啊…原来你是殿下的朋友，那就好说话了。对不起，是我们的错。
E: Huh!? Oh... so you're a friend of His Highness? That's different. Sorry, this was our mistake.

C: 不如说是「纷争」的后遗症吧，总需要时间去克服。只不过……
E: More like the scars of Strife... but it takes time to heal. But...

C: 认识。我是剧作家，他是演员。按理来说，他正在排练《被缚的埃德加》……
E: Yes. I'm a playwright, and he's an actor. By right, he's rehearsing The Shackled Edgar...

C: 都怪你写得太好了。
E: It's your fault for writing something too brilliant.

C: （「一日塔兰顿」…不就是公益法官吗？帮忙就帮到底吧……）
E: ("One-Day Talanton"... Isn't that just a fancy name for a public interest judge? Guess I'm in it for the long haul...)

C: 她是来自阿卡索斯的黄金裔！
E: She's a Chrysos Heir from Icatus!

C: 呵，连如何向刻法勒行礼都不明白的稚童，还妄想让泰坦回应叨扰？
E: Heh, a clueless child who doesn't even know how to pay respects to Kephale, yet still thinks a Titan will answer her trivial chatter?

C: 可是克拉特鲁斯那老顽固，吩咐卫兵不准任何人外出——尤其是我。
E: But that stubborn old Krateros has ordered the guards not to let anyone go outside, especially me.

C: 呼，多谢两位，能踩在地面上，感觉好多了。
E: Phew, thanks to both of you. Being back on solid ground feels so much better.

C: 不能每次都指望他人的相助，明白这一点，就已经踏出了成长的第一步。
E: You can't always rely on others for help. Understanding this is already the first step toward growth.

C: 克拉特鲁斯那老顽固，我就说我们能行吧！咳——
E: That old stubborn Krateros, I said we could handle it! Ahem—

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「——我会为你们背负这沉重的黎明，将漆黑的凶潮隔绝于圣城之外——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"— I will carry the burden of this heavy dawn, shielding the Holy City from the tides of darkness..."</color>

C: 父亲战死后，我一直收藏着它，本以为再也派不上用场了。想不到我也有故意用它来捏造假声的时候，那天在黎明云崖上……
E: After he died in battle, I kept it. I thought it would never come in handy again, but it turns out I ended up mimicking voices with it sometimes too... And that day, at Dawncloud...

C: 耐心等等嘛！天父又不是卖报的报童，要到处大声吆喝。
E: Be patient! sky father's not a town crier, loudly screeching their cries.

C: 委托名「我的绿叶书签不见了」，推演结果是「在委托人肚子里，少喝蜜酿」。
E: Request: "My green leaf bookmark is missing." - Extrapolation Result: "It's in the client's stomach. Maybe lay off the honey brew."

C: 「择取人们的喜好，创造不同口味的蜜酿」，正可谓法吉娜的印象所示。
E: "Honey brews for every palate, each bottle filled with different desires." That's the divine work Phagousa is most known for.

C: …足矣。万分感激，救世主阁下。老身方才明白了，该如何「将味道复现」。
E: I see it clearly now. My deepest thanks, Great Deliverer. Now I know how to "recreate the flavor."

C: 这是？
E: What's this?

C: 和你们一样啊，用终端随便听听。
E: Same as you guys — on terminals.

C: 唔，我算是明白为什么总有人喜欢这种古老笨重又不方便的「大块头」了。
E: Huh... What with them being so big and heavy, I used to wonder why anyone would ever buy a Phonograph. Think I'm starting to get it now.

C: 那么多星星好像糖果哦，数也数不完！
E: The stars look like candy! Endless candy...

C: 你说——是列车更漂亮一点，还是老巫婆的诊所更漂亮一点？
E: Which place looks nicer — the Express or the old witch's clinic?

C: 瓦尔特先生找我打听了半天……
E: Mr. Yang asked me about it all day...

C: …这次回去就把这件事提上日程吧。
E: ...I should add it to my to-do list.

C: 有机会的话，常回贝洛伯格看看吧——银鬃铁卫随时欢迎你们归来。
E: When you find a moment, do come back to Belobog to have a chat. The Silvermane Guards will always welcome you.

C: 我还有几天…
E: How long have I got left?

C: 怎么了？一副看见电子蜗牛的表情。
E: What's wrong with you? You look like you just got shocked by an electric snail.

C: 你没别的事可做吗？
E: Don't you have anything else to do?
Who's there!?

C: 你沉思片刻，确信自己发现了银狼的弱点，以及——
E: You thought for a while. You were sure that you've found Silver Wolf's weakness and —

C: 嗯？听声音我就知道是{NICKNAME}。
E: Huh? Hmph, I know your voice, {NICKNAME}.

C: 关于星神的一切我都很感兴趣，就是要看的资料实在太多了…不知道什么时候才能看完。
E: I am very interested in everything related to the Aeons, but there are too many materials to read... I don't know when I can finish them all.

C: 我理解你的意思，之前也有很多人说过类似的话。
E: I understand what you mean. Many people have told me the same thing.

C: 我理解你的意思，之前也有很多人说过类似的话。
E: I understand what you mean. Many people have told me the same thing.

C: 对于这场入侵你怎么看？
E: What do you think about this invasion?

C: 看你还是个明眼人，应该不会和他们一样不分青红皂白吧？
E: You look to be a smart cookie. You won't be as much of a brute as them, right?

C: 嘿，是你来啦？有什么我能帮上忙的就说，为朋友我卡波特都是两肋插刀的！
E: Oh, it's you! Tell me how I can help you. I, Capote, will do anything for my friend!

C: 但是经过我的深刻反思之后，我才意识到这个想法多么荒谬。如果遭遇无端压迫的人是我，想必应该也没有那份勇气去主动要求和对方谈一谈吧。
E: However, I realized how ludicrous my ideas were after I thought long and hard on them. If I were the one getting endlessly oppressed, then I probably also won't have the courage to actively approach the other party for a conversation.

C: 其实他来找过我，而且态度…有些让我不适应。不是说他做了什么奇怪的事情啦！只是平日里都高高在上的人，一下子对自己低声下气，多少感觉有点…怪怪的。
E: He's actually been to see me, and his attitude was... a bit weird. I'm not saying he did anything funny, just... for someone who's usually so high and mighty to suddenly act so low feels really weird.

C: 你最近都在忙什么呢？
E: What have you been working on lately?

C: 谢谢你的邀请，但我毕竟身为银鬃铁卫的情报官，没办法抛下工作去随意旅行……
E: Thanks for your invitation, but I am the Silvermane Guards' Intelligence Officer — I can't just drop my work and go travelling...

C: 但你们那位列车长，似乎也不是等闲之辈，与本座对弈数十局，竟是互有胜负。
E: But that conductor of yours is no ordinary player either. We played a dozen rounds and ended up in a stalemate.

C: 咳，算啦算啦，看表情就知道，你对这事完全没了解~
E: Ahem, never mind. I can tell from the look on your face that you have no idea what I'm talking about.

C: 贝洛伯格也有一套自己的供暖系统，但上至克里珀堡、下至磐岩镇的诊所，室内的温度总是难以维持恒定。
E: Belobog has a heating system of its own. However, maintaining a steady indoor temperature has always been a challenge, no matter if it's Qlipoth Fort or the Boulder Town clinic.

C: …咳，没什么。{NICKNAME}，麻烦你，请别把我们之间这段对话告诉帕姆…好吗？
E: Ahem... never mind. {NICKNAME}, please don't tell Pom-Pom about this conversation... Okay?

C: …啊，别在意。我只是在自言自语。
E: Ah... don't mind me. I'm just talking to myself.

C: 其父母亲眷都是著作等身的学者与冒险家。她自诩承接了「无名客」的精神，以遍游星海胜景为志向，还著有一本知名游记。
E: Her parents were established scholars and adventurers, and she naturally inherited the spirit of the Nameless to travel and see the stars. She even has a famous travelogue in her name.

C: 试着主动联系下她们俩如何？
E: Why don't you get in touch with them?

C: 唔，不错不错，大爷我很满意。
E: Mm, tasty morsels. Very satisfying.

C: 一个切片可以由美丽的尘埃、气体和粒子构成，它会如同绛紫色烟雾一样叆叇不绝…绕在指尖。
E: Picture a sliver made up of beautiful dust, gases, and tiny specks, twirling around your finger like a captivating plum-colored mist.

C: 是吗？听起来不错。下次我试试看。
E: Oh, is that all? Sounds great, I'll give it a go sometime.

C: 列车会经过…我的家乡吗？
E: Will the Express pass by... my home?

C: 也许还会遇见新的同伴，但我并不知道…是否能与别人相处得很好。
E: Perhaps I'll encounter new friends in the meantime, but I'm not sure... I sometimes wonder whether I'm able to get along well with others.

C: 这是我第一次去往匹诺康尼之外，多么壮丽啊……
E: This is my first time outside of Penacony... Wow. It's so awesome.

C: 对…对哦！你已经不是客人了。能在旅途上认识新的伙伴，真好啊。
E: That's right, you're no longer just a guest! Making new friends is what it's all about.

C: 想加入星穹列车吗？
E: Want to join the Astral Express Crew?

C: 贝洛伯格确实是一个寒冷的世界。
E: Indeed, Belobog is a world of ice and snow.

C: 你终于来啦！
E: You're finally here!

C: 好！
E: We'd be keen!

C: 看来你忘记了，列车的碎镜前还有一位活泼的忆者小姑娘。
E: Looks like you've forgotten — there is a Memokeeper girl in front of the Express' shattered mirror.

C: 我相信总有一天，她现在的经历会成为独一无二的回忆。
E: I trust that one day, her present experiences will become unique memories.

C: 很遗憾。我虽自心底里产生了「美」的情绪，也打算永远记住这份恩情，但在表达感谢后，我们还是打算分道扬镳。
E: Alas, while Beauty was invoked in the depths of my heart and I vowed to remember this kindness forever, after I expressed my gratitude, we still decided to part ways.

C: {NICKNAME}，我有一个疑问百思不得其解。请问你能否判断：这颗绚丽的五彩种子…真的能通过种植得到五彩晶石吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I have a question that I just can't wrap my head around. I would like to ask you: This splendid rainbow seed... Can it really grow into Rainbowite?

C: 罢了，这不重要。毕竟我和「老铁」早已成为了能够互相回应彼此意志的伙伴。
E: Forget it, it's not important. Old Mettle and I have long since become partners who can read and respond to each other's will.

C: 问问怀炎将军？
E: Why don't you ask General Huaiyan?

C: 她很好！我经常被她打败！
E: She's been great! She often defeats me!

C: 这石块…
E: This stone...

C: 虽然味道有些…但也算是尝鲜啦。这偌大寰宇果真还有许多新鲜事物在等待小女子游历见识。
E: The taste was a bit... hmm, but it was still a novel experience. Indeed, this endless universe still has many more wonders waiting for me to experience.

C: 难道是这「开拓」的空气异于常世？那小女子可要趁着机会好好呼吸了…呼……
E: Could it be that the air of "the Trailblaze" is different from normal air? Then I must use this opportunity to take a few deep breaths... Ah...

C: 人的过往与记忆，还真是复杂呢。
E: People's memories and pasts are complicated indeed.

C: 我听说那些机器人…从开机到现在就没停过，一直在工作。
E: I heard that those robots... have never been shut down since the day they'd been activated. They just keep going.

C: 有个叫曼娅的公务员，出身很不错，和我家也有点渊源。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: There's a civil servant named Manya, who is of good lineage — in fact, our families have a bit of history. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?

C: 嗯？来买东西的？记得要先排队哦。
E: Hmm? Here to buy something? You'll have to get in line first.

C: 我写了一些恐怖小说，批评家们觉得它的质量低劣到恐怖，根本不该出现在这世上；我还写了本灾难小说，评论界一致认定它的诞生就是一场灾难。
E: I wrote some horror novels, the quality of which can be described with the name of the genre according to some critics. Some say those novels should never have been written in the first place. For the disaster fiction I did, same critiques also apply.

C: 你听说过《雪国冒险奇谭》吗？就是前阵子被禁了的那部小说。其实出版社觉得那本书水平很高，希望能在原本的基础上进行改编，重新出版。
E: Have you heard of Tale of the Winterlands, the fiction that was recently banned? The publisher was actually quite happy with the quality and wanted the author to make some edits on the original so that they can publish it again.

C: 凝视着垃圾桶，我的心灵便归于平静，仿佛回到了家乡…啊，那故乡的风；啊，那故乡的味儿……
E: I always feel this strange calm when I stare at the trashcan, as if finally returning to where I belong... Ah, the breeze and the smell...

C: …哎，虽然你的说法很过分，但是没错，我的嗓音是有一点糟糕。
E: *sigh* Despite how rude you are, my voice does sound not good.

C: 「暖阳花」？
E: The Sunshine?

C: 我能有幸听完全曲吗。
E: May I have the pleasure of listening to the whole song?

C: 我问你，你有没有见过一个深蓝色头发，神情鬼鬼祟祟，眼神贼兮兮的小子前来搭话？
E: Has a sneaky kid with dark blue hair ever come up to talk to you?

C: …嗐，你误会了！我们只是想让布洛妮娅大人关注一下「深蓝骗局」——这可关系到我们贝洛伯格的长治久安啊。
E: ...You misunderstood what I meant! All we want is to make Lady Bronya aware of the Dark-Blue Scam. This issue has implications for the peace and stability of Belobog.

C: 嘿嘿，只是先向出版社要样书啦。我对书籍内容的要求可是很严格的。连我这关都过不了的书，可别想流到市场上。
E: Hehe. I just ask publishers for advanced copies of books. I have high standards when it comes to content, so if a book can't satisfy me, then they shouldn't even think about putting it on the market.

C: 比较出名的是那个搏击俱乐部——但我才不会花钱去看那种滑稽表演，太掉价了，恶俗又低级。
E: The Fight Club is quite popular. But personally, I wouldn't pay a shield for that kind of cheap show. It's vulgar and low-class.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 哼，淡季过去了，拳赛的高峰期就要来了…如果票价提高十个点……
E: Hmm, the off-season is over and the busy season for boxing is coming up... If the ticket prices go up by <unbreak>10%</unbreak>...

C: 嚯哈哈哈…告诉你：答案就是我史考特的搏击俱乐部！
E: Bwahaha, let me tell you: The answer is my Fight Club!

C: 啊，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我真的不能收你的礼物啦！
E: Huh? Oh, I can't take your gift!

C: 呼噜…呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 只要轻轻点燃它，烟雾就会创造一个平和的空间，清除矿场机械在运转时产生的有害磁场，抚平你的身心气息。
E: Burn it and its smoke will create a calmness, remove the harmful magnetic fields generated by the operation of the mine machinery, and soothe your mind.

C: 呃…怎么是你？
E: Uh... It's you?

C: 呣…这可是秘密哦？可不能轻易告诉{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}……
E: Hmm... It's a secret. I'm not going to tell you...

C: 不过，要是你要是能给我带一千包「雪地跳跳糖」过来…我就考虑把「千面」的绝技传授给你！
E: If you can bring me a thousand packets of snow-white popping candy... I'll consider teaching you my disguise technique!

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！你们见到布洛妮娅姐姐了吗？
E: Have you seen Bronya?

C: 天啊，真的吗？我一直在专心研究自己的机器人，完全不知道这件事！
E: Oh no, really? I've been so focused on my robot that I haven't heard a thing!

C: 宾馆只是开得比较久，在贝洛伯格留了点虚名而已。
E: The hotel has just been here for a long time and it became a bit famous in Belobog.

C: 我推荐你去西区逛逛，西区以文艺气息而闻名，黄金歌剧院就在那儿，剧院明星、限定周边，应有尽有。
E: I'd recommend the Western District, which is known for its artistic atmosphere. The Golden Theater is right there. You'll find everything from celebrities to merchandise.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 上层区的人可都是讲道理的人。哪像磐岩镇的这帮矿民，一言不合就要卸我胳膊腿……
E: They're all reasonable people up there in the Overworld. Not like these miners down here in Boulder Town who'd carve me up if I say the wrong thing...

C: 她的厨艺很棒的，你们有机会一定要尝一尝。
E: She's a great cook. You should try the food she makes.

C: 我就知道她会做出正确的决定。
E: I knew that she would make the right choice.

C: 我要学的东西实在太多了。除了继续锻炼变强，我还得用其它方式武装自己。
E: There's just too much that I need to learn. I have to arm myself in other ways, not just through training and getting stronger.

C: 瓦赫为他犯下的罪恶付出了代价。万幸他在生命的最后没有继续沉沦，为这座城市留下了自己的研究结晶。
E: Vache has paid the price for his crimes. Fortunately, he'd turned things around before the end of his life, leaving his research behind for the good of the city.

C: 还想聊些什么吗？
E: What else would you like to chat about?

C: 像你这样对我们乐队感兴趣的人还挺少见的，还想聊些什么吗？
E: It's pretty rare to have someone like you who's so interested in our band. What else would you like to chat about?

C: 我已吩咐过全军对你和同伴多加关照，但还请你务必不要做出逾矩的举动。
E: I've instructed the soldiers to treat you hospitably, but I do have to remind you to be considerate of your actions.

C: 还是老样子——整日守着她的机械屋，有订单时做工，没订单时就拉着佩拉和玲可一起排练。
E: Same old, same old. Hunkered down at her workshop, either working on orders or dragging Pela and Lynx to rehearsals.

C: …我没有。
E: ...I don't.

C: 再见，克拉拉。
E: Goodbye, Clara.

C: 地髓开拓团科考基地？
E: Geomarrow Development Group science base?

C: 根据演算，克拉拉有概率将其植入备用核心，从而使该个体「重生」，并且「活下去」。
E: According to calculations, there is a possibility that Clara will implant the backup core, causing the "rebirth" of this machine, allowing it to "survive."

C: 克拉拉能坚持下去吗？
E: Will Clara be able to handle it?
Hmm...

C: 那份协议没有被签订。
E: That agreement was not signed.

C: 这就是我要说的，别催我写新歌了
E: That's all I got to say. Don't force me to create

C: 饭来张口的病怀疑是爸妈给你惯的
E: Your parents should've taught you not to eat with your mouth open

C: 这上面的喧嚣世界，已不再对我们封锁
E: This chaos up above, we no longer can refuse

C: 路上小心，{NICKNAME}。愿你的旅途里都是晴天。
E: So long, {NICKNAME}. I wish you a smooth ride ahead.

C: …因为它冬天总是翘班！
E: ...Because it always skipped work in the winter!

C: 讲个和球有关的笑话。
E: Tell a joke about a ball.

C: 哦…还以为有好吃的呢。
E: Oh... I was hoping for some nice food.

C: 唉，这里面水太深……
E: Not gonna lie, this is hella sus...

C: 你品一品……
E: Give it another thought...

C: 好了，不逗你们玩了。我同意这门婚事。
E: Alright, I'll let up on the teasing then. I assent to this marriage.

C: 还剩几瓶，但不多……
E: Still got a few vials left, but not a lot...

C: 回收旧十字镐，坏鹤嘴锄！
E: Recycle old pickaxes and broken ones!

C: 其实我还是比较看好那个机械臂小子……
E: I'm actually feeling pretty good about that guy with the robot arm...

C: 欢迎来到旧武器试验场。
E: Welcome to the Old Weapon Testing Ground.

C: 我还是觉得我的方案更好…
E: I still think my plan is better...

C: 文物修复员嘛，那工作自然就是修复各种文物了。你现在能在展馆里看到的各种文物和比例模型，基本都出自我的手。
E: As an artifact restorer, my job is naturally to restore various cultural and historical pieces. Most of the artifacts and scale models that you can see in the exhibition hall were basically restored by me.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆现共设有三个常设展览馆，包括：综合展馆、工业展馆以及历史文化展馆！
E: There are three permanent exhibition areas in the Belobog History and Culture Museum, and they are: The General Hall, the Industrial Hall, and the History-Culture Hall!

C: 如果有的话，一定要立刻来告诉虎克哦！为了让大家好好参观，虎克一定会和洞洞机一起把坏人赶跑的！
E: If you have, you must tell Hook immediately! Hook and Diggertron will chase the bad guys away to make sure the museum visitors have a good time!

C: 眼前的小朋友怯生生地向你致意。
E: The child in front of you greets you shyly.

C: 这一切都多亏了你，{NICKNAME}——收下吧，{NICKNAME}，这是你应得的。
E: This is all thanks to you, {NICKNAME} — Take this, it's what you deserve.

C: 错了，是萨帕拉伊斯坎…
E: Nope, Zapala Iskan...

C: 妈妈，这个字怎么念呀？
E: Mom, how do you read this word?

C: 现如今，持明龙师也会派遣持明族中擅长云吟法术的青年参与冥差工作，协助维持幽囚狱的水障结构…十王司幽囚狱会永远感谢持明族的付出。
E: Even today, the Vidyadhara Preceptors would send Vidyadhara youths skilled in cloudhymn magic to join the spiritfarers in maintaining the prison's flood barriers... The Ten-Lords Commission and The Shackling Prison are eternally grateful for the Vidyadhara's contribution.

C: 曾有个身犯多起谋杀案的化外民被押送了进来，根据档案记录，他被称为「勺子杀人狂」，曾用一柄铁勺子持之以恒地对受害人施害。
E: There was an outworlder who got sent in for committing multiple murders. According to the records, he was known as "The Spoon Murderer" because he once used an iron spoon to persistently cause harm to the victim.

C: 原来是仙舟外远道而来的老板啊，今天是要来算一卦吗？
E: Ah, an esteemed customer visiting Xianzhou from afar. Are you here for a divination today?

C: 这运势怎么说改就改呢？
E: I can change my luck just like that?

C: 不过我嘛，我有另外的法子。我会尽量用模糊的方式告诉客户占卜结果——反正敝小店也只能算些模糊的走向。
E: But for me? I've got other ways. I provide clients with the most ambiguous results possible — it's about the limit of accuracy for my tiny shop anyway.

C: 仅限于外观哦！我也是熟悉仙舟历史的，这可不是什么好东西。
E: But only how it looks! I've studied my history and this is not a good thing.

C: 你可能在星槎海见过，他在一家叫「不夜侯」的茶馆里说书，自称什么「西衍先生」。
E: You may have seen him over in Starskiff Haven. He does storytelling in some teahouse called Sleepless Earl or other, calling himself something like "Mr. Xiyan."

C: 可你把它们全挡住了。
E: But you blocked off the light.

C: 感觉你也没做什么坏事。
E: It feels like you didn't do anything bad.

C: 要是总务处能少开一些没意义的会，公廨这边的工作肯定会更轻松的…哦，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，你来这里找我是做什么的呀？
E: Things would be a lot easier around here if the General Affairs Office stopped holding so many pointless meetings... So, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, how can I help you today?

C: 只要锻炼就能活上几百岁？
E: Is it possible to live for several hundred years through training alone?

C: 这不是先天决定的吗？
E: Isn't there a predetermining factor?

C: 对外，我都称自己是个「食探」。简单来说，就是去大小饭馆探店后整理意见，传播出去供众人参考之人。
E: I like to call myself a "forager." Put simply, it's a person who visits all kinds of restaurants large and small to put together reviews for others' perusal.

C: 唉，我这样的人本事低微，不及将军万一，怎么配奢谈保护将军？不过是神策府中的一件摆设罢了。
E: *sigh* I'm just a lowly, unskilled servant with less power than the general's little toe. How could I ever hope to protect him? I may as well be a flowerpot in the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 姐，你老是让我「通融通融」，我现在在将军面前根本抬不起头。搞得我们神策府是你们天舶司治下的小办事处一样……
E: Sis, you're always telling me to give people a break. I can barely show my face to the general anymore. It's like the Seat of Divine Foresight is just a subordinate office working for the benefit of the Sky-Faring Commission...

C: 这个…我们俩是姐弟，姐弟说话亲昵一些怎么了嘛？
E: Huh... We're siblings. What's wrong with siblings talking more intimately than other people?

C: 不可能！你这恶徒休想欺骗我！这幽囚狱里每个囚犯的脸我都记得！你就是那个…那个那个……
E: Impossible! Don't think you can deceive me, villain! I remember the face of every inmate in The Shackling Prison! You're that... Umm, that one...

C: 十王司也确实尝试过开发一套档案管理玉兆来提高了办公效率，但…最后因为种种「客观因素」，这个计划没有推行下去。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission also tried to develop a file management abacus to improve work efficiency, but... due to various "objective factors," the plan couldn't be enacted.

C: 那东西远比穷观阵要精准，我们考察团不由得花功夫研究了一番。
E: That thing was calibrated even more accurately than the Matrix of Prescience, and we couldn't help but pore ourselves into researching this technology.

C: 行啊，在外面做生意，咱们还得多聊。
E: Cool. Outworld traders like us need to stick together.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 老板，如果您需要一个可靠的、经验丰富的集装箱装卸工，请务必考虑我，我会竭尽全力干活的！
E: Hey boss, if you need a reliable and experienced professional to load and unload containers, please keep me in mind. I'll always give it my best!

C: 你说的没错，我现在已经能熟练掌握这项技能了。
E: You're not wrong. I've come to master this trick.

C: …你说的真是青雀吗？
E: ...Are we still talking about Qingque here?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 我说过了，十王司统管长生种生死、罪咎、魔阴身等诸般事宜，不受六御节制。
E: As I said before, the Ten-Lords Commission governs various long-life species' concerns such as death, sins, being mara-struck, and so on. We are not restricted by the Six Charioteers.

C: 再之后啊，司里组织了学术交流团，让一批罗浮丹鼎司的学者出去和域外的学者们交流经验。
E: Later, the commission organized an academic exchange program. A batch of Luofu scholars would be sent off to interact with Outworld scholars.

C: 但是我还是不能逃走。你知道的，出了这样的事情之后，人们对丹鼎司的评价在不断下降，但是我知道大部分医士和丹士并非邪教徒，他们需要有人支持。
E: But I can't do it. As you know, the public image of the Alchemy Commission has been greatly undermined after what took place previously. I know most healers and alchemists aren't cultists, and they need my support.

C: 我现在不就是在放生我原定的日程，在和你聊天吗？这不就是功德圆满，广结善缘嘛！
E: Look, I only managed to have a chat with you because of my daily release schedule. Doesn't this mean this newfound friendship is the cosmic reward for my accumulated virtue?

C: 关于尚滋味…
E: About Spices Supreme...

C: 您别拘谨，问就是了。
E: Don't be a stranger. Feel free to ask me anything.

C: 老板用上我这机巧鸟，<color=#dbc291ff>规划的线路越长，物流评分会越高</color>，要开始吗？
E: With my cycranes, <color=#dbc291ff>the longer the planned route, the higher the logistic score</color>. You ready?

C: 什么有机苹果！我又不是农产品！好啊，我拿你当朋友，你竟然想吃我？
E: What are you even talking about? I'm not an agricultural product! Aeons! I treat you like a friend, and you treat me like food?

C: 不打扰你啦。
E: I'll leave you alone, then.

C: 不打扰你啦。
E: I'll leave you alone, then.

C: 我会暂时留在仙舟。但我不会继续老师研究，四处逛逛看看，感受下这里的风土人情也好。这么难得的机会，我可舍不得浪费。
E: Well, I'll stay on the Xianzhou ship, but instead of continuing Master's research, I'll experience the unique customs and culture here. I don't want to waste a precious opportunity.

C: 大人不必客气，请尽管发问。
E: Please, ask away.

C: 不不不，在下绝不是这个意思。
E: I apologize if my words caused a misunderstanding. That's not what I meant.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「罗浮」，云骑军拱卫着遮天蔽日的建木，化外民登舟求访，星槎海中人潮汹涌声浪滔天。
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Luofu, on which the towering Ambrosial Arbor looms over countless Cloud Knights. With the arrival of numerous Outworlders, Starskiff Haven is alive with people from all walks of life.

C: 如何？要买点什么支持一下集团的生意吗？
E: So, how about buying something and supporting the Correctional Group?

C: 我若改行表演，只怕颗粒无收。
E: I will probably never earn a living wage if I choose my profession as a crosstalk comedian.

C: 但是和将军过招久了，彦卿自觉步入了某种难以突破的困境。老师你懂吧？
E: However, after sparring with the general for some time, I think my skills have plateaued. You know how that is.

C: 在彦卿心里，将军不是敌人，自然对招时也少了临场厮杀的危机感。这对砥砺剑心可是个不小的阻碍。
E: I can't see the general as my enemy, so I can't feel the sense of danger that one would have on an actual battlefield. This is definitely going to impede my progress in swordsmanship.

C: 还能忙什么，老三样呗——执勤、听说书、行侠仗义！
E: Oh, the usual — duty shifts, listening to stories, and playing the hero!

C: 孩子真的就像鸟一样，你把她拴在身边，她痛苦你也痛苦；你放她自由飞翔，嗖地一下就不知道飞到哪里去了。
E: Children are truly like birds. If you lock them up to keep them close, both of you will be miserable. But if you set them free, they will be gone in a flash.

C: 确实，就算身体是偃偶打造的，但总归是会疲惫的。
E: It's true. Even if she has the body of a puppet, she will still get fatigued.

C: 好，汝想聊点什么？
E: I see. What do you wish to talk about?

C: 十王敕命，幽囚狱重建事宜，须由可靠之判官亲自督办。故而吾将暂时驻守于幽囚狱，督办相关工作。
E: By the Ten Lords' order, the Shackling Prison's repairs must be personally presided over by a trusted judge. I've thus been temporarily stationed here to supervise the repairs.

C: 吾亦不是日日能见到小妹，有时也实在不知她过得怎样。小妹每次见到吾，又总是报喜不报忧，让吾担心她是否真的顺遂。
E: I don't see my sister every day, so I'm not always sure how she is, either. Moreover, she only ever brings favorable news whenever we meet, which makes me concerned if she's really doing fine.

C: 那时候我经常来绥园散步。风景也好，空气也新鲜，四周也安静。你看见那边那个燕乐亭了吗？我就是在那里赠出的初吻。
E: Back then, I often came to Fyxestroll Garden for a stroll. The scenery was beautiful, the air was fresh, and it was quiet all around. Do you see the Swallowsong Pavilion over there? That was where I had my first kiss.

C: 又来啦？{NICKNAME}大人？陪我聊会天呗，我真有点熬不住了，困疯了。
E: You're back, O great {NICKNAME}? Have a chat with me. I can't take it anymore. I'm falling asleep.

C: 「十王」究竟是谁？
E: Who exactly are the Ten Lords?

C: …噢，好的。
E: ...Oh, yes.

C: 说实话，量产成衣花色陈旧，只有化外民会喜欢，采买量少，短期内不会补货。
E: Honestly, mass-produced and ready-made lines are outdated and preferred only by Outworlders. We don't stock many of those, and we won't be re-supplying on short notice.

C: 「不赦十恶」是仙舟联盟律法中最为严重的十条罪名，以下内容引自《十王刑统》：
E: The Ten Unpardonable Sins are the ten most serious offenses in the Xianzhou Alliance's law. The following is quoted from the Ten Lords' Penal Code:

C: 这十种罪行都是动摇联盟根本的大奸大恶，也必将招致严酷的惩罚。
E: These ten offenses are the greatest sins that could shake the very foundation of the Alliance, and offenders must be severely punished.

C: 别别别，您就当行行好，再多聊一会儿。我远远见着那人就快失去兴致了。
E: Please don't do that. See it as a good deed and stay a while longer. I can see from the corner of my eye that he will quickly lose interest.

C: 这位客官，您看你这话说的。这茶楼生意好，来喝茶的客官就多，这喝茶的客官多了，我这也能观众老爷们套套交情，赚点儿小钱嘛。
E: {M#Good sir}{F#Madam}, don't talk like that. If the tea house has business, then more patrons will come to drink tea. With many patrons, I then can make friends and earn a little money for myself.

C: 给我讲一段「云上五骁」吧。
E: Tell me something from the High-Cloud Quintet.

C: 「我的剑，谁要看，看便是。」
E: "Those who wish to see my sword, come and see it."

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 老周听到了我的事，就办了三牲大礼来求我。我一瞧，乖乖，这么隆重的嘛，心里就有些高兴，但仙人嘛，总得端个架子，就说「本仙可以一试」。
E: Old Zhou heard of my story and held grand sacrifices with livestock to beg me to help him. I thought, darn, such fanfare! I was secretly very happy, but you know, us celestials have to put on some airs. So I replied, "I shall give it a try."

C: 你老实交代了他也不信…
E: He didn't believe you even when you told him the truth...

C: 这我能说瞎话吗？你要不信，你问他去。
E: What, you think I'm exaggerating? Go ask him if you don't believe me.

C: 有缘再会。
E: Until we meet again.

C: 噢噢，忘了说啦，咱叫冬生，是跟着一位神仙姐姐来这里的。不过…神仙姐姐不知道这事儿。
E: Ooh, I forgot to introduce myself. I'm Dongsheng. I followed a celestial lady here. But... she doesn't know that.

C: 说这么多你也理解不了，你只用知道，我们便是交易知识取得真知的团体就行了。
E: It's hard to explain, but basically, all you need to know is that we're a group that trades knowledge to gain true wisdom.

C: 我也滞留了。
E: Indeed.

C: 你脸上就差写着「化外民」三个字了，别闹了，我有个事想和你打听一下……
E: You've got "Outworlder" written all over your face. Jokes aside, I have something to ask you...

C: 这孩子！什么叫我哪位？我哪位你也不能乱动驭空大人的东西啊！
E: How dare you ask who I am? That doesn't matter — you're not allowed to touch Madam Yukong's things!

C: 那个小妮子担任贸易使节后，先后连接起了十六个世界的贸易使团，还把海市办成了星海盛典，「鸣火」居功至伟。
E: After that girl took up the mantle of trade envoy, she linked up the trade delegations of sixteen worlds in succession. She even turned the Grand Fair into an intergalactic festival; the Whistling Flames guild played an integral part in all this.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 你看，除了观察狐人小姐姐之外，我还是有正事要做的。
E: See, other than checking out the foxian ladies, I've got a purpose for being here.

C: 那好，「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」随时等待你的加入。
E: Alright, you're always welcome to join the Yanqing Galactic Fan Club.

C: 这年头真是奇了怪了。
E: Things really are getting weird these days.

C: 后面要唱什么来着？
E: What should I sing next?

C: 公共场合唱戏什么的…
E: Singing in public...

C: 战损款…
E: It's an old warship...

C: 总有人没见过卿卿我我，不要在意{F#她}{M#他}。
E: Some people have never witnessed expressions of true love. Don't give {F#her}{M#him} a second thought.

C: 若是您实在对引擎舱很感兴趣，我可以在不涉密的前提下，为您简单科普一下。
E: If you're truly curious about the engine room, I can give you a brief overview without revealing any technical secrets.

C: 加强自己！
E: "Work hard to improve yourself"!

C: 所以，我希望你能加入我们无限制格斗门。一把剪刀，一块板砖，也能把恶棍打得落花流水！不要让正义，被困在懦弱的身体！
E: So, I hope you can join our Lawless Brawl school. With a pair of scissors or a brick, you can make villains fall like leaves in the wind! Don't let justice be trapped in a weak body!

C: 无限制格斗，就是属于我们普通人的武器。
E: The Lawless Brawl is a weapon that belongs to us ordinary people.

C: 那艘星槎最后在冲天的火光中焚烧殆尽，只剩下一截龙骨断木被主人从战场上带回，埋在这绥园狐眠冢之下，以寄托哀思。
E: That starskiff ultimately went up in flames, with only a section of broken keel salvaged from the battlefield by its owner. It was buried here beneath Fyxestroll Garden Foxsomn Tomb as an expression of grief.

C: 犀焰。
E: Keralum.

C: 离开镇妖塔。
E: Leave the suppression tower.

C: 那不正说明了老夫长于教学，弟子青胜于蓝吗？
E: Doesn't that mean that I'm in fact an excellent teacher, since my pupil surpassed me?

C: 三月七的照片真是太好了。
E: This photo from March 7th is truly beautiful.

C: 实不相瞒，之前我确实遇到了一位棘手的新人，我输了，没能让他留下遗憾。如果说我是「新人杀手」，那么他就算是「专治老害」了。
E: To be honest, I did encounter a pretty troublesome newbie. I was defeated, and unable to leave any regrets for him. If I'm the Newbie Killer, that guy would probably be the "Veteran Slayer."

C: 本座受惠于遍智天君，时间充足的话，满足他人的好奇也算是分内之事。
E: As someone who receives the Wisdomwalker's grace, satisfying the curiosities of the people is also part of my job. I'd love to do so if time allows.

C: 但是天舶司接渡使停云是货真价实的，所有人有关她的回忆也更是如此。
E: But Tingyun the Sky-Faring Commission Amicassador did exist, and so does everyone's memory of her.

C: 希望这样的解释能让你好受一些。
E: I hope this will make you feel better.

C: 无尽形寿来自建木的果实。
E: An endless lifespan comes from the fruits of the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 连续三年九极拳冠军！
E: I'm reigning martial arts champ, three years straight!

C: 难道说，你其实是想…
E: Don't tell me you're planning on...

C: 这都是什么道理啊！
E: What kind of logic is this!?

C: 你问我我也不知道啊…
E: Don't ask me. I have no idea...

C: 所以后两本的标签是「纪实文学」。
E: That's why those last two are tagged under the Documentary genre.

C: 不是，凭啥啊！他们放假，我们怎么反而要加班？
E: No! How come!? Why are we working overtime, when they get off early?

C: 她给我考评绩效的时候…
E: When she carried out the performance appraisal for me...

C: 震惊！
E: I'm shocked!

C: 希望如此吧。
E: I hope so.

C: 这名药王秘传的信徒发出沉重的喘息，似乎受了不小的伤。
E: This Disciple of Sanctus Medicus lets out a heavy gasp, as though suffering from severe injuries.

C: 好哇，小夏可真是有派头。不如让姐姐来猜猜？
E: Well, well, look who's putting on airs, Naxy! Shall I take a guess?

C: 怎么说呢，感觉有些微妙…
E: How should I put this... It feels a little awkward...

C: 我向来不是个敬神的学者。让我相信所思所想不过是祂们思想的边角料，呵，恕我无法接受。
E: I've never been a god-fearing scholar. To believe that my thoughts are merely scraps from THEIR divine intellect? Hah, I simply cannot accept that.

C: 「渎神」这种事…干了一次就会忍不住想干第二次。
E: Once you've blasphemed against the gods... You can't help but want to do it again.

C: 能够与珍视之人共享一个光明而悦耳的世界，是多么叫人欣慰的事情啊。
E: How comforting it is to share a bright and melodious world with those we cherish.

C: 而浪漫之处在于…无论是对比显著的色彩、光泽，抑或布料上最细微的纤绒，都可以靠着人类的双眼看清。
E: And what makes it romantic is... whether it's the stark contrast of colors and luster, or the finest fibers on the fabric, they can all be seen clearly with the human eye.

C: 别说了，我认错，饶了我吧。
E: Stay thy tongue! I confess my fault, now prithee, grant me clemency.

C: 要我说，那些张扬跋扈的权贵确实应该教训教训。你不知道啊，小葡萄，奶奶我年轻的时候……
E: If you ask me, those arrogant bigwigs definitely need to be taught a lesson. You don't know this, little grape, but back in my day...

C: 像那句老话说的，多洛斯不养闲人！
E: As the old saying goes, Dolos has no room for slackers!

C: 这跟我有任何一点关系吗！害得我必须以「不偷」来对抗「偏见」了。
E: What does this have to do with me at all!? Now I have to fight against preconceived notions by not stealing.

C: 而小奇美拉就从后面蹿出，发起突刺冲锋，伴随着骁勇的山之民先锋队，没有任何敌人能够抵挡我们的战术协同！
E: Then, the little chimeras lunge from behind with a piercing charge, alongside the valiant Mountain Dweller vanguard! No enemy could withstand our tactical coordination!

C: 嗷呜~嗷呜嗷呜~
E: Awoo~ Awoo awoo~

C: 嗯，遐蝶姐姐的头发很漂亮…想象了一下，应该会很适合的。
E: Hmm, your hair is so pretty... I imagine it'll fit you perfectly.

C: 缇安老师，下次一定要小心躲开呀！
E: Trianne, make sure to dodge next time!

C: 缇宝说，希望能像天上的星星那样，永远陪伴在你身边。
E: Tribbie says she hopes to stay by your side forever, just like the stars in the sky.

C: 嗯！小小灰的奇思妙想，总能给*我们*很多、很多启发呢。
E: Mhm! Little Gray's brilliant ideas always give us so much inspiration!

C: {NICKNAME}？记得你曾孵化过一只小大地兽，莫非，我们面前的异兽，正是它最终长成的模样？
E: {NICKNAME}? I remember you once hatched a baby dromas. Could it be that the fantastic creature before us is what it has grown into?

C: 我再帮你联系玩具商吧。
E: I'll help you contact the toy maker again.

C: 啊！{NICKNAME}阁下的意思，是要委托玩具商做一套超稀有版定制大地兽玩偶？
E: Ah! So {NICKNAME}, you mean to commission a super-rare, custom dromas plushie from the toy maker?

C: 我今日带的是千载难逢的珍酿，倘若错过了，可得再等一千年呢。
E: I brought a once-in-a-millennium vintage today. Miss it, and you'll have to wait another thousand years.

C: 要不也把我关起来吧！
E: How about you lock me up as well!?

C: 你还阳假攒了多少天？
E: How many days of reanimation leave have you earned?

C: 消灭人类暴政…
E: Overthrow the human tyranny...

C: 我反对药王秘传。
E: Because I'm against the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 锟斤拷烫烫烫……
E: Jistgabburashothothot...

C: 等下，是「同登仙道」么…我怎么记得是「同登极乐」？
E: Hold on! Is it "the Immortality's true path"? Why do I remember it being "the Enlightenment's true path"?

C: 没有！
E: No!

C: 你没赢过我啊！
E: And you didn't win!

C: 材质：囚犯，琼玉牌桌，木椅，地灯
E: Materials: Convict, jade tile table, wooden stool, floor lamp

C: 我是～长草的研究员！
E: I am~ The researcher growing grass!

C: 门楼子机器人。
E: A robotic archway.

C: 想象体验就到此结束了。和平来之不易，请一定好好珍惜。
E: The imaginary experience ends here. Peace is hard-won, please treasure it.

C: 按道理来说，如果真是什么控制台的话，应该在舰桥那边，不在这里——
E: In theory, if it was really a control console, it should be at the bridge, not here...

C: 开启曲率加速，逃离这片星系！
E: Full burn ahead, we need to escape this system!

C: 很好！此时此刻，你感觉到自己热血沸腾。
E: Awesome! At this moment, you feel your blood boiling.

C: 你摇摇头悄然离开此处。毕竟，这里的选手并不需要认识你，他们只用考虑如何完成锻炼就可以了。
E: You shake your head and leave silently. The contestants here don't need to know who you are, after all. All they need is to think about how they are going to complete their training.

C: 好期待啊！
E: I can't wait!

C: 你是最坚强的战士！
E: You're the strongest warrior!

C: 铁臂卢卡！无敌拳法！
E: Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!

C: 这怎么一个人都没有啊？
E: Why is there no one here?
