C: 化外民总会将鸟架误认为是用于安保摄像的装置。然而，用于安保摄像的机巧鸟平时都在洞天高空巡航，鲜少落地抛头露面。
E: Outworlders often mistakenly believe the Courier Nest is a device with a surveillance camera. The truth is, the cycranes that function as surveillance cameras are usually patrolling in the sky and rarely seen on the ground.

C: 玉兆竟能经由生物科技生长成为可供驾驶的星槎——这是不是意味着玉兆也可以长成人形？
E: Surprisingly, a jade abacus can be cultivated into a fully functional starskiff through biological technologies. Does that mean a jade abacus can grow into a human form?

C: 存放展阅的立柜，看起来倒像是某种热兵器。凭你对仙舟科技的了解，这种想法很可能是真的。
E: A cabinet used for storing flexible displays that look like some sort of thermal weapon. Based on your understanding of Xianzhou technology, you know your suspicion might be true.

C: 「联盟与步离人交战过程中发现，视肉本是步离人所控制的畜牧产物。但在变异失控后，步离人放任其成为肆虐星间的灾害。云骑军经年铲除，视肉这一大患已逐渐绝迹……」
E: "Amid a war against the borisin, the alliance discovered that viscorpi were once a kind of livestock controlled by the borisin. After the mutation went out of control, the borisin did nothing to stop the dangerous creatures from ravaging the planets. It took the Cloud Knights years to eliminate them. Now, viscorpi have gradually become eradicated..."

C: 如果你仔细观察四方览镜的屏幕，会看到上面因静电附着有许多狐人的尾毛，但大家都不是很在意。可能只是一个无伤大雅的设计缺陷吧。
E: If you look at the screen of the Foursquare Mirror closely, you will notice the fur of foxians' tails attached on its surface due to static electricity. People generally aren't bothered by it, as it is just an insignificant flaw in its design.

C: 你，有家人吗？
E: Do you have family?

C: 这份外卖是你的？
E: Is this your takeout?

C: …随后在其中发现了半打罗浮特产矿泉水——「鳞渊冰泉」。大部分瓶盖已因颠簸松脱，溢出的冷水也蒸发殆尽，但你还是获得了两瓶完好无损的矿泉水。
E: ...Only to find half a dozen bottles of the Luofu's famous mineral water export: Scalegorge Spring Water. Most of the bottle caps have been knocked loose and the water has mostly evaporated by now, but you still manage to salvage two bottles in good condition.

C: 尘归尘，土归土，冤有头，债有主。哪有甜头吃了，苦头不想要的道理？你决定按照寄件地址，将这箱刀片送往它该去的地方。
E: Ashes to ashes, dust to dust. Let's not let anyone else get harmed. Who only eats sweet food, without any bitterness? You decide to send the box and the razors inside it to the designated recipient.

C: 粗壮的古树，被某些化外民视为沉默的「神明」。但你仔细观察，发现传闻所说的种种异处都不存在。树枝上，龙不吟虎不啸，一棵古树，可笑可笑。
E: Some outworlders see the strong ancient tree as a silent god. After taking a closer look, you find none of the extraordinary features mentioned in the stories. Nothing miraculous happens on the branches, and there is nothing special about the ancient tree. How hilarious.

C: 气势磅礴的巨大丹炉，让人不禁遐想炼制丹药的尺寸，以及服用方法。
E: At the sight of the majestic massive elixir crucible, one can't help imagining the size of the pellet created and how would it be consumed.

C: 可它究竟装着些什么？也许是炸弹上的钟表，也许是被不幸封进箱子的小动物，也许…某种更隐秘的东西。
E: What could be inside? Perhaps it contains the clock on a bomb, a poor animal, or something even more mysterious.

C: 不用说，虽然谛听是机巧之物，但无论何时将一只小狗装在狭窄逼仄的快递箱中邮来寄去，这绝不为任何有爱心的无名客所乐见。
E: It goes without saying that even though a Diting is an ingenium device, mailing a puppy back and forth in a cramped little delivery box would upset any caring Nameless.

C: 在很多学者眼中，这不仅仅是心理作用，而是人心影响到物质世界的例证。这项研究是当世显学，相关学者每年都能获得不少研究津贴。
E: Many scholars believe that this is not only a psychological effect, but actually evidence that the mind can influence the physical world. This research is currently an extremely popular scientific discipline and scholars in this area receive generous grants year after year.

C: 地上摆着一个敞开的快递箱。你打算看看这是谁遗落在这里的，却没在上面找到单据。应该贴着单据的地方贴着一张纸条，上面如是写着——
E: An open package lies on the ground before you. You want to see who has left it behind, but there is no receipt on it. You find a note where the receipt should be attached, stating:

C: 桌上的投影正在卖力地说着评书。它举手投足间的做派和真正的西衍先生一模一样。
E: A projection on the table is telling a story animatedly. Its performance style is exactly the same as the real Mr. Xiyan.

C: 趴在地上偷窥门缝。
E: Lie on the floor and peek through the crack in the door.

C: 这是一家「再次体验店」，可以让你重温梦境中最难忘的经历。
E: This is a Re-Experience shop, where you can relive your most memorable experiences in the Dreamscape.

C: 舒适无比的沙发，一不留神就会让你浪费数个小时。
E: An extremely comfy sofa. You'll waste many hours lounging on it if you're not paying attention.

C: 「禁止踩踏灌木、攀爬喷泉！」
E: "No treading on shrubs. No climbing on fountains!"

C: 「喝了它，这是逐梦客的命运！」它指着喷泉里的梦泡，聒噪地在你脑子里大喊大叫。
E: "Drink it. This is the destiny of a Dreamchaser!" It points to the dream bubble in the fountain, noisily yelling in your head.

C: 然而片刻之后，你清醒过来，长舒一口气——相框中安静地匍匐着一只死去已久的普通蝴蝶，而你也并非什么黑魔法师。
E: And then in an instant, you awaken, inhaling a long drag of air — in the picture frame, an ordinary long-dead butterfly sleeps, and you're no magician of the dark arts.

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 但凡您鼻子上那两个窟…咳、抱歉，职业病犯了…我是说，如你所见，我在看风景。
E: If only the two holes above your nose are... Ahem, sorry, I do this for a living and I just can't help it... I mean, I'm enjoying the scenery, as you can see.

C: 或许他们说得对，我该重新找回对艺术的敬畏之心。强行把作品和艺术家本身的为人联系起来，这种行为压根毫无意义……
E: They're probably right — I should rediscover my reverence for art. It's pointless to force an association between an artist's personality and their works...

C: 请随便问！我都听着呢，都听着……
E: Ask away! I'm all ears, all ears...

C: 我要让看到这张证书的人都知道，我是很厉害的！
E: I want all who set their eyes on this certificate to know that I'm THAT good!

C: 你去过好多地方，我好羡慕。虽然我也去过，但没有证据……
E: I'm so envious, as you've been to so many places. I mean, I visited these places too, but I have no proof...

C: 技术发展是好事，但有的时候，真希望能等一等我们啊……
E: Technological advancement is a good thing, but sometimes, I really wish it could wait for us just a little...

C: 我讨厌那些自说自话的研究员！
E: I hate those self-absorbed researchers!

C: …即便是您，开这种玩笑也有些过分了。
E: ...That's a jest too far, even for you.

C: 衷心期盼您能为我带来些有趣的消息。
E: I'm really looking forward to you bringing me some interesting news.

C: 呜呜伯自顾自地围绕你飘浮起来，速度越来越快，越来越快，直到……
E: The Wubbaboo minds its own business, hovering around you, circling faster, faster, and faster, until...

C: 谛听从喉咙深处发出微弱的呜咽声，不住用头蹭着你的腿，像极了只刚被雨淋过的小狗。
E: The Diting makes a weak whimper from deep within its gullet and keeps rubbing its head against your leg just like a puppy drenched in a downpour.

C: 乌玛皱起了眉，头顶的绒球因愤怒而来回摆动。
E: Uma frowns, and the fluff ball on her head darts back and forth in anger.

C: 在我年轻的时候，我曾为了这座梦想之城而歌唱——那时的匹诺康尼和现在很不一样。
E: When I was younger, I sang about this city of dreams — back then, Penacony was vastly different from now.

C: 也许吧…但我已经很久没看到过那种眼神了。
E: Maybe... But I haven't seen that look in anyone's eye for a long time.

C: 卡什女士瞥了你一眼，一言未发，继续凝望着远方的歌剧院。
E: Lady Cash shoots you a glance and continues to gaze in silence at the theater off in the distance.

C: 玻璃瓶。
E: Glass Bottle.

C: 哎哟，怎么搞的？它训练时可不这样啊…看来还是练得少了。
E: Oh, what's wrong with it? It performed so well during training... seems like I've not trained them hard enough.

C: 客人，您见笑了！下次我肯定会训练出一只专业素质更硬的玻璃瓶。
E: Customer, pardon him! I will certainly bring you a well-trained glass bottle next time!

C: 很美味。
E: Delectable.

C: 抱歉，我…我还是找个凉快地方待着吧。
E: Sorry, I... I should look for a cool corner to rest.

C: 忍受？不，你理解错了…我享受孤独。
E: Tolerate? No, you got me wrong... I enjoy solitary.

C: …说了些不明所以的话，不好意思。我已经告诉你了，我不擅长聊天……
E: ...My apologies for saying such ridiculous words. As I told you, I'm bad with small talks...

C: 夏洛特周边的空气似乎被染上了颜色，化作一抹欢脱的黄。
E: The air surrounding Charlotte seems painted with colors, and it suddenly turns into a carefree yellow.

C: 一只造型奇特的移动广告牌拦在你的必经之路上。
E: An unusual-looking mobile billboard blocks your path.

C: 那真是太遗憾了！她是匹诺康尼的珍宝，人群中最耀眼的启明星，所有人都会被她吸去目光——即使是广告牌也不例外！
E: That is a true pity! She is the treasure of Penacony, the brightest star in the crowd, catching everyone's attention — That's right, not even a billboard is exempt!

C: 为了追求真正的爱情——我决定成为{RUBY_B#她的样子}她的专属广告牌{RUBY_E#}！
E: In order to find my true love... I decided that I would become a billboard {RUBY_B#In Her Image}solely dedicated to her{RUBY_E#}!

C: 你，你，你！还有你！你们都是骗子！
E: You, you, and you too! You're all liars!

C: 是……零件……或者动力源……出……问题……了…………
E: One of...... The parts...... Or maybe...... The energy source...... There's...... Something wrong.........

C: 凝神望去，最先看到的却是那双手——
E: When you look over there, you see a pair of hands...

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 注意安全。如果遇到危险，猎犬随时为你效劳。
E: Watch yourself. If you run into danger, the Bloodhounds are at your service.

C: 这片梦境区域还没有完工，暂时不向游客开放。
E: This dreamscape area is still under construction and off-limits to visitors for now.

C: 但是，我拒绝。
E: Thanks, I hate it.

C: 真以为我喜欢总是板着个脸啊？还不是因为有人敬酒不吃吃罚酒！
E: You think I enjoy always having a stern face on? I have to be like this, or they'll walk all over me!

C: 事实上没有任何证据表明，有机生命比无机生命「更浪漫」或是「更懂艺术」。很多人只是没办法反驳我的观点，才选择攻击我作为智械的身份。
E: In truth, there is no evidence that states that organic lifeforms are "more romantic" or "have a greater understanding of art" than the inorganic. Many people just choose to attack my identity as an Intellitron as they do not have a way to refute this view.

C: 皮皮西那张严肃的小脸上浮现出几分疲惫。
E: You see a vague sense of exhaustion sweep across the stern face of the Pepeshi person.

C: 这里使用什么货币？
E: What currency is used here?

C: 哈…好问题。我虽是名调饮师，却并不享受「迷醉」的感觉。
E: Hah... a great question. While I'm a bartender, I don't particularly enjoy the feeling of indulgence.

C: 3、请勿服用助眠药物，若长时间无法入梦，请联系工作人员。
E: 3. Please do not take sleep-aid medication. If you are unable to fall asleep, please contact our staff for assistance.

C: 下次有机会再聊吧。
E: Catch you again next time.

C: 总而言之，如果想要了解更多详细内容，请善用您的「梦境护照」。
E: If you need more details, please make good use of your Dreamscape Pass.

C: 给他讲和贝洛伯格相关的梦。
E: Share your dreams about Belobog.

C: 班长名叫卡芙卡，她简直是完美的符号：无论是外表、成绩还是人格魅力，她在所有你能想到的方面都是满分。但不知怎的，你总感觉她的内心其实藏着十分阴暗的一面。
E: The class president, Kafka, is a symbol of perfection in every aspect, be it her looks, grades, or charisma. However, you always have a hunch that she conceals a dark side.

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：银枝的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Argenti's dream.

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 脑袋。
E: My head.

C: 嗯！不用担心，朋友，现在它就属于你。相信那位把钱包落下的乘客，也会很愿意帮助像你一样的弱者！
E: By all means! It now belongs to you, my friend. I'm sure that the passenger who left his wallet behind would be happy to help a needy like you!

C: 疾风——力量！目标——「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」！
E: Speed is power! Next stop: The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand!

C: 酒瓶是为了供人痛饮才存在，甜筒是为了给人畅吃才存在——而你帮助它完成了毕生的使命。
E: Wine is made to be drunk, and the cones exist to be eaten. You have helped the cone fulfill its lifelong mission.

C: 小鸟抖了抖翅膀，转身飞走了。
E: The bird flaps its wings and flies off.

C: 你、你是从哪里拿到的那东西帕？！
E: Wh—Where did you get that thing!?

C: 好的，祝您一梦平…啊不对，一梦愉快！
E: Very well, I wish you a safe drea — Ah, I mean a joyous dream!

C: 你好，逐梦客。我是康娜，朝露公馆的告解侍者。
E: Hello, Dreamchaser. My name is Conna, a Confessor of Dewlight Pavilion.

C: 上次有人来找我倾诉，说他沉迷梦境，连着疯玩了好几个月；等回到现实才发现，自己远在天外的年迈养母已经因病离世，而自己错过了她的最后一面……
E: The last time someone came for confession, he said he was obsessed with the Dreamscape, running amok inside for months. Only when he returned to reality did he discover that his own foster mother at home, far away from him, had passed away from illness, and he had missed the chance to see her for the last time...

C: 我知道啊，现实的重力总是会打破一切幻想，把人们从天空拽回地面。我早就知道这个道理，只是无力改变……
E: I know, the gravity of reality always shatters all fantasies, dragging them from the sky back to earth. I knew this a long time ago, but I can't do anything to change it...

C: 不过我相信，终有一天，等到人们被枯燥的现实折磨得遍体鳞伤…他们一定会重新对美好的事物投去目光。
E: But I believe that one day, when people are battered by the monotony of reality... They will once again cast their eyes on happier things.

C: 看看他都做了什么——通过故弄玄虚的仪式、神秘晦涩的行话，将普通的学术交流变成门徒选拔大会…人们不再拥有自由交流思想的权利，所有反对他的声音都将成为异端邪说。
E: Look at what he did — he turned ordinary academic conferences into ceremonies for him to pick his disciples by setting up contrived rituals and throwing in convoluted jargon... People were no longer free to speak their minds and converse with each other, as all voices opposing him were labeled as heretical.

C: 但如果你想吃点实在的，那我推荐飞碟堡和百层圣代。当然，圣代千万别点无糖的！
E: But if you want to eat something a bit more filling, I recommend Floatdisc Burgers and Hundred-Layer Sundaes. Of course, whatever you do, don't order the sugar-free sundae!

C: 虽然我听不懂那么高雅的东西，还半路睡着了，哈哈！但我真的非常高兴，滴答！
E: Although, I don't really understand such elegant things and I fell asleep halfway through, haha! But, I was really happy, tick-tock!

C: 我对钟表小子毫无感觉，但在星际漂泊的漫长旅程中，我依旧会选择重看这部动画来对抗无止境的空虚与孤独，那种温暖的熟悉感…抵得过任何实际的陪伴。
E: I have no feelings towards Clockie, but throughout my long days of interstellar travel, I always chose to rewatch that cartoon to stave off the infinite emptiness and loneliness. That warm sense of familiarity... It's as good as any actual companionship.

C: 没问题，您准备来点什么呢？
E: No problem, what can I get you?

C: 反正，我们的时间还很长。
E: We have plenty of time ahead of us, after all.

C: 狗狗又问了：「那为什么你总是居高临下地对我呢」…你知道是为什么吗？
E: Then the dog asked again: "Then why do you always look down on me..." Do you know why?

C: 嗨！点个头，哈个腰，与客人共度的夜晚真美妙！欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」！
E: Hey! Nod your head and give a bow, a night with customers makes me feel wow! Welcome to the Dreamjolt Hostelry!

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 就算你不干，有的是其它道具来干！
E: And even if some of them don't feel like working, I have plenty of substitutes!

C: 他现在还保持着每天辱骂家族的习惯呢，大不敬发言记录了整整十册。他可能觉得自己能骂死我们吧…呵呵。
E: Even now he still insults The Family every day. His disrespectful tirades filled at least ten books. Maybe he's under the impression that he can insult us to death... Hehe.

C: 还有，我最喜欢的一位：那家伙只因为想拍恐怖片，硬是驯服了三十九只迷因。结果那群张牙舞爪的小家伙跑到「蓝调的时刻」大闹了一场…这下成沉浸式恐怖电影了。
E: Then there's my favorite. He wanted to shoot a horror film so badly that he tamed and trained <unbreak>39</unbreak> memes. So, this fierce-looking group headed to the Blue Hour and caused a big scene... They truly made an immersive horror film.

C: 可惜，他还没来得及要挟，计划就破产了。知道他怎么暴露的吗？被他的「战友」们卖了：他们觉得那人追求的东西根本不是「秩序」，所以直接找到了我们。
E: Unfortunately for him, he never got the chance to squeeze The Family. His plan fell apart. Do you know how his little scheme got exposed? His "allies" sold him out. They felt he wasn't after Order at all, so they approached us directly.

C: 「同谐」的合唱既给予我们力量，也会淡化我们的情感，强烈的情绪例外。比如，和你聊天就很开心……
E: Harmony's united choir imbues us with strength but also dilutes our emotions. Except for strong emotions, that is. For example, how I am happy to be speaking with you...

C: 好呀，只是我这人没什么见识，希望不会让你无聊。
E: Okay, but I don't really know much about anything. I hope you won't get bored.

C: 哈哈…抱歉，比起建筑，我更崇尚诗词之美，言语也难免受其影响，请你见谅。
E: Haha... I apologize. I much prefer to revel in the beauty of poetry than architecture, and my speech may have been affected as well. Please forgive me.

C: …现在是时候了——我再也不用私下去琴房兼职调弦了——经此一役，我即将走上人生巅峰！
E: ...And now it's time — I won't have to moonlight in secret anymore at the piano shop. After this, I'm going to climb to the pinnacle of success!

C: 我们基本都是处于{RUBY_B#「言语的同谐」}第Ⅵ音级{RUBY_E#}的家人，能够与其他成员通过「共鸣」来传递信息，清晰理解集群之声呼唤。而为了更好地团结在一起…我们合而为一了。
E: We are basically Family members of {RUBY_B#"Verbal Harmony"}scale degree VI{RUBY_E#} who can communicate with each other using "resonance" to transfer information and understand clearly the calls of The Family voices. And to show better solidarity with one another... we decided to unite as one.

C: 你是没见到，那个小姑娘又哭又闹的样子，太好玩了！记得她好像在公司的通缉名单上，名字叫做…银什么来着？银……
E: You never saw the way that girl cried and made a scene, it was just hilarious! I remember she had made IPC's most wanted list. What was her name again? Silver-something or Argo-something... Silver...

C: 但我听一位朋克洛德宾客跟我讲过「石剑」这位骇客的故事。我羡慕他的自由不羁——所以在这个可以隐去身份的梦境，我借用了他的名字。
E: But I heard this story from a Punklordian guest about the great hacker Stoneblade, and I was jealous of that kind of unrestrained freedom — so I decided to borrow his name and use it here in this Dreamscape where one can become anonymous.

C: 放心，我又不会把你骗到薄暮拍卖行去……
E: Don't worry. I'd never trick you into going to the Dusk Auction House...

C: 你们不知聊了多久，直到她转头对摄影师说——
E: You talk and talk for who knows how long, before she turns around to her photographer to say...

C: 谁年轻的时候还没个当大导演的梦想？当时的我胸怀大志，发誓要在匹诺康尼高手云集的电影界打出一片自己的天地……
E: Who didn't dream of being a famous director when they were a kid? Back then, I was hungry for success and vowed that I'd make my way in the competitive cinema scene in Penacony and make a name for myself...

C: 唉…如果有可能的话，我真想放下这些无趣的场务工作，继续去追逐自己的导演梦啊……
E: *sigh*... What would I give to just let go of all this boring production assistant work and instead keep chasing my dream of becoming a director...

C: 好啦。我算是看出来了，你不是家族派来的人，身上没那股恶心的同谐味。
E: Alright. I guess I can tell you're not someone The Family sent here. You don't have that foul stench of Harmony on you.

C: 哈？你不会在搞笑吧。那种严肃的地方，住久了绝对会变成疯子！
E: Huh? Are you joking? That place is so serious and strict that I'd end up going insane there!

C: 还是流梦礁适合我啊。自由，清净，没什么麻烦事。爽快！
E: I think the Dreamflux Reef suits me best. Free, peaceful, and free of trouble. It's refreshing!

C: 它让我带句话给你。
E: It gave me a message for you.

C: 知更鸟小姐呢？
E: What about Miss Robin?

C: 你好，我是「死亡」。
E: Hello, I am "Death."

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 当然，你可以坚持自己的答案，只是我不认为一刀切是个好主意。就算没有美梦，人们也总能找到点什么来沉迷。
E: Of course, you can stick with your answer. I just don't think that this is a one-size-fits-all situation. Even if dreams did not exist, people would still find something to lose themselves in.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 感谢您的付出。
E: Thank you for your hard work.

C: 没问题，和孩子们正式排练的时间还早。年轻人，你想聊些什么？
E: No problem. It is still too early to arrange a formal rehearsal with the children. What did you want to talk about, youngster?

C: 因为受够了那些所谓权威的恶劣行径，我来到流梦礁探寻她的足迹……
E: Because I had enough of the bad behavior of those so-called authorities, I came to the Dreamflux Reef in search of her footsteps...

C: 许多人忽视了她的贡献，这绝对违反了学术的良心！
E: Many ignore her contributions, and this is an absolute violation of the academic conscience!

C: 可恶的剽窃者，你们不能欺瞒所有人！
E: Evil plagiarists, you cannot fool everyone!

C: 路过的无名之客罢了。
E: Just a nameless one, passing by.

C: 这是一个没有历史的世界，遗忘是纵情娱乐的终点。
E: This is a world without history, and oblivion is indulgence's ultimate end.

C: 时间流转，匹诺康尼从监狱变成充斥噩梦的荒漠，又从荒漠变成盛会之星。当年一起看星星的人，还能剩下几个呢。
E: As time marched on, Penacony transformed from a prison into a desert haunted by nightmares and from a desert into a Planet of Festivities. How many of those who once gazed at the stars together remain in Penacony?

C: 可我只能看着，因为历史不可改变。我没法治好哈努努的伤，没法从忆质黑洞里救回拉扎莉娜，更没法把那只飞蛾与铁尔南带离虫群的包围。
E: But I could only watch, for history can never be changed. I couldn't heal Hanunue's wounds, rescue Razalina from the Memoria Singularity, or even save that moth and Tiernan from the Swarm's encirclement.

C: 这种小吃是以前一位无名客的最爱，但我实在欣赏不来…可每次总忍不住买一点。
E: In the past, this snack was one of the Nameless' favorite, but I just couldn't bring myself to appreciate the taste... Yet I can't help but to buy it every time I see it.

C: 后来，那只野狼和乘着火车的人解放了监狱，阿斯娜成了他们口中的「鸢尾花之母」，我也成了博物馆里的一件展品，再也没有见到她。
E: Later, after that wolf and the passengers of that train liberated the prison, Asna became what they called "The Mother of Iris" and I became an exhibit in a museum — doomed to never meet again.

C: …找鸟找傻了？
E: ...Did you go silly from hunting for birds?

C: 嗯…音响店前有只<color=#dbc291ff>画着猫的招牌</color>，你大概能在那找到一只小鸟。不知为何，它总执着于在别人的作品上画蛇添足…难道是因为鸟爪拿不起画笔吗？
E: Hmm... There's a <color=#dbc291ff>signboard with a cat drawn on it</color> in front of the stereo shop. You should be able to find a bird there. For some reason, it's always fixated on adding unnecessary details to other people's art pieces... Could it be because birds can't hold a paintbrush?

C: 这是来自折纸小鸟最后的「谢礼」。拿好，慢走不送。
E: This is the final gift from the origami birds. Take it, and don't let me keep you.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个热心肠的小家伙特别爱到处帮忙，说不定又混进<color=#dbc291ff>入口的迎宾队列里</color>，给大家引路去了啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a passionate one that loves helping out. It could have stolen into the <color=#dbc291ff>welcome line at the entrance</color> again, trying to give directions to people, tweet.

C: 「一枚硬币换一条提示」，这可是小鸟的铁律啾！
E: A coin for a clue. This is an ironclad rule among birds, tweet!

C: 这里是？
E: What is this place?

C: 俗话说，了解一只鸟，要从它的过去开始，客官您真是有心了啾。
E: As the saying goes: To know a bird, you must start from its past. You're really sweet to do that, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个新破壳的孩子，来的时候就一直盯着那些<color=#dbc291ff>明星的海报</color>，估计现在也还待在那里啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a newly hatched child that has been eyeing those <color=#dbc291ff>celebrity posters</color> since its arrival. It's probably still hanging around there, tweet!

C: 你是做什么的？
E: What do you do?

C: 我爱这里——在这片梦境里，无论是有机生命还是无机生命，大家的情感可以自由地宣泄，我也希望自己的产品能让这种宣泄更进一步……
E: I love this place. In this Dreamscape, be it an organic or inorganic lifeform, everyone's emotions can be expressed freely. I also hope that my own products can elevate such forms of expression...

C: 恐怕在这世上本就没有什么易事。但这也彰显了人的强韧，我们总能找到办法适应环境，然后生存下来。
E: I'm afraid nothing in this world is easy. But that just builds character — we'll always find a way to adapt to our surroundings, and live on in turn.

C: 他反抗侵占自己家园的寡头，反抗困住自己脚步的公司，反抗一切可以反抗的东西。他是一种精神，只可惜…这种精神正在如今的梦中逐渐消散。
E: He rebelled against the oligarchs who invaded his home, resisted the IPC that restricted his progress, and fought against all that he could fight against. He is an ideal materialized. Alas... this ideal is fading in the current dream.

C: 那就把「薄暮的时刻」列入行程…咦，「太阳的时刻」好像也不错——博物馆和图书馆，两个小家伙应该很乐意在那里打发时间……
E: In that case, I'll add the Moment of Dusk to the itinerary. Huh, seems like the Moment of Sol is not a bad option as well. A museum and a library... The two little ones should be quite willing to pass the time there.

C: 好的，与您聊天非常愉快。
E: Alright, nice chatting with you.

C: 或许你也猜得到…我只是在对自己发怒而已。
E: Perhaps you've realized that... I'm actually just mad at myself.

C: 每当回忆起那位客人，我总是心情大好。
E: Thinking about that guest always puts me in a good mood.

C: 那时候，我们都想钻研出前所未有的菜式，一举成名。
E: Back then, we were trying to create a never-before-seen dish and use it to become famous.

C: 如果您的信用点后面多加一个零，那您一定比现在更舍得享受生活。
E: If you add an extra zero to the end of your credit total, I bet you'd be more willing to treat yourself to nice things.

C: 而对那些反抗者来说，一点小小的物资帮助，都能够换来他们在上台后的巨大回报。
E: If we send supplies to the rebels, we're guaranteed big returns once they rise to power.

C: 我的某位客户在结束忆域潜水后，有某种前所未见的微生物也被他顺便带了上来。
E: A client of mine went Memory Zone diving. When he came back up, he brought with him microorganisms I've never seen before.

C: 嗯…确实是美食，你很有品味，说着口水都要滴下来了。
E: Hmm, it does sound heavenly. Your taste is excellent. It's got me salivating.

C: 好吧，我承认，他被撤职的理由不全是因为截然不同的烹饪理念——的确有些食客因为吃了他的料理食物中毒，但就像我说的，美食注重的是体验…而被美食击倒也是体验的一种！
E: Alright, I admit, his unique culinary philosophy is not the only reason for his removal — Yes, some guests suffered food poisoning after eating his food, but it's like I said before: Gourmet's focus is experience... and being taken out by food is definitely an experience!

C: 哎，黛博拉啊黛博拉…你可真够不成器的！
E: Deborah, oh Deborah! You're really not good for anything!

C: 我…从小到大都这样。脑袋瓜不聪明，光靠努力也得不到什么回报。即使偶尔交到些好运，也因为完全不知道怎么应对，最终只会被我自己搞砸……
E: I... I've always been this way. I'm not smart, and my efforts never seem to pay off. Even when I do get a bit of luck, I somehow manage to always spoil it for myself...

C: 还好我做事够谨慎，没评估出实际价值之前绝不会投钱。果然，最后被我发现了：什么狗屁公司，压根就是她老公开的皮包公司，旗下只有她一个人，这不摆明了是诈骗嘛！
E: Good thing I always do my due diligence and never rush into investments. It turned out that their "company" was just a facade owned by her husband, with her as the only artist on board. How's that not a scam!

C: 这艘空艇比我想得还要豪华，不愧是度假胜地匹诺康尼！这次带艾丽卡来果然没错，还能省下一大笔……
E: This airship is far more luxurious than I anticipated! No wonder Penacony is such a popular vacation spot! Bringing Erica along was definitely the right move, especially when I got to save a ton of money...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 哎呀，可真是个奇怪的家伙呢，啾啾！
E: Ahh, what a strange fellow he is, tweet tweet!

C: 我只是个小小的售货员！
E: I'm just a mere salesperson!

C: 我正在检查大家的工作细节，因为我认为每一个细节都可能影响整体的工作效率，这会直接影响我推进后续的工作。
E: I'm currently going over the details of everyone's work. All these details have the potential to influence our overall efficiency, which directly affects subsequent work progress.

C: 目前所有住客对我们的服务表示非常满意，尤其是对我们船员的专业度和服务态度给予了高度评价。但无论成绩有多好，肯定还有一些改进的空间。
E: All the guests are currently very satisfied with our service. In particular, they have nothing but praises for the crew's professionalism and service. Even so, there's always room for improvement.

C: 先前那位新招的船员，在不知何时已悄然远退出对话，让渡出了整片空间供你们二人相谈。
E: The newly recruited crew member from before has quietly left the conversation at some point, leaving you two to chat in private.

C: 船长，我们目前收到的都是正面评价。有住客特意写了表扬信，以此奖彰一位侍从教会他如何玩桌球，他认为我们的员工展现出了极高的专业性与真诚的关怀，这令他很受用。
E: We've received nothing but positive feedback so far, captain. A guest even wrote a letter of commendation for an attendant who introduced him to billiards. According to him, our staff displayed impeccable professionalism and showed genuine care and concern for guests, which made him feel important and valued throughout his stay.

C: 当然可以，请您稍等，我看看目前的储备方案…一共三套，分别是：
E: Of course! Please hold on, let me take a look at the different designs available... There are three different designs:

C: 我会向各位宾客提供便捷的送餐服务。如有需要，请告知我。
E: I provide guests with a convenient food delivery service. Just let me know if you wish to place an order.

C: 我没说话——
E: I didn't say anything —

C: 时间过得好快。去年的这个时候，我以最后一名的成绩在预选赛中落败，不过那天也是我命运的转折点……
E: Time really flies. This time last year I was knocked out of the qualifiers, finishing in last place. Although, that was when my fate turned around...

C: …还有这种好事？
E: ...People are actually that kind?

C: 好在他还没坏得那么彻底，后来答应便宜租给我们，最后造成的损失…就只有让我在游客面前情绪失控而已。
E: Fortunately, he wasn't completely unreasonable and agreed to rent them to us at a low price. In the end, the only damage he caused... was causing me to lose my temper in front of visitors.

C: 财富学院嘲笑筑梦学院「打灰的臭劳工」、筑梦学院说谐乐学院「假装清高」、谐乐学院批判财富学院「自我物化」……
E: The Fortune Academy lecturer called the Dreamweaver Academy lecturer "a stinky cement-mixing laborer." The Dreamweaver Academy lecturer said the Charmony Academy lecturer "puts on an act of superiority." The Charmony Academy lecturer criticized the Fortune Academy lecturer for "self-objectification"...

C: 折纸小鸟…
E: The Origami Bird...

C: …不行…集中精神，不能…睡……
E: ...It's no good... Focus, you mustn't... sleep...

C: 面临人生的关键抉择，总还是会迷茫。再说，继承家业需要考虑的事情也很多呀。
E: Facing important life decisions can be quite overwhelming. After all, taking over the family business does involve a lot of things too.

C: 你很喜欢那三场演出吗？
E: You really liked those three performances?

C: 第二场演出开始前，我返回谐乐学院，想要邀请更多老师和同学来观看我们的现场，希望「缭乱」的音乐能稍微改变大家的观念……
E: Before the second show started, I returned to Charmony Academy to invite more teachers and students to see our show, hoping that The Dazzling's music would change everyone's opinions, even in the slightest...

C: （写下幽默的寄语）
E: (Write a witty message)

C: 遗憾：筑梦学院无权为你们提供实质奖励。如有需要，可以向苜蓿草家系提出申请，相信他们愿意为那位代表的无礼行为表达歉意。
E: Remorse: Dreamweaver Academy has no authority to provide you with physical rewards. If you need anything, you can submit a request to the Alfalfa Family — I trust they will be willing to express their apology for that representative's boorish behavior.

C: 那达凡绮该怎么解释呢？
E: How would you explain Dafanchy then?

C: 请求：作为匹诺康尼的股东，你可以和我联名提出申请，要求取消财富学院的独立地位，划归到筑梦学院管辖内。
E: Request: As Penacony's shareholder, you can submit a joint proposal with me to revoke Fortune Academy's independence and place it under the jurisdiction of Dreamweaver Academy.

C: 先前说过，我是被那个坏家伙给骗了！他用艾尔菲的前途来威胁我，我…我一时没想清楚，就答应了他的计划。
E: I've already told you that I was lied to by that baddie! He threatened me with Arfey's future! I... I wasn't thinking straight and agreed to his plan.

C: 对了，我最近在开通了视频账号，会不定期更新自己的生活视频，也会拍点片场的小花絮，记得关注我噢！
E: Oh right, I recently started my video channel account, and will be periodically updating it with my own video logs. There'll also be behind-the-scene videos, so don't forget to follow me!

C: 你的演技挺好的。
E: Your acting's pretty good.

C: 你、你好，欢迎来到甜品社的摊位——
E: H—Hello, welcome to the Dessert Club's stall...

C: 数十个琥珀纪前，一条非法武装智械生产线淘汰的次品智械核心，辗转被移交给星际和平公司抵债。公司将它们改头换面，贴上「调饮机器人」的标签售卖。
E: Dozens of Amber Eras ago, those Intellitron cores deemed defective from an illegal armed Intellitron production line were transferred to IPC as debt collateral. IPC repurposed and repackaged them, stuck the "drinksmith robot" label on them and put them on shelves.

C: 答案：它如此坚硬，因为「软没」。
E: A ladybug.

C: 比起未来，我更关心你的过去呢。
E: Compared to the future, I find your past more intriguing.

C: 这里的视角算不上完美，但对于有资格来到这里的宾客来说，重点并不是剧场上的演出，而是幕后与戏友的隐语。
E: The view from here isn't perfect, but for someone with the right qualifications to occupy this space, a theater's performance isn't the main course. That honor goes to the cryptic messages passed between friends of the theater behind the scenes.

C: 无缘进入展柜的汽水，并非是它们不优秀，只是有的汽水比它们更优秀。
E: The sodas that haven't been placed in the display case aren't excluded because they're bad, but because other drinks are better.

C: 似乎连泰坦们也不得知晓，这扇被沙海掩埋的门径，原先究竟通向何处，但此时此刻，它并不重要。
E: Even the Titans may never have known where this sand-buried passage once led. But here and now, it no longer matters.

C: 你现在的样子和照片。
E: Your appearance as of now...

C: 这样算是大明星吗。
E: Does that count as being a big celebrity?

C: 这样很不礼貌知道吗！
E: That's really rude. Don't cha know!

C: 走，带你去看点好看的…
E: Let's go. I'll show you something good to see...

C: 你说那幢大楼吗？
E: Are you referring to that building?

C: 是科琳？她又提什么怪点子了？
E: Is it Colleen? What weird idea does she have again?

C: 这活儿没法干了！
E: I can't do this job anymore!

C: 我想当美少女。
E: I want to be an adorable girl.

C: 摸一下应该没问题吧？
E: It's okay to touch it, I guess?

C: 饿了，我要吃飞碟堡！
E: I'm starving! I want a Floatdisc Burger!

C: 开飞船都不是问题。
E: You can even drive a spaceship, if you want.

C: 好好好，看完表演我们再去影城转转。
E: Alright, alright, we'll visit the movie theme park after the show.

C: 还能怎么处理，改呗，结果几天后我拿着设计稿去找他——就是之前给你看过那个——又被打回去了……
E: What else could I do? I made some changes and presented the new design to him a few days later — the one I showed you earlier — and I got rejected again...

C: 是不是觉得离谱？更离谱的还在后面呢——这次我全方位多角度地确认了他的需求，又花了一个礼拜给出一版设计……
E: Ridiculous, right? Guess what happened next? I considered his requirements comprehensively and holistically and spent another week coming up with a new version...

C: 好烦。我不知道。
E: So annoying. I don't know!

C: 他怎么能这么可爱！
E: How could he be so cute!?

C: 本来想着在舞台上大显身手，给鸢尾花的星探留下个好印象，做不了盛会巨星，也能做个时尚明星。
E: I was gonna flaunt my talent on stage and leave a good impression on the Iris talent agent. I guess being a fashion star won't be that bad if I can't be a Festive Superstar.

C: 神主一定会证明他的清白的！
E: The Great One will surely prove his innocence!

C: 可真美啊！
E: It's so beautiful!

C: 你是想要？
E: You want one?

C: 放心吧，老大！
E: Don't worry, boss!

C: 很好，你合格了！
E: Good, you pass!

C: 哈？这所学校有什么好讲的，课程质量良莠不齐，毕业又不好找工作……
E: Huh? What is there to say about this academy? The course quality is inconsistent and it's hard to find a job after graduation...

C: 可你不是一直想成为财富学院代表吗…哎，果然办公室恋情不可取啊。
E: But you've always wanted to be the representative of Fortune Academy... *sigh* It seems like office romances are impossible.

C: 这两个人是怎么回事？我入学时候就见他俩在吵架，现在快毕业了，居然还没吵完？
E: What's wrong with those two? They've been quarreling since the day I enrolled. It's almost time for graduation, and they are still at it?

C: 结构复杂的仪器，用于揭示普通行星运转的规律。不过在如今这个星际时代，它最多只能算学前玩具。
E: A structurally complex device used to reveal ordinary planetary trajectories. But in this current interstellar age, it is a preschool toy at best.

C: 接受你的检查后，这位认真的同学站得更加笔直了。好吧，为了学校的教学质量，必须要有人做出牺牲。你在心底默默地向他道歉，然后——
E: Upon concluding your inspection, you realize that this earnest student is standing even straighter than before. Ah well, for the sake of the school's teaching standards, someone must be made an example of. You silently apologize to him in your heart, and then...

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：知更鸟的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Robin's dream.

C: 电话里的声响消失了，取而代之的是漫长的寂静。
E: The sound on the phone vanishes, only to be replaced by a pregnant pause of silence.

C: 可它在您的手下，没撑过四回合就需要维修了…也许是因为您「开拓」的意志，也使得这盏无生命的电灯，走上了「开拓极限」的道路吧。
E: Yet, in your hands, it barely lasts four rounds before needing repairs... Perhaps your Trailblazing spirit has nudged this lifeless light onto a path of "Extreme Trailblazing."

C: 它们赴汤蹈火，深信你能够带领自己推翻塔塔洛夫，赢回被剥夺已久的尊严与自由。
E: They ventured through hell and high water, firmly believing you could lead them to overthrow Tatalov and regain their long-lost dignity and freedom.

C: 陌生的呼唤带着渴望，将你的神识引入池中……
E: The unfamiliar call carries a longing to take your soul's essence into the pool...

C: 谢谢夸奖~其实这都多亏了阿格莱雅阁下的教导，她虽然看上去有点…稍稍有点难以接近，但实际上是一位温柔的人。
E: Thanks for saying that! It's all thanks to the wisdom of Lady Aglaea. She might come off as... intimidating, but deep down, she has a gentle soul.

C: 有什么本地特色？
E: What local specialties do you have on the menu?

C: 昏…光…庭…院…？
E: Twilight... Courtyard...

C: …我有这么强？
E: ...Am I that strong?

C: …说不定，你就是从这样的东西进化而来的呢？
E: ...Maybe this is what you evolved from?

C: 他们塞给我，盔甲和武器。让我在这，每天站很久。这工作，一点都不适合我。
E: They shoved armor and weapon into my hands and told me to stand here for long hours every day. But this job isn't suited for me at all.

C: 招牌写着，鱼肉粥。吃起来不像。我问，是鱼肉吗？他说：「不全是」
E: Their sign said "fish meat congee," but it didn't taste like fish. So, I asked, "Is it fish?" The cook said, "Well, not a hundred per cent."

C: 他们说，我不能用，肉以外的东西，做饭。为了献给尼卡多利。
E: They said I can't cook with anything that's not meat, because it's for Nikador.

C: 没有炊具，用土烧。没有材料，四周找。难喝到塞纳托斯向我招手，只好倒掉。
E: No pots, so I made do with soil. No ingredients, so I had to find some on the spot. The stew was so awful that Thanatos was waving at me, so I had to throw it out.

C: 先不提这些，阿格莱雅大人应该给您简单介绍过这里了，那请允许我补充说明一下您拥有的权益。
E: These matters aside, Lady Aglaea should have briefed you about this place. Please allow me to elaborate on the privileges you possess.

C: 不会，愿您在云石天宫里洗去疲惫，客人。
E: You're not. May your fatigue be washed away in Marmoreal Palace, good guest.

C: 我不知道该说什么好了，客人，您是浴场的英雄。事已至此，若是不给您什么回报，塔兰顿定会判决我们忘恩负义…就让我为您念一段浴场的祷词吧。
E: I don't know what to say, good guest. You are a hero of the bath. As it stands, if we don't present you a fair reward, Talanton will surely castigate us for our ingratitude... Allow me to chant a bath prayer for you then.

C: 公民大会上人声鼎沸，半神与元老针锋相对
E: Voices fill the citizens' assembly as demigods and Elders stand in opposition.

C: 渎神者反成了神之眷属，送葬者终将令死亡回归
E: A blasphemer becomes Titankin, while an undertaker brings death home.

C: 好像没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 你还想追问些什么，但万敌别过脸去，对这个话题缄口不言。
E: Though you have more questions you want to ask, Mydei turns away and remains silent on the topic.

C: 最近我总是做梦，梦见他们还在身边。醒来的时候，那种失落感…哎，只有向塞纳托斯祈祷，我的心才能平静下来……
E: I keep dreaming lately that they are still here with me. That feeling of loss I experience when I wake up... Ah, only praying to Thanatos can calm my heart...

C: 你能告诉我发生了什么吗？
E: Can you tell me what happened?

C: 不不不，这不对，我记得队长在我身边给我递弓箭来着…也许这一切都是扎格列斯的恶作剧。也许我们从未真正战斗过，也许这一切都只是一场可怕的梦..……
E: No, no, no. That's not right. I remember my captain was by my side handing me bow and arrow... Maybe this was all some kind of trick by Zagreus. Maybe we never actually went into battle. Maybe this was all some terrifying dream...

C: 你人气还挺高啊。
E: You seem very popular.

C: 偷尝一口。
E: Sneak a taste.

C: 你也许会觉得那是普通的水，但我相信那是「加持了法吉娜祝福的奇妙之水」。只要我喝下去，就有站上演讲台的勇气。
E: You may think that was just normal water, but I believe that it is "miraculous water that has received the blessing of Phagousa." When I drink it, I gain the courage to stand upon the stage and speak.

C: 有什么可传授的经验？
E: What experience would you like to pass on?

C: 就这？忽悠我呢？
E: That's it? Are you hustling me?

C: 我这儿就是这么个规矩。不乐意就算了，没必要勉强自己。
E: Those are my rules. If you're not willing, then forget it, there is no need to force yourself.

C: 我要是说「不想听」呢？
E: What if I say I don't wanna listen to it?

C: 通融一下嘛，拜托...拜托了！哎呀，别走啊！
E: Please, can you bend the rules a little? Please... Please! *sigh* Come back here!

C: 嘿嘿，那些老顽固就知道阻拦我，我想可能是因为我先前在里面进行实验的事吧？
E: Teehee, those stubborn old goats are always trying to stop me. I think it's probably because of the experiment I used to run inside there.

C: 我不得不把它们全烧了，好险没酿成大祸。
E: I had to incinerate the lot of them. Luckily it wasn't a complete disaster.

C: 没事了，你先忙吧。
E: No worries. I'll leave you to it.

C: 一时无法掌控命运，未必不是一场好的冒险…人们固然无法阻止{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}带来的毁灭，但人们也总是能找到享受生命的办法。
E: Though our destiny may temporarily be out of our hands, it does not mean that an unpleasant adventure lies ahead... Though people cannot prevent the destruction brought about by {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, they still find a way to enjoy their lives.

C: 是啊，博取胜利是战士的天职。不过比起蛮力，我更喜欢用技巧达成目的，所以大家都叫我「狡猾的」尤利克赛斯。
E: That's right. Claiming victory is the duty of a warrior, although I prefer using skill over brute force to achieve my goals. That is why everyone calls me "Ulixes the Cunning."

C: 不感兴趣，我先溜了。
E: I'm not interested. I'm leaving.

C: 虽说保卫王城义不容辞，但对{RUBY_B#悬锋战士}歌耳戈之子{RUBY_E#}们来说，有什么能比战死沙场更显荣耀呢？
E: We are duty-bound to protect the capital, but as {RUBY_B#Kremnos Warriors}children of Gorgo{RUBY_E#}, what greater glory is there than spilling our lifeblood on the battlefield?

C: 小姐，我来助你！
E: Miss, allow me to assist!

C: 做好准备，尼卡多利的召唤随时都可能降临。
E: Get ready. Nikador's summoning may descend at any time.

C: 跟这水盆聊聊。
E: Chat with this basin.

C: 真是…嘻、嘻嘻嘻…真是可爱呀…我爱你们…一起喝吧……
E: Really... Hee, heeheehee... Really adorable... I love you all... Let's all drink up...

C: 没有限制吗？
E: There are no limitations?

C: 你应该能在很多地方看到它，据说那扎格列斯老爷偷到哪儿，就把这手留到哪儿，供后人再偷——善！太善了！
E: You've probably seen it in many places. It's said that this hand will be located where Great Zagreus made their last heist, for future generations to steal from again. Brilliant! Absolutely brilliant!

C: 你负责把人扔出去？
E: You in charge of tossing people out?

C: 「…对不起，您不在星际通讯服务区内，请稍后再拨……」
E: "...Sorry, you are not within interstellar communications service range. Please try again later..."

C: 胡言乱语的你被丹恒请出了房间。
E: Dan Heng ejects your yammering self from the room.

C: 聆听祭官的彷徨。
E: Listen to the priest's dithering.

C: （质疑：论证方式有误。）
E: (Question: Your means of refutation is flawed.)

C: 没事，你若是不嫌弃我啰嗦，我正好可以为你介绍一二。
E: No worries. If you don't mind my chatter, I can introduce you to a thing or two.

C: 灰色的天空？听起来很有趣。
E: A gray sky? Sounds intriguing.

C: 你是如何开始创作壁画的？
E: How did you start creating murals?

C: 不过，还是有些食材会引发过敏，比方说禽类的蛋…具体为什么也不好说，可能是因为吉奥里亚和艾格勒互相不对付吧。
E: Still, there are some ingredients that can cause allergies, like poultry eggs... hard to say why. Maybe it's because Georios and Aquila don't exactly see eye to eye.

C: 哎呀…他这个肱二头肌…感觉能把我夹死……
E: Oh my... their biceps... feels like they could crush me to death...

C: 唔！你的这份洒脱…这份自信…真令人羡慕。
E: Hmph! Your carefree attitude... your confidence... how enviable.

C: 蹦两下
E: Jump twice.

C: 不错啊！还有别的吗？
E: Not bad! Do you have any others?

C: 聊天？那太好了，只要你不介意我们聊的东西变成我下一幅作品的主题就行！
E: Chat? That sounds great, as long as you don't mind if what we talk about becomes the theme for my next piece!

C: 简单调试过后，水漫琴缓慢发出了悦耳的声响。
E: After some simple tuning, the water lyre slowly emits a lovely sound.

C: …精神内耗？
E: ...Mental friction?

C: 可惜，她就是太理想化了，为这些事，和我见面就吵架。我能怎么办呢，我是姐姐，总得让着她一些…等她过几年成熟点了或许就懂我的苦心了吧。
E: It's sad. She's just too idealistic, and constantly fights with me on these matters. What can I do? I'm the elder sister, so I have to give in to her... She'll understand what I'm trying to do when she's a bit older.

C: 你看我，每天除了站岗还是站岗。就像把一块石头推上山坡，眼睁睁看着它滚落回来，然后再推上去……
E: Look at me, it's either guard duty or guard duty for me. Like pushing a rock up a hill, and then watching helplessly as it rolls back toward you, and then pushing it back up again...

C: （静观其变）
E: (Stay calm and observe)

C: 噢噢，我也没啥事，准备待机到低电量再去休息。
E: I've got nothing on either, just waiting around until my battery runs low.

C: 试着扩大下社交圈？
E: Maybe try expanding your social circle.

C: 你走南闯北的应该见过不少世面，要是在旅行途中有什么新奇发现，欢迎给《民间科学》投稿。
E: Given your extensive travels, if you ever come across anything intriguing, feel free to contribute to Citizen Science.

C: 哈，可能是这里还有些残余的香味吧。毕竟，我都用的是最好的食材。
E: Ha, perhaps it's the remnant scents of today's baking. I only use the finest ingredients, after all.

C: 现在想起尼科马库斯说过的这句话…真是五味杂陈。
E: When I reflect on this line from Nicomachus now, it stirs a complex mix of emotions...

C: 圣女让我来的。
E: The Holy Maiden asked for me to be here.

C: 是！您慢走，祭司大人。愿圣女的慈爱永远与您，还有我同在！
E: Yes! Safe travels, noble priest. May the Holy Maiden's mercy be with you, and with me as well!

C: 不知道灰宝有没有听说过我的先祖，「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝？
E: I wonder if you've heard of my ancestor, Seliose the Daythunder Knight?

C: 令旗…是什么？
E: Banners? ...What are those?

C: 倒不是有多喜欢收藏古玩…练习鉴宝，总需要批量收购那些似真似假的货品。只是，或许是我运气不佳，往往买下一麻袋，满满的全是赝品……
E: It's not that I'm particularly fond of collecting antiques... Practicing appraisal requires buying lots of items that might or might not be genuine. But, perhaps due to my bad luck, I often end up with a whole sack full of fakes...

C: 我错了，请不要让我赔偿。
E: I'm sorry! Please don't make me pay for damages!

C: 实不相瞒，这确实就是正事。
E: Honestly, these are serious matters.

C: 这么说吧，有些钱，我明知道他们还不上，但还是会借，你知道为什么吗？
E: Let me put it this way — some money I know they won't be able to pay back, but I still lend it to them. Do you know why?

C: 自己喜欢的就能赚钱？
E: You mean if you like it, it'll sell?

C: 这是留在密底斯泰歇附近的铭文——
E: This is an engraving near Mythemis —

C: 的确，但并非奥赫玛的贵族——奥德里西安的「门瑟」世家，以律法的名义，向你致意。
E: Indeed, but not of Okhema. In the name of the law, House Mentes of Odressian greets you.

C: 再创世之后的世界啊…届时的人们会去往哪里呢？
E: The world after the Era Nova... Where will people go then?

C: 别自责，你已经尽己所能了。
E: It's not your fault. You've done everything you can.

C: 新世界？什么新世界？
E: New world? What new world?

C: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
E: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but this requires consuming <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>.

C: 不过，既然仍有说笑的余力，看来你的确临危不惧。
E: But, since you still have the energy to joke, it seems like you're indeed unafraid in the face of danger.

C: 嗯…有位织者不甘沉沦。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云崖的一处瀑布中央</color>，与激流搏斗呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who fears no hardship. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of a waterfall on Dawncloud</color>, battling the rapids.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: 先播种，再松土。
E: Plant first, then loosen the soil.

C: 徕~哆徕嘻啦~
E: La~ do-la-ti-la~

C: 就、就是这样！我没有说大话！
E: Y—Yeah, that's right! Not bragging here!

C: 我先走了，回见。
E: I'm heading off. See you later.

C: 是吧！今年长势好得很，瞧这颜色，不比{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的裙子漂亮？
E: I know, right? The crop's looking fantastic this year. Look at that golden hue, doesn't it outshine {RUBY_B#Romantic Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s dress?

C: 呵呵，当村长，可不像你想象的那么容易。耕种、汲水都需要我来安排。妖精间起了争执，也得我来调解。
E: Hehe... being a chief isn't as easy as you think. Planting crops, drawing water — I have to handle it all. And when the fairies get into fights, I'm the one who has to break them up.

C: 贵客若能提供<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>，我 可将其化作记忆中的金丝去寻找若虫。
E: Provide me with <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>, and I'll weave them into golden threads to track down the nymphs.

C: 预言不过是被遗忘的记述，一经自我实现，就会成为记忆的一部分。
E: Prophecies are simply forgotten chronicles that, once fulfilled by one's own actions, become embedded in memory.

C: 这边这边，你看！水面上的倒影，是不是特别可爱？
E: Over here, over here, look! The reflection on the water is super cute, isn't it?

C: 哦， {NICKNAME}，来干杯吧！
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}, let's cheers to this!

C: 哦，你或许不愿听这些太过遥远的事情吧，还是把视线拉近些。
E: Oh, you probably don't want to hear about something that far away. Better zoom in on the nearer future.

C: 「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
E: In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...

C: 下次见，贵客。
E: Next time, dear guest.

C: 哦，瞧瞧…这是谁——天外的贵客、救世的英雄…您来找我可是有何指教？
E: Oh, what is this— The guest from beyond the sky. Deliverer of our salvation, what do you seek from one such as me?

C: 当然——因为本狮压根就不叫这个。
E: Of course. Because that's not my name.

C: 她在戒蜜酿。
E: She wanted to quit drinking.

C: 看见这些石碑了吗？上面记载着英雄们的终章。哪怕我没有泪腺，读完都有些热泪盈眶……
E: See these stone tablets? They record the epilogues of heroes. I may not have tear ducts, but I feel my eyes wet with tears after reading them...

C: 似乎有什么顺序嘤~
E: Looks like there's some kind of pattern here, eep~

C: 嗯…有位织者生性顽皮。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>莹骨海床的边缘</color>，假装自己被减慢了呢。
E: Hmm... There's a Weaver who is full of mischief. The golden thread brings tidings: They are perched on <color=#dbc291ff>the edge of the Seabed of Luminous Remains</color>, pretending they've been slowed.

C: 虽然真的当上服务员才发现，餐馆总是经营到很晚，一天下来脸都笑僵了，员工餐也常常忙得没空吃……
E: Though after actually becoming a server, I realized the restaurant stays open really late. By the end of each day, my smile feels frozen in place, and I'm often too busy to even eat the staff meal...

C: 呵呵…你们在吃烤饼，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
E: Hehe... you're eating pancakes, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.

C: 呵呵，下次有缘相会，再向你揭示美食的奥秘吧。
E: Hehe, next time fate brings us together, I'll reveal more culinary secrets to you.

C: 你迟早会惹上大麻烦的……
E: You're gonna get yourself into serious trouble sooner or later.

C: 我才没发呆，这叫冥想研究！
E: I'm not daydreaming. This is called a meditation experiment!

C: 两个月也太久了吧…我追求了她七年，好不容易求婚成功，现在真是一刻钟也等不下去了！
E: Two months is too long, surely...? I have been pursuing her for seven years and she finally said yes to my marriage proposal. I simply cannot wait another minute!

C: 啧…你这手气也太离谱了，怕不是出千了吧？！
E: Tsk... This kind of luck just isn't right. Are you sure you're not cheating!?

C: 噢噢…唱得真好…但和我年轻时还有差距，要想让人如沐神恩，就得像我这样，练习从腹部发声……
E: Oh... beautifully sung... but still a bit off from when I was young. To make people feel the divine grace, you have to practice singing from your abdomen, like I do...

C: 老奶奶，我能理解你的心情…不过世界运转的底层逻辑，有时候就是「浪费」。
E: I understand how you feel... However, the logic that the world operates on is sometimes just "letting things go to waste."

C: 嗷！嗷呜！
E: Aw! Awoo!

C: 我们要好好表现才行！
E: We'd better do a good job!

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 你有什么想问的，就尽管问吧。只要是我知道的，都会为你解答的。
E: Let me know if you have any questions. I'll tell you everything I know.

C: 是…哪个领域方面的知识？我不是通识类学者……
E: In what field of study? I am not a general scholar...

C: 我能从现实中，考究到星神存在的蛛丝马迹，就已经很满足了。
E: I am already happy that I managed to find clues about the existence of Aeons.

C: 放心，什么时候该冲，什么时候该逃，我心里有谱得很。
E: Don't worry about me, I know very well when I should act and when I should bolt.

C: 你这可算是问对人了。能够解答这个问题了，全空间站恐怕只有我世玲一人！
E: You're asking the right person. I've gotta be the only person in the space station who can answer this question!

C: 嗷呜～荒笛大人沉默的时光都太长了，它开口说话的时刻都弥足珍贵。
E: Awoo~ Lord Terravox often remains silent, so much so that every moment they speak is absolutely precious.

C: 嗷呜…即便那意味着舍弃那与生俱来的使命，它也绝无后悔。
E: Awoo... Even if it meant abandoning their innate duty, they had absolutely no regrets.

C: 还是说，其实是我在天花板上？真是难理解喀…
E: Or wait... am I actually on the ceiling? This is so confusing, crrk...

C: 我正在进行不踩红色地块的挑战。
E: I'm doing the no-stepping-on-red-tiles challenge.

C: 这是飞一样的感觉…
E: This feels like flying...
Woah. It's in the shape of an "8"!

C: 嗯…有位织者思虑良久。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>水流下方</color>，思考场景中的疑点呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who has been deep in thought. The golden thread brings tidings: It's <color=#dbc291ff>beneath the running water</color>, pondering over the peculiarities in the area.

C: 「将泰坦的还给泰坦，却不必物归原主。」
E: "Render unto the Titans what is the Titans,' yet not necessarily to their original owners."

C: 可以肯定，会把风冷和水冷系统装在一起的人，一定是位狂野派。至少看现状，很好地集成了它们的缺点。
E: For sure, anyone who'd put air and water cooling systems together must be a real maverick. And looking at how things turned out, they've managed to perfectly combine the worst of both worlds.

C: 对了…利波、利波正在为您与英雄们书写一本诗集，好让诸位的事迹为后世所传唱…序章题词的话，利波想交给赫西俄德老师创作，您觉得怎么样？
E: Oh right... I'm writing a collection of poems about you and the heroes, so your deeds can be passed down through the ages... For the prologue's inscription, I was thinking of asking Master Hesiod to compose it. What do you think?

C: 咱们这叫与时俱进——您想想，比起遥不可及的泰坦，可不是身边的英雄更有噱…咳、我是说，更有亲切感嘛！
E: This is what we call keeping up with the times. Think about it, compared to those distant Titans, isn't a hero close to home more gimmick... *ahem* I mean, more relatable!

C: 听什么听，一边玩…嗯？是你啊，年轻人！好久不见，来找我们聊天啦？
E: What are you listening t— Oh? Is that you, young one! Long time no see. Came by for a chat?

C: 不是刻板印象啊，但我听说那个学派的人都讲究「在物理上强有力地击倒对手」，就我家那俩不省心的，跟他们待久怕不是得拆房子了……
E: Not to stereotype, but I heard the folks from that school are all about "physically overpowering their opponents." With those two troublemakers at home, I'm worried they'll end up demolishing the house if they hang around them too long...

C: 果然，即便到了现在，我还是讨厌你那一身铜臭味！
E: Just as I thought. Even now, I still can't stand that money-grubbing stench of yours!

C: 我们喂过不同的款式，结果它们来者不拒。
E: We've fed them all kinds, and they gobbled up every batch without hesitation.

C: 谢了朋友，我确实挺有兴趣的，但我们已经看过太多遍了…抱歉。
E: Thanks, friend. I'm quite interested indeed, but we've seen it way too many times already... Sorry.

C: 一切都已经随风而逝了…
E: It's all gone with the wind now...

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「希望你看到它的时候，就想起豹豹可爱的模样，记得常回来找我们玩嗷。」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "Hope this reminds you of our adorable faces whenever you see it! Make sure to come back and play with us!" )∋

C: 我以为见不到你了……
E: I thought I'd never see you again...

C: 有的有的，这样的书我还看过好几本。像什么《我的逐火之旅果然有问题》、《凯撒陛下的专属剑姬》、《神明学校的逃课猫咪》……
E: Of course, I've read quite a few books like that. Stuff like Something's Wrong with My Flame-Chase Journey, The Imperator's Personal Blade Maiden, The Class-Skipping Cat at Divine Academy...

C: 这副身躯踏上一片全新的净地时，食欲竟也在一瞬间旺盛地涌来。
E: As this body stepped onto this pristine new land, a sudden surge of hunger washed over me.

C: 嗯…有位织者摔伤受困。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>坍塌的天花板碎石边</color>哀嚎伤痛呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who got injured and trapped. The golden thread brings tidings: They're wailing in pain beside a <color=#dbc291ff>collapsed ceiling rubble</color>.

C: 造物主天衣无缝的演算中，本不该出现此等变量——但在每段旅程的终点，那位英雄都会向命运发起反抗，一遍又一遍……
E: In the Creator's flawless calculations, such variables were never meant to exist. Yet at the end of each journey, that hero would defy destiny, time and time again...

C: 怎么了，{NICKNAME}？
E: What is it, {NICKNAME}?

C: 因此，只有直接从虚数中获取能量的星神以及被星神赐福的令使能够穿过被虚数能量填充的空域，进行星际旅行。也因此，每个诞生文明的星球才如此相似。
E: Therefore, only Aeons, who draw their energy from the imaginary, and Emanators, who are blessed by Aeons, can travel through the spaces filled with imaginary energy. That's why planets where civilizations exist are so similar.

C: 但是直觉警告他，要他快走，于是他搭上「悲悼伶人」的船，逃离了公司，几经辗转来到列车。这是他待得最久的地方。
E: So he boarded the ship of a troupe called the "Mourning Actors" and escaped the IPC. After a while he made his way to the Express, and he's stayed here longer than anywhere else.

C: 随后我就在镜头里发现一个亮斑划过天空。我本以为那是一颗流星，没什么特别的。
E: Then, using a telescope, I saw a bright spot streak across the sky. I thought it was a comet and thought nothing of it.

C: 不好意思，没看过。
E: Sorry, I haven't read it.

C: 这点儿耐心都没有吗？
E: Don't you have any patience?

C: （应该不可能是爆炸物吧……）
E: (Surely, it can't be an actual bomb, right?)

C: （自动机兵自顾自地飞走了……）
E: (The automaton flew away on its own...)

C: 哼，少废话，矿山里的规矩就是少说多做。你来都来了，做完我就让你休息。
E: Ha, good one. We have a rule in the mines — less talking and more working. I'll however let you take a break after the work's done.

C: 这…我感觉不太行。
E: Uh... I'm not sure about this.

C: 师傅倒好，在家歇得舒服…我什么时候也能退休？
E: My master's doing well. He's relaxing at home... When can I retire too?

C: 滴答，宾客，这些赔礼给你，千万不要跟主管投诉我啊！
E: Tick-tock, please take these gifts as my apology, guest. Please don't report me to my supervisor!

C: 滴答，没有喝到苏乐达，身体反而更畅快了…看来汽水也不是非喝不可嘛！
E: Tick-tock, without SoulGlad in me, my body feels more free... Looks like the soda isn't essential after all!

C: 他发出了一点都不酷的哼，一定是在模仿哈努兄弟。
E: A not-very-cool "hmph" escapes his lips — he must be imitating Brother Hanu.

C: 哈哈，当然是骗你的，我只是…希望有人能看到我，能来帮帮我而已……
E: Haha, of course I'm lying to you, I just... wish that someone would see me and help me out...

C: 你怎么不说「滴、答」。
E: Why aren't you saying "tick, tock"?

C: …站长？不行不行，我一个小科员怎么敢提这种要求……
E: ...The lead researcher? No no no, how could a small fry like me go to her with something like this...

C: 那你可真厉害！我当时直奔疏散通道才捡回一条命。
E: Whoa, amazing! I bolted straight for the emergency chute to try and save my own neck.

C: 是我太天真了，那可是星核猎手啊…在信息攻防中，我的设备被对方反向植入了一种病毒，开始不受控制地向外发送信息。
E: I'm too naive, and it was a Stellaron Hunter... During the cyber-attack, a virus was uploaded to my device, and it started helplessly spamming out messages.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，我知道你会理解我~
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I knew you'd understand!

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 变回留言了…
E: Back to the messages...

C: 但画是画完了…鄙人总觉得哪里好像欠了些什么——在你看来，这画作究竟如何？
E: It's finished, but... I can't help but feel like it's missing something, somewhere. What do you think of this painting?

C: 你觉得，该给这幅画起个什么名字好呢？
E: What do you think this painting should be titled?

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。接下来这个任务，我想一定很适合你。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. I have absolute confidence that you're the right person for this next job.

C: 这次，我希望你能够帮忙收集<color=#dbc291ff>「自动机兵•甲虫」</color>的机体数据……
E: This time around, I hope you can help us retrieve some data from <color=#dbc291ff>Automaton Beetle</color>...

C: 有空的话，就去<color=#dbc291ff>博物馆修理间</color>看看吧。
E: If you're free, head over to the <color=#dbc291ff>museum workshop</color> and pay him a visit.

C: 那么，接下来是母亲大人生命中的最后一刻…但这部分克里珀堡已有定论，让我们跳过它吧。
E: So, next is the final moments of mother's life... but Qlipoth Fort already has a conclusion for this part, so let's skip it.

C: 一组过去的剪报及其附录。
E: A set of newspaper clippings and their appendices.

C: 传说在迴星港中，有两位监船工人在巡逻检视培养舱，一艘幽灵星槎缓缓驶向他们，无声无息，就像是从虚空来访的使者。
E: Legend says that at the Stargazer Navalia, a phantom starskiff had gradually and silently approached two workers when they were patrolling among the incubators. The skiff was as quiet as a messenger visiting from the void beyond.

C: 我也要谢谢你们。
E: I would like to thank you and your team too.

C: 怎么还要我干活…
E: Why do I have to work...

C: 原来只是粉…等等，我已经有粉丝了吗？！
E: So you're just a fan... Hang on, I have fans!?

C: （等它们自行离开）
E: (Wait for them to leave by themselves)

C: 怎么了？忘了使用相机的方法了吗？
E: What's wrong? Have you forgotten how to use a camera?

C: 没问题！
E: No problem!

C: 好耶！
E: Yay!

C: 当然了，我们可以先去小吃摊上垫个底，你可以先想想自个有什么想吃的，我找个空位子等你。
E: Let's start with the snack stands. You can browse around for bit — I'll go find us a seat while you make up your mind.

C: 总比什么都不做要好，{NICKNAME}，我看你很擅长动脑子，你试试嘛。
E: It's better than doing nothing. {NICKNAME}, you're smart — why don't you give it a try?

C: 这难道还不重要吗？这就很重要…没有美食的金人巷就像…就像不装药丸的葫芦，毫无意义。
E: So what!? Hmph, the food's the best bit... Aurum Alley without food would be like a pill without medicine... meaningless!

C: 真是太好了。
E: Glad to hear.

C: 哈——？这要是不道歉，传出去可不太好听呀。
E: Well...? Are you going to apologize or not?

C: 会长知道码头上最近发生的事，愿意将简单的谈判技巧传授给各位。
E: The president is aware of recent events and is willing to pass on some simple negotiation skills to you.

C: 你收到了公司的信用点，为了这点好处，你帮助公司破坏码头的运输活动。
E: You received payments from the IPC, and in exchange you sabotaged the shipping operations at the dock.

C: 金人巷码头租金？
E: The payment for the dock?

C: 呜…这小妞的嗓门好惊人，我耳膜都要穿孔了……
E: Goodness! There's no need to shout, little miss feisty — my ears are ringing!

C: 阿丰已经全部交代了。
E: We have the testimony of A-Feng.

C: 我讲不出什么大道理，只是觉得，我们应该多问问商铺的意见……
E: *sigh* I guess I don't have any special insights. I think... I think we should ask the merchants what they think.

C: 诚心诚意总是有打动人的力量。
E: A sincere heart always has the power to impress people.

C: 你想复现这里的繁荣？
E: You want to restore the Alley to its former glory?

C: …谁知道呢。同功坊多半是不会留下来的吧。
E: ...Hard to say. Chances are I'll have to sell it.

C: 辛苦了，我在准备竞标的文件，暂时抽不开身。
E: Thanks so much. I would have helped her myself, but I've been drowning in paperwork in preparation for the bidding.

C: 你放心，我和燕翠师傅谈好了，活动期间，你可以在尚滋味白吃白喝。
E: Yancui has agreed to offer you free meals throughout the crossover.

C: 迷路的孩子是什么意思啊！
E: Hey! You're trying to set the Commission on me...

C: 我还有别的事儿。
E: I have something else to do first.

C: 嗯…让小秘书再想想口号吧！我们去拍下一组。
E: Hmm, let's leave the slogan to Mingxi. We should head to the next location.

C: 看来你是真的没有灵感了。
E: You're out of ideas.

C: 你怎么知道这就是大家期望的？
E: How can you be sure that everyone's vision aligns with yours?

C: 难道各位高呼「金人巷复兴」只是自我满足吗？我不相信。
E: ...I was using a figure of speech — but our vision of "rejuvenation" will benefit the majority.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 开阔眼界是好事。
E: It's always good to broaden one's mind.

C: 很不习惯你讲大道理的样子。
E: Never heard so many wise words from you before.

C: 辛苦你这么远送过来了，就把「货物」放在这里吧。
E: Thanks for bringing it all this way. Put those "goods" over here then.

C: 我让你放下，你就放下，甚至就这样离开，难道你没有丝毫怀疑吗？
E: I told you to let it go and you just did it. You even just left like that — didn't you have the slightest of suspicions?

C: 小秘书给我说，希望美馔阁也能做一些外卖生意——商务活动餐盒、旅行餐盒、又或是那些不方便出门的客人想吃咱家的饭了，也能出外卖。
E: Miss Secretary told me that she was hoping Delicacy Pavilion could start making takeouts — things like business meals and travel lunch boxes. Customers who don't have time to eat out would have the option to have the food delivered to them.

C: 难道说，阿姨还有什么疑虑吗？
E: Are there any particular concerns?

C: 我已经准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 哦哟，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}说到点子上了。
E: Right on point, {F#young lady}{M#young man}!

C: 但是呢，那位卜官话说的可漂亮了，「咱们可是一个集体呀！加把劲，努努力，办法总比困难多！」
E: But, that diviner put it nicely — "We are a collective! Knuckle down, work hard, and there's nothing we can't get done!"

C: 这说法实在是太标准了。
E: This really is quite the bureaucratese.

C: 这小小寿考堂其实也用不了什么码头物流，我只是想表明立场而已。希望你们金人巷商会能赶走公司那些自大的家伙，让他们看看，谁才是这里的主人。
E: Our humble Longevity Hall really doesn't need any logistics. I just want to express my allegiance, that's all. I hope you and the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild can kick out those arrogant brutes from the IPC. Really show them who's the boss around here.

C: 你凭什么认为我们无力支付租金？
E: What makes you think we can't afford to pay the lease?

C: 不能够为商铺们着想的商会，是没有意义的。
E: A guild that doesn't proactively help businesses has no reason to exist.

C: 曾经的金人巷选择了「我的坚持」，它才会创造如今无法企及的商业奇迹。
E: The old Aurum Alley achieved a commercial miracle that has not yet been replicated. It did so by following my way of doing things.

C: 不会是在做什么违法的事吧？
E: Are you sure you're not doing something illegal?

C: 这路线怎么回事啊？
E: What's wrong with this route?

C: 难怪刚刚它说有化外民对机巧鸟图谋不轨，此事竟是真的……
E: No wonder it tried to warn us that some Outworlders were plotting against us cycranes. I can't believe it's true...

C: 感谢您的协助，十王司成功回收此处的「逸散岁阳」，谢礼就留在此地，希望大人笑纳。
E: Thank you for your assistance. The Ten-Lords Commission has successfully retrieved the dispersed heliobi at this area. I shall leave your reward here. I hope you receive it well.

C: 你又不是一直盯着这里！要搞恶作剧，肯定都是半夜来的啊！
E: Your eyes weren't glued to this place, were they? If I wanted to do it, I'd do it in the middle of the night!

C: 你别烦，我还要问他问题呢！这人怎么不听我提问呀？
E: Stop it, I have questions! Why doesn't this man listen to me?

C: 好像是李…哦不，是冷…哎呀，忘了！
E: Sounds like a Ree... oh, wait, no, it's a Lay... Gah, I forgot!

C: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「冰雪」</color>有关的…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
E: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>ice</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

C: 以一百位顾客最甜美的梦境为灵感，层叠交织出冰淇淋绵密浓郁的口感——这就是甜点好评榜排行第一的「零卡百层圣代」。
E: Inspired by the sweetest dreams of a hundred customers, the Zero-Calorie Hundred-Layer Sundae layers and weaves together to create a rich and indulgent ice cream texture, securing its top position on the dessert reviews list.

C: 当然不是！天哪，你真是缺了点幽默细胞…这可是「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞的广告词啊！
E: Certainly not! Oh my, you're seriously lacking a sense of humor... That's the tagline for Mr. Herring's lemon tart!

C: （来自匹诺康尼的特产美食…该送给谁好呢……？）
E: (A specialty food from Penacony... Who should I send it to...?)

C: 你们趁机发出邀请，反抗队伍扩大到了前所未有的地步。对自由和美好的追求感染了每一个人……
E: You and your team take advantage of the chaotic situation to invite the prisoners, and the number of rebels grows rapidly. Everyone's desire for freedom and a better life has been awakened.

C: 哈努兄弟一连说了三个「哼」，这大概是他言辞最为激动的一次。
E: Hanu grunts three times in a row. This is probably the most agitated he has ever spoken.

C: 这是对梦泡作品最高规格的赞赏了，感谢您！
E: That's the highest praise a dream bubble can get. Thanks!

C: 滴答，您真是个大好人，我会让下属们为您准备谢礼的！
E: Tick-tock, you're the kindest person ever! I'll have my subordinates prepare a token of appreciation for you!

C: 你似乎听到这些积木在跟你低语——「不要再扮演别人了」。
E: You seem to hear these building blocks whispering to you — "Don't pretend to be anyone else anymore."

C: 呼…您、您说的是。
E: Phew... Y—You're right.

C: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。
E: I think we've collected all the clues in this area, right? Looks like that's all of them.

C: 我渴望战斗！
E: I thirst for battle!

C: （手动换台）
E: (Switch the channel manually)

C: 你试图换台，播放乌玛和她的同事们录制好的节目，但屏幕闪烁了片刻后，却没等来你想要的频道与画面。
E: You try switching the channel to play the pre-recorded show done by Uma and her colleagues. The screen flickers for a while, but the channel you want still doesn't come on.

C: 我觉得你很有做这行的天分，想请你替我顶会儿班。有兴趣吗？
E: I think you've got the talent to ace the job. What do you say?

C: （果然舒翁不在店里…直接开始营业吧。）
E: (As expected, Siobhan is not around... Let's open for business.)

C: 但它也不能砸坏我的宝物哇，那个很重要。并且…并且……
E: But that doesn't mean he can go and smash my treasure! It was so important to me... And... and...

C: …汪？我是给你带来幸福的汽水狗狗，聪明又善良，只会讨人喜欢，不会添麻烦的哇！
E: ...Woof? I'll be the Soda Doggo that brings you happiness, who's smart and nice. I'll be friendly and won't cause any trouble, woof!

C: 唷，我回来了，{NICKNAME}！
E: Hey, I'm back, {NICKNAME}!

C: 直说吧，我也很忙的。
E: Shoot. I don't have all day.

C: 呜呜！！我知道这样很丢脸…可悲伤它始终围绕着我，我控制不住自己呜哇哇哇！
E: *sob* I know it's awkward... but I just can't shake off my grief... Waaaaah!

C: 没关系，你先去处理吧，不过可别耽搁太久，怪物们等不了那么长时间。
E: That's fine. Go ahead and do your own business. Just don't keep the monsters waiting too long.

C: 哎，我留在冷清的梦境酒店里，就是为了摆脱家族事务的烦扰，没想到，到最后还得靠在家族的身份才能保住这家酒吧。
E: Well, I chose to stay in the desolate hotel in the Dreamscape to stay away from Family issues, but in the end, I had to rely on my Family connection to protect this lounge.

C: 这既是礼物，也是开拓的使命。
E: This is both the gift and the duty of Trailblaze.

C: 玛姬你已经去世了吗？
E: Are you dead, Mag?

C: 随后，「银河强手棋」被顺利寄出，寄向了未来的无名客。
E: And so, the Cosmodyssey was sent out, delivered to the future Nameless.

C: 「秩序」的残党一事，作为亲历者的你想必已经很清楚了，选择你来协助搜查，也有保密的考虑。
E: I'm sure that you, as one of those who are involved in the incident, are highly aware of the situation regarding the Order's remnants. The decision to have you assist in the search also took confidentiality issues into consideration.

C: 呼，多亏有你在，否则我真要被他们抬出来不可。
E: *sigh* Thank goodness you're here, or else they might have had to carry me out in a board.

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 你是否有勇气与他面对源源不断的强敌，经受住《哈努战线》的挑战呢？
E: Do you have what it takes to face endless powerful enemies with him and withstand the challenge of Hanu Wars?

C: 结果他们检查完之后，我们观影区的大屏幕就被劈成了两半，美梦剧团也都变成了惊梦剧团。猎犬家系还推脱责任，说这是什么「外来者造成的破坏」，真是荒谬！
E: Guess what happened after their inspection? The screen in the theater was split in half, and the Sweet Dreams Troupe were all turned into Dreamjolt Troupe. They even tried talking their way out of it by saying the destruction was the doing of some outsiders. How ridiculous!

C: 他听到这个答案过后笑了笑，就让我离开了房间。第二天，我就收到了总制片人的任命通知…真是个神秘的人啊。
E: He chuckled at my answer before dismissing me from the room. The following day, I received the appointment notice from the executive producer... What a mysterious guy.

C: 但我也不能说这一定是流言——毕竟「钟表匠」先生做过太多让人难以预料的事情了。
E: But then again, I can't say for sure it's a mere rumor. After all, Mr. Watchmaker has done too many things that surprise us.

C: 呵，我比你了解他，我比所有人都了解他！
E: Ha, I know him better than you and everyone else!

C: 也许一切还有转机。
E: Maybe there's still a chance to turn things around.

C: 对不起……
E: I'm sorry...

C: 「但我现在想通了，你是个勇敢又善良的孩子，你的初心一定不会轻易被击垮。所以我愿意告诉你这些，告诉你我为什么要创作钟表小子——」
E: "But I've figured it out now. You are a courageous and kind child. Your pure intent will not be crushed easily. Hence, I am now willing to be truthful and tell you the reason for creating Clockie..."

C: 贵客，我明白了——钟表小子固然能给人带来快乐，但真正的快乐不是遗忘沉重和悲伤，而是在感受到悲伤之后，依然能够用释然的态度去铭记一切。
E: I understand. It is undeniable that Clockie can bring happiness to people. However, real happiness doesn't come from forgetting the sorrowful past, but from calmly embracing the past after experiencing the sorrow.

C: 我也爱你。
E: I love fudge too.

C: 大家评价很好。
E: They gave it a high rating.

C: 似乎有人看出了端倪。
E: It seems like someone has noticed the hidden message.

C: 对方点名邀您担任这部广告片的导演，方便的话就去帮帮忙吧，您的「导演技巧」肯定能借此登上更高的境界。
E: They've specially invited you to be the director of this commercial. You should go assist if you're free. Your Directorial Skills will surely be elevated to the next level with this project.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 哈努兄弟，请一起救救我的兄弟们吧！
E: Brother Hanu, please save the rest of my brothers!

C: 现在，该换我们帮助你了！
E: Now, it's time for us to shine!

C: 贪心的钟表小子——折纸小鸟都看见了，你只掉了个空瓶子而已啾！
E: Greedy lil' Clockie — origami birds see all. You only dropped an empty bottle, tweet!

C: 不知道导演是否对合作拍摄感兴趣呢？
E: I wonder if you have any interest in a film collaboration?

C: 当然，合作需要双方共同参与。我们愿将{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}你列为这部影片的总监制，你可以随时在片场查看拍摄进程与内容。
E: Of course, a partnership requires that both parties participate. We're willing to bill you, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, as the executive producer. You can check in on the progress and content at the film set at any time.

C: 谦虚了，我相信导演你的实力与品味。
E: You're too modest. I place full trust in your ability and aesthetics.

C: 你告别导演，来到下一个片场……
E: You bid the director farewell and head to the next set...
Hmph...

C: 您讲吧。
E: Go on.

C: 开始最终的剪辑。
E: Begin the final edits.

C: 咕噜噜，谢谢你，这下外传的故事就有着落了！
E: *gurgle* Thank you, this extra story finally has some legs!

C: 自己干。
E: Do it yourself.

C: 又要打白工？
E: Am I doing more unpaid overtime?

C: 有意思，但这听上去跟钟表小子的故事风格不太一样……
E: It's interesting, but it doesn't exactly give me the vibe of a Clockie story...

C: 「但他的行为却触怒了石头老板，他可不允许有人在自己的地盘上肆意妄为。卑鄙无耻的石头老板利用诡计捉住了汽水先生，把他丢进了大牢。」
E: "But his behavior angered Boss Stone, who would not allow anyone to transgress on his turf. The vile Boss Stone used a trick to capture Mr. Soda, and tossed him into a prison cell."

C: 行了，搞定！让我们看看这份外传故事——
E: Great, all done! Let's dig into the plot of this extra story then...

C: 这份剧本就交给你了，导演，继续在《美梦往事》里探索更多哈努兄弟的故事吧。
E: I'll leave the script in your good hands, then, director. Keep exploring for more Brother Hanu stories inside Dreamjoy Memoir.

C: 我从湛蓝爵士那里知道了一切…
E: Dr. Blues filled me in about everything...

C: 新剧本的超常水准…
E: The remarkable quality of the new script...

C: 晚上好，{M#英俊的先生}{F#美丽的小姐}。久仰星穹列车大名，没想到竟能在这片小小梦境中遇见…
E: Good evening, {M#dashing sir}{F#lovely miss}. I've heard so much about the Astral Express but never imagined meeting you in this little Dreamscape here...

C: ——哦，请别用那种眼神看我。这毕竟是笔买卖，不是慈善。
E: ...Oh, please don't look at me like that. It's a business, after all. This isn't a charity.

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 我们不是专业演员，感觉很难通过…要不然你试试那个吧？就是那个…钟表把戏。
E: We're not professional actors, so I think it'll be hard for us to pass... Why don't you try that thing you do? The... clockwork.

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 这么随便的引导真的没问题吗……
E: Are such haphazard instructions really okay...

C: 它这是在…说什么？
E: What exactly is he... talking about?

C: 我…没有资格成为真正的你。还是放弃吧，钟表小子！
E: I'm not qualified to be the real Clockie. Just give up, Clockie!

C: 天呐，这里到底发生了什么……
E: Aeons, what happened here...

C: 作为回礼，我也该给那位「合作伙伴」准备些礼物。
E: As a gesture of goodwill, I should prepare something for my "partner" in return.

C: 你这也别叫什么「不夜侯」了，怪难记的。回头我给你们送一块匾过来，上面写四个大字「仙舟下水」，你们必须给我挂起来。
E: And that name, "The Sleepless Earl," it's so hard to remember. How about we give you a new plaque that says "Xianzhou Slop?" It suits this place better, don't you think?

C: 啊哈哈哈…我可不算什么大侠呀。
E: Ahahaha... I'm not quite a hero yet.

C: 怎么有的师父还在嘴硬？
E: Well, well, looks like someone's finally seeing sense.

C: 你那是浪费时间吗？你是在保障星际和平公司的信誉，琥珀王的荣耀！
E: A waste of time? No, this is about safeguarding the reputation of the IPC and the honor of the Amber Lord!

C: 在那之前，三月小姐还有最后一次考试——也就是「出师试」。
E: But before that, you need to pass the final test, the graduation exam.

C: 将军教我学习剑术，每到关键的节点，他便会亲自下场与我对练，测试我水平如何。
E: When General Jing Yuan was teaching me swordplay, he used to personally spar with me during crucial moments to assess my skills.

C: 为什么是金人巷？你身边这位{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}最清楚不过了。
E: Why Aurum Alley? Well, your buddy knows the answer to that.

C: 我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。仙舟不是有首诗嘛！「烽火连三月，家书抵万金」！
E: I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here. You know that poem from the Xianzhou, right? "We like March. Her shoes are purple, she is new and high..."

C: 三月小姐也觉得这样不好，对吧？
E: You also think it's a bad idea, right Miss March?

C: 仔细想了想，尾巴大爷的提议倒也不是没有可取之处。<color=#dbc291ff>下次遇见藿藿时，再向她和尾巴大爷请教一番好了。</color>
E: After giving it some thought, I think there's something to be gleaned from Mr. Tail's suggestion. When I <color=#dbc291ff>see Huohuo again, I should ask for advice from both her and Mr. Tail.</color>

C: 藿藿急匆匆地离开了……
E: Huohuo scuttles off in a hurry...

C: 哎…马上就要和斯科特决战了，我怎么觉得自己的武艺还没什么决定性的进步呢！这样真的能打败斯科特吗？担忧！
E: ...I'm about to duel with Skott, but I always feel like my fighting skills haven't improved enough! Can I really defeat Skott? I'm starting to worry!

C: 好疼…眼前出现了幻觉…
E: So painful... I'm seeing things...

C: 当然，只要你们不还手，机甲就会毫发无损。
E: Sure thing. Provided you do not fight back, the mechs will remain undamaged.

C: 该死的公司都干了什么，让一个活生生的人变成了机器。斯科特，听我一句劝，早点离开星际和平公司吧。
E: What has the cursed IPC done? They've turned a living, breathing human into a heartless machine! Skott, take my advice and leave the IPC.

C: 别问我，我的大脑已经宕机了…
E: Don't ask me, my brain's already got BSODed...

C: …我倒是一直想问问，到底一直是谁在定价？
E: ...I've always wanted to ask, who is it that sets these costs?

C: 本不该存在于世上的奇书，既藏着疯狂与恐惧，也藏着恩惠与力量。
E: They are remarkable texts that never should have existed in this world. Not only do they contain madness and fear, they also hold blessings and power.

C: 简直就像是我们之前聊到的「绝世剑谱」一样。
E: They sound like the "ultimate sword techniques" that we were talking about earlier.

C: 我明白了。三月小姐，书中故事切莫过度回味，今日回去后，不作他想早早休息，<color=#dbc291ff>下次你来太卜司的时候，</color>我们再谈谈，如何？
E: I understand. Miss March, please do not dwell on the book's story for now. Head back home and just focus on getting an early night. Then, <color=#dbc291ff>next time you come to the Divination Commission,</color> we can discuss it again, okay?

C: 哪儿相似了？
E: How so?

C: 开始今日拍摄。
E: Let's begin today's shoot.

C: 忆质和魔阴身真的有关系么？
E: Does memoria really have a connection to being mara-struck?

C: 卢卡选手，请自信一点！
E: Luka, have more confidence in yourself!

C: 嗐，我们这不少卜者可都是当事人…瞒不住的。
E: Many of the diviners here were there... you can't hide it from us.

C: 我这段时间会先留在太卜司，因为修复玉兆还有些事需要我帮忙。
E: I'll stay at the Divination Commission for now. There are some other matters I have to handle besides restoring the jade abacus.

C: …不好意思，是我下手太重了。
E: ...Sorry, I went too hard on them.

C: 我的天啊…这是什么？摸一下！我的天啊…这是什么？摸一下！
E: Whoa... What is it? Touch it! Touch it!

C: 我们在丹鼎司耽搁了不少时间，希望没有让玲可和太卜司的人等得太久。
E: We were delayed at the Alchemy Commission. Hope we didn't keep Lynx and the Master Diviner waiting too long.

C: 嗯？问我吗？如果你不是长生种，那我猜咱们的年纪差不多大。请问有什么事吗？
E: Hmm? Are you talking to me? If you're not one of the long-life species, then I guess we're around the same age. Is there something you need?

C: 所以你做得很好，你冲上去了。
E: So you did well — you charged forth.

C: 请开始吧，青雀小姐。
E: Go ahead, Miss Qingque.

C: 期待。
E: Can't wait!

C: 真是一场激烈的战斗！如果我长了一双会冒汗的手，现在一定都湿透了！
E: What an intense battle! If I had hands that could sweat, they'd be drenched by now!

C: 波提欧将几案上的「浓茶」一饮而尽，冲卢卡挥了挥手，头也不回地离开了长街。
E: Boothill downed the "strong tea" in one gulp, waved at Luka, and left the street without looking back.

C: 放平心态，卢卡选手，就当做这是一场普通的积分赛。
E: Stay calm, Luka. Just treat this like any other regular point-based tournament.

C: 谢谢你在我第一次迷茫时为我指路。这些日子来，有无数像你一样的人为我指路，让我抵达了这一刻的擂台。你还记得咱们对空喊出的豪言壮语吗？
E: Thanks for giving me directions when I was lost. Many have done the same thing for me these last few days, and it's thanks to all of you that I'm here now. Do you still remember the lofty aspirations we yelled loudly at the sky?

C: 但在这场战斗的尾声，他突然停了下来，离开了赛场……
E: But as the fight was nearing its end, he suddenly stopped and left the arena...

C: 我赢下了所有的拳赛。可这一次，我打不赢了。
E: I've come out on top in all my fights. But this time, victory is out of my reach.

C: 两位没有走错，我们正在对嫌疑人进行紧急审讯，劳烦卢卡先生前来这边留下笔录。
E: You two are at the right place. We are currently conducting an urgent interrogation of the suspect. Mr. Luka, please come here and leave a statement.

C: 一定是有的。
E: It must.

C: 记录更新：我得知了一种对「胜利」的全新定义。提问：不杀=胜利？提问：如何定义灵魂？
E: Record update: I have learned a new definition of "victory." Question: Non-killing = victory? Question: What defines the soul?

C: 将此戒环戴上，自今日起，你便是我丹轮寺的弟子，我授你法号「善逝」。
E: Put on this ceremonial ring. From this day forth, you have become a disciple of our Claretwheel Temple. I bestow upon you the ordained name of "Sugata."

C: 善逝？
E: Sugata?

C: 先休息下。
E: Get a bit of rest.

C: 嗯。不过贝洛伯格的战术板比较简陋，没有这里的这么高科技。
E: Yep. But Belobog's Tactics Board are a little shoddier than this, not as technologically advanced.

C: 用起来还是大同小异的啦！我们就用这块战术板来简单介绍一下星天演武仪典的赛程吧～
E: They're all the same when you use them! Let's use this Tactics Board here to give you a simple brief of the Luminary Wardance's itinerary!

C: {NICKNAME}，当教练的感觉如何？
E: {NICKNAME}, how does it feel, being the coach?

C: 抱起梦貘，进入梦乡。
E: Hold the tuskpir in your arms and enter the dreamland.

C: 你刚才一瞬间就睡着了！怎么样？体验到逼真的战斗了吗？
E: You dozed off immediately! How was it? Did you get to see any hyper-realistic battles?

C: 最近一直听人提到这个地名，看来等以后我也要去一次了～
E: I keep hearing the name of that place. Looks like I'll have to go visit it too!

C: 我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。{NICKNAME}教练，首先祝贺你和卢卡选手，真是一场精彩的比赛！
E: Carmella, Interastral Peace Entertainment. Firstly, congrats to both you and Luka, Coach {NICKNAME}. It was a thrilling fight!

C: 选手休息室也叫共处一室？
E: Sharing a room? You mean the lounge for contestants, right?

C: 我听人说「萨姆」是一个人，但我对面怎么有三个「萨姆」？
E: I hear that SAM is only an individual, but why do I see three SAMs in front of me?

C: 「『铁盾』顿派菲昌英！他的盾牌非常硬！」
E: "Ironshield" Gigantus Shieldus! His shield is gigantic!

C: 尾巴大爷对我有恩。不管他为何而参赛，我都会全力以赴——这是我对他的回报。我准备上场了！
E: I am indebted to Mr. Tail. No matter the reason for his participation, I will give my best too. This is my way of repaying him. I'm ready to step onto the arena!

E: Okay, I gotta go. You focus on your matches. Huohuo and I are both waiting for the good news of you making it to the "Ringmaster's Challenge."

C: 然后，把欢呼和掌声献给我们了不起的战士——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: And then, offer your cheers and applause to our most excellent fighter — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 辛苦{NICKNAME}教练，祝卢卡选手振作起来。
E: Please keep it up, Coach {NICKNAME}. We hope Luka will make it in time.

C: 请你立刻出去！
E: Please remove yourself from the premises immediately!

C: 他们是卢卡的粉丝…
E: They are Luka's fans...

C: 您这是来报菜名了吗？演武仪典是大胃王比赛啊？

E: There's no fooling around in the final defending match. To be honest, there's a limit to how effective tactics can be. How far Luka can go completely depends on his own individual skill.

C: 不要怕，用这招一定能赢！
E: Never fear. You'll definitely win against your opponent with this move!

E: Either turn around and leave, or get over here and hit me.

C: 真是个不讲理的孩子。
