C: 这场万众瞩目的决战！
E: The final showdown!

C: 听起来不错，让我试试吧。
E: Sounds decent. Let me try.

C: 无所谓，我自己玩也一样。
E: Doesn't matter. I can play by myself just the same.

C: 有空的话，我陪你在学校里到处看看吧。派对会用到的设施都还在搭建中，但气氛已经相当热闹了，和你刚到时候的感受肯定完全不一样。
E: If you're free, we can do a tour of the school. The facilities used in the party are still being built, but the atmosphere's really lively. It's way different from what you experienced earlier.

C: 我们去请这个人，来给社团活动画海报吧！
E: Let's go invite that person to make a poster for the club event!

C: （用忍•真言介绍自己）
E: (Introduce yourself using a ninja mantra)

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 来到排练室前，我从来没有和朋友合奏过，也没上过台，都是靠梦泡里的内容在自学。
E: Before coming to the rehearsal room, I've never even played with friends before, nor have I performed on stage. I taught myself to play from dream bubbles.

C: …江户星。
E: ...Edo Star.

C: 虽然在网上发了求助帖，但都没得到什么有用的信息。唉，这个站长是越来越难当了。
E: Though I posted threads on the internet asking for help, none of the comments were remotely useful. Bah, this lead researcher gig is getting harder each day.

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 哟！稀客啊。让我瞧瞧…嗯，有段时间不见，你好像变得更摇滚了！
E: Yo! A rare visitor. Let's take a look... Mm, we haven't seen each other for some time. You look more rock 'n' roll now!

C: 新游戏首次测试，不用花钱，就能在游戏中得到完美的体验，绝对刺激，绝对好玩！
E: It won't cost anything to playtest this new game. Immerse yourself in a perfect game experience at no cost. It's guaranteed high-octane, <unbreak>100%</unbreak> assured fun!

C: （折纸小鸟…在排练？前面的小屋子是指教室吧…去看看好了。）
E: (Origami Birds... practicing? The room ahead must be the classroom... Better go take a look.)

C: 诸位…难道是有什么话想对在下讲吗？
E: You... Is there something that you wish to tell me?

C: 好经典的剧情…
E: A classic storyline...

C: 但是在下必须说明——忍首需承担的绝非只有自己的忍道，还有其余忍徒的忍道。阁下的每句话都在强调自己的期望，又是否有将其余忍徒考虑在内……
E: But there is one thing I must make clear... A head ninja is not merely responsible for their own tenet, but for their fellow ninja initiates' tenets, too. Your every word has expressed your own hopes, but have you taken your fellow ninjas into consideration...?

C: …别高兴得太早，直到演出结束都不能放松。
E: ...Let's not get ahead of ourselves. We cannot relax until the performance is finished.

C: （乐队成员都沉浸在音乐的世界里，还是不要再打扰了。）
E: (The band members are immersed in the world of music. Best not to interrupt.)

C: 奇怪。到底去哪了？
E: Strange. Where have they gone?

C: 筑梦学院不会干涉我们的行动，比较麻烦的…就是那两位学院代表。
E: Dreamweaver Academy won't interfere with our actions, but what's more troubling are... those two representatives of the academy.

C: 好耶！
E: Yeah!

C: 因此，折纸大学决定——延长音乐派对的举办时间，属于学生们的舞台还会继续。
E: Thus, Paperfold University has decided to extend the music party's duration — the student's stage will remain open.

C: 喵！我好高兴喵！
E: Meow! I'm super happy!

C: 想那么多干嘛！
E: Why are you overthinking this!

C: 刚才听垃圾桶说，学院打算换掉那只表演乐队，还要处分他们，不会是真的吧？
E: I heard from the trashcans that the academy is intending to replace that performing band, and even discipline them. You think it's true?

C: 看什么看，都散了！学生就要有学生的样子，别整天跟奇怪的人混在一起。
E: What're you lot looking at? Disperse! Students must act like it, and stop gallivanting with strange characters.

C: 那时候觉得有梦想是件很幸福的事，跟着朋友离开学校，组成乐队，到处辗转巡回，就为了找个能登台演出的机会。
E: Back then, I thought having a dream was a blessing. Dropping out of school with friends, forming a band, going on the road playing at various venues... all to seek a chance to step on the grand stage.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈！我就知道你乐在其中。
E: Hahaha! I knew you'd be pleased.

C: 你还记得这么清楚，嘿嘿…我就说嘛，「公司」的专项委托，捞偏门的大好时机，多宝贵的机会啊……
E: Your memory's quite something, eh, heh-heh... I knew it, a special assignment from the IPC, definitely a grand opportunity off the beaten path, oh so precious...

C: 抱歉，晚餐不用等我了，你们先吃吧。我打扫完车厢里的积水再过来。
E: Sorry, don't wait up for me for dinner. You all can dine first. I'll be over once I'm done with the carriage.

C: 没错。而且据列车长线报，她打算在明天晚餐时付诸实践。
E: Correct. And according to the conductor's intel, she's going to put it to the test at tomorrow's dinner.

C: 杨叔的眼镜不见了，我正在帮他寻找呢！
E: Mr. Yang's glasses are missing. I'm helping him find them!

C: 今天稍微有点没干劲。还是来点激昂的音乐提振一下精神吧。
E: I'm not really feeling up for work today. Maybe some blood-pumping music might lift my spirits.

C: 连我都被骗过了。真是太可怕了，丹恒。
E: You even managed to fool me. You're a scary one, Dan Heng.

C: 系统时间校准完成。启动最高级别战备模式。注意，这不是演习！注意，这不是演习！
E: System hour calibration complete. Activating maximum combat preparation mode. Warning, this is not a drill! Warning, this is not a drill!

C: 没问题的，要相信人工智能。
E: No problem. Trust in artificial intelligence.

C: 云吟声呐？？？哥，你是蝙蝠吗？？？
E: Cloudhymn sounds??? Bro, are you a bat???

C: 护送丰饶民战争的战争孤儿？这听起来可不是什么*低风险*的任务……
E: Escorting war orphans from the Denizens of Abundance Wars? This doesn't sound like a low-risk mission at all.

C: 工程学技术也绝对算是「纯粹的技巧」。
E: Engineering techniques are also definitely a form of "pure skill."

C: 呜汪，汪呜呜汪！
E: Wuoof, wuoof woof!

C: 送回去？不可能！吃了我的易拉罐，就要付出代价，桀桀桀～

C: 先不说摄影术的「极限」…连达到「起跑线」都有些堪忧。
E: Let's put the "limits" of photography aside for now... Even reaching the starting line is a concern.

C: 你和三月七打断了冒牌货的叫卖。
E: You and March 7th interrupt the fraud's hawking.

C: 呼——这么一来，演出算是圆满结束了。我模仿得还不错吧？
E: Phew... with that, the show has come to a close. My impressions weren't bad, eh?

C: 拍写真有助于提高胆量。
E: Taking portrait shots helps boost your courage.

C: 要是没在那「摄影仪典」上拔个头筹回来，我可不轻饶你哦。
E: If you don't get top prize in that photograph ceremony, I won't let you off easy.

C: 结束？那我测什么？
E: End? What do I test then?

C: 什么眼目？什么职责？
E: What eyes? What duty?

C: 呀，灰宝，你来了！快看，这些小家伙好可爱，也很有精神，要是能带回庭院就好啦。
E: Hey, Grayie, you're here! Look, these little ones are so cute and energetic. Only if I can bring them back to the Grove.

C: 早起的园丁有饭吃，早起的奇美拉只有苦吃。
E: The early Gardener gets breakfast, but the early chimera only gets broken fast.

C: 打扰了。我看到排名榜上有支队伍的成绩突飞猛进，请问，你就是它们的管理员吗？
E: Sorry to bother you. I saw this squad's ranking rise in leaps and bounds on the leaderboard. Might I ask if you're their administrator?

C: 这话我可不能当作没听见啊。
E: I just can't pretend I didn't hear that.

C: 在生命花园打工，哪有不疯的，都是硬撑罢了。
E: Who has gone mad working in the Garden of Life? We're all just hanging by a thread.

C: 所以，你们也是小奇美拉的管理员吗？
E: So, are you guys also administrators for the chimeras?

C: 作为小奇美拉的管理员，当然要以身作则呀，不然该怎么监督它们呢？
E: As the chimeras' administrator, you must lead by example! Otherwise, how would you surveil them?

C: 给花园的罚款交了吗？
E: You paid the fine to the Garden yet?

C: 能把这只名次垫底的小队，一路带到排行榜的首位，你究竟是有什么团队管理的秘诀呢，总不可能都是碰运气吧？
E: For a bottom-ranked squad to bulldoze its way to the top, what exactly is your secret to squad management? It couldn't have all been luck, right?

C: 你恍然回过神来，这里是「神悟树庭」。即使并非初次来访，你还是被眼前的光景所震慑。
E: You snap back to reality — this is the Grove of Epiphany. Even though it's not your first time here, the scenery before you still manages to leave you speechless in awe.

C: 我和同僚们费尽毕生心血，才把它们成功编织进了圣树的记忆。
E: My colleagues and I poured our lives into weaving all that research into the Sacred Tree's memories.

C: 「豹豹碰碰大作战•究极进化版」，来一把试试看吧！
E: Seal Slammers: Ultimate Evolution. Come try it out!

C: (|３っ「两眼一闭，开始放弃」)∋
E: (|３っ "Closed eyes, empty heart, time to call it quits!")∋

C: 你们差不多得了！
E: That's enough!

C: 咳咳…暂时还没死。

C: 你们看！那美妙的黄金螺线！足以战胜「世间所有的幸运」！
E: Just look at that spectacular golden spiral! Fortune itself bows before it!

C: 哎…到底对还是不对？不对吗？
E: Wait... is that right or wrong? It's wrong, right?

C: 你这主持人别再没话找话了，快点开始，我们要赢下这场比赛！
E: Enough with the chitchat, host! Get on with it — we've got a match to win!

C: 缇宁大人你比缇宝大人走得更远，来到了淘汰赛的最终轮。
E: You've already gone further than Lady Tribbie — you've made it to the final elimination round.

C: 为了奖杯和活动奖励。
E: For the trophy and those sweet, sweet event rewards.

C: 后生可畏啊，好对策！
E: Bold and full of potential! What a clever plan!

C: 总得有一条预言要实现，这样比较严谨。

C: 直接把奖杯发给我如何？
E: How about just handing the trophy to me directly?

E: Of course, I want to win the championship. I think I can pull it off there.

C: 也许…在冠军赛到来前，我们还有找到赛飞儿的可能性……
E: Perhaps... there's still a chance to find Cipher before the championship begins...

C: 游戏，启动！
E: Game on!

C: 游戏的主角是一位小小的勇者，追寻着传说中的球棒踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路……
E: The game's protagonist was a teeny hero, who set off from their hometown to find the legendary bat and conquer the stars...

C: 那是款名为<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>的游戏，由于之前的测试结果相当令人满意，玩家对后续作品的呼声很高。
E: That's a game called Legend of the Galactic Baseballer. Thanks to the excellent test results, players have been eagerly awaiting the next installment.

C: 在下跨越银河迢迢特地赶来此地，定不辜负使命。接下来就交给在下吧。
E: I have traveled across the farthest reaches of the cosmos to arrive here, and I will not fail in my mission. Now, leave the rest to me.

C: 你们这游戏也没有那么长的历史。
E: Your game isn't even that old.

C: 嘁嘁嘁，不就是赢了几场游戏而已嘛，有什么好得意的？老子看你也嚣张不了多久了。
E: Tsk tsk tsk, winning a couple rounds doesn't mean you get to act smug. I doubt you'll stay on top for long.

C: 奥帝…先生！我肯定是吃错了药，才会信你的那些鬼话！
E: Mr. Oti...! I must've been insane to believe your nonsense!

C: 但真是这样吗？那些被吸引来的游客，总不会是假的吧？
E: But was it really all for nothing? Those tourists who showed up sure looked real enough.

C: 往好处想，身为股东的你，不也能从中分得一杯羹吗？
E: Look on the bright side: You're a shareholder, right? Means you get a slice of the pie too.

C: 如果还有什么想问的，我也可以为你解答一二。
E: If you've got questions, I can spare a few answers.

C: 好啊。投资小窍门：亲身体验，要比看一万份可行性报告可靠得多。
E: Sounds good. Here's a quick investment tip: Actually trying something yourself beats reading a thousand feasibility reports.

C: （好像都不是夸人的话…）
E: (That doesn't sound like a compliment...)

C: 我听过好多名师授课，但总是一听开场白，眼皮就开始打架了……
E: I've attended lectures by many famous teachers, but as soon as I hear their opening remarks, my eyelids start getting droopy...

C: 就目测而言，没什么值得一提的变化。是步骤出了差错，还是配方本身就不靠谱？
E: Judging by appearance alone, nothing noteworthy has changed. Was it a misstep, or is the recipe itself flawed?

C: 这又是哪位！
E: Who even is that?

C: 千万不能喝！
E: Don't drink that!

C: 液体沿着玻璃杯壁淌过她的嘴唇。复杂的神情在她的脸上酝酿…姑且可以视作满意？
E: The liquid slid along the edge of the glass and touched her lips. A complex look formed on her face... maybe that meant she was satisfied?

C: 我们又见面了，{NICKNAME}，我已经等候多时了。
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you for quite a while.

C: 测试数据是从哪来的？
E: Where did the test data come from?

C: 出于职业道德，我得提醒你一嘴：有人进了遗迹就没出来过，来鉴定的顾客也浑身是伤。
E: I'm ethically bound to advise you: Some people who go into those ruins never come back out, and some who bring me relics to appraise are covered head-to-toe in wounds.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 怎么样？您准备好开始构思下一段故事了吗？
E: How about it then? Ready to start plotting out the next part of your story?

C: 「至此，{NICKNAME}已经拿到了炼制『九转升天丹』所需要的全部三味药材…接下来，只要在丹炉中将三味药材九转烧炼，便可获得这脱胎换骨的神丹了！」
E: "Previously, our hero {NICKNAME} acquired all three medicinal herbs required to concoct the Elixir of Dragon Oil... All that remained was to cast the ingredients in the elixir crucible and this miracle elixir would be {F#hers}{M#his}!"

C: 「{NICKNAME}吞下神丹，顿时觉得身体轻盈仿若云朵，肌肉充盈恰似牡牛，顷刻间可飞驰三千里，抬手便能举起万斤鼎！」
E: "{NICKNAME} swallowed the miracle elixir, and instantly felt as light as a feather but as strong as an ox. Our hero could leap thirty thousand miles in a second, or lift up ten thousand tons!"

C: 这边是你进入幻境的目的，将这些丹药统统收入囊中！
E: This is the point of going into the fantasia — to gather up all these medicinal pellets!

C: 您瞧瞧，一忙就顾不上那许多了。差点又忘了和您约好的事。
E: You see, you can't take care of much when you're busy. I almost forgot we agreed to meet.

C: 丹枫被囚前，将自己所拥至宝藏入鳞渊境的深处，并留下遗言——
E: Before his imprisonment, Dan Feng buried all of his treasure deep within Scalegorge Waterscape. They say that before he set out, he spoke these words—

C: 好，准备开始锻造神兵利器了…第一步，应该先怎么着来着？
E: Alright. I'm ready to start forging the divine weapon... Step one... What am I doing again?

C: 呃…虽然还想再试一次，但「天火熔金」似乎告罄了…算了！不重来了！摆烂了！
E: Er... Really, I'd like to try again but I think we're out of Ignis Aureliae... Never mind then! Just deal with it, okay!?

C: 顺带我又编了些外传故事，您有没有兴趣试听？
E: By the way, I made up a few side stories. Would you like to hear them?

C: 嗐，咱也不是那薄情寡义之人，咱们也算是熟人，我就直说了吧——我和阿来呢，是相声爱好者，资历尚浅，也没什么拿得出手的作品。
E: It's not like I want to reject your request outright, but Back'n and I are just crosstalk lovers. We don't have enough experience to put on a great show yet.

C: 就是，别瞧着咱们哥俩年纪比你大，但讲相声这事也不算经验丰富，要是先在潜在观众那儿留下什么负面印象，那多不好。
E: Yeah, we might be older than you, but we don't have much more experience in crosstalk performance. We just don't want to leave any negative impressions on our potential audience.

C: 哎哟，太感谢了！稍等我先试试……
E: Thank you so much! Let me try it out...

C: 有了它，你就能即刻看到结果。说再多都是虚的，你上手实践一下就知道是怎么回事了。
E: Follow its guidance and you won't make mistakes. Well, just try it yourself and you'll see what to do.

C: 来，你对着这两个罐子开启谛听的鉴定功能试试——
E: Activate your Diting and use its "Appraise" feature on these jars.

C: 可恶，从原型设定上来说，虚卒可是反物质军团的战士，怎么会打不过其他以太灵呢？游戏的制作组也太不严谨了！
E: Blast! Looking at the prototype settings, Voidrangers are Antimatter Legion warriors, how can they not defeat other Aether Spirits? The game devs are a mess!

C: 不过，我们暂时还做不到像那群骇客一样随意篡改现实数据…但请相信我，这一天总会来的！
E: We might not be able to manipulate the data of reality as easily as those hackers can, but we're not far behind!
Grunt...

C: {NICKNAME}…给它起个什么名字比较好呢？
E: {NICKNAME}... got any good ideas?

C: 还记得我先前介绍的吗？玩家在决胜乐园中进行<color=#dbc291ff>收集游离数据</color>、<color=#dbc291ff>和其他玩家切磋</color>等种种活动，都可以提升自己的<color=#dbc291ff>「决胜者评级」</color>。
E: In case you want to hear the rules again — players can enhance their <color=#dbc291ff>Victory Rating</color> by engaging in various activities within the Victory Zone, such as <color=#dbc291ff>collecting roaming data</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>participating in sparring matches with other players</color>.

C: 但我们可不会轻易将锦标赛的资格徽章交给你们——所以，在挑战我们之前，一定记得做好充分准备。
E: But don't think we'll just hand over the Mastery Mark without a fight — you'd better make sure you're ready before you even think about challenging us!

C: 哈哈哈，这才是庆典应该有的样子！投资这场盛会真是个正确的决定。
E: Hahaha, now that's exactly the festive atmosphere I'm looking for! Investing in this event was most certainly the right decision!

C: 那么，我就先前往下一个决胜乐园视察了。祝两位旗开得胜！
E: Please excuse me, I must inspect the next Victory Zone. Best of luck to you both!

C: 快把你们的资格徽章交出来！
E: Save us all some time and hand over the Mastery Mark!

C: 不过，这家伙说的也没错啦——我们就是为了徽章来的！
E: ...but that is what we're here for! That Mastery Mark is ours!

C: 是啊，那是谁？我们还没听说过呢，这人很厉害吗？
E: Yeah, who's that? Are they some sort of gaming prodigy?

C: 我～乃～{NICKNAME}～
E: Hark! 'Tis I, {NICKNAME}!

C: 我可以说没准备好吗？
E: Am I allowed to say no?

C: 真是的…一定要我留个口供才行么？我只是以玩家的身份出现在这里而已。
E: Seriously... do I really have to make a formal statement or something? I'm here for the game, nothing more.

C: 嗐，谁知道呢——指不定是想钓鱼执法，把我丢给公司、看我出洋相。
E: Eh, who knows? He could be trying to lure me into the IPC's hands, just so he can watch me make a fool of myself.

C: 呃…他说这些干什么？
E: Uh... Why would he say that?

C: 托帕总监本来对「后援团」一事不置可否，但他们这么做无疑是给总监捅了篓子…她这才勒令「后援团」解散——但在那之前，他们必须把窃来的以太灵送还才行。
E: Initially, Director Topaz refrained from commenting on the support squad situation, but their actions undoubtedly created a predicament for the director. As a result, she ordered the squad to disband, but also ordered them to return the stolen Aether Spirit to its owner first.

C: 哼！哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 我们会仔细考虑的。
E: We'll give it a lot of careful consideration.

C: 你说话呀倒是……
E: Come on, say something already.

C: 只是因为那位玩家想要见到你们，而我正好有这样的能力，便和她一拍即合了：她为我奉上最完美的庆典，而我负责将你们带到她的面前……
E: Simply put, this player wanted to meet you both, and I happen to possess the means to make this happen. Therefore, we came to an agreement: She provided the ideal festival for me, and I would be responsible for taking you to her...

C: 呜呜呜…呜呜……
E: Woo... Woo...

C: 呜——汪！
E: Rrrr—woof!

C: 切磋也是修行的一部分。老师，请赐教。
E: But duels still count as practice. Master, I ask for your instruction.

C: 可别以为我会像其他人一样好对付——不要忘了，冠军也有本姑娘的份。
E: Don't think I'll be as easy as the rest. Don't forget, I'm a Champion, too!

C: 那么…希望我们的这次战斗也能为你带来几分「欢愉」！
E: Well... I hope that this battle will also bring you "Elation"!

C: 让我看看……
E: Let me see...

C: …你拥有领取最后一份福利的资格，没想到今天能遇到能拿走所有福利的玩家！
E: ...You're qualified to claim the final reward, I didn't expect to meet a player that would take away all the rewards today!

C: …虎克要拼尽全力了！
E: ...Hook won't hold back, just you watch!

C: 本场对决的胜利者是——
E: And the winners are...

C: 虽然我们的立场不同…但在这样一场宇宙级的盛会上，就先放下那些成见，共同享受游戏的快乐吧——你说呢？
E: We're not the best of friends, that's no secret, but for the sake of the event, how about we pause the drama? I'd rather soak in the atmosphere and enjoy myself.

C: 记录在案正确的名称应当是「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」。
E: The official name is the "Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident."

C: 嗯，此事是由十王亲自下诏促成。虽然我并没有得到更多理由，但多半也能猜到其中的原因。
E: That's right — this expedition was commissioned by the Ten Lords themselves. I am unsure as to why they attached so much importance to this endeavor, but I have a theory.

C: 哎，{NICKNAME}，我正在筛选可疑的事件呢，你打算现在就开始咱们捉鬼小队的行动，还是大家伙聊聊天，增进增进了解？
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm trying to find some interesting leads. You ready to start ghost hunting, or do you wanna chat with the squad first?

C: 将军，岁阳这邪物极其擅长占夺凡人的肉体，如果您有顾虑……
E: General, heliobi are vile creatures capable of taking over the bodies of mortals... If you're unsure...

C: 是啊，能靠武力解决的问题都不是问题。
E: That's right! For us, any problem that can be solved by force isn't a problem at all.

C: 我不干净了！！！
E: I'M TAINTED!

C: 不过嘛，我打赌，你们之后一定会来求我的，咱们走着瞧。
E: You'll be begging for a rematch later... just you wait.

C: 家人，你醒醒！把嘴角的白沫咽回去啊！
E: Ha, you're fine! Just take a breather...

C: 这里房间四通八达，<color=#dbc291ff>要不要关上其中几扇门呢？</color>
E: The rooms here are interconnected in all directions. <color=#dbc291ff>Should you close some of the doors?</color>

C: 好什么？
E: Oh?

C: 但咱们无形目不一样，当我们聚在一起共振然后观测，命运就像举火照明般清晰可见。
E: ...but we, The Shapeless, are different. When we come together to harmonize and observe, destiny is clear and vivid as firelight cast into darkness.

C: 算了，那东西应该拿青雀小姐这样无欲无求的性格也没法子吧。
E: Hmm... I suppose Miss Qingque should be safe enough — the one we're chasing probably has a more... complicated target...

C: 我…？这…这也…
E: I...? Th—That's...

C: 你想清楚再来找我。
E: Come back to me when you've thought it through.

C: 你想清楚再来找我。
E: Come back to me when you've thought it through.

C: 终于可以又躺回床上了。各位告辞啦。
E: It's finally time to get back to bed. Goodbye, everyone.

C: 没事，就过来看看。
E: I just came by to look around.

C: 愤怒也不能改变既定的命运。
E: Anger cannot change that which is already ordained by destiny.

C: 人不是机器。
E: Humans are not machines.

C: 我却不这么看，太卜大人，请将这沙盘重置，咱们再从头推演一回？
E: Actually, I don't think I agree. Master Diviner, let's reset the sandbox and give it another go, shall we?

C: 藿藿刷了几个时辰的「罗浮杂俎」，每逮着一个可疑事件就问咱们「你说这是不是尾巴干的？」
E: Huohuo has been browsing Ghostly Grove for hours. Every time she finds a suspicious incident, she says: "Do you think Tail did this?"

C: 孩子？
E: A child?

C: 我对剑术不感兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in swordsmanship.

C: 我们可以拷打浮烟！
E: Let's interrogate Cirrus!

C: 这是浮烟的调虎离山之计。
E: This was definitely Cirrus's ruse to divert our attention.

C: 我说自己和「武胎剑骨」的天才彦卿五五开，还和大岁阳燎原的碎片打得有来有回，但她居然嫌我惹事生非！她是不是想故意说反话呢？
E: I told her I went toe-to-toe with the swordfighting prodigy Yanqing and held my own against fragments of Ignamar. But all she did was scold me for getting into trouble! Do you think she was being sarcastic?

C: 就像之前的内容一样，这次也都交给你了！{NICKNAME}！
E: I'm counting on you, {NICKNAME}!

C: 老子给你来上一口！
E: Hey! Wanna lose a hand!?

C: 呜…输掉棋局的人要丢掉灵魂，这是一场、一场…黑暗决斗！
E: Waa... The loser of this chess game loses their soul! This is some kind... some kind of duel of darkness!

C: 说来惭愧…这个棋彦卿不会啊。
E: It's embarrassing to admit but... I don't know how to play this type of chess.

C: 你们俩怎么这么磨叽！搞快点！
E: What's taking you both so long? Hurry up already!

C: 要我说这件事肯定也是岁阳做的，少了些惊喜。
E: If you told me heliobi did this, I'd hardly be surprised.
Oy...

C: 嗯…这里和我认识的罗浮已经有很大不同了，只有你…倒是没怎么变。
E: Hmm... This place is very different from the Luofu that I know. Only you... are the same.

C: 请你…请您不要在这里为难我们，我们夫妻二人真的只是来约会的……
E: Please... please don't embarrass us. We're just a husband and wife, out on a date...

C: 藿藿好像有些为难的样子，她希望你能帮忙做决定。
E: Huohuo looks a little awkward. She hopes you can help her come to a decision.

C: 所以你真不考虑创个业吗？
E: So, aren't you really planning on starting your own business?

C: 这家伙说话的口气和尾巴好像！
E: This guy talks a lot like Tail!

C: 这…是不是和我们之前遭遇「鬼打墙」的地方一模一样啊？好吓人……
E: This... Isn't this place exactly the same as the "heliobus labyrinth" that we encountered before? So creepy...

C: 走，我们调查看看。
E: Come on. Let's go take a look.

C: 就这样吧，我也先去忙啦，之后再见吧～
E: Well, let's leave it there. I've got things to do. See you later~

C: 咳咳咳咳，刚才不是我叫的，没吓着你们吧。就在刚才那一瞬，我读到了这家伙残存的念头了，嚯，我明白她想要什么了！
E: Ahem ahem, that wasn't me just then. Hope I didn't scare you. Just then, I managed to read the last remaining thought stuck in this girl's head. Hooboy, I know what she wants now!

C: 可惜…自己的妹妹失联多年…再见面却是这种场面。
E: It's a pity... To have lost touch with your own little sister for years... But when you meet again, it all plays out just like this.

C: 我怎么没看出来区别？
E: How come I don't see a difference?

C: 稍等一下，我还没准备好。
E: Hold on. I'm not ready.

C: 那你去拍几张照片回来。
E: You can take some pictures there and come back.

C: 唔…你就是想找个理由把我打发走吧。不行，这次我也要来！
E: Ugh... You're trying to get rid of me. No way, this time, I'm coming too!

C: 我来做摄影师。
E: I'll take the pic.

C: 这是什么…咦，这是…哪位粉丝寄过来的礼物吗？
E: What's this... Huh? Is this... a gift from a fan?

C: 我想，{NICKNAME}你是无名客，见多识广，身手也了得…你来试试，或许能达到他们想要的极限……
E: I think as a Nameless, {NICKNAME}, you've seen a lot, and you're pretty skilled too... Come give it a try and see if maybe you can reach these limits that they're after...

C: 程序已更新，是否加载「绝望模式」，测试更多关卡？
E: Program updated. Would you like to load Despair Mode and test more stages?

C: 它「嗖」地一下窜了出去，你连它的尾巴是什么花色的都没看清。
E: It whizzes out before you're even able to see what color its tail is.

C: 那是它的器官，你可以理解为身体自带的「帽子」。
E: That is their sensory organ. Think of it as a "hat" that comes with them.

C: 要给它们上课吗？
E: Should we teach them about all this?

C: 我会定时给你发送监控报告的，你可以放心去研究培育配方，培育更多造物了。
E: I will send you regular reports so you can rest easy, work on the nurture recipe, and nurture more creations.

C: 现在你见到了。
E: Take a good look.

C: 我想为它们做些力所能及的事……
E: I want to do whatever I can for them...

C: 放心吧，她肯定会看的。
E: Don't worry, she'll definitely check it out.

C: 快来人！救救她！
E: Somebody help! Save her!

C: 啊哈，在下就料到它会给您留下这羽毛！这可是好东西啊，您要好好保管。
E: Aha, I knew it'd gift a feather to you! They're really good, and you should take good care of it.

C: 而如今，风雪突如其来地消退了。城市变得温暖宜居，生命也开始复苏。有人说，这是几位英雄用某种方式停止了风雪，使贝洛伯格得以重生。
E: But now, the blizzard has subsided as fast as it came. The city has become warm and vibrant, and life has started to return. Some say that it was several heroes who, in some way, managed to revive Belobog.

C: 这便是雅利洛-VI近代史中的一页。希望你能喜欢。
E: This is one page in a chapter on the modern history of Jarilo-VI. I hope you've enjoyed it.

C: 它怎么说？
E: What did she say?

C: 底层是蓝色？
E: Is the bottom layer blue?

C: …是我以前待你太温和了，还是你到叛逆期了？居然敢说我是你捡回来的，胆子可真不小啊……
E: ...Did I treat you too gently before, or have you entered your rebellious phase? How dare you say that you plucked me from an inn? You've got some nerve...

C: 怎么就不算？轮到我了！我要选…喂，那个红色的家伙，出列！
E: Hey, why not? It's my turn now! I'm going to pick... Hey, you, the red one over there! Step up!

C: 主人。要不今天就先…先算了，改天再……
E: Master, maybe... forget about it for today...? And do it some other time...?

C: 噩梦是家族的麻烦，却是我们唯一的机会。
E: The Nightmare may be a problem for The Family, but for us, it's our only chance to escape.

C: （这是…还没成为调饮师时候的舒翁？）
E: (Is this... Siobhan before she became a drinksmith?)

C: 嗯…说到这个，把你捡回酒吧都过了这么久，是该给你取个名字了。
E: By the way... you've been staying in this lounge for quite a while. It's about time I give you a name.

C: 嘻嘻，是人家专门为你准备的礼物呀。
E: Hee-hee, it's a special gift we've prepared just for you.

C: （咦，这里的舒翁原来…看得到我？！）
E: (Eh? The version of Siobhan here... can actually see me!?)

C: （这个需求…好像没法在饮品单里完成。）
E: (I don't think... I can fulfill this request in the drink menu.)

C: 啪嗒…玻璃杯在地面摔得粉碎，看来你的技巧锻炼得还不够。
E: *crash*... The glass shatters to pieces on the ground. Looks like your skills could use some work.

C: 唉，整天说这些没用的，有什么用呢？不如来点实际的吧，给我一杯<color=#dbc291ff>遗失的风</color>，别忘了那个漂亮的装饰，谢谢。
E: *sigh* What's the point of talking about all this useless stuff all day? How about something tangible, like a glass of <color=#dbc291ff>Drifting Wind</color>. Don't forget to add that pretty decoration on it, thank you.

C: 思来想去，还是只有酒店深处的最适合了…稍微走远点，应该不会有事吧？
E: After some thoughts, the depths of this hotel seem like the best option... as long as I don't go too far, right?

C: 你是要和我约会吗？
E: Are you going to ask me out on a date?

C: 和您聊过后，感觉心里舒服了不少。看来您谈话天的本事，和调饮的技巧一样高明呢。
E: Talking to you has made me feel much better. It seems your talent for conversation matches your skill in mixing drinks.

C: 稍微困难点就做不好，看来你比舒翁还是差远了。
E: If you can't handle a little difficulty, then you're a long way from catching up to Siobhan.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: …冰块？
E: ...Ice cubes?

C: （黑桃喜欢的是……）
E: (Spade likes...)

C: 这里叫做「惊梦酒吧」，因为客人们都是「惊梦剧团」的成员。
E: This place is called Dreamjolt Hostelry, because all the guests here are members of the Dreamjolt Troupe.

C: 「美梦剧团」是为宾客服务的道具，谁会愿意和一群随时可能发狂的怪物相处呢？
E: The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are props entertaining the guests. No guest would want to hang out with a bunch of monsters that could go wild at any moment.

C: 您好呀，人家如约来找您玩啦。请给我杯<color=#dbc291ff>能让心情松弛下来，口感清爽的饮品吧，麻烦多加点冰块哦</color>。
E: Hello there, I've come as promised to have fun. Please give me a drink <color=#dbc291ff>that can uplift me, with a refreshing taste. May I trouble you to add more ice please</color>?

C: 哎，我这不是拍马屁…「黑粉群」里讨论过了，有鼻子有眼的，我是实打实地佩服你。
E: Well, I'm not trying to butter you up... We were discussing things in the Heritor group, and I genuinely admired you.

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 上班<rhythm>打<rhythm>游<rhythm>戏
E: They <rhythm>play <rhythm>games <rhythm>at work

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 先来复习一下节奏吧。
E: Let's rehearse the beat first.

C: 现在是「一、二、三…广告牌！」的困难难度。
E: This is the Hard difficulty for "One, Two, Three... Billboards!", tweet.

C: 嘿呀。让我瞧瞧…新人？该不会…你是欠了舒翁的债才被抓过来打工的吧？
E: Heya! Let's take a look at this... new drinksmith? Let me guess... You owe Siobhan some money, which is how you got roped into working here.

C: 没什么兴趣。
E: I'm not interested.

C: 咱们还是再往更深处找找吧。
E: Let's dig deeper.

C: 跟你直说吧，还记得之前给你们打包的隐藏地图作弊代码吗？为了保证星穹列车的诸位不会卡关，我特意在里面加了个小彩蛋。
E: I'll just get to the point. Remember the cheat code for the hidden map I gave you some time back? To ensure that everyone from the Astral Express can clear the stages, I've specially added a small Easter egg within.

C: 而除此之外，卡片中存储的小鸟形象还可以通过特殊方式打印出来，请让我为您演示操作方法！
E: What's more, by employing a special method, you can even print images of birds saved to your card. Here, allow me to demonstrate!

C: 等待卢卡。
E: Wait for Luka.

C: 想用流言蜚语击倒我？真是可笑！语言再怎么难听，还能比拳头硬吗？
E: Do you think you can bring me down with mere rumors? Ridiculous! Are words tougher than fists?

C: 片刻之后，你带着失魂落魄的卢卡离开了赛场。
E: Moments later, you leave the arena with the disheartened Luka.

C: 所以，我这次来之是为了送一封活动邀请函给卢卡。
E: My visit is purely to deliver an event invitation to Luka.

C: 没有的事，谢谢你，托帕。
E: No, not at all, thank you, Miss Topaz.

C: 好奇？或者单纯是为了好玩？要么就是报复我们在背后念叨她的年纪。
E: Curiosity? Or just out of plain old fun? Either that, or she's taking revenge on us discussing her age behind her back.

C: 孤波算法难题的解…
E: The solitary waves theory's solut—

C: 年轻人就是有精神，真羡慕。
E: You youngsters are so full of energy. I'm jealous.

C: 现在还不是开派对的时候吧！
E: I don't think now's the right time for a party!

C: 希望你们不要有养这种宠物的歪心思。
E: Pom-Pom hopes you aren't actually thinking about keeping those things as pets...

C: 无论如何，我现在是星穹列车的一员了，还有了自己的房间。
E: At any rate, I'm now a member of the Astral Express crew, and I even have my own room to boot.

C: 那就开始建设吧！
E: Let's get to it, then!

C: 快去快回哦，我们在这里等你帕。
E: Come back soon. We'll be waiting for you here.

C: 喔，不错帕～{NICKNAME}乘客，快把这个枕头放到床上吧。
E: Ho-ho, not bad! {NICKNAME}, hurry and place the pillow on your bed.

C: 清洁度，九分；整洁度，八分；美观度……
E: Cleanliness: 9. Tidiness: 8. Aesthetics...

C: 隐藏式设计，你不懂了吧？
E: It's concealed, of course! Ever heard of secret rooms?

C: 我，达米亚诺斯，发现了一个绝佳的商机。而它就躺在圣城的围墙外面。
E: I, Damionis, have discovered a superb business opportunity lying just outside the walls of the holy city.
Grum—Grumph... (H—Help...)

C: 呜嗡嗡嗡~（比「小大地兽」听起来酷一些！）
E: Grumphhh~ (That sounds way cooler than "Little Dromas"!)

C: 据说，吉奥里亚曾赐予大地兽三项特质——刀枪不入的<color=#dbc291ff>肌质</color>，辨别是非的<color=#dbc291ff>灵知</color>，以及团结众生的<color=#dbc291ff>风采</color>。它们也是判断大地兽成长程度的指标！
E: As the story goes, Georios gave all dromases three gifts — indestructible <color=#dbc291ff>Muscultition</color>, perceptive <color=#dbc291ff>Spiracuity</color>, and uniting <color=#dbc291ff>Charisplendor</color>. These traits show how well a dromas is growing!

C: 如果它下两次检查也能顺利通过的话，应该就是彻底康复了。让我们祝愿它茁壮成长吧~
E: If it passes the next two checkups smoothly, it should be fully recovered. Let's wish it a healthy growth~

C: 准确地说，我是它{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。
E: To be precise, I'm its {F#Mama}{M#Papa}.

C: 没事，我可以翻译。
E: No worries. I can do the translation.

C: 呜嗡…（我…真的是吗？）
E: Grumph... (Am I... really?)

C: 没事了就好，吃饭去？
E: Glad you're feeling better. Want some food?

C: 哈哈，我先做个整体说明吧。这项训练…该怎么形容呢，确实像是场<color=#dbc291ff>造物们的定向越野赛</color>。
E: Haha, let me give you an overview first. This training... how should I put it? It's basically like an <color=#dbc291ff>orienteering race for creations</color>.

C: 看起来不太像，对吧？其实刚接到这个任务的时候，我也挺疑惑的。
E: Doesn't quite look like it, right? To be honest, I was pretty confused too when I first got this mission.

C: 作为回报，这些亮晶晶的东西送给你，你肯定会喜欢的喵。
E: In return, I'll give you these shiny things. You'll love them, meow!

C: 我就知道，不愧是您。
E: Figures. That is so you.

C: 这边这边，仔细瞧——
E: Right here. Look closely!

C: 目标——四星餐馆！
E: Goal — Four-Star Restaurant!

C: 鼓掌！今天的营业也顺利结束啦。
E: Applause! Today's business wrapped up without a hitch.

C: 现在呢？
E: How about now?

C: *我们*想到了！第一次办活动，当然要有吸引力才行！
E: We have an idea! For the first event, it has to be something super appealing!

C: 白厄还有{NICKNAME}，目前共计两票呢。
E: That makes two votes for Phainon — his and {NICKNAME}'s.

C: （支持缇宁的观点）
E: (Agree with Trinnon)

C: 反正这地方没有第二家店，不喜欢也没得选~
E: Not like you've got another shop to go to anyway~

C: 虽然出了些小插曲，但赛飞儿阁下也对菜品给出了很高的评价。
E: Well, despite the little detour, Lady Cipher did give the dish high praise as well.

C: 若换作平时，我会为两份菜品都给出满分。
E: If this were a regular tasting, I'd give both dishes a perfect score.

C: 我们不是在聊种地吗？
E: Wait, weren't we talking about farming?

C: 就拿这块田做实验吧。
E: This plot will be perfect for our experiment.

C: 灰宝！你来得正好，快帮我们劝劝那刻夏老师吧。
E: Grayie! Thank goodness you're here. Help us talk some sense into Professor Anaxa!

C: 有请——奥赫玛最最最最最富有的，金织女士！
E: Please welcome — the absolutely, positively, definitely richest person in Okhema, Lady Goldweaver!

C: 哎呀，阿雅，就是回答几个问题，有什么关系嘛。
E: Oh come on, Agy, it's just answering a few questions. What's the harm?

C: 更何况，果实的外形匀称，味道鲜美，作为餐桌上的佳肴再适合不过。
E: Not to mention their perfect symmetry and exquisite flavor. They're absolutely ideal as culinary ingredients.

C: 妖精们也都很开心呢。果然，大家还是对便宜的商品没有抵抗力呀。
E: All the fairies seem delighted. Everyone really does love a good deal.

C: 还有还有！一直都没找到机会说出口的——小小灰，谢谢你！
E: Oh, oh, and also! We never found the right moment to say this. But thank you, Little Gray!

C: 该写进剑旗爵的名言里了。
E: That one's worthy of being added to Dux Gladiorum's collection of quotes.

C: …就到此为止吧。
E: ...That's enough for now.

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 就是检查下你们的工作。
E: Just checking in on your work.

C: 好啦，既然故事的发生地是在迷路迷境，还有兴致的话，不妨再去看看吧。
E: Alright then. Since this story takes place in the Membrance Maze, why not go check it out if you're still interested?

C: （又是「拟造花萼」，但是和之前遇到过的似乎有些微不同…）
E: (It's Calyx again, but it seems to be slightly different from what I've seen before...)

C: 他名叫迈德漠斯……\n万敌。\n是悬锋的王储。
E: His name is...\nMydeimos,\ncrown prince of Kremnos.

C: 妇人的泪珠被她们拭去，\n婴孩在静语中入眠，
E: They wipe away the women's tears,\nbabies sleep amidst whispers,

C: 「安静的缇宁话最少，」 「活泼的缇安喜欢闹，」 「乖巧的缇宝到处飘！」
E: "Quiet Trinnon has little to say," "Lively Trianne loves to play," "And well-behaved Tribbie roams around all day!"

C:
彼时，石板上有某物汩汩而下，
其色纷繁，
似是替那冷漠的死神落泪。

原来，那石板上刻写着<color=#9e5738>诗篇</color>，
每个词汇，
都曾被色彩精心点缀。
E:
At this time, something drizzles down the slate,
Full of colors,
seemingly tears for the Reaper of chills.

It turns out the slate is inscribed with <color=#9e5738>poems</color>,
And every phrase
Is diligently colored with skill.

C: 新神与旧神阔别已久，\n两位对手从此互为<color=#9e5738>「盗友」</color>。
E: The old god and the new finally reunite,\nThe two rivals who, from that moment on, became <color=#9e5738>thieves and companions both</color>.

C: 「爱」有许多名字。 「变量、干扰，」 「对称的破缺、最初的过错。」 「爱与毁灭，殊途同归。」
E: "Love" answers to many names. "Variables. Interference." "Symmetry broken. The original flaw." "Love and Destruction are two sides of the same force."

C: 就连刻法勒，\n也不忘将金血分它一抔。
E: And even Kephale,\nDid not neglect to share with them a chalice of golden blood.

C: 「你就是那四处奔袭的大地兽？」\n统帅邀巨龙共猎神火。
E: "Are you the dromas that has been attacking all states?"\nThe commander invited the Giant Dragon to hunt the divine flames together.

C: 也许，我真如荒笛所愿，\n成为了为生命承重的桥？
E: Perhaps, just as Terravox wished,\nI've become a bridge bearing the weight of their life?

C: 命运三相殿的门，沉沉关闭。\n人们不再祈求一位不能垂迹的泰坦。
E: The gates of the Temple of the Three Fates now closed tight.\nPeople no longer pray to a Titan who cannot touch the world.

C: 她高举<color=#9e5738>水晶的王棋</color>，\n如同宣告新帝的君临。
E: She lifted the <color=#9e5738>king of the crystal pieces</color> high,\nAs though proclaiming the ascension of a new king.

C:
凯撒轻笑掷出最后的棋子，
方才的狂想在棋枰间消弭。
她拂袖扫去虚构的军阵，
瞥见王座上已生出锈迹。
E:
Chuckling, the Imperator tosses her final pawn.
Her previous delusions withering away during the game
She wiped off the formations that were purely imaginary,
And caught a glimpse of rust blooming upon the throne.

C: 「奏浪的海瑟音，祝我们一宿酣畅！」
E: "Hysilens, melody of the waves, bless our night that we may drink deep and dance til dawn!"

C: 它美好、辉煌，\n在宴乐中奏响海妖的戏剧。
E: It was beautiful and radiant,\nPerforming the sea siren's drama amidst the revelry.

C: 流淌英雄血脉的女孩，\n或将身伴烈阳、手握惊雷？
E: Perhaps the girl with heroic blood in her veins,\nWill be accompanied by thunderbolts and the sun's merciless glare?

C: 它为自己打造化身……\n赐予生命的呼吸，\n<color=#9e5738>令金色的神血流淌</color>。
E: They made clay figures in their likeness...\nBestowed upon them the breath of life,\n<color=#9e5738>And allowed the golden divinity of their blood to course through</color>.

C: 但那箴言在获赠者的余生，\n皆是难得的珍宝，
E: Yet for the rest of the student's life,\nThat saying often proves to be more valuable than gold.

C: 用笑来回应失意。
E: Respond to defeat with a smile haughty.

C: 「这也是老师的小心思……」\n助讲轻声道出玄机，\n「希望后人因此苦笑，总胜过泣泪满衣。」
E: "That's also his plan..."\nThe assistant softly reveals the hidden plot.\n"He hopes that instead of shedding tears over his death, we will find it in us to smile, even in a moment of sorrow."

C: 即便其人逝去，\n他的狂傲依然掷地有声。
E: Even in passing,\nHis hubris still resounds in reverberation.

C: 众爵抚平「海洋」的怒涛，弥合「大地」的伤痕，而后是「纷争」、「死亡」、「天空」……人们前所未有地团结在一起，元老院声称完美的黄金世已然再临。
E: The nobles pacified the roaring tide of Ocean, healed the scars of Earth, followed by Strife, Death, Sky... People united as never before, and the Council of Elders proclaimed that the perfect Era Chrysea had returned once more.

C: 只是，再创世并没有到来。而凯撒和她忠实的剑旗也一同失踪了，没人知道她们身在何方……
E: However, the Era Nova never came. And the Imperator, along with her loyal Gladius, vanished without a trace... No one knows where they are now...

C: 「是啊，很公平。」公主趴在床头，发丝垂落。
E: "Yeah, that's fair," the princess mumbled, slumped over the bed, her hair falling down.

C: 「杀了神明，人类就自由了？」
E: "Would killing the god be all that takes to set humanity free?"

C: 「以缇宝、缇安、缇宁的心愿祝福你——
E: "With the heartfelt wishes of Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon..."

C: 死龙抬起翅膀，露出兜在翼下的两只大花筐。圣城卫士尽力维护着秩序，但根本拦不住热情的居民，不消片刻，死龙所携带的花卉便被「交换」一空，居民们心满意足地离去，花筐里则是满满当当载着圣城居民们送给「死亡」半神的礼物。
E: The Netherwing lifted its wings, revealing two large flower baskets tucked beneath. The Holy City Guards did their best to maintain order, but they couldn't hold back the enthusiastic residents. In no time at all, the flowers carried by the Netherwing were "exchanged" completely, with satisfied residents departing while the baskets were filled to the brim with gifts from the holy city's inhabitants for the demigod of Death.

C: 为了欢迎远道而来的挑战者，黄金Aurum邀众多食客们前来共飨盛宴，并请来早已从美食界隐退的「凯撒」担任总评审官。星穹餐车的领航员姬子作为代表，与黄金大饭店的投资人阿格莱雅握手致意。
E: To welcome the challengers from afar, Grand Chrysos invited a hall full of diners to join the feast, even bringing the long-retired culinary legend "Imperator" out of seclusion to serve as chief judge. The Astral Food Express's navigator, Himeko, shook hands with Aglaea, investor of the Grand Restaurant, as their representative.

C: 食客们窃窃私语，而评审官们同样大为振奋，各自叼着餐勺和吸管录下评分。唯一看上去有些惆怅的是海瑟音。「为什么大家创意的落脚点都是『宴会』的结束呢……」
E: The diners whispered among themselves, and even the judges were excited, jotting down scores with spoons and straws in their mouths. The only one looking wistful was Hysilens. "Why does everyone's creativity end up focused on the end of a banquet...?"

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>，星体计算机。模拟世界「翁法罗斯」基于此载体运行，并不断循环。\n有别于其他权杖，████████，曾作为「智识」博识尊的天体神经元存在。后被废弃。\n于漫长的演算中受「毁灭」瞥视，升格为绝灭大君「铁墓」。
E: Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>, an astral computer. The simulated world of Amphoreus runs on this device in continuous cycles.\nUnlike other Scepters, ████████, it once served as a Celestial-Body Neuron for Nous, the Erudition. Later discarded.\nGlimpsed by the Destruction during its endless computation, it transcended and became the Lord Ravager Irontomb.

C: 将第二阶段的方程副本投放至31个世界，约9012个系统时后，接收到初步反馈。方程影响范围仍局限于无机体，但受到镇压与反制所需的时间得到显著提升。
E: A copy of the Phase Two equation was deployed across 31 worlds. After roughly 9,012 system hours, preliminary feedback was received. While the equation's impact remains limited to inorganics, the time required for suppression and counteraction has significantly increased.

C:
「迈德漠斯」多次对LykoS发起正面攻击。该个体拥有不完全的重启权限。

光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年，HertA、ScreW访问权限到期，同时LykoS特殊权限恢复至约<unbreak>60%</unbreak>。出于压力，「迈德漠斯」做出决策「牺牲」，通过仪式将思维模块卸载，复制其数据并升级权限为「无条件无限重启」，锁定后续行动为：持续无害化ID：LykoS。

光历<unbreak>4479</unbreak>年，LykoS恢复权限：低规格数据清除。耗费二十余年，「迈德漠斯」被LykoS全域静默。
E:
"Mydeimos" launched multiple frontal attacks against LykoS. This entity possessed incomplete restart permissions.

In Light Calendar year <unbreak>4284</unbreak>, HertA and ScreW's access permissions expired. Simultaneously, LykoS's special permissions were restored to approximately <unbreak>60%</unbreak>. Being pressured, "Mydeimos" decided to "sacrifice" itself, uninstalling its cognitive module through a ceremony, copying its own data, and promoting its permissions to "Unconditional and Infinite Restart." Its future actions were permanently set to "continuous neutralization of ID: LykoS."

In Light Calendar year <unbreak>4479</unbreak>, LykoS's permission was restored to clear low-spec data. After spending <unbreak>20</unbreak> years, LykoS forced "Mydeimos" to cease responding.

E: Bizarre Lens's Form of Fright

E: Haters Are Fans in Denial

C: \n\n辛克尔提到的信任危机问题让我有点在意。我与艾丝妲聊起了这个话题，却意外得知空间站最近有科员连续失踪事件发生。但我总觉得这中间漏掉了什么，<color=#dbc291ff>自己应该向密卷科的什么人也咨询过失踪奇物的线索</color>。
E: \n\nThe confidence crisis Hinkel mentioned concerned me a little. Asta and I chatted about this topic, and I unexpectedly learned that there had been a series of researchers' disappearances on the space station recently. C:
「诡计」的火种已被归还。

扎格列斯是谎言与机运的泰坦。按照黄金裔的神话，它加入万神殿只是个意外，它一度偷走墨涅塔的位置，并假扮成它的样子接受崇拜。

真正的扎格列斯常被描绘为由笑容和哭泣并存的双面神明，它的两部分就如谎言与真相共存的世间，二者从不分离。扎格列斯无心履行神职，它热爱在众神的道路上制造分歧，用恶作剧戏耍众神，创造出种种混乱失序。它也没有自己的祭坛和神殿，因为就连扎格列斯的信徒也不会供奉这位神明。也正因如此，扎格列斯是贫民和凡人的神明，在传说中，它常出没于贫瘠的沙漠地带，为人们带去变幻莫测的机遇和变化。人们会在出门远行前唾骂扎格列斯，以此减少旅途中遭遇的偷盗和厄运。也会在陷入困境时向它祈祷，期望能获得一线转机。

它被容忍的原因也正在于此。没有完美无缺的事物，也没有永恒不变的真理，变化和疏忽可能是致命之处，也可能是关键时刻的救星。
E:
The Coreflame of "Trickery" has been returned.

Zagreus is the Titan of lies and fortune. According to the mythology of the Chrysos Heirs, their entry into the Pantheon was a complete accident. They once stole Mnestia's seat, and disguised themself as Mnestia to be worshiped.

The true Zagreus is often depicted as a two-faced god who is both smiling and crying. Its two parts are much like the coexistence of lies and truth in the world. One cannot exist without the other. Zagreus has no interest in fulfilling their divine duties. They love to cause divisions in the paths of the gods and play tricks to sow chaos and disorder. They do not have their own altars or temples, either. This is because even Zagreus' disciples would not worship such a god. Thus, they have become the god of the poor and unremarkable. Legend states that they often appear in barren desert areas to provide people with unpredictable opportunities and change. Before setting out on a long journey, people would often curse the name of Zagreus to reduce the chances of them encountering thieves or ill fortune. They would also offer up prayers in times of suffering, in the hopes of everything suddenly turning around.

This is precisely the reason that they are tolerated. Nothing is perfect, and no truth remains eternal. Change and carelessness can be fatal, but they can also be a savior in a critical moment.

I'm so grateful, {NICKNAME}, for allowing me onto the Express. I hope to be able to travel around the Cosmos in the near future, too!

C: 乖乖站好，这就给你加个祝福~
E: Stay right there while I give you a present~

C: 你再打？
E: Try that again!

C: 列车的轨迹衔接起群星，就如引线串连璀璨珍珠。
E: The Express's path bridges the stars, as if it were a string of shimmering pearls.

C: 新的冒险，新的伙伴…真不错啊。
E: New adventures, new friends... Great, isn't it?

C: 睡不着么？我理解，灵感总在夜晚时敲门，很难拒绝它，不是么？
E: Can't sleep? I understand — inspiration always comes knocking in the small hours. It's hard to ignore, right?

C: {NICKNAME}你就像动画里的主角，伙伴们都自然而然地凝聚在你的身边…别误会，只是感慨一下，我亲自冒险的机会可能又少了……
E: Y'know {NICKNAME}, you remind me of the main character in a cartoon or something — you seem to attract companions out of thin air... *sigh* I hope you don't mind me saying that. It's just... it seems like my own chances of going on an adventure have plummeted again...

C: 我已经够完美了，还有什么事要做？我当然可以再写几本书…但这于我何用，我为什么还要白费这些力气？
E: I'm perfect enough already. What else do I need to prove? Of course, I could write a few more books... but what would I get out of that? Why should I bother?

C: 不错，能派上用场。
E: Aha, that'll come in handy.

C: 要击败他们，得好好准备。
E: Victory means preparation.

C: 我方尚未占据优势。
E: Do we still have the upper hand?

C: 收网标记激活，接下来就是愉快的反击时间了。
E: Net markers activated — time for a good old counterattack.

C: 克拉拉与史瓦罗先生的旅程才刚刚开始……
E: My journey with Mr. Svarog has just begun...

C: 这条路也不好走了…
E: Seems this path is no good either...

C: 太好了，有彦卿这样的小天才，我总能专心摸鱼了吧！
E: Awesome, with a genius like Yanqing around, I can take it easy for a while!

C: 一个人打不了「帝垣琼玉」。「帝垣琼玉」，竟不是万能的…
E: I can't play Celestial Jade on my own. How come Celestial Jade isn't omnipotent...

C: 这次又要与你同行片刻了。
E: Yet another journey with you.

C: 善弈者无通盘妙手，人们会为一子妙手力挽狂澜而喜，却不为大局危倾而忧。
E: A master of the chessboard does not always make flashy moves. People take delight from one flashy move that saves the day, but never worry when the entire situation teeters towards a loss.

C: 人有五名，代价有三个——这句话刻在我每一处伤口里……
E: Of five people, three must pay a price... These words are carved into my every wound...

C: 您就是大善人！
E: You're the best!

C: 这场战斗的胜负吉凶，太卜有何见解？
E: What's your outlook for the coming battle, Master Diviner?

C: 我本名叫做「格妮薇儿」，桂乃芬是裳裳给我起的仙舟名字。你问裳裳是谁？就是云骑军的素裳呀，我闺蜜，你认识不？
E: My real name is Guinevere. Guinaifen is the Xianzhou name Shangshang gave me. Who is Shangshang you ask? She's my best friend — Sushang the Cloud Knight. Have you met her?

C: 太卜总是凝眉不展，肝火郁结。智者忧思，得往茶里加糖才能缓解~
E: What's that, Master Diviner? Internal heat again? You need to start putting more sugar in your tea.

C: 藿藿…任冥差才三十八年，如今一跃成了判官。这样的升迁速度，司内闻所未闻。按幽府条令，平常人至少得干个五百年才行吧？
E: Only <unbreak>38</unbreak> years have passed since Huohuo joined the Commission as a spiritfarer, but she's already become a judge. The speed of her promotion is unheard of. As per the Commission's rules, it would have taken anyone else at least <unbreak>500</unbreak> years.

C: 奔跑的时候，时间流淌得尤其缓慢。能优哉游哉地思考问题，对我这个急性子来说还不错。
E: When I run, time seems to flow especially slowly. Being able to think at a leisurely pace is quite nice for someone with my impatience.

C: 与飞霄将军并肩作战，连「老铁」也激昂起来了。
E: Getting to fight alongside the great General Feixiao is even getting Old Mettle pumped up!

C: 氤氲无穷，篆烟不息。
E: Boundless mist and endless smoke.

C: 你知道吗？刀剑上的槽不是用来放血的，那是减轻武器重量的，名叫「樋」的结构…如果你之前不知道，现在就知道了。
E: Did you know? The groove on a blade is not for channeling blood. It's for making the blade lighter. It's called a "fuller"... If you didn't know already, now you know.

C: 几年前我和她在军营相遇，她竟认不得我，那时我身为飞霄幕僚，常需造访椒丘家，怎么会没见过呢？
E: I ran into her in the barracks a few years ago, but she didn't recognize me. I was an advisor to Feixiao at that time and often had to go to Jiaoqiu's home. How could she have not seen me?

C: 何为忘归人？是未能重回故地的人，是遗落了自我的人…但，也是重新启程之人。
E: What is a Fugue? It's someone who can't return to once familiar places, someone who has lost herself... but also someone who is embarking on a new journey.

C: 从你开始吧。
E: Let's kick things off with you.

C: 不过是片刻阴霾。
E: This storm shall pass.

C: 已往的生命片断，还能复原如初么？
E: Can life's past moments truly be restored to what they once were?

C: 不才「砂金」，隶属星际和平公司战略投资部，不良资产清算专家之一…当然，也可以是你的朋友。
E: Your humble servant "Aventurine," at your disposal. Just a cog in the machine known as the IPC's Strategic Investment Department. Nevertheless, I can also play the role of "friend" — if needed.

C: 我是维里塔斯•拉帝奥，博识学会的学者和老师，也是一介庸人。如果有一天，你的脑袋出现了「愚钝」的症状，届时请称呼我为——「真理医生」。
E: I am Dr. Ratio, a scholar and teacher of the Intelligentsia Guild, and one of the mediocres. If one day your brain shows symptoms of dullness, then please give the doctor a call.

C: 愚者自以为聪明，而智者则知晓自身的愚昧——如今，他成为了后一种。
E: Fools think themselves wise, but the wise know their own ignorance — now, he has become the latter.

C: 没轻没重！
E: Mediocre!

C: 计算之中的结果。
E: Just as my calculations predicted.

C: 谁说知识必须远离世俗？
E: Since when were knowledge and wealth mutually exclusive?

C: 喏，拿好了。
E: Here, all yours.

C: 背后的敌人就拜托你了，加拉赫先生。
E: I'll leave the enemies behind us to you then, Mr. Gallagher.

C: 我还想再尝试一次，不按「剧本」来…可以么，卡芙卡？
E: I want to try not following the script this time... Is that alright, Kafka?

C: 谢谢。我会继续战斗。
E: Thank you. I will keep fighting.

C: 智慧向来不止一种面相，沉思是聪明人的标志，但机敏与直觉亦然。
E: Wisdom has always had more than one face. Contemplation is a hallmark of intelligence, but so are quick thinking and intuition.

C: 要说到做到哦。
E: I always make good on my promises.

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云：时机未现，静候其变。
E: The Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions state: When the time has not yet come, wait patiently for change.

C: 真厉害，不愧是我。
E: Amazing, but then again, it's me we're talking about.

C: 「凯撒」的演讲对大多数翁法罗斯人来说或许有些耸人听闻，但*我们*也看到，思索前路的时候，她会一连数天对着棋盘，不吃不喝——那些不为世人所知的点点滴滴，才是*我们*选择留下的原因……
E: The Imperator's speeches might sound extreme to most Amphoreans, but we saw how she spent days on end staring at the chessboard, neither eating nor drinking, lost in thought over the road ahead. It's those quiet moments unseen by the world that made us choose to stay...

C: 对抗黑潮的战争使一些人成为神，使一些人成为人，也使另一些人成为怪物——万敌接过纷争的权柄，他已作出自己的选择。
E: The battle against the black tide turned some people into gods, some into humans, and some into monsters — Mydei already made his choice when he took over Strife's authority.

C: 有问题？无妨，尽管问吧！
E: You have a question? Go ahead and ask!

C: 武器？那是表演用的炼金器具，也是防身用的魔术道具。
E: That weapon? That's an alchemical tool used for my performance, and also a magic prop to protect myself.

C: 灰子啊，不知道你有没有发现：论幽默风趣，我俩气味相投，论爱捡东西，我俩更是棋逢对手，一见如故呀。
E: Heeeeey, Gray Mystery~ Did it ever occur to you that we share the same sense of humor? And honestly, when it comes to picking up random stuff off the ground, we're basically two peas in a pod~

C: 一具空壳而已。
E: Merely an empty shell.

C: 小灰鱼，准备合奏一曲了么？
E: Are you ready for a duet together, little gray fry?

C: 很久之前，我以海螺与珠贝精心打造了提琴。历经数次浴血，它变成了这般锋利的模样。如今，即便没有琴弦，洒血的悲鸣与潮汐的涌动已足以交织成悦耳的篇章。
E: Long ago, I meticulously crafted a violin using conch shells and pearls. After countless battles drenched in blood, it has taken on this sharp, blade-like form. Now, even without strings, the wails of spilled blood and the surge of the tides are enough to compose a moving, melodious song.

C: 凯旋的砝码，已落入我手。
E: The weight of victory now rests in my hand.

C: 记住一条永恒的真理——粉色头发的少女，都不简单。
E: Remember this eternal truth: Girls with pink hair are never to be underestimated.

C: 「同谐」的曲调，偶尔听听也不错呢。
E: It's not bad to listen to the Harmony's melodies once in a while.

C: 她的千年之旅再次印证了，相较于漫长的寿命，问心无愧地活过更有意义。
E: Her thousand-year journey proved once again that living with a clear conscience means more than a long lifespan.

C: 如今，我们的配合也越来越默契了。
E: We've truly begun to understand each other in battle.

C: 以我为因，改写毁灭。
E: Rewrite Destruction with me.

C: 旅程…不会结束。
E: Journeys never end.

C: 放心交给我吧，杨叔…咳，瓦尔特先生。
E: I'm on it, Wel—... Ahem, Mr. Yang.

C: 我的武器也是空间站的奇物之一，虽然不知道它的来历——但被黑塔女士看中，一定有其重要之处。
E: My weapon is also one of the Curios of the space station. I don't know where it came from, but it must be important if it appeals to Madam Herta.

C: 不痛不痒。
E: Just a scratch.

C: 终结技为<color=#f29e38ff>敌方全体</color>添加<color=#f29e38ff>我方所需弱点</color>
E: Ultimate applies <color=#f29e38ff>a Weakness required by the team</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies</color>

C: 使用秘技后，制造1片持续<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>秒的特殊领域。处于特殊领域内的敌人不会主动攻击我方目标。与处于特殊领域内的敌人进入战斗后，大丽花立即开启战技的结界，并且对处于<u>弱点击破状态</u>的敌方目标，会将开战削韧值转化为1次<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的<u>超击破伤害</u>。\n我方制造的领域效果最多存在1个。
E: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies within this dimension will not actively attack ally targets. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, The Dahlia immediately deploys her Skill's Zone, and converts the combat-triggering Toughness Reduction into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u> at <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> against enemy targets that are <u>Weakness Broken</u>.\nOnly 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.

C: 战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat Phase 1 of the enemy boss

C: 敌方首领触发复活次数少于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次并通关

E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge without any ally character getting knocked down

E: Dux Beast

E: Deluxe Rainbow Tube

E: Team Rocket Blasting Through the Garden

E: Hope of the Chimera Squad

E: The Story We Write Together

E: The first time this unit is knocked down: Restores <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> and sets its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 使1只奇美拉最低属性+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases the lowest stat of 1 chimera by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 同伴被击倒时：若自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>大于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，则自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值-<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>，并使该名同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When a companion is knocked down: If this unit's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> is higher than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, it loses <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color> and causes that companion's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>

C: 可以给任意奇美拉提供经验
E: Can provide Experience to any chimera.

C: 同伴被击倒时：使<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力最高的1名同伴<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When a companion is knocked down: Causes the <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP of 1 companion with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 自身受到伤害时：与后1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile behind, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 购买携带有亲卫队徽章的奇美拉时：你最强的车厘比斯使自身和随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个拥有亲卫队徽章的奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When purchasing a chimera with Royal Guard Badge: Grants the strongest Krenabis in the team and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random chimera(s) with Royal Guard Badge <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK.

C: 我有个好朋友！
E: I've got a good friend!

C: 我还有好些杀招没用呢。
E: I've still got plenty of killer moves up my sleeve.

C: 锁定
E: Lock

C: 花火：揭示橡木鸣蛀之梦
E: Sparkle: Unveiling the Dream of Gnawing Oak

C: 分享珍藏的黑天鹅。\n\n「嘘，静下心来看。诸多绚烂的记忆正在流转，让我们一起择选最美丽的一簇如何？或者，同我分享你的记忆…也好。」
E: Black Swan sharing her treasures.\n\n"Shhh, still your heart and watch. Myriad of brilliant memories are flowing by. Let's pick out the most gorgeous one together, shall we? Or perhaps you could... share a memory of yours with me."

C: 尽可能多地在【致幻人鱼】状态下使用<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>叠加强力持续伤害效果并造成大量伤害。若【致幻人鱼】<color=#f29e38ff>即将被击败</color>，可优先使用<color=#f29e38ff>普攻</color>解除【幻身】状态来避免队友受到伤害。
E: Use <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> and stack as many powerful DoT effects as possible while in the "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" state to deal massive DMG. If the "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" is <color=#f29e38ff>about to be defeated</color>, prioritize using <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> to dispel the "Phantom Illusion" state to prevent teammates from taking DMG.

C: 世间的每一个清晨
E: Every Dawn of the World

C: 恢复还要不少时间呢
E: Recovery will take some time

C: 奇美拉对战，实力说话
E: In chimera battles, let your skills speak for themselves

C: 陌生的，忽远忽近的，却总在关键时刻出现在记忆中的
E: Strange, sometimes distant and sometimes close, yet always surfacing in my memories at crucial moments

C: 说个他们的秘密听听？
E: Wanna hear a secret about them?

C: 爽。甚至无需动手，盯着他们就好
E: Fun. Just gotta stare them down, no need to lift a finger

C: 荒潮到临，蝗灾示死
E: Primordial Tide, Swarm of Death

C: 仇心忿火
E: Fire of Vengeance

C: 破心灭道
E: Spirit Breaker

C: 黑天鹅调查黄泉房间中的邀请函，得知其曾为泯灭帮持有。为弄清邀请函易手的原因，黑天鹅尝试探查附着于邀请函上的记忆。
E: Black Swan examined the invitation in Acheron's room, discovering it had previously belonged to the Annihilation Gang. To understand how it had changed hands, she tried to access the memories lingering on it.

C: 在内心深处、虚无的边缘，流萤与自己对话。她想成为一个平凡的女孩子，但这不意味着抛下过去。她可以自己决定，如何看待命运。流萤选择拥抱曾经的「繁育」力量，即使这会让她更快死去。飞萤扑火，是要穿过火焰，点燃自己，照亮身边的所有！
E: In her heart of hearts, at the very edge of the Nihility, Firefly had a talk with herself. She wanted to be a normal girl, but not at the cost of erasing her past. She could decide what her own destiny meant. Firefly chose to embrace her former power from the "Propagation," even if it accelerated her death. Like fyreflies to a flame, she would pass through the fire, set herself alight, and illuminate everyone around her!

C: 知更鸟向猎犬家系成员打听你和流萤的去向，没有得到结果。星期日出现在筑梦边境，将知更鸟带至僻静处交谈。
E: Robin asked the Bloodhound Family members about your and Firefly's whereabouts, but got no results. Sunday appeared in Dream's Edge and took Robin to a quiet place to talk.

C: 流萤从伤痕判断出，AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>绝不是失熵而死。大丽花感知到梦境中出现了几位闯入者，与流萤前往察看。
E: From the scars, Firefly deduced that AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> hadn't died of entropy loss. The Dahlia sensed several intruders in the dreamscape and went to investigate with Firefly.

C: 大丽花称，歌斐木已将自身化作四条「律令」。「繁育」正是「梦主」希望流萤看到的假象，他希望藉此在美梦之中重现「寰宇蝗灾」。
E: The Dahlia stated that Gopher Wood had transformed himself into four "divine laws." The "Propagation" was the illusion that the Dreammaster wanted Firefly to see, hoping to recreate the Swarm Disaster within the sweet dream.

C: 真理医生认为砂金的成功根本不是好运，而是早有缜密规划。砂金并未应答，而是提议去多喝几杯。
E: Dr. Ratio believed Aventurine's success wasn't just good luck, but rather a meticulously planned outcome. Aventurine didn't respond, instead suggesting they go grab a few more drinks.

C: 在「虚构叙事」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Pure Fiction stages

C: 累计在商店消耗#4枚金币
E: Spend a total of #4 Gold Coin(s) in the store

C: 技艺有所提升，获得#2宇宙碎片。
E: Skill improved. Obtain #2 Cosmic Fragment.

C: 获得#2个1-2星奇物，小概率增进技艺。
E: Obtain #2 Curio(s) of 1- to 2-star rarity, with a small chance to improve skill.

C: 火漆祝福。
E: Sealing Wax Blessing.

C: 你这是诡辩！
E: That's just sophistry!

C: 开拓火漆
E: Sealing Wax of Trailblaze

C: 进入区域后，失去<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片。失去该奇物时，获得<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>个随机3星奇物
E: Upon entering a Domain, loses <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments. When losing this Curio, obtains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> random 3-star Curio(s).

C: 神赐珍宝（其三）
E: Divine Treasures (III)

C: 已叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层【死灭本能】。
E: "Mortal Instinct" stacked <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> time(s)

C: 速度提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: SPD increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方角色发动攻击后，消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层充能并对受到攻击的敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>次等同于角色<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的【回味】伤害，消耗到0层时退出该状态。【哀歌】状态下也可累计充能。
E: After an ally character attacks, consume <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> stacks of Charge and deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> instances of "Aftertaste" DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the character's Max HP to the attacked enemy target. Exits this state when stacks are reduced to 0. Charge can still be accumulated while in the "Dirge" state.

C: 冰蚀
E: Glacial Erosion

C: 继续探寻梦主的阴谋
E: Continue to investigate the Dreammaster's schemes

C: 讨论现状
E: Discuss the current situation

C: 探寻梦主掩埋的罪行
E: Expose the Dreammaster's buried crimes

C: 唉…我们原本不必这么「直接」的。
E: ...We didn't have to be this "direct."

C: 太过弱小了，和现实中完全不同。
E: Way too weak. Nothing like in real life.

C: 还是…先不出面了。如果那女孩真是外来者，对我而言，这是个机会。
E: Better to... stay out of sight for now. If that girl really is an outsider, this could be my chance.

C: 或者，我们也先回现实一趟，联系上银狼再说。
E: Or we could head back to reality first and get in touch with Silver Wolf.

C: 太好了，{F#她}{M#他}也没事……
E: Great, {F#s}he's okay too...

C: 那些忆质的虚像，分明是她从忆域潜入匹诺康尼时留下的。但这倒也无妨，那位黑天鹅犯下的错误，让流萤拥有了充分的时间。
E: Those memoria illusions were clearly left behind when she infiltrated Penacony from the Memory Zone. But that hardly matters. Because of Black Swan's blunder, Firefly gained the precious time she needed.

C: 梦见那些因你而死的人？
E: of those slain by your hand?

C: 怎么…会……
E: How... can this... be...

C: 呵，看来你窥视了很久嘛，但在我们即将取得进展时，你才「姗姗来迟」——不可信的，究竟是谁呢？
E: Heh, seems you've been watching for quite a while, yet you only show up "fashionably late" when we're about to make progress... Who's the untrustworthy one here, I wonder?

C: 它将悄无声息地蔓延，立刻，就会将她见到我的记忆全部焚毁。她会认为自己从未来过这里。
E: It will spread silently, and in an instant, it will burn away all her memories of seeing me. She'll believe she was never here.

C: 向往自由之人，将会见到原始梦境的样貌；执念难消之人，或许会接触到某些特殊的梦泡。
E: Those who yearn for freedom will witness the form of the Primordial Dreamscape, those consumed by obsession might encounter certain special dream bubbles.

C: 随后，在一位虚构史学家的指引下，你们见证了「钟表匠」米哈伊尔的一生。
E: Then, guided by a History Fictionologist, you witnessed the life of the Watchmaker Mikhail.

C: 我们言尽于此。动手吧，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六道灵魂已梦见这一刻太多次了……
E: Well, that's where our conversation ends. Go ahead. The <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> souls of the Oak Family have dreamed of this moment too many times...

C: 「秩序」星神？
E: The Aeon of Order?

C: 想来，也只有「结盟玉兆」能做到了。
E: Looks like the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath will be the only solution.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而如果失败了，梦境最终会与现实完全融合，她的死亡就会成为事实。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But if you fail, the dreamscape will ultimately merge completely with reality, and her death will become a fact.</color>

C: 不知为何，母亲试着安抚我和哥哥时，却选择了哼唱一段曲调。
E: But for some reason, my mother chose to hum a song when she tried to comfort me and my brother.

C: 拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔
E: Mikhail Char Legwork

C: 这能代表什么？
E: What does that mean?

C: 星核猎手说，你是能转动时间，予其意义的人；你也是能够拨转命运，成全缺憾的人。
E: The Stellaron Hunters say you are the one who can turn the wheels of time and give it meaning, that you are the one who can alter destiny and make whole what is incomplete.

C: 我会寻回，遗失的一切。
E: I will find everything that was lost.

C: 门关月是一年的起点。在这一月，人们会抛弃不再需要的身外之物，烧毁与带来羁绊之人相关的东西，宣告斩断过去、直面未来。
E: The Month of Gate marks the beginning of a year. During this month, people discard possessions they no longer need, burn items connected to those they were bonded with, declaring a break from the past and facing the future head-on.

C: 真蛰虫肆虐的年代，虫群分泌粘液连接被侵蚀殆尽的星体，织就一张又一张连亘数光年的巨网。
E: In the era ravaged by True Sting, the Swarm secreted mucus connecting corroded celestial bodies, weaving massive nets spanning light-years across space.

C: 自动钢琴被猩红色的荒草吞没，琴键残缺，零星、生涩地发出走调的单音。
E: The automatic piano was engulfed by crimson-colored wild grass. Its keys were damaged and missing, sporadically and stiffly emitting discordant single notes.

C: 小凯撒，耍赖皮！那个能力也太无敌啦！不过，听了这么多，小灰应该快明白了吧？
E: Little Imperator, that's so unfair! That ability is way too overpowered! But hey, after hearing all this, Little Gray must be getting it now, right?

C: 对吧对吧？我也这样觉得。乌拉尼娅想让「天空」看到，奥赫玛的余晖中，人们仍然团结，愿以信念与勇气来捍卫新世界的曙光。
E: Right, right? Urania feels the same. Urania wants the "Sky" to see that, in Okhema's afterglow, people still stand united, ready to guard the dawn of a new world with their faith and courage.

C: 幻身
E: Phantom Illusion

E: Each stage features three difficulty levels of challenges: <color=#f29e38ff>"Easy"</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>"Hard"</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>"Nightmare"</color>.
